title: 假日旅途中的意外帮助
sentences: Tom and Anna wait on a chair.
They need an adult's advice about a holiday trip.
The map is missing, but Anna finds a note.
The note gives advice about rain, so they read it.
Tom asks an adult about the road while Anna moves the chair.
The adult writer reads the note and draws.
He draws the trip on the map, and Anna checks the road.
The chair is free when the train arrives.
The writer gives advice before they leave.
They begin the holiday trip with his map.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在椅子上等待。
他们需要一位成年人提供关于假日旅行的建议。
地图不见了，但安娜找到一张纸条。
纸条给出了关于下雨的建议，所以他们读了它。
汤姆向成年人询问道路，安娜则移动椅子。
成年作家读了纸条并画了图。
他在地图上画出旅行路线，安娜检查道路。
火车到达时，椅子空了出来。
作家在他们离开前给出建议。
他们带着他的地图开始假日旅行。

title: 拱门下的表格和蚂蚁
sentences: Tom and Anna sit under the arch.
They finish a colour form.
The blank form has an ant, so Tom looks up.
Tom is able to draw, but the ant climbs onto his head.
Anna moves the form away, and Tom waits.
Tom is able to brush the ant from his head.
The ant marks the form, so its colour changes.
Anna adds blue colour, and it becomes a garden.
They carry the form under the arch; the teacher sees the ant.
Tom touches his head, and the teacher smiles.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在拱门下。
他们完成一张彩色表格。
空白表格上有一只蚂蚁，所以汤姆抬起了头。
汤姆能够画画，但蚂蚁爬到了他的头上。
安娜把表格移开，汤姆等着。
汤姆能够把蚂蚁从头上拂走。
蚂蚁在表格上留下印记，所以颜色变了。
安娜加上蓝色，图画变成了一座花园。
他们把表格带到拱门下；老师看见了蚂蚁。
汤姆摸了摸头，老师笑了。

title: 盒子里的一顿饭
sentences: Tom and Anna sit under the arch.
A warm meal is ready in the box.
The meal is for them, not the ant, so the box stays closed.
Part of it is in a box.
Tom tries to be brave, but the box will not open.
Anna uses humour to make him smile.
Humour is part of their plan.
The key is by the box.
The box opens, and the meal is for all.
They are happy to be together by the box.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在拱门下。
一顿热饭已经为他们准备好了。
这顿饭是给他们的，不是给蚂蚁的。
其中一部分放在一个关着的盒子里。
汤姆努力鼓起勇气，可盒子就是打不开。
安娜用幽默逗汤姆笑。
她的幽默也是他们计划的一部分。
钥匙就在桌子旁边。
盒子打开了，饭是给大家的。
他们很高兴能在一起。

title: 门边的表格
sentences: Tom and Anna share a room with a box.
That box hides a red book and form.
Anna can say that the form is missing.
Tom looks by the table, but finds nothing.
They walk from the table with a key.
Anna can say that the key is right.
Tom opens the box with Anna.
The book is inside, but the form is below.
They take the form from the box.
Tom puts the book by it, and they leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜共用一个房间，房间里有个盒子。
盒子里藏着一本红书和一张表格。
安娜可以说，表格不见了。
汤姆在桌子旁边找，却什么也没找到。
他们带着钥匙从桌边走开。
安娜可以说，钥匙就在这里。
汤姆和安娜一起打开了盒子。
书在里面，但表格压在下面。
他们从盒子里拿出表格。
汤姆把书放在表格旁边，两人离开了。

title: 谁来拿红色的书
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive; all children wait.
Who will get the red book?
Tom or Anna will open the box.
All watch as Anna finds a key.
The lock is stiff, but Anna tries.
Who will get it if the key works?
Tom or Anna can lift the lid.
Anna opens it, and Tom will get the book.
All clap as they see the red cover.
They get food, and all leave together.
translations: 汤姆和安娜到达时，所有孩子都在等。
谁会拿到那本红书？
汤姆或安娜会打开盒子。
大家看着安娜找到一把钥匙。
锁很紧，但安娜还是试了试。
如果钥匙有用，谁会拿到它？
汤姆或安娜都可以抬起盖子。
安娜打开盒子，汤姆就拿到了书。
大家看到红色封面时都拍起手来。
他们拿上食物，所有人一起离开。

title: 送到楼上的食物
sentences: Tom and Anna have some food.
They need to take it up.
If Tom carries it, Anna takes some bread.
The box is heavy, so Tom stops.
Anna takes food out; it is light.
When they reach the room, the door is closed.
They need a key, but Tom looks.
If Anna finds it, they can go in, so they hurry.
When she returns, Tom can take the box up.
They share some food with the ant.
translations: 汤姆和安娜有一些食物。
他们需要把食物拿上楼。
如果汤姆来搬，安娜就拿一些面包。
盒子很重，所以汤姆停了下来。
安娜拿出一些食物，盒子就变轻了。
他们到房间时，门关着。
他们需要钥匙，所以汤姆找了起来。
如果安娜找到钥匙，他们就能进去。
她回来时，汤姆把盒子搬了上去。
他们和蚂蚁分享了一些食物。

title: 房间里的两个盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna pack two boxes for a day outside.
The other box is for next year.
They can take only one box out.
Tom wants to give Anna the small box.
Then the small box breaks beside the door.
Anna can give Tom the other box instead.
They carry the other box out, but it is heavy.
The other box can wait until next year, so they leave it.
If Tom takes only the small bag out, they can leave.
Then they leave the room together.
translations: 汤姆和安娜收拾好两个箱子，准备到外面待一天。
另一个箱子是明年要用的。
他们只能把一个箱子拿出去。
汤姆想把小箱子给安娜。
可是小箱子在门边坏掉了。
安娜可以把另一个箱子给汤姆。
他们把另一个箱子搬出去，但它很重。
另一个箱子可以留到明年再用。
汤姆只把小包拿了出去。
然后他们一起离开了房间。

title: 新盒子的打开方法
sentences: Tom and Anna find a new box by the room door.
The box is very heavy, and they may need help.
First, Anna asks how it opens.
Tom tries the lid, but no key appears.
They do not have any tools, so Anna waits.
First, Anna looks at the new lock.
She shows Tom how to lift it with a card.
The box may open if they push together.
They find any small tool, and the very old lock moves.
When the new box opens, they carry it inside.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在房门旁发现了一个新盒子。
盒子很重，他们可能需要帮助。
安娜先问盒子怎么打开。
汤姆试着掀盖子，但没有找到钥匙。
他们手边没有任何工具。
安娜先查看新锁。
她向汤姆示范如何用卡片抬起锁。
如果一起用力，盒子可能会打开。
他们找到一件小工具，那个很旧的锁终于动了。
新盒子打开了，他们把它搬进房间。

title: 门后的下行路线
sentences: Tom and Anna stand by a closed door.
A narrow way leads down between the room and stairs.
Anna feels well, but Tom worries about the steps.
If the door is locked, they wait because it is safe.
After Anna finds a key, Tom opens it.
The way down is between two walls.
Tom walks slowly, but Anna walks well.
They reach the bottom because the way is safe.
After they rest, Tom looks back at the door.
The way is still between the room and the stairs down.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在一扇关着的门旁。
一条窄路在房间和楼梯之间向下延伸。
安娜感觉很好，但汤姆担心那些台阶。
他们等着，因为门锁着。
安娜找到钥匙后，汤姆打开了门。
向下的路在两面墙之间。
汤姆慢慢走，安娜却走得很好。
因为这条路很安全，他们到达了底部。
休息后，汤姆回头看了看那扇门。
这条路仍在房间和向下的楼梯之间。

title: 穿过房间的红盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna find a red box over the table.
It is not even, and it is still open.
Tom walks through the room.
Such a large box cannot fit by the door.
If Anna sends Tom back, he gets a cloth.
The box is over the table when he returns.
They put a board through the handles, but it is not even.
Tom goes back, and Anna holds the box, so it stays still.
Such a heavy box needs two.
They move it over the table and leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜发现桌子上方有一个红盒子。
盒子不平，而且还开着。
汤姆穿过房间。
这么大的盒子无法从门边通过。
安娜让汤姆回去拿一块布。
他回来时，盒子在桌子上方。
他们把木板穿过把手，但木板并不平。
汤姆回去，安娜扶住盒子。
这么重的盒子需要两个人来搬。
他们把盒子移过桌子，然后离开。

title: 旧学校里的盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at an old school.
The government plans to repair the last classroom.
Tom wants to put a red box inside.
The door is closed, so the plan cannot work.
If Anna asks the school guard, he can help.
When the government sends a key, Tom can put the box inside.
The old room begins to work as a store.
They clean the last shelf before lunch.
The new store will work for the school.
Tom puts the box down, and the government thanks them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到一所旧学校。
政府计划修缮最后一间教室。
汤姆想把一个红盒子放进去。
门关着，所以计划无法进行。
安娜向学校的门卫求助。
政府送来一把钥匙，汤姆就能把盒子放进去。
旧房间开始作为储藏室使用。
他们在午饭前清理了最后一层架子。
新储藏室将为学校继续工作。
汤姆把盒子放下，政府向他们表示感谢。

title: 寻找同一本书
sentences: Tom and Anna need the same book for class.
The library system says where it is.
But the book is not on that shelf.
They look under tables while the room grows quiet.
The search can seem difficult without a plan.
After Tom checks the return box, Anna checks the system.
She finds the same book there with a note.
The note shows where the search can seem clear.
Tom says the find is great, and they smile.
They need the book, so they take the great find to class.
translations: 汤姆和安娜需要同一本书上课。
图书馆系统显示了书的位置。
但书不在那个书架上。
他们在桌子下寻找，房间渐渐安静。
没有计划时，寻找似乎很困难。
汤姆检查归还箱后，安娜又查看了系统。
她在那里找到了同一本书和一张纸条。
纸条说明原来的书架位置在哪里。
汤姆说这次发现很棒，两人都笑了。
他们需要这本书，于是把它带去了课堂。

title: 家人的房间
sentences: Tom and Anna help a family move in.
One part of the room is for boxes.
A high shelf holds a group of boxes.
Anna sees a number on the largest box.
The family needs that box, but it is too high.
Tom brings a chair while Anna makes much space.
Because the group works together, Tom reaches the shelf.
He gives Anna the box, and she reads the number.
The box belongs to another part of the house.
Much of the room is clear after the family sits.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助一家人搬进一所房子。
房间的一部分用来放箱子。
高架子上放着一组小箱子。
安娜看见最大的箱子上有一个数字。
这家人需要那个箱子，但它太高了。
汤姆搬来椅子，安娜同时腾出很多空间。
因为大家一起合作，汤姆够到了架子。
他把箱子递给安娜，她读出了数字。
这个箱子属于房子的另一部分。
房间的大部分空了，这家人坐了下来。

title: 房子里的红盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna carry a red box to a house.
They want to keep it inside.
The company owns the house, so they need a key.
Anna calls the company while Tom waits.
The company is against their plan, but Anna calls again.
After a worker arrives, they keep the box outside.
While Tom checks the room, Anna calls again.
The worker is not against the plan now.
The company lets them keep the box in the house.
They close the door and leave the house.
translations: 汤姆和安娜把一个红盒子搬到一所房子。
他们想把盒子留在里面。
公司拥有这所房子，所以他们需要钥匙。
安娜给公司打电话，汤姆在旁边等待。
公司反对他们的计划，但安娜再次打了电话。
工作人员到来后，他们把盒子留在外面。
汤姆查看房间时，安娜再次给公司打电话。
工作人员现在不再反对这个计划。
公司让他们把盒子留在房子里。
他们关上门，离开了房子。

title: 门边的钥匙
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive in a country with a box.
They need a place.
A man holds a key in his hand.
Anna can talk while Tom holds the box.
He will not let them enter.
Anna asks for help because the box is heavy, but he listens.
After they talk to the office, he checks the place.
The office says the country can help.
The man can let Tom put the box in a safe place.
They talk, thank him, and leave with the key in hand.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着一个盒子来到一个新国家。
他们需要找个地方存放盒子。
一名男子手里拿着一把钥匙。
安娜和他交谈，汤姆则抱着盒子。
他不让他们进入那间房。
安娜请求帮助，因为盒子很重，但他愿意听。
他们和办公室交谈后，男子查看了这个地方。
办公室说，这个国家可以帮助访客。
男子让汤姆把盒子放在安全的地方。
他们又和他交谈，向他道谢，手里拿着钥匙离开。

title: 不同的计划
sentences: Tom and Anna have a different plan.
They want to start a reading club.
The light is off in the room.
Every person must see the point on a notice.
Tom tries to turn the old switch.
Because the light stays off, Anna checks the cable.
She finds a different switch behind the box.
Every person waits while Anna checks the point again.
After Tom tries to turn the switch, the light starts.
The light is on, so their different plan can start.
translations: 汤姆和安娜有一个不同的计划。
他们想开办一个读书会。
房间里的灯关着。
每个人都必须看清通知上的要点。
汤姆试着转动旧开关。
因为灯一直关着，安娜检查了电线。
她在箱子后面找到另一个不同的开关。
每个人等待时，安娜再次检查要点。
汤姆转动开关后，灯亮了。
灯亮着，所以他们不同的计划可以开始。

title: 周末前的游戏
sentences: Tom and Anna plan a play for the end of the week.
They need the right room before Friday.
A question about the room stops them.
Tom checks the key while Anna asks the guard.
The guard gives them the right room, but the lights are off.
Before the play, Anna moves two chairs.
Tom reads the question on the notice again.
At the end of the week, the play begins.
The children say the room is right for the play.
The question has an answer, so they smile.
translations: 汤姆和安娜计划在本周末演一场戏。
他们需要在星期五前找到合适的房间。
一个关于房间的问题让他们停了下来。
汤姆检查钥匙，安娜则询问门卫。
门卫给了他们合适的房间，但灯关着。
演出前，安娜搬开了两把椅子。
汤姆又读了一遍通知上的问题。
到了周末，演出开始了。
孩子们说这个房间很适合演出。
问题有了答案，所以他们都笑了。

title: 把盒子移到另一边
sentences: Tom and Anna need to move a box to the other side.
A fact on the box says it is safe.
They have one month to finish the job.
Tom can run, but Anna walks quite slowly.
The box will not move near the door.
Anna checks the other side, so Tom can run back.
The fact is quite clear because the door is too small.
After the month ends, they find a wider door.
They move the box through it together.
Both sides are clear, and they finish.
translations: 汤姆和安娜需要把箱子移到另一边。
箱子上的一个事实说明它是安全的。
他们有一个月完成这项工作。
汤姆可以跑，安娜却走得很慢。
箱子在门边怎么也动不了。
安娜查看另一边，所以汤姆跑了回来。
这个事实很清楚：门太小了。
一个月结束时，他们找到了更宽的门。
他们一起把箱子搬了过去。
两边都清理好了，他们完成了任务。

title: 重新制作招牌
sentences: Tom and Anna help a small business change its sign.
The old sign is long, but its message is important.
Anna has one good eye for colour.
Tom wants more power for the small light.
The business cannot open, so they check the sign.
The new message is important, and the change is simple.
Anna uses her eye because the wire is dark.
Tom gives the light more power.
The sign is no longer long, and the business opens.
After the change helps the shop, they go home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助一家小店更换招牌。
旧招牌很长，但上面的信息很重要。
安娜有一只善于观察颜色的眼睛。
汤姆需要更多电力来点亮小灯。
商店无法开门，所以他们检查招牌。
新信息很重要，这次更换也很简单。
安娜用眼睛找到了一根深色电线。
汤姆给小灯增加了电力。
招牌不再那么长，商店也开门了。
更换帮助了商店后，他们回家了。

title: 关于水的故事
sentences: Tom and Anna hear a story about a young swimmer.
The swimmer's mother needs clean water.
Her interest in the river brings people together.
They need money because a small pump is broken.
Tom reads the story, but the pump will not work.
Anna asks the mother about the water.
The young swimmer shows them a safe place by the river.
Their interest grows, so they collect money.
The story ends when clean water reaches the house.
The mother thanks them, and the children smile.
translations: 汤姆和安娜听到了一个关于年轻游泳者的故事。
游泳者的母亲需要干净的水。
她对河流的兴趣把大家聚到了一起。
一个小水泵坏了，所以他们需要钱。
汤姆读着故事，但水泵就是无法工作。
安娜向母亲询问水的情况。
年轻的游泳者带他们来到河边一处安全的地方。
他们的兴趣越来越浓，于是开始筹钱。
干净的水流进房子时，故事有了结局。
母亲向他们道谢，孩子们也笑了。

title: 早早开始的工作
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a school before the early lesson.
The school wants to improve the development of a garden.
Its first level is low, though the children are kind.
A second plan puts seeds near the wall.
Tom starts early, but the soil is hard.
Anna checks the level of water.
The children are kind, so they help carry soil.
The garden's development begins after the second plan.
Though the first plants are small, they grow.
The new level looks good, and the children continue.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在早课前参观一所学校。
学校想改善一座花园的建设。
花园的第一个高度很低，尽管孩子们很友善。
第二个计划把种子放到墙边。
汤姆很早开始工作，但土壤很硬。
安娜检查水的高度。
孩子们很友善，所以帮忙搬土。
第二个计划实施后，花园开始建设。
虽然第一批植物很小，它们还是长大了。
新的高度看起来不错，孩子们继续照料。

title: 走向远处的市场
sentences: Tom and Anna walk to a market far from town.
They have little time, but the visit is possible.
The market's effect on the village matters to them.
A long road can lead them there.
Anna checks the map while Tom carries water.
The far market is closed, so they ask a seller.
The seller says the market can lead to new work.
They have little money, but a visit is possible.
The effect is clear when more people arrive.
They return together after the market.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走到离城镇很远的市场。
他们时间很少，但这次拜访是有可能的。
市场对村子的影响与他们有关。
一条长路可以带他们到那里。
安娜查看地图，汤姆则拿着水。
远处的市场关着，所以他们询问一位卖家。
卖家说，这个市场可以带来新的工作。
他们钱很少，但这次拜访仍然可能完成。
更多人到来时，影响就清楚了。
他们在市场结束后一起回去。

title: 朋友和父亲
sentences: Tom meets his friend Anna outside a clinic.
Her father has an idea for a small garden.
He writes his name on a box.
They need one hour to finish.
The box is light, but Tom hurts his body.
Anna's father helps, so Tom rests.
The friend has another idea, and Anna writes the name.
After an hour, Tom moves his body carefully.
The father's name is on the box.
Tom thanks his friend before they leave.
translations: 汤姆在诊所外遇到了他的朋友安娜。
安娜的父亲有一个小花园的想法。
他把自己的名字写在一个箱子上。
他们需要一个小时完成这件事。
箱子很轻，但汤姆的身体受了伤。
安娜的父亲帮忙，所以汤姆休息了。
这位朋友又有了一个想法，安娜写下了名字。
一个小时后，汤姆小心地移动身体。
父亲的名字就在箱子上。
汤姆向朋友道谢，然后他们离开。

title: 法律书上的一行字
sentences: Tom and Anna find a line in a law book.
The line sounds political, so Anna reads it twice.
Almost everyone in the room knows the law.
Tom asks who wrote it, but nobody has ever seen the name.
The idea is among notes in the room.
Anna checks every page while Tom looks at the line.
The political note explains why the law changed.
Almost every mark is clear among the notes.
They do not ever lose the page.
After the line, they understand the law in the room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在法律书里发现了一行字。
这行字听起来很有政治意味，所以安娜读了两遍。
房间里几乎每个人都知道这部法律。
汤姆问是谁写的，但没人曾经见过这个名字。
这个想法藏在旧笔记之间。
安娜查看每一页，汤姆则看着那一行字。
政治笔记解释了法律为什么改变。
笔记之间几乎每个记号都很清楚。
他们不会永远弄丢那一页。
这一行字帮助他们理解了法律。

title: 修好道路的计划
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a bad road after rain.
The road has a deep hole near town.
They face the authority at the gate.
The officer looks at Anna's face.
Because Tom and Anna work together, they produce a plan.
Anna shows the bad part, so the officer listens.
While they work together, they produce a safe path.
The officer sees Anna's face and agrees.
The road is repaired after the authority helps.
They leave together when the road is safe.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在雨后查看一条糟糕的道路。
道路在城镇附近有一个深坑。
他们在门口面对主管部门。
那位工作人员看着安娜的脸。
因为他们一起工作，所以制定了一个计划。
安娜指出坏的地方，工作人员便听了起来。
他们一起工作时，修出了一条安全的路。
工作人员看着安娜的脸，同意了计划。
主管部门提供帮助后，道路得到了修理。
道路安全后，他们一起离开。

title: 办公室里的迟到计划
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive late at the office that day.
The general offers them a job after the war.
Because the office rate is high, Anna waits.
Anna reads the offer while Tom checks the office.
Then the general says the rate can change.
Tom is late again, but Anna is ready.
The war changed the town, so the office needs help.
They offer a lower rate after the meeting.
In general, the office plan is fair.
Tom and Anna leave the office before the day ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜迟到了才到达办公室。
战争结束后，将军给他们提供了一份工作。
表格上的费率太高了。
安娜阅读提议，汤姆查看办公室。
将军说费率可以改变。
汤姆又迟到了，但安娜已经准备好了。
战争改变了城镇，所以办公室需要帮助。
会议后，他们提出了一个更低的费率。
总的来说，这个计划很公平。
汤姆和安娜在夜晚前离开办公室。

title: 广场上的完整景色
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at a public square before noon.
They have a full minute to choose a place.
Because a low wall blocks their view, they wait.
The reason is a new sign near the gate.
Anna walks around it while Tom checks the view.
After one minute, Tom sees the public garden.
The full view helps them find the low door.
They ask a guard for the reason.
The public path opens at the gate, so they enter.
The view is full and clear by the door.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在中午前来到一个公共广场。
他们有完整的一分钟选择地点。
因为矮墙挡住了视线，他们只好等待。
原因是大门旁有一块新牌子。
安娜绕过牌子，汤姆查看景色。
一分钟后，汤姆看见了公共花园。
完整的景色帮助他们找到了矮门。
他们向一名门卫询问原因。
公共小路打开了，所以他们走了进去。
最后，景色完整而清楚。

title: 控制落下的盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna watch a box near the market.
The box may fall, so Anna wants control.
A sign shows the price of the box.
The society uses the box for a public event.
Tom tries to stop it, but the rope breaks.
Anna takes control while Tom can watch the rope.
The price is low, so the society can repair it.
When the box starts to fall, Tom pulls it back.
They stop the box before it hits the ground.
The society thanks them for their control.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在市场附近看着一个箱子。
箱子可能掉下来，所以安娜想控制它。
一块牌子显示了箱子的价格。
协会要在公共活动中使用这个箱子。
汤姆试图阻止它，但绳子断了。
安娜控制住箱子，汤姆则看着绳子。
价格很低，所以协会可以修理它。
箱子开始下落时，汤姆把它拉了回来。
箱子撞到地面前，他们把它停住了。
协会感谢他们控制住了箱子。

title: 学习历史的路
sentences: Tom and Anna walk to a museum after class.
The education process begins with a history lesson.
A painting is in the wrong position.
Tom asks a guide about the process.
The guide moves the art while Anna reads history.
They walk to the next room, but the sign is low.
Because position matters, the education lesson continues.
After the guide checks the art, the display is right.
The process is clear, so they remember history.
Anna says the education was worth the walk.
translations: 汤姆和安娜下课后走到博物馆。
教育过程从一节历史课开始。
一幅画放在了错误的位置。
汤姆向导游询问这个过程。
导游移动艺术品，安娜同时阅读历史资料。
他们走到下一个房间，但牌子很低。
因为位置很重要，教育课程继续进行。
导游检查艺术品后，展品摆对了。
过程很清楚，所以他们记住了历史。
安娜说，这次教育值得走这一趟。

title: 把盒子送到门边
sentences: Tom and Anna need to send a box to the station.
The box has value, so they check the order.
A strong force pushes air through the open door.
Anna can act quickly while Tom holds the box.
The order is wrong, but they can send it again.
The box's value is clear after Tom checks the label.
A sudden force moves the air around them.
Anna can act again and close the door.
They send the box in the right order.
The delivery has value because they acted together.
translations: 汤姆和安娜需要把一个箱子寄到车站。
箱子很有价值，所以他们检查订单。
强大的力量把空气推过敞开的门。
安娜迅速行动，汤姆则扶住箱子。
订单有误，但他们可以再次寄出。
汤姆检查标签后，箱子的价值很清楚。
突然的力量让周围的空气流动起来。
安娜再次行动，关上了门。
他们按照正确的顺序寄出箱子。
这次运送很有价值，因为他们一起完成了工作。

title: 穿过街道的决定
sentences: Tom and Anna stand across a busy street.
They have enough time to cross safely.
A decision about the foot path affects everyone.
The bridge leads to an industry area.
Tom watches the street while Anna checks the bridge.
They have enough light, so they cross.
The decision is hard because the foot path is low.
After the industry closes, the street is quiet.
They walk across together, and Anna holds Tom's hand.
The foot path makes the decision easier.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在一条繁忙街道的对面。
他们有足够的时间安全过街。
关于人行道的决定会影响所有人。
这座桥通向工业区。
汤姆观察街道，安娜则检查桥。
他们有足够的灯光，所以走了过去。
这个决定很难，因为人行道很低。
工业区关门后，街道安静了。
他们一起过街，安娜牵着汤姆的手。
这条人行道让决定变得更容易。

title: 教堂里的音乐
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a church to hear music.
A paper near the door makes the plan clear.
Anna keeps one idea in mind.
Tom says the church is full, but they wait.
The music starts, and Anna feels love for the song.
Tom reads the paper while Anna keeps the plan in mind.
The clear music helps them hear every note.
After the music ends, they leave the church.
Love for the town brings them back.
The paper gives a clear answer, so they smile.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走进教堂，准备听音乐。
门边的一张纸让计划变得清楚。
安娜把一个想法记在心里。
汤姆说教堂坐满了，但他们还是等着。
音乐响起，安娜爱上了这首歌。
汤姆读着纸张，安娜把计划记在心里。
清晰的音乐帮助他们听见每个音符。
音乐结束后，他们离开了教堂。
他们对小镇的爱让他们再次回来。
纸张给出了清楚的答案，所以他们笑了。

title: 建筑里的旧故事
sentences: Tom and Anna visit an old building.
Its condition is poor, but the walls still stand.
A sense of history fills the room beside a map.
The nation built it after a war.
A sign describes a death near the building.
Anna can cut a paper map while Tom reads.
The map helps them understand the nation.
Because the condition is poor, the old building is unsafe.
After Tom decides to cut the map, they find the story of the death.
The sense of the map stays with them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一座旧建筑。
它的状况很差，但墙还站着。
房间里充满了历史感。
这个国家在一场战争后建造了它。
一块牌子介绍了建筑附近的一场死亡。
安娜剪开一张纸地图，汤姆则阅读。
地图帮助他们了解这个国家。
糟糕的状况让旧建筑变得不安全。
汤姆剪开地图后，他们找到了那场死亡的故事。
这个地方的感觉一直留在他们心里。

title: 小镇里的语言
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a town library.
They share their experience with a new language.
The first lesson is hard, but the teacher is kind.
Anna asks what sort of language the town uses.
Tom takes care of the notes.
Their experience grows while they practice.
Because the words are hard, the teacher asks for care.
After the lesson, they sort the papers.
The town welcomes the new language.
Tom and Anna leave with useful experience.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观小镇的图书馆。
他们与一种新语言分享自己的经验。
第一课很难，但老师很友善。
安娜询问小镇使用的是哪种语言。
汤姆负责照看笔记。
他们练习时，经验越来越多。
因为单词很难，老师要求大家细心。
课程结束后，他们把纸张分类。
小镇欢迎这门新语言。
汤姆和安娜带着有用的经验离开。

title: 田野里的信
sentences: Tom and Anna find a special letter in a field.
A certain line gives the committee hope.
The field is quiet, but the letter is wet.
Anna takes the letter to a committee office.
The committee wants to know who sent it.
Tom reads the certain line while Anna dries the paper.
The special message gives them hope.
After the field dries, they search for the sender.
The letter leads them to a small house.
Their hope feels real, so they smile.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在田野里发现了一封特别的信。
一行确定的话给委员会带来了希望。
田野很安静，但信被弄湿了。
安娜把信带到委员会办公室。
委员会想知道是谁寄来的。
汤姆阅读确定的那一行，安娜把纸晾干。
这条特别的信息给了他们希望。
田野变干后，他们寻找寄信人。
信把他们带到一所小房子。
希望变成了现实，所以他们笑了。

title: 把灯拉亮
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a meeting in a hall.
A strong light hangs above the door.
Tom feels his heart beat as people arrive.
Anna can pull the light cord, but it stays off.
The speaker's voice is low, so nobody hears.
Tom can pull the cord again while Anna checks the meeting.
The strong light comes on after the cord moves.
Anna speaks, and her voice fills the room.
After the meeting, Tom feels calm in his heart.
They leave the room together.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大厅准备一场会议。
门上方挂着一盏强灯。
人们到来时，汤姆感觉心脏在跳动。
安娜拉动灯绳，但灯没有亮。
说话人的声音很低，所以没人听见。
汤姆再次拉绳子，安娜检查会议情况。
强灯亮了起来。
安娜开口说话，她的声音充满房间。
会议结束后，汤姆感到心里平静。
他们一起离开。

title: 空地上的活动
sentences: Tom and Anna visit open land for an event.
Tom and Anna join a free event for a military family.
Tom's son wants to watch.
The cause of the event is a new bridge, so Tom waits.
Anna finds a safe place on the land.
The military group supports the event, so Anna smiles.
The son is free after school, so he joins.
The cause becomes clear when music starts.
The event ends, and they leave the land.
The son thanks them before going home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到一片空地参加活动。
一场为军人家庭举办的免费活动开始了。
汤姆的儿子想去观看。
活动的起因是一座新桥。
安娜在空地上找到了一个安全的地方。
军人小组支持这场活动。
放学后儿子有空，所以他也加入了。
音乐响起时，原因变得清楚了。
活动结束后，他们离开了空地。
儿子向他们道谢，然后回家。

title: 舞台上的交易
sentences: Tom and Anna help support a play on stage.
The stage has a wide range of lights.
A local group wants to trade old chairs.
Tom hurts his arm while moving one.
Anna says the plan is true, but the chair is heavy.
The support team checks the stage.
They trade the old chairs for a table.
The range of lights grows wider after repairs.
Tom's arm feels better, so he returns.
The true story ends with the play.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助在舞台上演出的人。
舞台上有一排很宽的灯光。
一个小组想用旧椅子换东西。
汤姆搬椅子时伤到了手臂。
安娜说计划是真的，但椅子很重。
支援小组检查舞台。
他们用旧椅子换来一张桌子。
修理后，灯光照亮了更大的范围。
汤姆的手臂好些了，所以他回来了。
这场真实的故事以演出结束。

title: 经理的记录
sentences: Tom and Anna meet a manager at a store.
The manager needs a record of each account.
The material is short, so they order more.
Tom wants to join the work team.
Anna checks the account while the manager reads.
The record shows the material arrived.
A short delay stops the work, but Tom helps.
The manager asks Anna to join the meeting.
They record the new account after lunch.
The material is ready, so the work ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一家商店见到一位经理。
经理需要每个账户的记录。
材料不够了，所以他们订购更多。
汤姆想加入工作小组。
安娜检查账户，经理则阅读记录。
记录显示材料已经送到。
一个短暂的延误让工作停下，但汤姆帮了忙。
经理请安娜参加会议。
午饭后，他们记录了新账户。
材料准备好了，所以工作结束。

title: 窗边的空间
sentences: Tom and Anna clean a room with a wide window.
Yesterday, the space was full of boxes.
A tax example is on a paper base for Anna.
Tom moves the paper while Anna opens the window.
The example explains why the tax changed, so Anna smiles.
Anna clears the space, so Tom checks the base.
The window shows the street, but boxes remain.
Yesterday, the plan was still useful.
They remove the boxes after the tax example is understood.
The base is clear and the space is ready.
translations: 汤姆和安娜清理一间有宽窗户的房间。
昨天，房间里堆满了箱子。
一张纸的底部写着一个税务例子。
汤姆移动纸张，安娜同时打开窗户。
这个例子解释了税为什么改变。
安娜清出空间，所以汤姆检查底部。
窗户能看见街道，但箱子还在。
昨天的计划仍然有用。
他们理解税务例子后搬走了箱子。
底部清理干净，空间也准备好了。

title: 夜空下的规则
sentences: Tom and Anna watch a star over a field.
A rule says the cover must protect an oil tank.
The quality of the cover is low.
Tom and Anna need to increase its strength.
Anna checks the oil while Tom measures the cover.
The quality starts to increase after they add a new layer.
The star is visible, so they continue.
The rule is clear, but the cover is heavy.
They check the tank and oil again.
The improved cover has good quality around the tank.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在田野上方看星星。
一条规则要求盖子保护油罐。
盖子的质量很低。
他们需要提高它的强度。
安娜检查油，汤姆则测量盖子。
加上一层新材料后，质量提高了。
星星清晰可见，所以他们继续工作。
规则很清楚，但盖子很重。
他们又检查了一遍油。
改好的盖子质量不错。

title: 医院里的照片
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a common hospital room.
They want to hang a picture in a new unit.
A necessary repair keeps the picture off the wall.
The structure of the room needs a safe plan.
Anna moves the table while Tom checks.
The nurse says a common room welcomes visitors after lunch.
A necessary check is complete, so Tom hangs the picture.
The structure is strong, but the unit opens.
The picture stays on the wall, and the room looks bright.
They leave the hospital after thanking the nurse.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入医院的一间普通房间。
他们想把一张照片挂进一个新病区。
一次必要的维修让照片暂时不能挂上墙。
房间的结构需要一个安全的计划。
安娜移动桌子时，汤姆检查医院。
护士说，午饭后普通房间可以接待访客。
必要的检查完成了，所以汤姆挂上了照片。
结构很结实，而且病区开放了。
照片留在墙上，房间看起来很明亮。
他们向护士道谢后离开了医院。

title: 墙上的北方消息
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a room with a bed to read the news.
A bed blocks the wall and the table.
Anna sees a missing detail in the news.
They need the detail before a test.
Tom moves the bed while Anna reads the paper.
The test is on the table, so they check the map.
The wall becomes clear after the bed moves.
News shows a road north, so Anna points.
The detail says the test is for a town in the north.
They replace the bed and leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入一间有床的房间，准备阅读新闻。
一张床挡住了墙和桌子。
新闻中缺少一个细节。
他们需要在测试前找到这个细节。
安娜读报纸时，汤姆移动了床。
测试在桌上，所以他们查看地图。
床移开后，墙面露了出来。
新闻显示一条道路向北延伸。
细节说明测试是关于北方一个小镇的。
他们把床放回去，然后离开房间。

title: 照顾小宝宝
sentences: Tom and Anna find a baby in a private room.
A nurse asks them to give attention.
A small amount of water is beside the baby.
Anna gives the baby a bit of water.
Tom takes one step, but the nurse is away.
The baby needs attention, so Anna calls.
The private room is warm after lunch.
The amount of water is enough.
Tom takes another step, and the baby smiles a bit.
They leave when the nurse returns.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一间私人房间里发现了一个宝宝。
一名护士请他们照看宝宝。
宝宝旁边有少量的水。
安娜给宝宝喝了一点水。
汤姆走了一步，但护士不在。
宝宝需要照看，所以安娜呼叫护士。
午饭后，私人房间很温暖。
水的量足够了。
汤姆又走了一步，宝宝笑了一点。
护士回来时，他们离开了。

title: 树旁的组织
sentences: Tom and Anna visit an organization near the town.
They read a theory about a poor family.
A tree stands beside the property door.
The property has a wide room, but it is empty.
The poor family needs the room after repairs.
Anna studies the theory while Tom measures the room.
The organization opens the wide door, so workers enter.
The tree blocks the old path to the property.
They clear the path, and the organization brings supplies.
The poor family enters the wide room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜拜访小镇附近的一个组织。
他们阅读一篇关于贫困家庭的理论。
一棵树就在房产的门旁。
这处房产有一间宽敞的房间，但里面是空的。
维修后，贫困家庭需要这间房。
安娜研究理论时，汤姆测量房间。
组织打开宽门，所以工人进去了。
树挡住了通往房产的旧路。
他们清理道路，组织带来了物资。
贫困家庭进入了宽敞的房间。

title: 南方办公室的机会
sentences: Tom and Anna travel south to meet Anna's brother.
The road south is open after rain.
Anna ties her hair before they leave.
A board beside the office door shows a chance.
The secretary holds the key while they wait.
Anna's brother waits by the board with a form.
The chance is good, so they enter the office.
The secretary checks the form after Tom reads it.
Anna's hair is wet, but the south road is clear.
Her brother signs, and the secretary gives the key.
translations: 汤姆和安娜向南方旅行去见安娜的兄弟。
下过雨后，向南的道路已经开放。
安娜在出发前扎好了头发。
办公室门边的木板显示着一个机会。
秘书拿着钥匙，而他们在等待。
安娜的兄弟拿着表格在木板旁等候。
机会很好，所以他们进入了办公室。
汤姆读完表格后，秘书检查了它。
安娜的头发湿了，但南方的道路很清楚。
她的兄弟签字后，秘书交出了钥匙。

title: 夏天的种植计划
sentences: Tom and Anna start a simple summer operation.
They make an agreement to water one plant.
The plant is dry, and the summer heat is strong.
Anna's daughter brings water, while Tom checks the soil.
Tom makes a simple plan, but the hose breaks.
Anna's daughter carries water, and Tom looks for help.
The operation continues when a neighbor lends a hose.
They write the agreement on a card.
The plant stands straight, so the plan works.
Tom and Anna leave, and Anna's daughter closes the gate.
translations: 汤姆和安娜开始一项简单的夏日工作。
他们达成协议，要给一株植物浇水。
植物很干，夏日的高温也很强烈。
安娜的女儿带来水，汤姆则检查土壤。
汤姆制定了一个简单计划，但软管坏了。
安娜的女儿提着水，汤姆寻找帮助。
邻居借给他们一根软管后，工作继续了。
他们把协议写在一张卡片上。
植物挺直了，所以计划奏效了。
汤姆和安娜离开了，安娜的女儿关上大门。

title: 未来的医疗房间
sentences: Tom and Anna find an animal on the floor in a current room.
They want medical help for the animal.
The floor is cold, and the animal cannot stand.
Anna fears a loss if help comes late.
Tom calls a medical worker while Anna covers the animal.
The loss would hurt them, but the future looks uncertain.
The worker arrives, so they move the animal from the floor.
The current room has a quiet bed.
Medical care gives the animal a better future.
They leave after the animal rests.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一间当前的房间地板上发现了一只动物。
他们想为这只动物寻找医疗帮助。
地板很冷，动物无法站立。
如果帮助来晚了，安娜担心会有损失。
汤姆呼叫医护人员，安娜同时盖住动物。
这次损失会让他们难过，但未来看起来不确定。
工作人员到了，所以他们把动物从地板上移开。
当前的房间里有一张安静的床。
医疗照顾给了动物一个更好的未来。
动物休息后，他们离开了。

title: 向西寻找休息处
sentences: Tom and Anna see a fire at camp after dark.
They need a map page to reach the house.
The first page is wrong, so Anna checks another.
The map shows a road west.
They need a rest after the long walk.
The fire burns near camp, but the house is dark.
Anna finds the right page while Tom watches the fire.
The purpose is clear after the wrong page is replaced.
They walk west before the sky turns dark.
The purpose is complete after a rest at the house.
translations: 天黑后，汤姆和安娜在营地看到一小堆火。
他们需要一张地图纸才能到达休息屋。
第一页是错的，所以安娜检查了另一页。
地图显示道路向西延伸。
走了很久后，汤姆和安娜需要休息。
火在营地附近燃烧，但房子很暗。
安娜找到正确的纸张，汤姆同时看着火。
错误的纸张被替换后，目的就清楚了。
天空再次变暗前，他们向西走。
在房子休息后，目的完成了。

title: 过去的舞台设计
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a design for the present stage.
Tom will present the design at the show.
A fight begins during rehearsal near the stage door.
The fight interrupts a past scene, but actors stay calm.
Anna uses her knowledge before the actors move.
Tom changes the design while the actors rest.
The top light fails, so the present stage is dark.
Anna fixes the light because she has a simple tool.
The top light works after the past scene returns.
Their knowledge helps finish the design.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为现在的舞台准备一个设计。
他们将在演出中展示这个设计。
排练时，门边开始了一场打斗。
这场打斗打断了过去的一幕，但演员保持冷静。
演员移动前，安娜使用了她的知识。
演员休息时，汤姆修改了设计。
顶部的灯坏了，所以现在的舞台很暗。
安娜用一个简单工具修好了灯。
过去的一幕回来后，顶部的灯亮了。
他们的知识帮助完成了设计。

title: 花园里的商店
sentences: Tom and Anna work in a garden.
They want to open the store after moving a box.
The box may drop when the table moves.
Anna sees blood near the box, so they stop.
Tom can push the box while Anna checks the cut.
The garden is small, but its size is useful.
Anna cleans the blood before they open the store.
Tom can push the box, but it does not drop.
The size of the garden fits the store.
They open the store and leave the garden.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在花园旁的一家商店工作。
他们想在移动箱子后开门营业。
桌子移动时，箱子可能会掉落。
安娜看见箱子附近有血，所以他们停下。
汤姆可以推箱子，安娜同时检查伤口。
花园很小，但它的大小很实用。
他们开店前，安娜清理了血迹。
汤姆可以推箱子，但它没有掉落。
花园的大小适合这家商店。
他们开了商店，然后离开花园。

title: 声音和清单
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a room to read a list.
They need a statement for the meeting.
Natural light falls on the table.
A sound from the door stops their reading.
Anna writes a note about the sound.
Tom has a thought, but the list is missing.
They search the table while the sound continues.
The note gives a clear statement, so Anna smiles.
Natural light shows the list under a book.
Their thought helps them finish before the meeting.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入一个房间阅读清单。
他们需要一份会议声明。
自然光照在桌子上。
门边的声音打断了他们的阅读。
安娜写了一张关于声音的便条。
汤姆有一个想法，但清单不见了。
声音继续时，他们寻找桌子。
便条给出了清楚的声明，所以安娜笑了。
自然光照出书下的清单。
他们的想法帮助他们在会议前完成工作。

title: 向东走向大海
sentences: Tom and Anna walk east toward the sea.
They want to reach the sea before sunset.
A dead tree blocks the path.
The relation between the path and sea is unclear.
They move forward, but the tree remains.
A round stone marks the path near the house.
Tom moves the dead tree while Anna reads the map.
The relation becomes clear, so they walk east.
The round stone points forward toward the sea.
They reach the sea before dark.
translations: 汤姆和安娜向东朝大海走去。
他们想在日落前到达大海。
一棵死树挡住了小路。
小路和大海之间的关系并不清楚。
他们继续向前走，但树还在。
一块圆石在房子附近标记着小路。
汤姆搬开死树，安娜同时查看地图。
关系变清楚了，所以他们向东走。
圆石指向大海前方。
他们在天黑前到达了大海。

title: 车站里的小狗
sentences: Tom and Anna find a dog at the station.
They make a first attempt to help before the train.
The dog has a serious paw problem.
Anna is happy, but the dog refuses water.
Tom fills a cup while Anna calls a nurse.
The first attempt fails because the dog hides.
The nurse arrives at the station, so they wait.
A second attempt gives the dog water.
The serious problem improves after a short rest.
The happy dog drinks from the cup.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在车站发现一只狗。
他们想在火车到来前帮助它。
狗的爪子出了严重问题。
安娜很高兴，但狗不肯喝水。
汤姆装了一杯水，安娜同时叫护士。
第一次尝试失败了，因为狗躲了起来。
护士到了车站，所以他们等待。
第二次尝试让狗喝到了水。
短暂休息后，严重的问题有所好转。
这只快乐的狗喝了杯子里的水。

title: 机器的答案
sentences: Tom and Anna stand by a machine near an office.
They need an answer before the door opens.
A sign says the machine needs a degree check.
Tom says, "Please wait," while Anna reads the paper.
The machine is not ready, so they check the sign.
Anna finds the degree on the paper.
Tom changes the degree, and the machine starts.
The answer is clear after the sign is read.
Please press the button when the machine is ready.
They sign the paper and enter.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在办公室附近的一台机器旁。
他们需要在门打开前找到答案。
一个标志说机器需要检查度数。
汤姆说：“请等一下。”安娜同时读着纸张。
机器还没准备好，所以他们检查标志。
安娜在纸上找到了度数。
汤姆改变度数，机器启动了。
标志读完后，答案很清楚。
请在机器准备好时按下按钮。
他们在纸上签字，然后进入。

title: 科学和行为
sentences: Tom and Anna read a science book.
They want to understand a disease in an animal.
The animal's behaviour changes when the room is quiet.
Its growth is slow, and Anna worries.
An attack starts near the door.
Tom is left by the door while Anna calls.
The doctor says science can help the disease.
The animal is left in a safe room after care.
Its behaviour calms, and growth begins again.
The attack is over, so they leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜阅读一本科学书。
他们想了解动物身上的一种疾病。
房间安静时，动物的行为会改变。
它的生长很慢，安娜很担心。
门边开始了一次攻击。
安娜呼叫时，汤姆留在门边。
医生说科学可以帮助治疗疾病。
照顾之后，动物被留在安全的房间里。
它的行为平静下来，生长也重新开始。
攻击结束了，所以他们离开。

title: 马和军队的表格
sentences: Tom and Anna visit an army horse center.
They need to read a form about the horse.
The horse has a physical problem in one leg.
Anna has a bad feeling, but the nurse checks it.
The leg is cold, so Tom holds the horse.
The army nurse asks about the horse's sex.
After a short rest, the horse feels normal.
The physical problem is small after the check.
Anna's feeling improves, and the horse feels normal.
They record the sex before they leave the army center.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到一所军队马术中心。
他们需要阅读一份关于这匹马的表格。
马的一条腿有身体问题。
安娜感觉不太好，但护士检查了它。
腿很冷，所以汤姆扶着马。
军队护士询问马的性别。
短暂休息后，马感觉正常了。
检查后，身体问题并不严重。
安娜的感觉好转了，马也感觉正常。
他们记录性别，然后离开军队中心。

title: 蓝色玻璃旁的争论
sentences: Tom and Anna visit Anna's sister at a glass shop.
They move a blue box before opening.
A nearby crime makes the sister close the window.
When an argument starts, Tom sees a training gun.
The blue glass box blocks the exit, so Anna calls security.
Anna's sister checks the door, while Tom moves the box.
The guard says the gun is for training.
The crime is unrelated, and the argument ends.
Tom puts the glass beside the blue wall.
Anna's sister opens the shop, but everyone leaves.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到安娜姐姐的玻璃店。
他们在开门前搬走一个蓝色箱子。
附近发生了一起犯罪事件，姐姐因此关上了窗户。
争论开始时，汤姆看见一把训练用枪。
蓝色玻璃箱挡住出口，所以安娜叫了保安。
安娜的姐姐查看门口，汤姆则搬动箱子。
保安说那把枪是训练用的。
犯罪事件与此无关，争论也结束了。
汤姆把玻璃放在蓝色墙边。
安娜的姐姐打开商店，但大家都离开了。

title: 阳光下的歌曲
sentences: Tom and Anna walk toward a park concert.
They want to hear a song before dark.
Tom hurts his leg on the dark path.
The sun is behind clouds, so they stop.
Anna starts a discussion about the route.
The dog makes them laugh, and Tom rests.
The song begins after the sun returns.
The discussion ends, so Tom moves his leg while Anna watches.
The path is not dark now.
They laugh again before the song ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走向公园音乐会。
他们想在天黑前听一首歌。
汤姆在昏暗的小路上伤了腿。
太阳躲在云后，所以他们停下。
安娜开始讨论路线。
狗让他们发笑，汤姆休息了一会儿。
太阳出来后，歌曲开始了。
讨论结束了，所以汤姆活动腿部。
现在小路不再黑了。
歌曲结束前，他们又笑了。

title: 河边的绿色石头
sentences: Tom and Anna stand by a river to measure water.
The river is cold after night rain.
A green stone blocks the path.
The store's profit is low, so they work quickly.
Anna uses a measure while Tom checks the river.
They move the stone, but the water stays cold.
The green stone leaves a mark near the river.
The measure shows enough water for the store.
The profit improves after the store opens.
They leave the river before rain.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在河边测量水。
昨夜下雨后，河水很冷。
一块绿色的石头挡住了小路。
商店的利润很低，所以他们快速工作。
安娜使用量具，汤姆同时检查河水。
他们移开石头，但水仍然很冷。
绿色石头在河边留下了痕迹。
量具显示商店有足够的水。
商店开门后，利润有所提高。
下雨前，他们离开了河边。

title: 专家的座位卡
sentences: Tom and Anna meet an expert before a meeting.
They need to divide seats for guests.
A card shows a memory from the last meeting.
The expert finds one empty seat near the door.
Anna gives Tom a smile while they read the card.
The division is wrong because two guests share a seat.
The expert moves a table, so Tom finds another seat.
The card matches the memory, and the division is clear.
Anna gives another smile when guests arrive.
The expert checks each seat before the meeting.
translations: 会议前，汤姆和安娜遇到一位专家。
他们需要为来宾分配座位。
一张卡片显示上次会议的记忆。
专家在门边找到一个空座位。
他们阅读卡片时，安娜对汤姆微笑。
分配错了，因为两位来宾共用一个座位。
专家移动桌子，所以汤姆找到另一个座位。
卡片符合记忆，分配也清楚了。
来宾到达时，安娜又微笑了。
会议前，专家检查每个座位。

title: 春天的和平游戏
sentences: Tom and Anna meet in spring at a park.
They want to play with a ball before lunch.
A wrong direction leads them away from the field.
Tom feels pain in his leg after walking.
Anna wants peace before they start.
The ball begins to shake in the wind.
Tom holds the ball while Anna checks the map.
They find the direction to the field, so they turn.
The spring air is warm, but pain remains.
Peace returns after Tom rests; Anna can shake the ball again.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在春天的公园见面。
他们想在午饭前玩球。
错误的方向让他们离开了球场。
走了一段路后，汤姆的腿开始疼。
他们开始前，安娜希望保持平静。
风中球开始摇晃。
安娜检查地图时，汤姆拿着球。
他们找到球场的方向，所以转身。
春天空气温暖，但疼痛仍在。
汤姆休息后，平静回来了；安娜可以再次摇球。

title: 图书馆里的深水鱼
sentences: Tom and Anna study a fish in a library.
They need a camera to see its deep habitat.
The fish is in a book about deep water.
The camera has a heavy weight, so Tom lifts it.
Anna marks the page while Tom checks the camera.
They cannot fly the model near the library window.
The weight becomes smaller after Tom removes its case.
The fish appears on the camera, so Anna smiles.
The library keeps the deep-water book safe.
Tom can fly a model before the study ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在图书馆研究一条鱼。
他们需要相机观察鱼的深处栖息地。
鱼在一本关于深水的书里。
相机很重，所以汤姆把它提起来。
安娜标记页面，汤姆同时检查相机。
他们不能在图书馆窗边让模型飞行。
汤姆取下外壳后，重量变小了。
鱼出现在相机上，所以安娜笑了。
图书馆保存着那本深水书。
汤姆可以在学习结束前让小模型飞行。

title: 美丽的岛屿
sentences: Tom and Anna stand at the sea's edge.
They hope to reach a beautiful island.
Trouble blocks the boat, so the crew asks them to wait.
Anna feels fear when the waves rise.
Tom checks the middle, while Anna watches the edge.
The crew moves a rope, but trouble continues.
A sailor fixes it, so the boat leaves.
The beautiful island appears in the middle of the sea.
Anna's fear fades when the water calms.
They reach the island and stand at its edge.
translations: 乘船前，汤姆和安娜站在海边。
他们希望到达一个美丽的岛屿。
麻烦挡住了船，所以船员请他们等待。
海浪升高时，安娜感到害怕。
汤姆检查船的中部，安娜则看着边缘。
船员移动了一根绳子，但麻烦还在继续。
一名水手修好绳子，所以船开走了。
美丽的岛屿出现在大海中央。
水面平静后，安娜的恐惧消失了。
他们到达岛屿，站在它的边缘。

title: 比赛的最后付款
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a competition at the center.
They want to complete a task before the judges.
A bag holds the final payment papers.
The heat in the room is high, so Anna opens a window.
Tom opens his mouth to ask about payment.
The competition is not complete because a page is missing.
Anna checks the bag while Tom cools near the window.
The payment is inside, so they complete the task.
The heat falls after the window opens.
Tom closes his mouth and leaves the competition.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在中心参加一场比赛。
他们想在评委到来前完成任务。
一个袋子装着最后的付款文件。
房间很热，所以安娜打开窗户。
汤姆张嘴询问付款。
比赛还没完成，因为缺了一页。
安娜检查袋子，汤姆在窗边乘凉。
付款就在里面，所以他们完成任务。
窗户打开后，热气下降了。
汤姆闭上嘴，离开了比赛。

title: 安全的土地
sentences: Tom and Anna stand on earth near a horse stable.
They want to keep the horse safe before the owner arrives.
A mark is on the horse's skin.
Tom hurts one finger while checking the gate.
Anna is responsible for the horse, so she calls the owner.
The owner comes, but the horse stays safe.
The nurse checks the skin and cleans the mark.
The earth is safe after the rain stops.
Tom's finger feels better after a wrap.
Anna remains responsible until the owner leaves.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在马厩附近的土地上。
他们想在主人到来前保证马的安全。
马的皮肤上有一个印记。
汤姆检查大门时伤了一根手指。
安娜负责这匹马，所以她叫主人。
主人来了，但马仍然安全。
护士检查皮肤并清理印记。
雨停后，土地很安全。
包扎后，汤姆的手指感觉好多了。
主人离开前，安娜一直负责。

title: 明天的交换计划
sentences: Tom and Anna see a bird beside a box.
They want to exchange the box tomorrow before lunch.
The front room is ready for the exchange.
The box has damage on one side.
Anna gives her opinion while Tom checks the damage.
The bird flies to the front door, so they wait.
The manager brings a new box for exchange.
The damage is small, and the exchange can continue.
Tom agrees with Anna's opinion about the box.
They meet again tomorrow after the exchange at the front room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在社区中心看见一只鸟，旁边还有一个箱子。
他们想在午饭前交换这个箱子。
前面的房间已经准备好交换。
箱子的一侧有损坏。
安娜表达看法时，汤姆检查损坏。
鸟飞到前门，所以他们等待。
经理带来了一个新箱子交换。
损坏很小，所以交换可以继续。
汤姆同意安娜关于箱子的看法。
交换后，他们明天在前面的房间再次见面。

title: 风中的钥匙
sentences: Tom and Anna stand in wind outside the hall.
They need a key for the hall door.
A match box sits on the table.
A judge checks a paper beside the scale.
The key is missing, so Tom searches the front step, but Anna waits.
Anna holds the paper while wind moves it.
The judge finds the key near the match box.
Tom checks the scale after the judge signs.
The credit is written on the paper, so they can enter.
The wind stops after the credit is recorded.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在大厅外的风中。
他们需要大厅门的钥匙。
一个火柴盒放在桌上。
法官检查秤旁边的一张纸。
钥匙不见了，所以汤姆寻找门前台阶。
风吹动纸张时，安娜拿着它。
法官在火柴盒旁找到了钥匙。
法官签字后，汤姆检查了秤。
信用写在纸上，所以他们可以进入。
信用被记录后，风停了。

title: 农场上的乐队
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at a farm festival.
They want to see a plane in the sky.
A male farmer leads them near the field.
The band plays beside the farm gate.
The sky is clear, but the plane is small.
Tom can touch a model plane on the ground.
The male farmer lets Anna touch the model.
The band plays again after the plane lands.
The farm is quiet, so they look at the sky.
They leave the farm before evening.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到农场参加节庆活动。
他们想看看天空中的飞机。
一位男农夫带他们到田野附近。
乐队在农场门旁演奏。
天空很晴朗，但飞机很小。
汤姆可以触摸地上的模型飞机。
男农夫让安娜触摸模型。
飞机降落后，乐队再次演奏。
农场很安静，所以他们看向天空。
他们在傍晚前离开农场。

title: 火车上的平衡
sentences: Tom and Anna wait for a train with a box.
They want to sleep on the train.
A copy of the order is under the box.
The box's balance is wrong.
A branch blocks the track, so the train stops.
Anna has doubt about the trip.
A worker removes the branch while Tom moves the copy.
The balance improves, and the train starts.
Anna has no doubt after the train moves.
They sleep on the train before morning.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着箱子等待火车。
他们想在火车上睡觉。
一份订单副本在箱子下面。
箱子的平衡不对。
树枝挡住了轨道，所以火车停下。
安娜对这次行程有疑问。
工作人员移走树枝时，汤姆移动副本。
平衡改善了，火车也开动了。
火车开动后，安娜不再有疑问。
天亮前，他们在火车上睡觉。

title: 船上的运输
sentences: Tom and Anna are on a ship with a box.
They need to transport it to an island.
The machine's brain stops, so transport stops.
Anna finds the insurance paper beside the machine.
Tom sees a stick near a hole in the wall.
Anna reads insurance while Tom checks the brain.
They fix the hole before water enters the ship.
The brain works again, and transport can continue.
The ship carries the box after the repair.
Tom moves the stick away from the hole.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在船上带着一个箱子。
他们需要把箱子运输到一座岛。
机器的大脑停止了，所以运输也停下。
安娜在机器旁找到了保险文件。
汤姆看见墙上的洞旁有一根棍子。
安娜阅读保险时，汤姆检查大脑。
水流进船前，他们修好了洞。
大脑再次工作，运输可以继续。
修理后，船运着箱子前进。
汤姆把棍子从洞旁移开。

title: 冰上的木船
sentences: Tom and Anna take a boat toward the mountain.
They drink water before moving.
Ice blocks the boat, so they stop.
The distance to the mountain is long.
Tom finds wood beside the boat.
Anna sees more ice near the wood.
They use wood to push ice, but the boat stays.
Tom can drink water while Anna checks the distance.
They move ice, and the boat goes forward.
They reach the mountain after the boat crosses a short distance.
translations: 汤姆和安娜乘船向那座山驶去。
他们在移动前喝了些水。
冰挡住了船，所以他们停了下来。
到那座山的距离很远。
汤姆在船边找到了一些木头。
安娜看到木头旁边还有更多冰。
他们用木头推冰，但船仍然停着。
汤姆喝水时，安娜检查距离。
他们移开冰，船向前行驶。
船穿过一小段距离后，他们到达了山边。

title: 冬日道路上的金戒指
sentences: Tom and Anna walk on a winter road.
They look for a gold ring near the wall.
A mark on the wall shows danger.
The road has danger, so they stop.
A ball begins to roll downhill.
Tom keeps Anna separate from the danger.
Anna finds the gold ring after the ball can roll away.
They keep the ring and ball separate.
The winter wind is cold, but the mark remains.
Tom moves the ball from the dangerous road while Anna watches.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走在一条冬日道路上。
他们在墙附近寻找一枚金戒指。
墙上的标记显示这里有危险。
道路有危险，所以他们停下。
一个球开始向下滚。
汤姆让安娜和危险分开。
球可以滚开后，安娜找到了金戒指。
他们把戒指和球分开放好。
冬风很冷，但标记仍然在。
汤姆把球移出危险的道路。

title: 监狱窗边的花
sentences: Tom and Anna carry a flower to prison.
They want to speak with the chief before the regular meeting.
The prison gate is closed, so they wait.
Anna's reaction is quiet, but Tom shows the flower.
The chief's reaction changes when he sees it.
A regular guard asks about the flower.
Tom says it belonged to the chief's mother.
The chief shares his belief, so the guard opens the door.
Anna hears the chief's belief, and thanks him.
Their calm reaction helps the chief keep the flower.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着一朵花来到监狱。
他们想在例行会议前和首领谈谈。
监狱门关着，所以他们等待。
安娜的反应很平静，但汤姆展示了那朵花。
首领看到花后，反应发生了变化。
一名值班人员询问这朵花。
汤姆说这朵花属于首领的母亲。
首领分享了自己的信念，所以值班人员打开了门。
安娜听见首领的信念，并感谢他。
他们平静的反应让首领留下了这朵花。

title: 登机前找回戒指
sentences: Tom and Anna wait for a flight at the airport.
The flight is quick, so they arrive early.
Anna puts her ring beside a glass of wine.
Tom notices the ring is missing when the call begins.
He searches the bright room, but cannot find it.
Anna checks the table after the wine moves.
The ring is under the glass.
Tom pays a debt before the flight.
The quick flight is ready, but the ring is safe.
A bright sign shows the gate after the debt is paid.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在机场等航班。
航班很快，所以他们提前到了。
安娜把戒指放在一杯葡萄酒旁边。
广播开始时，汤姆发现戒指不见了。
他寻找明亮的房间，但没有找到。
葡萄酒移开后，安娜检查桌子。
戒指就在酒杯下面。
汤姆在航班前支付一笔债务。
快速航班准备好了，但戒指很安全。
债务付清后，明亮的指示牌显示登机口。

title: 起居室里的搬箱子计划
sentences: Tom and Anna work in a living room.
They need to lift a box before dinner.
Tom touches his ear because it hurts.
A complex shelf blocks the box.
Anna can jump over a line near the box.
Anna marks a limit by the door before lifting.
Tom tries to lift the box, but it stays.
Anna checks Tom's ear, so he rests in the living room.
The limit is safe, so they lift the box together.
Tom can jump over the line after the complex shelf moves.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在起居室里工作。
他们需要在晚饭前抬起箱子。
汤姆摸耳朵，因为那里疼。
一个复杂的架子挡住了箱子。
安娜可以跳过箱子旁的一条线。
安娜在门边画出界限，然后准备抬箱子。
汤姆试着抬箱子，但它没有移动。
安娜检查汤姆的耳朵，所以他在起居室休息。
界限是安全的，所以他们一起抬箱子。
复杂的架子移开后，汤姆可以跳过那条线。

title: 发动机旁的温暖房间
sentences: Tom and Anna work beside an engine in a warm room.
They want to start the engine before the baby wakes.
A soft box holds an egg near the machine.
The baby begins to cry, so Anna checks the room.
Tom reads about religion while the engine cools.
The warm room makes the baby cry less.
Anna moves the soft box away from the engine.
Tom turns the engine, but it does not start.
Tom closes the religion book when engine is quiet.
Anna takes the egg after it starts.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在温暖房间的发动机旁工作。
他们想在宝宝醒来前启动发动机。
软盒子里有一个鸡蛋，放在机器旁。
宝宝开始哭了，所以安娜检查房间。
汤姆阅读宗教内容，发动机同时冷却。
温暖的房间让宝宝少哭了一些。
安娜把软盒子从发动机旁移开。
汤姆转动发动机，但它没有启动。
发动机安静后，汤姆合上了宗教书。
发动机启动后，安娜拿走了鸡蛋。

title: 湖边的便宜晚餐
sentences: Tom and Anna plan a cheap meal for a female friend.
They cook by the lake before she arrives.
A strange wave reaches the small boat.
Wind may blow the paper into water, so Tom grabs it.
Another strange wave moves the boat.
The female friend calls ashore, but the boat is far.
Anna can cook an egg while Tom pulls the boat.
Wind can blow again after the boat reaches shore.
They cook inside, and the cheap meal stays warm.
The female friend eats after the strange waves end.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为一位女性朋友计划便宜的饭。
她到来前，他们在湖边做饭。
一个奇怪的波浪冲向小船。
风可能把纸吹进水里，所以汤姆抓住它。
又一个奇怪的波浪推动了小船。
女性朋友在岸边呼喊，但小船很远。
安娜可以煮鸡蛋，汤姆同时拉船。
船到岸后，风还可能吹来。
他们在屋里做饭，便宜的饭保持温暖。
奇怪的波浪结束后，女性朋友吃了饭。

title: 桥边的绳索连接
sentences: Tom and Anna stand beside a quiet bridge.
They need a connection across the river.
Tom loses one shoe near the bridge.
A fire can burn the shoe, so Anna moves it.
Anna wears a dress while carrying the shoe.
The connection is a rope under the bridge.
The water is quiet below, but the fire still burns.
They use the rope to make a connection across.
Tom moves the shoe before the fire can burn it again.
Anna keeps her dress safe on the bridge.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在一座安静的桥边。
他们需要一条跨过河流的连接。
汤姆在桥边丢了一只鞋。
火可能烧到鞋子，所以安娜把鞋移开。
安娜穿着裙子，同时拿着鞋。
这条连接是一根桥下的绳子。
下面的水很安静，但火仍在燃烧。
他们用绳子在两岸之间建立连接。
汤姆在火再次烧到鞋前把鞋移开。
安娜让裙子在桥上保持安全。

title: 博物馆里的骨头记录
sentences: Tom and Anna study a museum box.
They begin learning about a bone inside.
A small lip keeps the box closed.
The existence of the bone is unclear, so Anna reads.
Tom lifts the flat box, but the lip stays closed.
Their learning continues after Anna finds a key.
The record proves the existence of the bone.
Anna uses the key, and Tom opens the box while checking a distribution list.
The flat bone lies near the lip, so learning is complete.
Anna checks the distribution list before leaving.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在博物馆研究一个扁平盒子。
他们开始学习里面的一根骨头。
一个小边缘把盒子卡住了。
骨头的存在不清楚，所以安娜阅读。
汤姆抬起扁平盒子，但边缘仍然卡着。
安娜找到钥匙后，他们继续学习。
记录证明了骨头确实存在。
安娜用钥匙打开盒子，同时查看分配清单。
骨头靠近边缘，所以学习完成了。
安娜在离开前检查资料分配。

title: 雨天完成健康计划
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a health center to keep the town healthy.
A representative asks them to finish a writing plan.
Anna shows respect for the representative.
Tom hurts his knee when rain starts.
The representative brings them inside, so writing stays dry.
Tom checks his knee while Anna writes.
Anna keeps writing because the plan is not finished.
The healthy plan tells people to stay inside during rain.
The representative reads the writing after Anna finishes.
Tom rests his knee, and they show respect to the representative.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到健康中心，让小镇保持健康。
一位代表请他们完成一份写作计划。
安娜向代表表示尊重。
下雨时，汤姆弄伤了膝盖。
代表把他们带进室内，所以文字保持干燥。
汤姆检查膝盖时，安娜写作。
计划还没完成，所以安娜继续写。
健康计划告诉人们下雨时待在室内。
安娜完成后，代表阅读文字。
汤姆休息膝盖，他们向代表表示尊重。

title: 生日聚会前的准备
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a clean room for a birth celebration.
They place a plate on the table.
Anna reads the birth record while Tom draws a circle.
The circle marks the place for the cake.
Tom hurts his neck when a chair moves.
Anna makes a selection from three plates, so the table stays clean.
They clean the table after the chair falls.
Tom checks his neck, but the plate is safe.
The selection is clear, and the circle is ready.
They celebrate the birth with a clean plate.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为生日庆祝准备一间干净的房间。
他们把一个盘子放在桌上。
安娜读出生记录时，汤姆画了一个圆圈。
这个圆圈标出了蛋糕的位置。
椅子移动时，汤姆伤了脖子。
安娜从三个盘子中选择，所以桌子保持干净。
椅子倒下后，他们清理桌子。
汤姆检查脖子，但盘子很安全。
选择很清楚，圆圈也准备好了。
他们用干净的盘子庆祝生日。

title: 地图上的回家路线
sentences: Tom and Anna study a map beside a tall building.
They want an equal road home.
The building door is shut, so they wait.
Anna has a desire to go home.
Tom does not hate the long road, but rain is heavy.
The map shows two equal roads.
Tom opens a tall gate while Anna checks the map.
The door is shut again when the wind blows.
Their desire is strong, and Anna does not hate the equal road.
They leave after Tom shuts the gate.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在高楼旁研究地图。
他们想找一条回家的相等道路。
大楼的门关着，所以他们等待。
安娜有回家的愿望。
汤姆不讨厌长路，但雨很大。
地图显示两条相等的道路。
汤姆打开高门，安娜同时查看地图。
风吹过时，门又关上了。
他们的愿望很强，而且安娜不讨厌这条相等道路。
汤姆关上门后，他们离开了。

title: 刷墙时的午餐
sentences: Tom and Anna paint a wall in a dry room.
They want a beautiful room before lunch.
A leaf falls beside a metal plate.
The paint smells sweet, but the wall is wet.
Anna puts salt on the plate while Tom cooks.
Tom moves the dry leaf from the wet paint.
The metal plate holds sweet food.
They paint the wall again after the leaf leaves.
Salt stays on the plate, and the paint dries.
They leave the dry room after lunch.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在干燥房间里给墙刷漆。
他们想在午餐前拥有漂亮的房间。
一片叶子落在金属盘子旁边。
油漆闻起来很甜，但墙还是湿的。
安娜把盐放在盘子上，汤姆同时做饭。
汤姆把干叶子从湿油漆上移开。
金属盘子装着甜食。
叶子离开后，他们再次给墙刷漆。
盐留在盘子上，油漆也干了。
午餐后，他们离开干燥的房间。

title: 课堂上的阅读任务
sentences: Tom and Anna sit in class for a reading lesson.
They need to read a ticket for the trip.
Teaching begins after the teacher shows a bottle.
Tom is fat in a drawing, but healthy in life.
Anna puts sugar in the bottle for a test.
Reading tells them to check the sugar.
Tom reads the ticket while Anna checks the bottle.
The bottle has too much sugar, so they remove it.
Teaching is clear, and fat drawing makes them laugh.
They finish the ticket after the bottle is clean.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在教室里上阅读课。
他们需要读一张旅行票。
老师展示瓶子后，教学开始了。
汤姆在画里很胖，但现实中很健康。
安娜把糖放进瓶子做测试。
阅读材料告诉他们检查糖。
汤姆读票，安娜同时检查瓶子。
瓶子里的糖太多，所以他们取出糖。
教学很清楚，胖画让他们发笑。
瓶子干净后，他们完成了票的阅读。

title: 天气站的乐器演出
sentences: Tom and Anna walk to a weather station on a straight road.
They want to play an instrument at the station.
A weather report has an error.
A closed bottle contains acid, so Anna stays back.
Tom reads the weather while Anna checks the instrument.
The straight road is wet after rain.
Their married teacher asks them to correct the error.
Tom carries the instrument, but he does not touch the acid.
The weather improves, and the error is corrected.
The married teacher thanks them before they leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜沿直路走向气象站。
他们想在气象站演奏一种乐器。
天气报告里有一个错误。
关着的瓶子装着酸，所以安娜退后。
汤姆读天气，安娜同时检查乐器。
下雨后，直路变湿了。
他们已婚的老师请他们改正错误。
汤姆拿着乐器，但没有碰酸。
天气变好了，错误也被改正。
他们离开前，已婚的老师感谢了他们。

title: 外套口袋里的礼物
sentences: Tom and Anna find a thin coat.
They want to hide a surprise in its pocket.
The pocket is small, but the gift can fit.
Anna feels pleasure when she sees it.
Tom takes a breath, and Anna wraps it.
They do not want to waste paper.
Thin paper covers the surprise, so it stays safe.
Anna puts the gift in the pocket.
Anna feels pleasure because no paper goes to waste.
They leave, and Tom takes a breath outside.
translations: 汤姆和安娜找到一件薄外套。
他们想把一个惊喜藏进口袋。
口袋很小，但礼物放得进去。
安娜看到它时感到快乐。
汤姆深吸一口气，安娜把它包好。
他们不想浪费纸。
薄纸包住了惊喜，所以它很安全。
安娜把礼物放进口袋。
安娜感到快乐，因为没有纸被浪费。
他们离开了，汤姆在外面深吸了一口气。

title: 向导带领的果园之旅
sentences: Tom and Anna meet a guide at the village gate.
They begin a journey to a yellow orchard.
The guide says a slow walk protects the fruit.
A yellow fruit falls, and a noise follows.
The guide hears another noise near the road.
Tom carries the fruit while Anna follows the guide.
The journey is long, but the guide knows the road.
They cross a slow bridge after the noise stops.
The guide shows yellow trees, so the journey continues.
They eat the fruit after the noise ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在村口遇到一位向导。
他们开始前往黄色果园的旅程。
向导说，慢慢走可以保护水果。
一个黄色水果掉下来，随后传来声音。
向导听见道路附近又有声音。
汤姆拿着水果，安娜跟着向导。
旅程很长，但向导熟悉道路。
声音停止后，他们走过一座慢桥。
向导展示黄色树木，所以旅程继续。
声音结束后，他们吃了水果。

title: 厚墙后的猫
sentences: Tom and Anna hear a cat behind a thick wall.
They want to help the angry cat.
The cat's chest moves quickly, but it is not hurt.
A hearing room is on the other side of the wall.
Tom feels angry because the cat cannot leave.
Anna opens a small hole and checks the muscle.
The thick wall blocks the sound.
Tom hears the cat again after the hearing room opens.
The cat's chest moves, so its muscle is fine.
The angry cat leaves through the hole.
translations: 汤姆和安娜听见厚墙后面有一只猫。
他们想帮助那只生气的猫。
猫的胸口起伏很快，但它没有受伤。
墙的另一边是一间听证室。
猫无法离开，所以汤姆感到生气。
安娜打开小洞并检查肌肉。
厚墙挡住了声音。
听证室打开后，汤姆又听见了猫。
猫的胸口在动，所以肌肉没问题。
生气的猫从洞里出来。

title: 道路旁的根和煤
sentences: Tom and Anna walk along a narrow road.
They look for a root by the road.
A horse moves its nose near a box.
A bird has a hurt wing, so Anna stops.
Tom finds a tooth by the root, and the horse waits.
Coal in the box frightens the bird.
Anna checks the wing while Tom moves coal.
The horse lowers its nose when noise stops.
The bird rests under a narrow tree near the root.
They leave coal by the root, but Tom returns the tooth.
translations: 汤姆和安娜沿着狭窄道路行走。
他们在路边寻找树根。
一匹马在盒子旁动了动鼻子。
一只鸟的翅膀受伤了，所以安娜停下。
汤姆在树根旁找到一颗牙，马在旁边等着。
盒子里的煤让鸟感到害怕。
安娜检查翅膀，汤姆同时移开煤。
声音停止时，马低下鼻子。
鸟在狭窄的树下、树根旁休息。
他们把煤放在树根旁，但汤姆归还了那颗牙。

title: 雪天找到棕色衬衫
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at a cabin during snow.
They want a brown shirt for Tom.
The door's motion is slow because snow is heavy.
Anna makes a suggestion before they enter.
Tom may slip on snow, so he holds the wall.
The brown shirt hangs near the door.
The suggestion is to move slowly across the floor.
Anna opens the door, but its motion stops.
Tom does not slip after Anna gives him the shirt.
He puts on the shirt after the suggestion works.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在下雪天来到一间小屋。
他们想为汤姆找到一件棕色衬衫。
因为雪很大，门的移动很慢。
安娜在进去前提出了建议。
汤姆可能在雪上滑倒，所以扶住墙。
棕色衬衫挂在门边。
建议是慢慢走过地板。
安娜打开门，但门的移动停住了。
汤姆没有滑倒，安娜把衬衫给了他。
建议奏效后，他穿上了衬衫。

title: 广场上的家庭聚餐
sentences: Tom and Anna carry meat to the town square.
They want to put a frame near the family table.
A chain holds the frame, so it cannot move.
Anna makes a request for help.
Tom can kick a ball away from the meat.
The family waits in the square while the helper comes.
Anna pulls the chain after the helper arrives.
Tom moves the frame beside the table.
The request is accepted, so Tom can kick the ball again.
They eat meat in the square before going home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜把肉带到镇上的广场。
他们想把一个框架放在家庭餐桌旁。
一条链子拴住了框架，所以它无法移动。
安娜提出请求，希望有人帮忙。
汤姆可以把球踢到远离肉的地方。
帮手到来时，一家人在广场上等候。
帮手到来后，安娜拉动了链子。
汤姆把框架移到桌子旁。
请求被接受了，所以汤姆可以再次踢球。
框架放好后，他们在广场上吃肉。

title: 铁门后的观察记录
sentences: Tom and Anna make an observation.
They wash a glass in the room.
A servant waits near the door with a key.
The box has a large mass, so Tom stops.
A secret is hidden behind the iron door.
Anna writes the observation while the servant checks.
The servant says the secret is safe, but the lock is shut.
They wash the glass after the servant finds a key.
The observation shows the mass of an iron box.
The servant opens the door, and the secret is safe.
translations: 汤姆和安娜做了一次观察。
他们在房间里洗玻璃杯。
一位仆人拿着钥匙在门边等候。
盒子很重，所以汤姆停下。
铁门后面藏着一个秘密。
安娜写观察记录，仆人同时检查锁。
仆人说秘密很安全，但锁还关着。
仆人找到钥匙后，他们洗了玻璃杯。
观察显示重量属于一个铁盒子。
仆人打开门，秘密很安全。

title: 屋顶上的种子和乌云
sentences: Tom and Anna stand on a roof with a seed.
They want to plant the seed before rain.
A grey cloud covers the roof.
Tom carries milk, but the roof is wet.
Anna puts the seed in the earth.
Tom must stretch his arm to reach the box.
The cloud grows dark, so they hurry.
Anna drinks milk while Tom can stretch again.
The seed is safe under the roof after the cloud passes.
They leave the grey roof before rain.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着种子站在屋顶上。
他们想在下雨前种下种子。
一片灰云笼罩了屋顶。
汤姆拿着牛奶，但屋顶是湿的。
安娜把种子放进土里。
汤姆必须伸手够到箱子。
云变暗了，所以他们加快动作。
安娜喝牛奶时，汤姆又伸手。
云经过屋顶后，种子很安全。
他们在下雨前离开灰色屋顶。

title: 矿井旁的震动比较
sentences: Tom and Anna wait beside a rail near an old mine.
They want to compare two boxes.
Tom feels ill, and Anna feels tired.
A sudden shock moves one box.
The rail shakes, so they step back.
The mine is closed because the shock is dangerous.
Tom makes a comparison of the box sizes.
Anna feels less tired after she sits down.
Tom feels less ill after the comparison.
They leave the mine when the rail stops.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在旧矿井旁的铁轨边等候。
他们想比较两个箱子。
汤姆觉得不舒服，安娜也很疲惫。
突然的震动使一个箱子移动。
铁轨摇动，所以他们退后。
矿井关着，因为震动很危险。
汤姆比较了箱子的大小。
安娜坐下后没那么累了。
比较后，汤姆感觉没那么不舒服。
铁轨停止后，他们离开矿井。

title: 草地上的帽子和餐盒
sentences: Tom and Anna walk across grass in a park.
They want to find Anna's hat.
A small wheel is beside the path.
The hat has a sharp edge, so Tom keeps back.
Anna checks the taste of food near a solid box.
The grass is wet, but the hat is not there.
Tom moves the wheel after it blocks the path.
The solid box holds the picnic food.
Anna checks taste, and Tom sees the sharp hat under box.
They leave grass with the hat and wheel before sunset.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在公园的草地上走着。
他们想找到安娜的帽子。
一只小轮子在小路旁边。
帽子有锋利的边，所以汤姆后退。
安娜检查结实盒子旁食物的味道。
草地很湿，但帽子不在那里。
轮子挡住小路后，汤姆把它移开。
结实盒子里装着野餐食物。
安娜检查味道，汤姆看见轮子下的锋利帽子。
他们带着帽子和轮子离开草地。

title: 早餐里的奶酪和外套
sentences: Tom and Anna sit at a table for breakfast.
They want to make an addition to their bread.
The cheese is beside the bread.
Anna's coat hangs near the door.
Tom feels sad because the cheese is missing.
A steel box holds the extra cheese.
Anna makes an addition to the bread after Tom opens the box.
Tom is sad, but Anna gives him the warm coat.
The steel box holds the cheese while the bread is ready.
They wear the coat after breakfast, before leaving.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在桌边吃早餐。
他们想给面包加一样东西。
奶酪放在面包旁边。
安娜的外套挂在门边。
奶酪不见了，所以汤姆感到难过。
钢盒子里装着多余的奶酪。
汤姆打开盒子后，安娜给面包加了奶酪。
汤姆很难过，但安娜把暖和的外套给了他。
钢盒子装着奶酪，面包也准备好了。
早餐后，他们穿上外套。

title: 海边的网和靴子
sentences: Tom and Anna walk on sand near sea.
They want to find a boot for a dear friend.
A violent wind pulls a net toward the water.
Tom writes a note about his sense of self.
Anna draws a self portrait in the sand.
The boot is under the net.
The sand covers the boot, so Tom holds the net.
The violent wind stops when Anna calls for help.
The dear friend arrives after the wind stops, while Tom holds the boot.
Tom gives the boot to the dear friend.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在海边沙地上行走。
他们想为一位亲爱的朋友找到一只靴子。
猛烈的风把一张网吹向水面。
汤姆写下一张关于自我的便条。
安娜在沙地上画了一幅自画像。
靴子在网的下面。
沙子盖住了靴子，所以汤姆抓住了网。
安娜呼救时，猛烈的风停了。
风停后，那位亲爱的朋友赶到了，汤姆拿着靴子。
汤姆把靴子交给了那位亲爱的朋友。

title: 抗议前的打印任务
sentences: Tom and Anna print a paper for the town committee.
They want to open a locked door opposite the office.
A discovery lies beside the printer.
The committee needs approval before the paper can print.
A protest begins outside, so the opposite door closes.
Anna finds a key for the lock.
Tom prints the paper after the committee gives approval.
The opposite door opens when the protest grows quiet.
The discovery is recorded, and approval is clear.
They lock the printer before leaving.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为镇委员会打印文件。
他们想打开办公室对面的锁门。
打印机旁有一个发现物。
委员会需要批准，文件才能打印。
外面开始抗议，所以对面的门关上。
安娜找到了一把锁的钥匙。
委员会批准后，汤姆打印了文件。
抗议声变小后，对面的门打开了。
发现物被记录下来，批准也很清楚。
他们离开前锁好打印机。

title: 厨房里的土豆和灰尘
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a potato in the kitchen.
They put a silver pot and a knife on the table.
The potato is ready, but dust covers the stove.
A sudden sound makes Anna stop.
Tom moves the knife, while Anna covers the pot.
The dust settles, so they wash the potato.
The sudden noise returns when the pot boils.
Anna checks the silver pot, and Tom holds the potato.
They cut the potato with the knife.
The kitchen is clean, and the dust is gone.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在厨房里准备土豆。
他们把银锅和刀放在桌上。
土豆准备好了，但炉子上有灰尘。
突然的声音让安娜停了下来。
汤姆移开刀，安娜则盖住锅。
灰尘落定后，他们清洗了土豆。
锅沸腾时，突然的声音又出现了。
安娜检查银锅，汤姆拿着土豆。
他们用刀切土豆。
厨房干净了，灰尘也消失了。

title: 一起做蛋糕
sentences: Tom and Anna make a cake.
They need to add a substance to the bowl.
The cake mix is wet, so Tom holds the bowl.
Anna gives Tom a kiss before measuring the substance.
The angle of the bowl is wrong.
Tom is dependent on Anna because the bowl is heavy.
Anna changes the angle, and the cake stays inside.
Tom gives Anna a kiss after she fixes the bowl.
The wet mix becomes smooth, and the cake is ready.
Tom is dependent on Anna when they carry it.
translations: 汤姆和安娜做蛋糕。
他们需要把一种物质加入碗里。
蛋糕糊是湿的，所以汤姆扶着碗。
安娜量物质前亲了汤姆一下。
碗的角度不对。
汤姆依赖安娜，因为碗很重。
安娜调整角度，蛋糕糊留在碗里。
安娜修好碗后，汤姆亲了她一下。
湿蛋糕糊变得顺滑，蛋糕准备好了。
搬运蛋糕时，汤姆依赖安娜。

title: 扩建房间里的电线
sentences: Tom and Anna plan an expansion of the hall.
They must hang a lamp, but a wire is loose.
A false note tells them the wire is safe.
Anna's tendency is to follow every smell.
The smell grows, so the expansion stops.
Tom traces the wire while Anna opens a window.
The wall cracks; the false note falls beside a box.
They replace the box, and the wire is fixed.
The fixed box removes the smell.
The expansion resumes when Anna's tendency protects the hall.
translations: 汤姆和安娜计划扩建礼堂。
他们必须挂上一盏灯，但有根电线松了。
一张错误的说明说电线很安全。
安娜有个顺着气味查找的习惯。
气味变重了，所以扩建停了。
汤姆沿着电线找，安娜打开窗户。
墙面裂开，错误的说明掉在盒子旁。
他们换掉盒子，电线修好了。
修好的盒子让气味消失了。
扩建重新开始，安娜的习惯保护了礼堂。

title: 厨房里的面包和烟雾
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare bread with butter.
They must serve it before the meeting.
Smoke slips from a rough pipe.
It darkens the flag, so Anna opens a window.
She lifts the flag with a smooth cloth.
Tom blocks the pipe, but its rough edge tears it.
The torn cloth reveals a crack below.
Tom seals it, and the pipe stops smoke.
Anna wipes the flag with the smooth cloth.
They spread butter on bread after the smoke clears.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备黄油面包。
他们必须在会议前把面包端上桌。
烟从一根粗糙的管子里冒出。
烟熏黑了旗子，所以安娜打开窗户。
她用一块光滑的布提起旗子。
汤姆堵住管子，但粗糙的边缘把布撕破了。
撕破的布露出了下面的一道裂缝。
汤姆封住裂缝，管子不再冒烟。
安娜用那块光滑的布擦旗子。
烟散去后，他们把黄油涂在面包上。

title: 月光下的窗帘和苹果
sentences: Tom and Anna share an apple by a window.
They want to watch the moon before closing the curtain.
Tom's throat hurts, and Anna's stomach hurts.
Anna sets the apple aside while Tom finds water.
The electric light fails, so they feel for the curtain.
A cloud hides the moon when Tom pulls it.
After Anna rests, he tries again; the curtain opens.
Anna drinks water; her stomach feels better.
The moon appears, so the electric light is unnecessary.
Tom drinks for his throat, then they close the curtain.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在窗边分吃一个苹果。
他们想在拉上窗帘前看看月亮。
汤姆喉咙疼，安娜的胃也疼。
安娜把苹果放下，汤姆去找水。
电灯坏了，所以他们摸索着找窗帘。
汤姆拉窗帘时，一片云遮住了月亮。
安娜休息后，他再试一次，窗帘打开了。
安娜喝水后，胃感觉好些了。
月亮出现了，所以不需要电灯。
汤姆喝水缓解喉咙疼，然后他们拉上窗帘。

title: 浴室里的时钟和化学品
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a bathhouse to fix a clock.
A wall curve points toward the clock.
They must read it before the bath fills.
A chemical bottle is beside the bath, so Anna moves it.
While she moves it, a cat's tail hits it.
Tom is conscious of danger but catches it.
He finds a crack in the chemical bottle.
After sealing it, they follow the curve to the clock.
The clock works, and the bath stays safe.
When the cat's tail stops, they leave conscious.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入浴室去修理时钟。
墙上的弯线指向那只时钟。
他们必须在浴缸装满前读出时间。
浴缸旁有一瓶化学品，所以安娜把它移开。
她移动瓶子时，猫的尾巴碰到了它。
汤姆意识到危险，但接住了瓶子。
他发现化学品瓶子上有一道裂缝。
封好瓶子后，他们沿着弯线走到时钟旁。
时钟开始运转，浴缸也保持安全。
猫的尾巴停下来后，他们保持警觉地离开了。

title: 农场的铃声和羊
sentences: Tom and Anna find a sheep beside the bell.
They need its button to call the farmer.
A broken crate covers the button; destruction blocks the gate.
Anna leads the sheep away with rice.
Tom pulls the crate, but it will not move.
He uses a bar, and a broken board snaps.
The button appears, so Anna presses it; the bell rings.
After the bell rings, the farmer clears the destruction.
He fixes the button and checks the bell.
When the sheep eats the rice, they leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在农场的铃旁发现一只羊。
他们需要它旁边的按钮来叫农夫。
一个坏木箱盖住按钮，损坏的东西堵住了门。
安娜用米饭把羊引开。
汤姆拉木箱，但它纹丝不动。
他用木棍撬动，一块坏木板裂开了。
按钮露出，安娜按下它，铃响了。
铃响后，农夫清理了损坏的地方。
他修好按钮并检查了铃。
羊吃米饭时，他们离开了。

title: 狭窄房间里的船和奖励
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a tight repair room.
They must move a vessel and deliver a reward.
Steam escapes, so the tight room becomes hot.
A brick wall blocks their only door.
Tom reads a fiction book while Anna checks the steam.
They push the vessel, but the brick wall shakes.
A loose stone reveals the steam valve.
Tom closes the valve, and the vessel stops shaking.
The reward is safe after the team repairs the brick wall.
They leave the tight room with the fiction book.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入一间狭窄的维修室。
他们必须搬走一艘船，并送出一份奖励。
蒸汽冒了出来，所以狭窄的房间变得很热。
一堵砖墙挡住了唯一的门。
汤姆读着一本小说，安娜检查蒸汽。
他们推船时，砖墙却摇晃起来。
一块松动的石头露出了蒸汽阀。
汤姆关上阀门，船也停止摇晃。
维修团队修好砖墙后，奖励安全了。
他们带着小说离开了狭窄的房间。

title: 游泳前的准备
sentences: Tom and Anna reach a dirty pool.
They want to swim after cleaning it.
Tom hurts his tongue on a stone.
Anna gives him comfort, but he cannot swim yet.
His loose shirt gets dirty near the pool.
They wait till the drain opens.
Anna gives comfort while Tom washes his tongue.
Dirty water flows away, so they clean the pool.
They wait till it clears, then Tom swims.
His loose shirt dries, and the clean pool brings comfort.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到一个肮脏的泳池。
他们想把泳池清干净后再游泳。
汤姆被一块石头碰伤了舌头。
安娜安慰他，但他还不能游泳。
他的宽松衬衫在泳池边弄脏了。
他们一直等到排水口打开。
安娜安慰汤姆时，他洗了洗舌头。
脏水流走了，所以他们清理泳池。
他们一直等到水变清，然后汤姆下水。
他的宽松衬衫干了，干净的泳池也带来了安慰。

title: 农场出发前的奶牛
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a farm boat.
They plan to sail after moving a cow.
The cow blocks the gate beside the boat.
Anna opens the gate, but the cow stays.
Tom can rub its neck while Anna checks the oven.
Smoke lifts a leather bag from a shelf.
Anna saves the leather bag, and the cow follows her.
Tom can rub the cow again, so it leaves the gate.
The boat is ready to sail after the oven cools.
The leather bag returns to the shelf, and they sail.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备一条农场用船。
他们计划把奶牛移开后航行。
奶牛挡住了船旁的栅门。
安娜打开栅门，但奶牛不肯走。
汤姆可以抚摸它的脖子，安娜检查烤箱。
烟把一个皮包从架子上吹了下来。
安娜救下皮包，奶牛跟着她走。
汤姆可以再次抚摸奶牛，所以它离开了栅门。
烤箱冷却后，船准备好航行。
皮包回到了架子上，他们也开始航行。

title: 树荫下的午餐
sentences: Tom and Anna sit in shade by a wall.
They plan a picnic with soup from a tin.
Tom wears trousers for the picnic.
Anna feels pain in a nerve in her hand.
A crack appears in the wall, so they move the table.
The shade keeps the soup cool.
Tom opens the tin while Anna rests her hand.
Her trousers brush the wall but stay clean.
Anna moves her fingers until the nerve feels better.
After Tom covers the crack, they eat soup in the shade.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在墙边的树荫里。
他们计划带着一罐汤野餐。
汤姆穿着裤子来参加野餐。
安娜手上的一条神经感到疼痛。
墙上出现裂缝，所以他们移开桌子。
树荫让汤保持凉爽。
汤姆打开罐子，安娜休息她的手。
她的裤子擦过墙，但仍然干净。
安娜活动手指，直到神经感觉好些。
汤姆盖住裂缝后，他们在树荫下喝汤。

title: 小猪逃出围栏
sentences: Tom and Anna check a pig's pen.
They want to keep the pig inside before the storm.
A burst of wind opens the pen door.
The pig runs to the road, so Anna calls Tom.
Tom fears punishment if the pig escapes.
Anna remembers a wise trick with a basket.
She uses the trick while Tom holds the pen door.
The burst stops, and the pig turns back to the pen.
Tom closes the pen after the trick works.
The wise trick prevents punishment, and the pig stays safe.
translations: 汤姆和安娜检查小猪的围栏。
他们想在暴风雨前把小猪留在里面。
一阵强风吹开了围栏门。
小猪跑向道路，所以安娜叫汤姆。
汤姆担心小猪逃走后会受到惩罚。
安娜想起了一个用篮子的聪明办法。
汤姆扶住围栏门时，安娜用了这个办法。
强风停了，小猪转身回到围栏。
这个办法奏效后，汤姆关上围栏。
聪明的办法避免了惩罚，小猪也安全了。

title: 马车去看小镇景点
sentences: Tom and Anna ride a carriage to an attraction.
They want to reach the attraction before sunset.
A loud wheel breaks, and the carriage stops.
Tom uses a glove to hold the wheel.
Anna tries bitter fruit while they wait.
A frequent carriage passes, but its driver cannot stop.
The driver returns after hearing their loud bell.
He fixes the carriage, and the glove protects Tom.
Anna leaves the bitter fruit at the stop.
The frequent carriage reaches the attraction before sunset.
translations: 汤姆和安娜乘马车去一个景点。
他们想在日落前到达景点。
一个响亮的车轮坏了，马车停下。
汤姆用手套扶住车轮。
他们等待时，安娜尝了尝苦水果。
一辆经常经过的马车驶来，但司机无法停车。
司机听到他们响亮的铃声后返回。
他修好马车，手套保护了汤姆。
安娜把苦水果留在了停靠处。
那辆经常经过的马车在日落前抵达景点。

title: 斜坡上的外套调整
sentences: Tom and Anna carry an orange coat down a slope.
They need an adjustment before a market show.
The coat's silk sleeve catches on a nail.
A cotton bag falls near a rat.
Anna moves the bag, but the rat runs up the slope.
The rat follows an orange cart into a box.
While Tom fixes the silk sleeve, Anna waits.
The cotton bag hangs safely beside the box.
The adjustment holds, so the orange coat is ready.
After that, they carry the coat uphill.
translations: 汤姆和安娜把一件橙色外套带下斜坡。
他们需要在市场展示前做些调整。
外套的丝绸袖子被钉子勾住了。
一个棉布袋掉在老鼠旁边。
安娜移动袋子，但老鼠跑上了斜坡。
老鼠跟着一辆橙色小车钻进了盒子。
汤姆修理丝绸袖子时，安娜在一旁等待。
棉布袋安全地挂在盒子旁。
调整起了作用，所以橙色外套准备好了。
之后，他们把外套带上斜坡。

title: 厨房里的坚果和刀刃
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a nut in the kitchen.
They want to cut the nut with a blade.
Tom gets a bite on his hand.
An automatic machine starts, and a flame appears.
Anna turns it off, but the blade falls.
Tom cleans his wound while Anna holds the nut.
The flame stops after the machine is off.
They take a bite of the nut.
The automatic machine stays off, so the blade is stored.
Tom's wound heals, and they finish the nut.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在厨房准备一颗坚果。
他们想用刀刃切开坚果。
汤姆的手被咬了一下。
一台自动机器启动了，火焰也出现了。
安娜关掉机器，但刀刃掉了下来。
汤姆清理伤口，安娜拿着坚果。
机器关闭后，火焰熄灭了。
他们又咬了一口坚果。
自动机器保持关闭，所以刀刃被收好。
汤姆的伤口好了，他们吃完了坚果。

title: 市场广告和篮子
sentences: Tom and Anna carry a basket of grain to market.
They want to read an advertisement at the market.
Powder spills beside the basket.
Anna uses a brush, so the powder moves away.
While Tom holds the basket, a needle pricks his glove.
The advertisement explains that the needle came with the powder.
After that, Tom lifts the grain into a clean basket.
Anna uses the brush again before the powder dries.
Then they put the needle in a box.
They read the advertisement, then carry the grain inside.
translations: 汤姆和安娜提着一篮谷物来到市场。
他们想在市场读一则广告。
篮子旁边洒出了粉末。
安娜使用刷子，所以粉末被扫开了。
汤姆扶住篮子时，一根针刺到了他的手套。
广告说明这根针是和粉末一起出现的。
之后，汤姆把谷物移进一个干净的篮子。
粉末变干前，安娜再次使用刷子。
然后他们把针放进盒子。
他们读完广告，然后把谷物带进屋。

title: 花茎上的昆虫
sentences: Tom and Anna hear a rhythm near a flower stem.
They want to guide an insect into a box.
The insect hides under a cloth.
Tom hurts his toe while lifting the cloth.
Anna keeps a grip on the box, but it slips.
The rhythm grows loud, so they wait.
The insect climbs the stem after the noise stops.
Tom uses the cloth to guide it into the box.
Anna keeps her grip while Tom rests his toe.
The rhythm softens, and they return the insect to the stem.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一朵花的花茎旁听见节奏声。
他们想把一只昆虫引进盒子。
昆虫藏在一块布下面。
汤姆提起布时弄伤了脚趾。
安娜抓住盒子，但盒子滑了一下。
节奏声变大了，所以他们停下来等待。
声音停止后，昆虫沿着花茎向上爬。
汤姆用布把它引进盒子。
汤姆休息脚趾时，安娜继续抓紧盒子。
节奏声变轻了，他们把昆虫放回花茎。

title: 港口边的诗和蛇
sentences: Tom and Anna wait by a quiet harbour.
They want to fold a paper verse before the boat leaves.
Mixed colours hide the verse, so Anna cannot read it.
A snake hides under the table.
Tom uses a pump while Anna watches the boat.
Anna lifts the table, but the snake moves.
After the snake leaves, Anna can fold the paper.
The mixed colours fade when Tom uses the pump again.
The verse becomes clear, and the boat is ready.
They read the verse beside the harbour.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在安静的港口旁等候。
他们想在船离开前折好一张诗稿。
混合的颜色遮住了诗，所以安娜读不清。
桌子下面藏着一条蛇。
安娜看着船时，汤姆使用水泵。
安娜抬起桌子，但蛇动了起来。
蛇离开后，安娜可以把纸折好。
汤姆再次使用水泵时，混合的颜色变淡了。
诗变清楚了，船也准备好了。
他们在港口旁读完了这首诗。

title: 排水口旁的铜号
sentences: Tom and Anna work in a repair shop.
Before the sale, they need a copper horn receipt.
A nail holds a receipt, but it hangs above a drain.
Anna's skirt gets wet when the drain spills.
A horn sounds, so Tom closes the door.
Tom removes nail, but receipt is still wet.
Anna lifts her skirt while Tom clears the drain.
After it opens, Tom replaces the nail; Anna reads the receipt.
Then the copper horn dries; the skirt is safe.
They carry the horn and receipt to the customer.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一家修理店工作。
售出前，他们需要一张铜号收据。
一根钉子固定着收据，但收据悬在排水口上方。
排水口漏水时，安娜的裙子湿了。
号角响了，所以汤姆关上门。
汤姆取下钉子，但收据仍然是湿的。
安娜提起裙子，汤姆清理排水口。
排水口打开后，汤姆放回钉子，安娜读了收据。
然后铜号干了，裙子也安全了。
他们把号角和收据带给顾客。

title: 驾驶课前的画布
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a canvas for a driving lesson.
They want to remove a wrong mark from it.
Tom feels shame about the mistake.
Anna can twist a rod to hold the canvas.
The driving lesson starts, but the canvas slips.
Tom hurts his thumb while moving the rod.
Anna can twist the rod again, so the canvas stays flat.
Tom checks his thumb after the lesson starts.
The shame fades when Anna helps him.
They finish the driving lesson with the canvas ready.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为驾驶课准备一块画布。
他们想去掉画布上的错误标记。
汤姆为这个错误感到羞愧。
安娜可以拧动一根杆来固定画布。
驾驶课开始了，但画布滑了下来。
汤姆移动杆时弄伤了拇指。
安娜可以再次拧动杆子，所以画布保持平整。
课程开始后，汤姆检查了拇指。
安娜帮助汤姆时，他的羞愧感渐渐消失。
他们带着准备好的画布完成了驾驶课。

title: 羊毛外套的挂钩
sentences: Tom and Anna sit by a window with a wool coat.
They want to fix a hook before leaving.
Anna feels regret after tearing delicate cloth.
They eat with a fork while Anna checks the hook.
A ray of light shows the delicate tear.
The wool coat slips, and the hook bends.
Anna fixes the hook while Tom holds the coat.
Tom puts the fork away after the cloth is repaired.
Anna feels no regret when the delicate cloth is safe.
A ray warms the wool coat, and they leave.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着一件羊毛外套坐在窗边。
他们想在离开前修好一个挂钩。
安娜撕破了精致的布料，因此感到后悔。
安娜检查挂钩时，他们用叉子吃东西。
一束光照出了精致布料上的裂口。
羊毛外套滑了一下，挂钩弯了。
汤姆拿着外套时，安娜修好了挂钩。
布料修好后，汤姆把叉子放到一旁。
精致布料安全后，安娜不再后悔。
一束光让羊毛外套变暖，他们离开了。

title: 平行道路上的托盘
sentences: Tom and Anna stand beside a cart near parallel roads.
They plan to carry a tray to market.
A stamp is stuck to the tray.
The cart has a stiff wheel, so it will not move.
Tom hurts his chin while pulling the cart.
Anna checks the stiff wheel before they push again.
The stamp falls from the tray when the cart shakes.
Tom holds his chin, but he keeps helping.
The parallel roads lead to the market gate.
Anna fixes the cart, and they carry the tray to market.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在平行道路旁的手推车边。
他们计划把一个托盘送到市场。
托盘上粘着一枚邮票。
手推车有个僵硬的轮子，所以无法移动。
汤姆拉车时弄伤了下巴。
他们再次推动前，安娜检查僵硬的轮子。
手推车摇动时，邮票从托盘上掉下来。
汤姆扶着下巴，但仍然继续帮忙。
平行道路通向市场门口。
安娜修好手推车，他们把托盘送到市场。

title: 抽屉里的衣领和纽扣
sentences: Tom and Anna open a drawer in the costume room.
They need a brass button for a collar.
The collar has a loose stitch.
A bee enters, so Anna closes the drawer.
Tom finds a whip near the door.
The bee circles the drawer while Tom checks the collar.
Anna makes the stitch, but the button stays hidden.
Tom lifts the collar and finds the brass button.
He puts the whip away before the bee returns.
They sew the brass button onto the collar and close the drawer.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在服装室打开一个抽屉。
他们需要一枚衣领用的黄铜纽扣。
衣领上有一处松开的缝线。
一只蜜蜂飞进来，所以安娜关上抽屉。
汤姆在门边找到一根鞭子。
蜜蜂绕着抽屉飞，汤姆检查衣领。
安娜缝好缝线，但纽扣仍然藏着。
汤姆提起衣领，找到了黄铜纽扣。
蜜蜂回来前，他把鞭子收好。
他们把黄铜纽扣缝在衣领上，并关上抽屉。

title: 洗袜子时的冰块
sentences: Tom and Anna wash a sock beside a bowl.
They need soap and liquid to clean it.
A cord blocks the floor, so Anna moves it.
A spoon lies beside the bowl.
Tom can crush ice with the spoon.
Anna adds soap while Tom holds the sock.
The liquid clears after the soap mixes.
Tom can crush the last ice with the spoon.
The sock is clean, but the cord is wet.
They stir the liquid with the spoon and wash the sock.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在碗旁洗一只袜子。
他们需要肥皂和液体来清洗它。
一根绳子挡住地面，所以安娜把它移开。
碗旁放着一把汤匙。
汤姆可以用汤匙把冰压碎。
安娜加肥皂时，汤姆拿着袜子。
肥皂混合后，液体变清了。
汤姆可以用汤匙把最后的冰压碎。
袜子干净了，但绳子是湿的。
他们用汤匙搅拌液体，又洗了袜子。

title: 桌边的铅笔和旧盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna polish a table beside a basin.
They need a drawing pencil.
A pin lies under an old box.
The basin leaks, so Anna moves the table.
Tom may smash the box, but Anna calls it cruel.
Anna lifts the box, but the pencil is not there.
Tom can polish the table while Anna checks the basin.
The pin rolls away, revealing the pencil beside the box.
Then they put the pin in a cup.
They reject the cruel plan to smash it and use the pencil.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在水盆旁擦亮一张桌子。
他们需要一支画画铅笔。
一根别针在旧盒子下面。
水盆漏水了，所以安娜移开桌子。
汤姆可能砸碎盒子，但安娜说那很残忍。
安娜抬起盒子，但铅笔不在那里。
安娜检查水盆时，汤姆可以擦桌子。
别针滚开了，露出盒子旁的铅笔。
然后他们把别针放进一个杯子。
他们拒绝残忍的砸盒子计划，拿起铅笔。

title: 山羊和猴子的房间
sentences: Tom and Anna carry a bucket into an animal room.
They want to see a monkey before lunch.
A feather floats in the bucket.
A goat stands near the door.
The monkey is awake, so Anna keeps quiet.
Anna offers water in the bucket, but the goat knocks it.
Tom steadies the bucket while Anna restores harmony.
The goat drinks after Anna steadies the bucket.
