The feather floats again, and the monkey stays awake.
The animals share the room in harmony before sleep.
translations: 汤姆和安娜提着一个桶进入动物房。
他们想在午饭前看看猴子。
一根羽毛漂浮在桶里。
一只山羊站在门边。
猴子醒着，所以安娜保持安静。
安娜把水倒进桶里，但山羊撞翻了桶。
汤姆扶稳桶，安娜恢复了和谐。
安娜扶稳桶后，山羊喝了水。
羽毛再次漂浮，猴子仍然醒着。
动物们和谐地共享房间，然后睡觉。

title: 雾中的发明测试
sentences: Tom and Anna stand in the mist beside an invention.
Before testing, they check the invention.
A brake is near the wheel.
Tom feels an impulse to run in the mist.
A thread is tied to the screw.
The invention is ready, but the brake is stiff.
Anna uses the brake when the wheel moves.
Tom controls his impulse, so he stays beside Anna.
The thread holds the screw, and the screw is tight.
The invention works before the mist clears.
translations: 汤姆和安娜站在雾中的一项发明旁。
测试前，他们检查这项发明。
刹车在轮子旁边。
汤姆在雾中有一种想奔跑的冲动。
一根线系在螺丝上。
发明已经准备好，但刹车很僵硬。
轮子移动时，安娜使用了刹车。
汤姆控制住冲动，所以留在安娜身边。
线固定住螺丝，螺丝也很紧。
雾散去前，发明运转起来。

title: 包裹里的灯泡
sentences: Tom and Anna find a parcel near a table.
They need a bulb for the dark room.
A hammer lies beside the bulb, but Tom leaves it.
A foolish note is inside the parcel.
A worm crosses the floor, so Anna steps back.
Tom reads the note for a probable answer.
The parcel holds a new bulb.
Anna changes the bulb while Tom moves the hammer.
The worm leaves when the light comes on.
The probable answer is foolish, but the bulb works.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在桌子旁找到一个包裹。
他们需要一只灯泡照亮黑暗的房间。
灯泡旁放着一把锤子，但汤姆没有动它。
包裹里有一张愚蠢的便条。
一条虫子爬过地板，所以安娜退后了。
汤姆读便条，寻找一个可能的答案。
包裹里装着一只新灯泡。
安娜更换灯泡时，汤姆移开锤子。
灯亮起来时，虫子爬走了。
这个可能的答案很愚蠢，但灯泡能用。

title: 娱乐活动中的雨伞
sentences: Tom and Anna tie a knot in an umbrella rope.
They want to open the umbrella at a science amusement.
Ink spills on the table beside an apparatus.
A box of poison is closed, so Anna keeps away.
The knot is tight, but the umbrella will not open.
Tom cleans the ink while Anna checks the apparatus.
The amusement begins when the rain starts.
Anna opens the umbrella after Tom fixes the knot.
The apparatus stays safe beside the poison box.
The ink is gone, and the amusement continues.
translations: 汤姆和安娜把雨伞绳打了一个结。
他们想在科学娱乐活动中打开雨伞。
墨水洒在仪器旁的桌子上。
毒药装在一个关着的盒子里，所以安娜保持距离。
结打得很紧，但雨伞打不开。
汤姆清理墨水时，安娜检查仪器。
下雨时，娱乐活动开始了。
汤姆修好结后，安娜打开了雨伞。
仪器安全地放在毒药盒旁。
墨水消失了，娱乐活动继续进行。

title: 等茶壶烧开
sentences: Tom and Anna wait by a kettle.
They want to make tea with a linen cloth.
Tom has a cough while Anna cleans the table.
Chalk marks the sticky floor.
The kettle is near the wall, but it is not ready.
The waiting continues because the water is cold.
Anna folds the linen cloth and moves the chalk.
Tom's cough improves after he drinks water.
The sticky floor is clean, so the kettle can boil.
The kettle boils after the floor is clean, and the waiting ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在茶壶旁等待。
他们想用亚麻布泡茶。
安娜清理桌子时，汤姆咳嗽了。
粉笔在粘的地板上留下了痕迹。
茶壶在墙边，但还没有准备好。
因为水还是冷的，他们继续等待。
安娜折好亚麻布，并移开粉笔。
汤姆喝水后，咳嗽好了一些。
粘的地板干净了，所以茶壶可以烧水。
地板干净后，茶壶烧开了，等待也结束了。

title: 休息室里的宝石
sentences: Tom and Anna find a jewel under a cushion.
They want to give it to the porter.
A berry sits beside a book.
The book contains prose about the town.
When a whistle sounds, the porter is outside.
Anna calls the porter while Tom checks the cushion.
The porter carries a bag, so the whistle sounds again.
Tom finds the jewel under the cushion.
Anna reads the prose while the porter takes it.
They return the berry, but the porter thanks them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在垫子下面找到一颗宝石。
他们想把它交给搬运工。
一本书旁放着一颗浆果。
书里有一篇关于小镇的散文。
哨声响起时，搬运工在外面。
安娜叫搬运工，汤姆则检查垫子。
搬运工提着袋子，所以哨声又响了。
汤姆发现宝石在垫子下面。
安娜读散文时，搬运工拿走了宝石。
他们归还浆果，但搬运工向他们道谢。

title: 雷雨中的农舍
sentences: Tom and Anna wash a stocking in the farmhouse.
They want to use a comb after the wash.
Thunder sounds over the house.
A plough stands near the field.
A box has a hollow space beside the stocking.
Wax is on the table, so Anna moves it.
The thunder stops when the rain slows.
Anna uses the comb to clean the stocking.
Tom checks the hollow box while the plough waits outside.
The stocking is clean, so they move the wax beside the comb.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在农舍里洗一只长袜。
他们想在洗完后使用一把梳子。
房子上方传来雷声。
田地旁停着一台犁。
一个盒子在袜子旁有一处空洞。
桌上有蜡，所以安娜把它移开。
雨势变小时，雷声停止了。
安娜用梳子把袜子清理干净。
犁在屋外等着时，汤姆检查空盒子。
袜子干净了，所以他们把蜡放到梳子旁。

title: 花园里的装饰盒
sentences: Tom and Anna work in a fertile garden.
They want to paste an ornament on a box.
The dirty table gives Tom disgust.
Boiling water sits beside a sponge.
Anna lifts the sponge, but the water is too hot.
Tom opens a window while the sponge cools.
Dirty water leaves, and the table becomes clean.
The boiling water cools, so Anna uses the sponge again.
The disgust fades when the table is clean.
Tom can paste the ornament on the box in the fertile garden.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在肥沃的花园里工作。
他们想把一个装饰物粘在盒子上。
脏桌子让汤姆感到恶心。
海绵旁放着一碗沸水。
安娜拿起海绵，但水太热了。
海绵冷却时，汤姆打开了窗户。
脏水流走了，桌子变干净了。
沸水冷却后，安娜再次使用海绵。
桌子干净后，恶心的感觉消失了。
汤姆可以在肥沃的花园里把装饰物粘到盒子上。

title: 花园里的果冻袋
sentences: Tom and Anna eat jelly in a garden.
They want to open a jar with a cork.
A spade rests near the flower bed.
Scissors hang beside a bag on the wall.
Their digestion is slow, so Anna drinks water.
The hanging bag holds the jar of jelly.
The jelly is sweet, but the cork is tight.
After Anna uses the scissors, she cuts cloth and opens the cork.
While Tom moves the spade away from the table, Anna rests.
Their digestion improves, and the hanging bag is empty.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在花园里吃果冻。
他们想打开一个带软木塞的罐子。
花坛旁放着一把铲子。
墙上的袋子旁挂着一把剪刀。
他们消化得很慢，所以安娜喝了水。
悬挂的袋子里装着果冻罐。
果冻很甜，但软木塞很紧。
安娜使用剪刀后，剪布并打开软木塞。
汤姆把铲子移到远离桌子的地方时，安娜休息了。
他们消化得好多了，悬挂的袋子也空了。

title: 鸡舍里的弯曲木板
sentences: Tom and Anna see a fowl near a bent board.
They want to fix the bent board.
The board is feeble, so Anna holds it.
An elastic band lies on the table.
Tom begins to sneeze in the dusty room.
The fowl walks around the board while they work.
Anna uses the elastic band to hold the bent board.
The feeble board breaks when Tom sneezes.
Tom may sneeze again, but the fowl moves outside.
The elastic band holds, so they move the bent board away.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在弯曲木板旁看见一只家禽。
他们想修好这块弯曲的木板。
木板很脆弱，所以安娜扶住了它。
桌子上放着一根松紧带。
汤姆在满是灰尘的房间里开始打喷嚏。
他们工作时，家禽绕着木板走动。
安娜用松紧带固定住弯曲的木板。
汤姆打喷嚏时，脆弱的木板断了。
汤姆可能又打喷嚏，但家禽走到了外面。
松紧带固定住木板，所以他们把弯曲的木板移开。

title: 从四月到十二月的拜访
sentences: Tom and Anna meet at the centre in April.
They choose a December visit date.
Anna cannot find the old ticket.
Tom asks Anna's age while checking the calendar.
The ticket costs one cent, so Anna searches her bag.
They return to the centre, but the ticket is missing.
Tom writes Anna's age on a card for the clerk.
The clerk finds the ticket under the December calendar.
Anna cannot use the old ticket; a new one costs one cent.
They plan the December visit at the centre before April.
translations: 汤姆和安娜四月在中心见面。
他们选择一个十二月的拜访日期。
安娜找不到那张旧票。
汤姆查看日历时问了安娜的年龄。
票价是一美分，所以安娜翻找她的包。
他们回到中心，但票不见了。
汤姆把安娜的年龄写在卡片上给职员看。
职员在十二月的日历下面找到了票。
安娜不能使用旧票；新票只要一美分。
他们在四月前于中心计划十二月的拜访。

title: 会议前的电子邮件
sentences: Tom and Anna read a January email.
They need to send a dollar before Friday's meeting.
The email has its old address.
Anna writes a new email because the address is wrong.
The February meeting is near, so Tom checks the calendar.
He checks its new address, but the email is not ready.
Anna puts the dollar in an envelope.
Tom sends the dollar after Anna fixes the email.
The January email explains the Friday meeting.
They meet in February when the new email arrives.
translations: 汤姆和安娜阅读一封一月的电子邮件。
他们需要在星期五的会议前寄出一美元。
邮件上有一个旧地址。
地址不对，所以安娜写了一封新邮件。
二月的会议临近了，所以汤姆查看日历。
他检查新地址，但邮件还没有准备好。
安娜把一美元放进信封。
安娜修好邮件后，汤姆寄出了这一美元。
一月的邮件说明了星期五的会议。
新邮件到达后，他们在二月见面。

title: 六月的测量路线
sentences: Tom and Anna travel in June.
They want to walk one mile to a lake.
The road is one kilometre long, but rain begins.
The picnic table is one metre wide.
July is warmer than June, so they bring water.
They wait and walk later after the rain.
Tom walks one mile while Anna watches the road.
They reach the next kilometre marker before returning.
Anna measures the table in one metre sections.
They return later in June, before July begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在六月旅行。
他们想走一英里到湖边。
这条路有一公里长，但开始下雨了。
野餐桌有一米宽。
七月比六月暖和，所以他们带上了水。
他们等待着，雨后再晚些走。
汤姆走一英里，安娜则看着道路。
他们到达下一个一公里标志后才返回。
安娜把桌子分成一米一段来测量。
他们在六月晚些时候返回，赶在七月开始前。

title: 邻居和社区项目
sentences: Tom calls his neighbour on Monday.
They want to plan a programme for the community centre.
The neighbour is away in October, so Anna waits.
Anna leaves a phone near the door for him.
November is cold, so they choose an indoor room.
Tom calls the neighbour on the phone, but there is no answer.
They delay the programme while they check the dates.
The neighbour returns before October ends.
Anna answers the phone when the neighbour calls.
They start the programme on Monday in November.
translations: 汤姆星期一给邻居打电话。
他们想为社区中心安排一个项目。
邻居十月份不在家，所以安娜等着。
安娜把电话放在门边等他来电。
十一月很冷，所以他们选择室内房间。
汤姆用电话给邻居打去，但没有人接。
他们一边核对日期，一边推迟项目。
邻居在十月结束前回来了。
邻居打来电话时，安娜接了起来。
他们在十一月的星期一开始了项目。

title: 星期日的新风格
sentences: Tom and Anna meet on Saturday to choose clothes.
They want to speak about a new style for Sunday.
Anna wears a T-shirt, but September weather is warm.
Tom checks the weather, and the T-shirt feels too hot.
The September afternoon stays warm, so Anna waits.
Tom can speak clearly about the style.
While Anna finds another T-shirt on Saturday, Tom waits.
The style looks better with the new T-shirt.
They choose the T-shirt for Sunday.
They rest on Sunday after the event.
translations: 汤姆和安娜星期六见面挑选衣服。
他们想谈谈星期日要穿的新风格。
安娜穿着一件短袖衫，但九月天气很暖。
汤姆查看天气，短袖衫让人觉得太热。
九月的下午仍然很暖，所以安娜等待着。
汤姆可以清楚地谈论这种风格。
安娜星期六寻找另一件短袖衫时，汤姆在等待。
穿上新短袖衫后，这种风格看起来更好。
他们为星期日选好了短袖衫。
活动结束后，他们在星期日休息。

title: 安排星期二和星期三的见面
sentences: Tom and Anna meet their friends on Thursday.
They plan to help them on Tuesday.
Tom carries his bag to the meeting room.
Anna asks which room is open.
The meeting moves to Wednesday, but friends need help Tuesday.
They call them after lunch on Tuesday.
Tom leaves his bag, but the friends are not there.
When Anna checks which room, she finds them.
The Thursday meeting is busy, so they choose Wednesday.
They help them on Tuesday and plan the Wednesday meeting.
translations: 汤姆和安娜星期四与朋友见面。
他们计划星期二帮助朋友们。
汤姆把他的包带到会议室。
安娜问哪个房间开着。
会议改到星期三，但朋友们星期二需要帮助。
他们在星期二午饭后给朋友们打电话。
汤姆放下他的包，但朋友们不在那里。
安娜查看哪个房间时，找到了他们。
星期四的会议很忙，所以他们选择星期三。
他们星期二帮助朋友们，并计划星期三的会议。

title: 一起制定搬运计划
sentences: Tom asks what Anna needs.
They would move a box to make room.
Their room has a heavy box.
Anna has my book on the table.
Tom could lift the box, but it slips.
They think about another way.
Tom asks what tool they need.
Anna says they could use a cart, so Tom waits.
After they think the cart will help, Anna returns my book.
They would finish when their room is clear.
translations: 汤姆问安娜需要什么。
他们想搬开一个箱子来腾出空间。
他们的房间里有一个沉重的箱子。
安娜把我的书放在桌上。
汤姆可以抬起箱子，但箱子滑了。
他们思考另一个办法。
汤姆问他们需要什么工具。
安娜说他们可以用一辆手推车，所以汤姆等着。
他们认为手推车会有帮助后，安娜还回了我的书。
房间清空后，他们就会完成搬运。

title: 找回客人的包
sentences: Tom and Anna walk into a room.
They want to find your bag for the visitor.
The room is just beyond the door.
Our table is near the wall.
Anna also carries a book while Tom checks the door.
Tom checks the chair, but the bag is not there.
They go into the room again after the door opens.
The answer is just under our table.
When Anna finds your bag, Tom also finds a key.
They want to go home after the visitor arrives.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走进一个房间。
他们想为客人找到你的包。
房间就在门的另一边。
我们的桌子在墙边。
安娜还带着一本书，汤姆则检查门。
汤姆检查椅子，但包不在那里。
门打开后，他们再次走进房间。
答案就在我们的桌子下面。
安娜找到你的包时，汤姆也找到了一把钥匙。
客人到达后，他们想回家。

title: 找答案和回家的路
sentences: Tom should find the answer before they leave.
They must tell the truth about a missing box.
Many people wait in the room, so Anna asks for quiet.
Anna says, Yeah, the door is open.
Tom should read the paper beside the door.
They must find a place for the box.
Many books are on the table while Anna waits.
Anna can tell Tom the answer after she reads.
Yeah, the map shows another room, says Anna.
They find the box in the right room and must close the door.
translations: 汤姆应该在离开前找到答案。
他们必须说出丢失盒子的真相。
房间里有很多人在等，所以安娜请大家安静。
安娜说，是的，门开着。
汤姆应该读一读门边的纸。
他们必须为盒子找到一个地方。
桌子上有很多书。
安娜读完后可以把答案告诉汤姆。
安娜说，是的，地图显示另一个房间。
他们在正确的房间找到盒子，必须关上门。

title: 帮助孩子搬家

They want to see a child needing a book.
The child has a good life with family.
The box is too heavy, so Anna moves it.
Anna has her own book, but shares it today.
Tom says, Oh, the door is open.
The child can help us when the box is light.
They want to make the child's life better.
The box is too big for the room.
Before leaving, Anna gives the child her own book; Tom says, Oh, thank you.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在中心帮助我们。
他们想见一个需要书的孩子。
这个孩子和家人一起过着美好的生活。
盒子太重了，所以安娜把它移开。
安娜有自己的书，但今天愿意分享。
汤姆说，哦，门开着。
盒子变轻后，孩子可以帮助我们。
他们想让孩子的生活变得更好。
盒子对房间来说太大了。
离开前，安娜把自己的书给孩子，汤姆说，哦，谢谢。

title: 离开小镇的旅程
sentences: Tom and Anna call the local office before they leave town.
They want to try a new trip together.

The bus is late after the call.

She can try another bus, but it is full.
Tom hears the clerk say Anna can become a better guide.
They leave town when the bus arrives.
The trip can mean a new start for them.
The world opens after they leave.

他们想一起尝试一次新的旅程。

打完电话后，公共汽车却晚点了。
世界似乎很大，所以安娜研究了地图。
她可以尝试另一辆公共汽车，但车上已经坐满了。
汤姆听到职员说安娜可以成为更好的向导。
公共汽车到达后，他们离开了小镇。
这次旅行可能意味着一个新的开始。
离开后，世界向他们敞开了。

title: 旧房间里的感觉
sentences: Tom can ask Anna about the old room.
They want to find something before entering.
Most chairs are wet, so Anna can feel cold air.
Tom has never seen the room open.
The room is really quiet, but the door is stuck.
Tom can ask about something behind the door.
Anna can feel better when they open a window.
They have never opened the old door before.
The answer is really clear on the paper.
Most of the room is ready, so they enter together.

他们想在进入前找到某样东西。
大多数椅子都是湿的，所以安娜能感觉到冷空气。
汤姆以前从未见过这个房间打开。
房间真的很安静，但门卡住了。
汤姆可以询问门后的某样东西。
他们打开窗户时，安娜感觉好些了。
他们以前从未打开过那扇旧门。
纸上的答案真的很清楚。
房间大部分已经准备好，所以他们一起进入。

title: 带学生找到正确区域

They want to show the student a new area.
The area has a problem with its door.
Anna finds another door near the wall.
The student waits while Tom shows the map.
However, the problem is still there.
The other area is open, so Anna leads the student inside.
Tom can show the student the right place.
However, another door is not locked.
The problem has an easy answer when Anna checks the map.

他们想把一个新区域展示给学生。
这个区域的门有问题。
安娜在墙边找到另一扇门。
汤姆展示地图时，学生在一旁等候。

另一个区域是开放的，所以安娜带学生走了进去。
汤姆可以把正确的位置展示给学生。
然而，另一扇门没有锁。
安娜查看地图时，发现问题有一个简单的答案。

title: 四位成员的聚会准备
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a party in a large room.
They want four members to arrive before lunch.
Each member needs a chair, but one is broken.
The large room is cold, so Tom closes a window.
The party cannot begin until Anna finds another chair.
Tom puts four cups on the table, and Anna brings a chair.
Each member sits down, so the party can begin.
The last member brings a blanket.
Four members share it, and the room feels better.
They end the party after each member leaves.

他们想让四位成员在午饭前到场。
每位成员都需要一把椅子，但有一把椅子坏了。
大房间很冷，所以汤姆关上一扇窗。
安娜找到另一把椅子前，聚会不能开始。
汤姆把四个杯子放在桌上，安娜带来一把椅子。
每位成员坐下后，聚会就可以开始了。
最后一位成员带来一条毯子。
四位成员分享毯子，房间感觉暖和了。
每位成员离开后，他们结束了聚会。

title: 去当地商店的路线
sentences: Tom and Anna always walk to the local shop.
They follow the road before it opens.
A few people wait, but it stays closed.
During the wait, Anna works without a break.
Tom always carries a small bag, so he checks the road.
The local shop opens when the few people knock.
They follow the road inside, but Anna forgets the bread.
During the search, Tom works without help.
Anna finds the bread, and the shop becomes quiet.
They always walk home after the local shop closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜总是走到当地商店。
他们想在商店开门前沿着道路走。
几个人在门边等待，但门一直关着。
等待时，安娜不停地工作。
汤姆总是带着一个小包，所以他查看道路。
几个人敲门后，当地商店开门了。
他们沿着道路走进商店，但安娜忘了买面包。
寻找面包时，汤姆独自工作。
安娜找到了面包，商店也安静下来。
当地商店关门后，他们总是走路回家。

title: 写给学校的信
sentences: Tom and Anna bring five books to the office.
They want to write a letter for school.
Anna hears music from the next room.
Tom may live near the school next year.
He writes the address, but the letter is missing.
Anna brings five envelopes from the next room.
She can hear the next bell, so Tom checks the desk.
Tom can write another letter after finding paper.
They live near school, and the next letter is ready.
When they bring it, Anna can hear Tom read what he wrote.
translations: 汤姆和安娜把五本书带到办公室。
他们想为学校写一封信。
安娜听见隔壁房间传来音乐。
汤姆明年可能住在学校附近。
他写下地址，但信不见了。
安娜从隔壁房间带来五个信封。
她可以听见下一声铃响，所以汤姆检查了桌子。
找到纸后，汤姆可以再写一封信。
他们住在学校附近，下一封信也准备好了。
他们带来信时，安娜可以听见汤姆读出他写的内容。

title: 家里的会议消息
sentences: Tom and Anna stay home today.
They want to read information about a city meeting.
Anna can believe the meeting will happen today.
The home is quiet, so Tom opens the paper.
A million people live in the city.
The information is on the paper, but the date is missing.
Tom can believe the report after Anna checks the date.
The meeting can happen today when the town hall opens.
They return home after the meeting.
They return under a million city lights.
translations: 汤姆和安娜今天待在家里。
他们想阅读关于城市会议的信息。
安娜可以相信会议今天会举行。
家里很安静，所以汤姆打开了纸张。
这座城市有一百万人居住。
信息写在纸上，但日期不见了。
安娜核对日期后，汤姆可以相信这份报告。
市政厅开门时，会议今天可以举行。
会议后，他们回到了家。
他们在一百万盏城市灯光下回家。

title: 书店里的学习和付款
sentences: Tom and Anna study books in a bookshop.
They want to pay for both books.
The shop is often busy after school.
A friend is away today.
The books cost a lot, so Anna checks the price.
Anna can study in a quiet room.
The friend calls, so Tom can pay for both books.
The shop is often open late.
The friend is not away now because she arrives.
While they study, the books help them a lot.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在书店学习书本内容。
他们想为两本书付款。
放学后，商店经常很忙。
一位朋友今天不在。
书很贵，所以安娜检查了价格。
安娜可以在安静的房间里学习。
朋友打来电话，所以汤姆可以为两本书付款。
商店经常开到很晚。
朋友到了，所以现在不在外面了。
他们学习时，这些书对他们帮助很大。

title: 车旁的工作面试
sentences: Tom and Anna meet around a car near the office.
They want to find a job.
The job can include travel around the town.
The car is near the door.
There is nothing on the seat, so Anna checks the bag.
Tom meets the manager inside the office.
The job can include work around the town.
Anna walks around the car while Tom talks.
There is nothing in the bag when Anna checks again.
Before they leave, Tom can meet Anna at the office.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在办公室附近的车旁见面。
他们想找一份工作。
这份工作可能包括在小镇周围出行。
车就在门边。
座位上什么也没有，所以安娜检查了包。
汤姆在办公室里见到了经理。
这份工作可以包括在小镇周围工作。
汤姆交谈时，安娜绕着车走。
安娜再次检查时，包里什么也没有。

title: 一起玩游戏
sentences: Tom and Anna sit at a table with children.
They want to play a game.
The report shows a poor result from the last game.
Tom can stand near the door.
Anna sits with the children while Tom reads.
They play until the light is low.
The game is simple, so everyone joins when Anna explains.
Tom can stand and read the report.
Anna can sit by the table after Tom reads.

title: 现代电视节目
sentences: Tom and Anna watch television.
They want to compare two programmes before dinner.
The modern programme is nice, but its final part is missing.
Anna can prepare the room while Tom checks the television.
They compare the programmes and write one question.
The television is above the table, so Anna can prepare a new card.
The modern programme starts when the guests arrive.
Tom reads the final question.
Anna can compare both answers.
The television shows the answer, and the final programme is nice.
translations: 汤姆和安娜看电视。
他们想在晚餐前比较两个节目。
现代节目很不错，但它缺少最后一部分。
安娜准备房间时，汤姆检查电视。
他们比较这些节目，并写下一个问题。
电视在桌子上方，所以安娜可以准备一张新卡片。
客人到达时，现代节目开始了。
汤姆阅读最后一个问题。
安娜可以比较两个答案。
电视显示了答案，最后的节目也很不错。

title: 每个人的技能
sentences: Tom and Anna see a pretty picture.
They want everybody to learn one skill.
The teacher sends an OK message because the class needs a plan.
Anna has a useful skill, but Tom may forget the old steps.
Everybody sits in the room while Anna reads the message.
Tom may forget the old plan if the message is not clear.
The pretty picture shows the skill.
Anna sends another message, so everybody can practice.
Tom improves his skill after the practice.
Anna says, OK, the plan is ready.
translations: 汤姆和安娜看见一幅漂亮的画。
他们想让每个人学习一项技能。
老师发来一条“好”的消息，因为班级需要一个计划。
安娜有一项有用的技能，但汤姆可能会忘记旧步骤。
安娜阅读消息时，每个人都坐在房间里。
如果消息不清楚，汤姆可能会忘记旧计划。
漂亮的画展示了这项技能。
安娜又发了一条消息，所以每个人都可以练习。
练习后，汤姆提高了自己的技能。
安娜说，好，计划准备好了。

title: 公园里的账单
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a park.
They want to finish a short report before the meeting.
Tom does not want to miss the meeting.
The bill is on the table, but the title is unclear.
Anna can check the title while Tom checks the bill.
The park is near the office, so they work there.
Tom can finish the page after Anna checks the bill.
Anna can check the bill before Tom finishes.
Tom does not miss the final bus.
The title is clear, so they finish the report there.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一个公园。
他们想在会议前完成一份简短的报告。
汤姆不想错过会议。
账单在桌子上，但标题不清楚。
安娜可以检查标题，汤姆则检查账单。
公园在办公室附近，所以他们在那里工作。
安娜检查账单后，汤姆可以完成这一页。
在汤姆完成前，安娜可以检查账单。
汤姆没有错过最后一班公共汽车。
标题很清楚，所以他们在那里完成了报告。

title: 改善顾客服务
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a shop.
They want to improve the service for every customer.
A customer waits near the door because the shop is closed.
Tom says sorry because the customer needs an answer.
Anna can guess the customer needs help.
A post explains when the shop will open.
They visit the customer while Anna checks the post.
The customer reads the post, so the wait becomes easier.
Anna can guess the customer's question.
Tom says sorry again, and Anna can improve the service.
translations: 汤姆和安娜拜访一家商店。
他们想为每位顾客改善服务。
一位顾客在门边等待，因为商店关门了。
汤姆说对不起，因为这位顾客需要一个答复。
安娜可以猜到这位顾客需要帮助。
墙上的通知说明商店什么时候开门。
他们接待顾客时，安娜检查通知。
顾客读了通知，所以等待变得轻松了。
安娜可以猜到顾客的问题。
汤姆再次说对不起，安娜可以改善服务。

title: 今晚的广播采访
sentences: Tom and Anna sit beside the radio.
They want to hear a popular interview tonight.
The radio is quiet, but the interview time is unclear.
Anna says, Imagine yourself on the popular show, while Tom checks the schedule.
They listen again, so they find the new time.
Anna tells Tom, Imagine yourself speaking to the guest.
Tom writes the time before the interview begins.
The popular interview starts at eight.
Tom enjoys the interview, and Anna hears the guest.
They listen to the radio after the interview tonight.
translations: 汤姆和安娜听收音机。
他们想今晚收听一场受欢迎的采访。
收音机很安静，但采访时间不清楚。
安娜说，想象你自己出现在受欢迎的节目中，而汤姆检查日程。
他们再次收听收音机，所以找到了新的时间。
安娜告诉汤姆：想象你自己和嘉宾交谈。
采访开始前，汤姆写下时间。
受欢迎的采访八点开始。
汤姆享受采访，安娜听着嘉宾的声音。
采访后，今晚他们又收听了收音机。

title: 杂志里的歌曲
sentences: Tom and Anna open a magazine.
They want somebody to sing at the meeting.
The text is useful, but the song has no final line.
Anna reads the text while Tom checks the magazine.
The magazine has thirty pages, so Tom finds the song.
Somebody waits by the door when the meeting begins.
The useful text gives the singer a line.
Tom helps somebody sing after Anna points to it.
The magazine has thirty pages, and the class applauds.
Somebody can sing the song, so the meeting ends well.
translations: 汤姆和安娜打开一本杂志。
他们想让某个人在会议上唱歌。
这段文字很有用，但歌曲没有最后一句。
安娜阅读文字时，汤姆检查杂志。
杂志有三十页，所以汤姆找到了那首歌。
会议开始时，有人在门边等候。
这段有用的文字给歌手提供了一句歌词。
安娜指向歌词后，汤姆帮助某个人唱歌。
杂志有三十页，班级鼓起了掌。
某个人可以唱这首歌，所以会议顺利结束。

title: 积极的合作伙伴
sentences: Tom and Anna receive an address for a partner.
They want to send an interesting object.
The object is ready, but the address is unclear.
Anna has fifty cards, so she checks the first one.
Tom asks the partner to compare cards while Anna checks the address.
A positive note shows the correct address.
Anna finds the interesting object beside the door.
The partner sends a positive reply after reading the note.
Tom counts fifty cards, and they pack the object.
They send the address and object to their partner.
translations: 汤姆和安娜收到一个伙伴的地址。
他们想寄出一件有趣的物品。
物品已经准备好，但地址不清楚。
安娜有五十张卡片，所以她检查第一张。
汤姆请伙伴比较卡片，安娜同时检查地址。
一张肯定的便条显示了正确地址。
安娜在门边找到了那件有趣的物品。
伙伴读完便条后发来肯定的答复。
汤姆数了五十张卡片，他们把物品装好。
他们把地址和物品寄给伙伴。

title: 厨房里的晚餐
sentences: Tom and Anna work in a kitchen.
They prepare dinner and read a newspaper.
A painting is above the table, but the kitchen is dark.
A scientist brings a note while Anna starts dinner.
The rich family waits in the kitchen.
Tom reads the newspaper, so Anna looks for light.
The scientist turns on the light in the dark room.
The kitchen becomes bright, and the painting looks clear.
The scientist checks the note before the family eats.
The rich family enjoys dinner, and Tom closes the newspaper.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在厨房里工作。
他们准备晚餐并阅读一份报纸。
桌子上方有一幅画，但厨房很暗。
一位科学家带来一张便条，安娜开始准备晚餐。
这个富有的家庭在厨房里等待。
汤姆阅读报纸，所以安娜寻找光线。
科学家在黑暗的房间里打开了灯。
厨房变得明亮，画也看清楚了。
科学家在家人用餐前检查便条。
富有的家庭享用晚餐，汤姆合上了报纸。

title: 出生证明
sentences: Tom and Anna plan travel to an office.
They want to travel fast before it closes.
Anna was born there, but her record is missing.
Tom packs an extra bag while Anna checks a road video.
The video shows a fast route, so they take it.
At the office, Anna explains where she was born.
The clerk watches the video and searches files.
After a quarter hour, the clerk finds the record.
The extra bag holds a quarter-hour ticket.
They travel home after the record arrives.
translations: 汤姆和安娜计划去一个办事处。
他们想在办事处关门前快速出发。
安娜出生在那里，但她的记录不见了。
汤姆收拾了一个额外的包，安娜则检查道路视频。
视频显示了一条快速路线，所以他们选择了它。
在办公室，安娜说明了自己出生的地方。
职员观看视频，查找档案。
一刻钟后，职员找到了记录。
额外的包里有一张四分之一小时的票。
记录到达后，他们回家了。

title: 餐厅里的茶
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a restaurant.
They want to drink tea with Anna's mum.
Anna's mum waits because the table is not ready.
Tom is interested, but tea is below coffee.
A reader sits nearby while Anna checks the cups.
The restaurant is quiet, so Tom reads the menu.
Anna's mum brings tea when the table is ready.
Tom is still interested, and the reader shows a page.
The tea is below the cup, so Anna moves it.
Tom and Anna leave the restaurant after tea.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一家餐厅。
他们想和安娜的妈妈一起喝茶。
安娜的妈妈在等待，因为桌子还没有准备好。
汤姆很感兴趣，但茶在咖啡下面。
一位读者坐在附近，安娜则检查杯子。
餐厅很安静，所以汤姆阅读菜单。
桌子准备好后，安娜的妈妈端来了茶。
汤姆仍然感兴趣，读者给他看了一页。
茶在杯子下面，所以安娜把它移开。
喝完茶后，汤姆和安娜离开餐厅。

title: 周末的谈话
sentences: Tom and Anna begin a conversation.
They want nobody to miss the lesson.
The first sentence is perfect, but the conversation has no beginning.
The weekend starts in the morning.
Anna explains the beginning while Tom reads the sentence.
The conversation continues, so nobody leaves.
Tom repeats the perfect sentence.
Anna gives the conversation a clear beginning.
Nobody reads the sentence again.
They finish the lesson before the weekend begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜开始一段谈话。
他们想让没有人错过这节课。
第一句话很完美，但谈话没有开头。
周末早上开始。
安娜解释开头时，汤姆阅读句子。
谈话继续进行，所以没有人离开。
汤姆重复这句完美的话。
安娜给这段谈话一个清楚的开头。
没有人再次阅读这句话。
他们在周末开始前完成了课程。

title: 八月的博物馆
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a museum in August.
They want to find a pair of paintings.
The driver waits because one painting is missing.
The meaning is clear, but its pair is not there.
Anna does an exercise while Tom checks the museum map.
They search another room when the museum opens.
The driver points to a case, and Tom finds the pair.
Anna explains the meaning while the driver returns.
The exercise is simple, so Anna repeats it.
The pair is displayed, and they leave the museum in August.
translations: 汤姆和安娜八月参观博物馆。
他们想找到一对画。
司机在等候，因为一幅画不见了。
这幅画的含义很清楚，但另一幅不在那里。
安娜做练习时，汤姆查看博物馆地图。
博物馆开放后，他们寻找另一个房间。
司机指向一个柜子，汤姆找到了这一对画。
安娜解释含义时，司机回来了。
练习很简单，所以安娜重复了一遍。
这一对画展出后，他们在八月离开博物馆。

title: 公寓里的电话课
sentences: Tom and Anna live in an apartment.
They want a ride to school before the lesson.
Anna's dad waits near the door because the telephone is silent.
Tom puts on his clothes while Anna checks the telephone.
The lesson starts soon, but the ride is not ready.
The apartment is quiet, so Anna's dad calls the telephone.
The telephone rings, and the ride arrives.
Tom takes the ride to school with his dad.
The clothes are ready for the lesson.
Tom and Anna start the lesson after the ride.
translations: 汤姆和安娜住在一间公寓里。
他们想在上课前乘车去学校。
安娜的爸爸在门边等待，因为电话没有声音。
汤姆穿上衣服，安娜检查电话。
课程很快开始，但车还没有准备好。
公寓很安静，所以安娜的爸爸拨打电话。
电话响了，车马上到了。
汤姆和爸爸乘车去学校。
上课用的衣服准备好了。
汤姆和安娜乘车后开始上课。

title: 农民的照片
sentences: Tom and Anna study a farm photo.
They want to meet a farmer and see land.
The farmer has forty animals, but a visitor cannot see them.
The visitor waits because the farmer is busy.
Anna can prefer coffee while Tom checks the photo.
Tom shows the photo, and the farmer opens the gate.
The farmer leads the visitor into the field.
The visitor counts forty animals beside the fence.
Anna can prefer coffee after the farmer offers two drinks.
The farmer thanks the visitor, and Tom keeps the photo.
translations: 汤姆和安娜研究一张农场照片。
他们想见一位农民并看看土地。
农民有四十只动物，但一位访客看不见它们。
农民很忙，所以访客在等待。
汤姆检查照片时，安娜可以选择咖啡。
汤姆展示照片，农民打开了门。
农民带访客走进田地。
访客在栅栏旁数了四十只动物。
农民提供两种饮料后，安娜可以选择咖啡。
农民感谢访客，汤姆保存了照片。

title: 交通中的重复练习
sentences: Tom and Anna wait for a bus.
They want to repeat the lesson before class.
Anna is afraid of traffic, so they stay on the sidewalk.
The bus is late, but the lesson is wonderful.
Tom can repeat the first sentence twice.
Traffic moves slowly while Anna reads the lesson.
The bus arrives when traffic clears.
Anna is not afraid now.
Tom can repeat the answer twice.
The wonderful lesson continues on the bus.
translations: 汤姆和安娜等待一辆公共汽车。
他们想在上课前重复这堂课。
安娜害怕交通，所以他们站在人行道上。
公共汽车晚点了，但这堂课很精彩。
汤姆可以把第一句话重复两遍。
交通移动得很慢，安娜一边读课文。
交通畅通后，公共汽车到了。
安娜现在不害怕了。
汤姆可以把答案重复两遍。
精彩的课程在公共汽车上继续。

title: 足球比赛的描述
sentences: Tom and Anna watch football.
They want to write a description of the game.
Hey, the football game is starting.
Tom makes a mistake because he writes too fast.
The team has twelve players, but the description misses one name.
The weather is cool while Anna writes the description.
Tom corrects the mistake when Anna reads the list.
Hey, the game is exciting, and the team cheers.
Twelve fans cheer for the team.
The cool air helps them finish the description.
translations: 汤姆和安娜观看足球比赛。
他们想写一段比赛描述。
嘿，足球比赛开始了。
汤姆写得太快，所以犯了一个错误。
球队有十二名球员，但描述漏掉了一个名字。
安娜写描述时，天气很凉爽。
安娜阅读名单时，汤姆改正了错误。
嘿，比赛很精彩，球队也在欢呼。
十二名球迷为球队加油。
凉爽的空气帮助他们完成描述。

title: 互联网教室
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a classroom.
They want to take a photograph for the lesson.
The internet is slow, so the upload seems dangerous.
A famous teacher is waiting, but the answer is negative.
The classroom is quiet while the teacher checks the camera.
The famous teacher finds a safe place for the photograph.
Tom uses the internet again, and the upload starts.
The negative answer changes when the teacher helps.
The internet works, so Anna takes the photograph.
They leave the classroom, and the upload is not dangerous.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入一间教室。
他们想为课程拍一张照片。
互联网很慢，所以上传似乎很危险。
一位著名的老师在等待，但答案是否定的。
老师检查相机时，教室很安静。
这位著名的老师找到了安全的拍照地点。
汤姆再次使用互联网，上传开始了。
老师帮忙后，否定的答案发生了变化。
互联网恢复后，安娜拍下了照片。
他们离开教室，上传并不危险。

title: 泳池里的演员
sentences: Tom and Anna welcome an actor.
They want to climb near the pool before lunch.
The actor eats chicken, but the fourth chair is empty.
The pool is clean, so Anna checks the steps.
Anna can climb the steps while Tom welcomes the actor.
The actor says welcome when the door opens.
Tom finds the fourth step near the pool.
The chicken is ready after the actor finishes.
The pool is open, and Anna can climb again.
Tom and Anna welcome the actor before lunch.
translations: 汤姆和安娜欢迎一位演员。
他们想在午餐前爬到泳池附近。
演员吃鸡肉，但第四把椅子是空的。
泳池很干净，所以安娜检查台阶。
汤姆欢迎演员时，安娜可以爬上台阶。
门打开时，演员说欢迎。
汤姆在泳池附近找到了第四级台阶。
演员吃完后，鸡肉准备好了。
泳池开放了，安娜可以再次攀爬。
汤姆和安娜在午餐前欢迎演员。

title: 卧室里的午餐
sentences: Tom and Anna wait in a bedroom at a clinic.
They want to prepare lunch before the nurse's visit.
The lunch is expensive, and the correct address is missing.
A nurse waits while Tom checks the old letter.
The nurse asks for the address and counts sixty letters.
The bedroom is quiet, so Anna prepares lunch.
Tom finds the correct address in the letter.
Anna prepares the lunch after Tom finds it.
The expensive lunch is ready for the nurse.
The nurse receives the correct address and counts sixty letters.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在诊所的卧室里等候。
他们想在护士来访前准备午餐。
午餐很贵，而且正确的地址不见了。
护士在等待，汤姆则检查旧信。
护士询问地址，并数了六十个词。
卧室很安静，所以安娜准备午餐。
汤姆在信里找到了正确的地址。
汤姆找到地址后，安娜准备了午餐。
昂贵的午餐已经为护士准备好了。
护士收到正确地址，又数了六十个词。

title: 忙碌的舞蹈课
sentences: Tom and Anna sit at a desk.
They want to learn a dance.
Fifteen students are in the room.
One student is sick and cannot join.
The teacher is busy, so the class needs help.
Tom can wake the student while Anna clears a space.
Anna starts the dance after the students form a line.
The desk is near the wall, and the music starts.
Fifteen students follow Anna around the desk.
The teacher is less busy when the sick student can wake and join.
translations: 汤姆和安娜坐在书桌旁。
他们想学一支舞。
房间里有十五名学生。
一名学生生病了，不能参加。
老师很忙，所以课堂需要帮助。
安娜清理空间时，汤姆可以叫醒学生。
学生们排好队后，安娜开始跳舞。
书桌在墙边，音乐响了起来。
十五名学生围着书桌跟着安娜。
老师不那么忙时，生病的学生可以醒来并加入。

title: 海滩上的有趣话题
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at an airport.
They want to discuss a funny topic during their beach trip.
The airport is busy, so the beach plan is unclear.
The trip can be fun, but Anna wants a quiet beach.
Anna drinks a beer while Tom checks the map.
They discuss the funny topic after finding the beach bus.
The beach is warm when they arrive.
The trip is fun for everybody.
Tom puts down the beer because they must board.
Anna talks about the topic as they leave the beach.
translations: 汤姆和安娜到达机场。
他们想在海滩旅行中谈论一个有趣的话题。
机场很繁忙，所以海滩计划还不清楚。
旅行可以很有趣，但安娜想找一处安静的海滩。
汤姆查看地图时，安娜喝了一杯啤酒。
找到去海滩的公共汽车后，他们讨论了有趣的话题。
他们到达时，海滩很温暖。
这次旅行对每个人来说都很有趣。
他们必须登车，所以汤姆放下了啤酒。
安娜在离开海滩时谈论这个话题。

title: 糟糕的午餐
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a dish.
They want to cook a fresh vegetable.
The dish has pepper, but the taste is terrible.
Nineteen guests wait for lunch.
The kitchen has eighty plates while Anna checks the dish.
Tom removes pepper after Anna tastes the dish.
Anna changes the dish when the vegetable is ready.
The vegetable is fresh, so the dish can improve.
Tom tastes the dish again, and the pepper is less strong.
Eighty plates are ready, and the vegetable dish is not terrible for nineteen guests.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备一道菜。
他们想烹饪一种新鲜蔬菜。
菜里有胡椒，但味道很糟糕。
十九位客人等待午餐。
厨房里有八十个盘子，安娜检查这道菜。
安娜尝过这道菜后，汤姆去掉胡椒。
蔬菜准备好后，安娜改变了这道菜。
蔬菜很新鲜，所以这道菜可以改善。
汤姆再次品尝这道菜，胡椒味没那么浓了。
八十个盘子准备好了，这道蔬菜菜肴对十九位客人来说并不糟糕。

title: 早餐短语
sentences: Tom and Anna eat breakfast.
They want to discuss a diet.
Anna says hi because she has a useful phrase.
The breakfast has cream, but the diet phrase is missing.
Tom writes the phrase on paper, so Anna can explain it.
Ninety people read the advice while Tom checks questions.
The diet is simple, so Anna explains it to them.
Anna says hi again when Tom finishes.
The cream is on the table, and Tom shares it.
Ninety readers understand the diet before breakfast ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜吃早餐。
他们想讨论一种饮食。
安娜说嗨，因为她有一句有用的话。
早餐里有奶油，但饮食短语不见了。
汤姆把短语写在纸上，所以安娜可以解释它。
九十个人阅读建议，汤姆检查问题。
这种饮食很简单，所以安娜向他们解释。
汤姆完成后，安娜又说了声嗨。
奶油在桌子上，汤姆分享了它。
九十位读者在早餐结束前理解了这种饮食。

title: 秋天的自行车
sentences: Tom and Anna ride a bike in autumn.
They want to say hello to a friendly neighbour.
Autumn leaves cover the road near the house.
Anna's jacket is tied to the bike.
Seventy leaves block the road, so Tom slows down.
Tom says hello at the door while Anna holds the bike.
The friendly neighbour opens the door and helps them.
Anna rides the bike when the road is clear.
Autumn is cool, but the jacket keeps Anna warm.
Seventy leaves move away, and the friendly neighbour waves.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在秋天骑自行车。
他们想向一位友好的邻居问好。
秋天的树叶盖住了房子附近的道路。
安娜的夹克系在自行车上。
七十片叶子挡住道路，所以汤姆放慢速度。
汤姆在门边说你好，安娜扶着自行车。
友好的邻居打开门帮助他们。
道路清楚后，安娜骑上自行车。
秋天很凉爽，但夹克让安娜保持温暖。
七十片叶子被风吹走，友好的邻居挥手告别。

title: 节日里的游客
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a festival.
They want to meet a tourist.
The festival is amazing, but the tourist is lost.
Tom's uncle brings eleven cups.
Anna drinks orange juice while Tom asks for directions.
The tourist follows the music after hearing Tom's question.
The festival has music, so the tourist finds the stage.
Tom's uncle welcomes the tourist when he arrives.
Eleven people watch, and the uncle smiles.
The tourist finds the stage, and Anna shares cold juice at the amazing festival.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一个节日。
他们想遇到一位游客。
这个节日令人惊叹，但游客迷路了。
汤姆的叔叔带来十一只杯子。
安娜喝橙汁时，汤姆询问路线。
游客听到问题后，跟着音乐走去。
节日里有音乐，所以游客找到了舞台。
游客到达时，汤姆的叔叔欢迎了他。
十一人观看节目，叔叔笑了。
游客找到舞台，安娜在精彩的节日分享冷果汁。

title: 生日早晨的惊喜
sentences: Tom is a teenager, and today is his birthday.
His morning routine starts in the bathroom.
Anna puts a tomato in a small box for him.
Tom is fifth in line for breakfast.
He follows his routine while Anna waits by the door.
Tom looks for a birthday card after breakfast.
Anna brings the box from the bathroom, but Tom cannot open it.
The fifth note is inside, so Tom reads it.
The note says the teenager should share the tomato.
Tom smiles, and the birthday surprise is ready.
translations: 汤姆是一名青少年，今天是他的生日。
他的晨间日常从浴室开始。
安娜把一个番茄放进小盒子里给他。
汤姆排在早餐队伍的第五位。
他照常做事时，安娜在门边等着。
汤姆在早餐后寻找一张生日卡片。
安娜从浴室带来盒子，但汤姆打不开它。
第五张纸条在里面，所以汤姆读了它。
纸条说，这名青少年应该分享番茄。
汤姆笑了，生日惊喜也准备好了。

title: 音乐会前的粉色吉他
sentences: Anna's grandmother visits the concert hall.
Anna wants to play a pink guitar for her grandmother.
The pink guitar is bright, but the room is unclear.
A policeman stands near the door, so Anna asks for directions.
Anna reads a short paragraph while Tom checks the tickets.
Her grandmother waits with the pink guitar.
Tom looks for the concert room after the policeman answers.
The policeman points to a small door.
The guitar is safe behind the door.
Anna plays the pink guitar for her grandmother after the last paragraph.
translations: 安娜的祖母来到音乐厅。
安娜想为祖母弹一把粉色吉他。
粉色吉他很鲜艳，但房间不清楚。
一名男警察站在门边，所以安娜询问路线。
安娜阅读一段短文，汤姆检查票。
她的祖母拿着粉色吉他等着。
警察回答后，汤姆寻找音乐会房间。
男警察指向一扇小门。
吉他在门后很安全。
安娜为祖母弹奏粉色吉他，随后读完最后一段。

title: 假期里的洋葱汤
sentences: Tom and Anna go on vacation with their aunt.
Their aunt has a favourite small restaurant.
The vacation feels exciting, but Tom is tired.
Tom wants to relax after the long trip.
Anna orders a bowl of onion soup.
The aunt cuts another onion while Anna waits.
The exciting smell brings Tom to the table.
Anna shows him the favourite soup on the menu.
The onion soup is hot when it arrives.
Tom can relax after he eats, and they enjoy the vacation.
translations: 汤姆和安娜跟阿姨一起去度假。
他们的阿姨有一家最喜欢的小餐馆。
这个假期令人兴奋，但汤姆很累。
长途旅行后，汤姆想放松一下。
安娜点了一碗洋葱汤。
阿姨在厨房里切另一个洋葱，安娜在等待。
兴奋的香味把汤姆吸引到桌边。
安娜把菜单上最喜欢的汤给他看。
洋葱汤送到时还是热的。
汤姆吃完后可以放松，他们享受了这个假期。

title: 购物清单上的巧克力
sentences: Tom is eighteen, and his cousin plans a trip.
Tom wants chocolate, but the shopping list is missing.
Anna helps Tom practise words while she draws a chart.
The first shop has no chocolate, so Tom checks the chart.
He can practise before asking the shop worker.
The chart shows a shop nearby, across the road.
Anna and Tom walk there, and Tom asks again.
The worker finds chocolate, so Tom finishes shopping.
They carry it home before the party.
His cousin smiles because Tom is eighteen, and shopping worked.
translations: 汤姆十八岁了，他的表亲计划去购物。
汤姆想要巧克力，但购物清单不见了。
安娜帮汤姆练习词语，同时画了一张图表。
第一家商店没有巧克力，所以汤姆查看图表。
他可以在询问店员前练习。
图表显示马路对面附近还有一家商店。
安娜和汤姆走到那里，汤姆再次询问。
店员找到了巧克力，所以汤姆完成了购物。
他们在聚会前把巧克力带回家。
他的表亲微笑，因为汤姆十八岁了，而且购物成功了。

title: 网球场上的小老鼠
sentences: Anna is fourteen and plays tennis after school.
Tom brings a salad for their lunch.
They play tennis while a singer begins a dialogue near the court.
Anna hears a small mouse under the bench.
The mouse runs beside the salad box.
Tom stops the tennis game, but the salad is safe.
The singer pauses during the dialogue while Anna checks the box.
Anna moves the salad box to the table.
The mouse comes out when the box moves.
Anna is fourteen, returns to tennis, and hears the singer finish.
translations: 安娜十四岁，放学后打网球。
汤姆带了沙拉给他们当午餐。
他们打网球时，一位歌手在球场附近开始对话。
安娜听见长椅下有一只小老鼠。
老鼠跑到沙拉盒旁边。
汤姆暂停网球比赛，但沙拉是安全的。
歌手暂停对话，安娜检查盒子。
安娜把沙拉盒移到桌上。
盒子移动时，老鼠跑了出来。
安娜十四岁，回到网球场，并听见歌手结束演唱。

title: 楼上的午餐菜单
sentences: Tom is sixteen today.
He visits his grandfather with Anna.
Tom is hungry before lunch.
The menu is missing, so the grandfather waits.
Anna goes upstairs to look for the menu.
Tom takes a shower while Anna searches upstairs.
The shower makes Tom less hungry for a moment.
Anna finds the menu upstairs.
The grandfather waits by the stairs.
The menu has lunch, and Tom is sixteen when he eats.
translations: 汤姆今天十六岁。
他和安娜去看望爷爷。
午餐前汤姆很饿。
菜单不见了，所以爷爷在等待。
安娜上楼去找菜单。
汤姆洗澡时，安娜在楼上寻找。
洗澡让汤姆暂时没那么饿了。
安娜在楼上找到了菜单。
爷爷在楼梯旁等着。
菜单上有午餐，汤姆十六岁时吃了起来。

title: 电影院外的钢琴声
sentences: Anna is thirteen and wants to visit the cinema.
Tom calls a taxi for the film.
An actress is on the cinema poster.
The taxi stops near a piano shop, so Anna checks the cinema time.
Anna hears cooking music while Tom checks the taxi.
The actress on the poster smiles at Anna.
When the piano shop opens, Anna looks inside.
Anna sees a cooking show on a small screen.
The taxi waits while thirteen people enter the cinema.
After Tom finds the cinema, the actress starts the film.
translations: 安娜十三岁，想去电影院。
汤姆为电影叫了一辆出租车。
一位女演员出现在电影院海报上。
出租车停在钢琴店附近，所以安娜查看电影时间。
安娜听见烹饪音乐，汤姆检查出租车。
海报上的女演员对安娜微笑。
钢琴店开门时，安娜向里面看去。
安娜在小屏幕上看见一个烹饪节目。
出租车等着，十三个人走进电影院。
汤姆找到电影院后，女演员开始了电影。

title: 字典里的狮子
sentences: Tom finds a dictionary in the classroom.
He wants to spell a word for his boyfriend.
The dictionary has a picture of a lion.
Tom feels excited, but the spelling is difficult.
Anna helps him spell while the boyfriend waits.
The boyfriend waits by the door in blue jeans.
Tom writes the word beside the lion.
Anna checks the spelling in the dictionary.
The lion in the dictionary looks friendly, so Tom smiles.
Tom feels excited when the spelling is right, beside the jeans.
translations: 汤姆在教室里找到了一本字典。
他想为男朋友拼写一个单词。
字典里有一幅狮子的图片。
汤姆感到兴奋，但这个单词很难拼写。
安娜帮助他拼写，男朋友在等待。
男朋友穿着蓝色牛仔裤在门边等着。
汤姆在狮子旁边写下这个单词。
安娜在字典里检查拼写。
字典里的狮子看起来很友好，所以汤姆笑了。
拼写正确时汤姆感到兴奋，狮子就在牛仔裤旁边。

title: 午夜的游泳课
sentences: Anna is seventeen and likes swimming.
Tom wants to watch a dancer at the pool before midnight.
The swimming class starts at midnight.
Anna is hungry and needs a sandwich.
The toilet is near the swimming pool.
A dancer waits beside the toilet.
Tom brings a sandwich, so Anna can return to class.
Anna returns to the swimming class after the sandwich.
The dancer starts moving when the class begins.
Anna is seventeen, and swimming continues after midnight.
translations: 安娜十七岁，喜欢游泳。
汤姆想在午夜前看泳池边的舞者。
游泳课在午夜开始。
安娜饿了，需要一个三明治。
厕所就在游泳池附近。
一位舞者在厕所旁等候。
汤姆带来三明治，所以安娜可以回到课堂。
吃完三明治后，安娜回到游泳课。
课程开始时，舞者开始移动。
安娜十七岁，午夜后游泳课继续。

title: 超市楼下的紫色地图
sentences: Tom and Anna go to the gym after school.
They want to buy food at the supermarket.
Anna wears a purple shirt, so Tom can see her.
The geography map is downstairs near the gym.
Tom cannot find the supermarket door because the gym is busy.
Anna says bye to the gym teacher.
The purple shirt helps Tom follow Anna downstairs.
They check the geography map, and it shows the supermarket.
Tom says bye, but Anna finds the door.
They buy food at the supermarket and leave the gym.
translations: 汤姆和安娜放学后去健身房。
他们想在超市买食物。
安娜穿着紫色衬衫，所以汤姆能看见她。
地理地图在健身房附近的楼下。
健身房很忙，汤姆找不到超市的门。
安娜向健身房老师说再见。
紫色衬衫帮助汤姆跟着安娜下楼。
他们查看地理地图，地图显示了超市。
汤姆说再见，但安娜找到了门。
他们在超市买了食物，然后离开健身房。

title: 考试前的自行车
sentences: Tom rides a bicycle to school.
The first class feels boring.
An exam starts after lunch.
Anna sees an elephant in a book.
Tom eats a carrot before the exam.
Anna puts a banana in her bag.
The exam question has a bicycle and an elephant, so Tom remembers the lesson.
Tom remembers the carrot when he writes an answer.
The elephant picture is not boring now.
After the exam, Tom rides the bicycle home and shares the carrot and banana.
translations: 汤姆骑自行车去学校。
第一节课感觉很无聊。
午饭后开始考试。
安娜在一本书里看见一头大象。
考试前汤姆吃了一根胡萝卜。
安娜把一根香蕉放进包里。
考试题里有自行车和大象，所以汤姆想起了课程。
汤姆想起胡萝卜并写下答案。
大象的图片现在不无聊了。
考试后，汤姆骑自行车回家并分享胡萝卜和香蕉。

title: 祖父母的美味毛衣
sentences: Anna visits her grandparent after school.
A dancing class is near the house.
The class looks fantastic, but Anna has homework.
Her grandparent gives her a warm sweater.
Tom brings a delicious cake while Anna gets ready.
Anna finishes her homework, and the sweater is ready.
She wears the sweater to the dancing class.
Her grandparent watches from the door, so Tom helps Anna dance carefully.
The class is fantastic, and everyone eats delicious cake.
Anna thanks her grandparent after dancing.
translations: 安娜放学后去看望祖父母。
房子附近有一节舞蹈课。
这节课看起来很棒，但安娜还有家庭作业。
她的祖父母给她一件暖和的毛衣。
汤姆带来一块美味的蛋糕，安娜正在准备。
安娜完成家庭作业，毛衣也准备好了。
她穿着毛衣去上舞蹈课。
祖父母从门边看着，所以汤姆帮助安娜认真跳舞。
这节课很棒，大家吃了美味的蛋糕。
跳舞后，安娜感谢祖父母。

title: 咖啡馆里的护照
sentences: Tom finds his passport at the station.
A waiter invites him to a cafe.
Tom says goodbye to Anna at the door.
Anna checks the spelling of his name.
The cafe has a table for Tom's hobby.
Tom talks about his hobby while he waits.
Anna writes the correct spelling on a card, so Tom checks it.
The waiter brings a drink to the table.
Tom puts the passport beside the card, but the waiter smiles.
Tom says goodbye before leaving the cafe.
translations: 汤姆在车站找到了护照。
一名服务员邀请他去咖啡馆。
汤姆在门口向安娜说再见。
安娜检查他名字的拼写。
咖啡馆有一张桌子供汤姆进行爱好活动。
等待时汤姆谈起了自己的爱好。
安娜把正确拼写写在卡片上，所以汤姆检查了它。
服务员把饮料端到桌边。
汤姆把护照放在卡片旁边，但服务员笑了。
汤姆离开咖啡馆前说了再见。

title: 博客里的金发女孩
sentences: Anna has blonde hair today.
Tom finds one euro in his pocket.
Anna is thirsty after the walk.
She writes a blog about the walk.
Tom is bored on the quiet bus.
Anna listens to a cd while she waits.
Tom buys water with one euro, so Anna is less thirsty when they stop.
The blog keeps Tom from feeling bored on the bus.
The blonde girl adds the cd to her bag.
Anna is not thirsty, and Tom reads the blog again.
translations: 安娜今天是金发。
汤姆在口袋里找到一欧元。
走路后安娜口渴了。
她写了一篇关于这次散步的博客。
汤姆在安静的公交车上很无聊。
安娜等待时听一张唱片。
汤姆用一欧元买水，所以他们停下时安娜没那么渴了。
这篇博客让汤姆在公交车上不再无聊。
金发女孩把唱片放进包里。
安娜不渴了，汤姆又读起博客。

title: 网上的剧院网站
sentences: Tom watches a dvd with his girlfriend.
They want to find an online theatre show.
The website has a new show, but the theatre is far away.
Anna says thanks for the invitation while Tom checks the map.
The theatre door is near the street, so they can walk there.
Tom checks the website on his phone.
The online ticket is ready when Anna finishes the message.
Anna sends the website to her girlfriend.
The dvd shows the same theatre.
They enter the theatre, and Anna says thanks to Tom.
translations: 汤姆和女朋友一起看一张影碟。
他们想找一场在线剧院演出。
网站上有一场新演出，但剧院很远。
安娜为邀请道谢，汤姆查看地图。
剧院的门在街边，所以他们可以走过去。
汤姆在手机上查看网站。
安娜写完消息时，在线票已经准备好了。
安娜把网站发给她的女朋友。
影碟展示了同一家剧院。
他们进入剧院，安娜向汤姆道谢。

title: 媒体门禁的应用测试
sentences: Tom arrives at the media office with a local app.
He has the ability to repair it before the meeting.
The project is based on a town story, so the media team wants it.
The gate is closed, although the guard waits inside.
Tom puts the backup in a bin while Anna checks their pass.
The guard asks why the app matters to the team.
Tom opens the app, so the guard reads the story.
Anna shows the pass, and the gate opens.
The team sees the project is based on a local story.
Tom removes the backup from the bin because the files are safe.
The app records the meeting before the team leaves.
Anna says Tom has the ability to solve problems, so they share the story.
translations: 汤姆带着一个本地项目的应用到达媒体办公室。
会议开始前，他有能力修理它。
项目基于镇上的故事，所以媒体团队想看看它。
门关着，虽然警卫正在里面等候。
安娜检查通行证时，汤姆把文件备份放进小箱子。
警卫问应用为什么对媒体团队重要。
汤姆打开应用，警卫可以阅读屏幕上的故事。
安娜出示通行证，门为他们打开了。
媒体团队发现项目基于真实的本地故事。
文件安全后，汤姆从箱子里取出备份。
媒体团队离开前，应用程序记录了会议。
安娜说汤姆有解决问题的能力，所以他们分享了故事。

title: 楼梯上的智能手机
sentences: Anna reaches the state office and finds a penny missing from her pants.
She needs the penny for the bus, so she checks her smartphone.
The smartphone shows a specific route through the building.
A narrow stair leads to a dark lower room.
At the stair, a state worker asks what Anna wants.
While Anna explains, Tom calls her smartphone.
The sound comes from the route near the stair.
Although the stair is dark, Anna checks the floor because the penny may be there.
She finds the penny under the stair beside a button.
After Tom arrives, Anna puts the penny in her pants.
The smartphone saves the specific address, so the worker closes the office.
With the penny safe in her pants, they leave.
translations: 安娜到达州政府办公室后，发现裤子里少了一枚便士。
因为她需要便士乘公交车，所以她查看智能手机。
智能手机显示一条穿过旧建筑的具体路线。
一段狭窄楼梯通向昏暗的下层房间。
楼梯顶端，一名州政府工作人员询问安娜在找什么。
安娜解释时，汤姆从办公室拨打她的智能手机。
声音来自楼梯附近的具体路线。
虽然楼梯很暗，安娜检查地面，因为便士可能在那里。
她在楼梯下一个纽扣旁找到了便士。
汤姆到达后，安娜把便士放回裤子口袋。
智能手机保存具体地址，州政府工作人员关上办公室。
便士安全地放在裤子里后，安娜和汤姆离开了州政府办公室。

title: 社区服务项目
sentences: When Tom joins a community service program, he might help one family first.
Anna wants to understand the program before they visit the family.
The case concerns a family that has no clean water.
The service team can provide a filter, so they carry tools.
Tom can hold the heavy box while Anna opens the gate.
The program might need more volunteers if the repair takes all day.
After Anna reads the case report, she finds the broken pipe.
The service group provides a filter and clear instructions.
Tom can hold the filter while Anna fixes the pipe.
When the water runs clear, the program manager checks the repair.
The family tests the water, and the case is solved.
Anna says the program can provide lasting help.
translations: 汤姆加入社区服务项目时，可能会先帮助一个家庭。
安娜想在他们拜访这个家庭前了解项目。
这个案例涉及一个没有干净水的家庭。
因为服务团队可以提供新过滤器，他们带着工具来到房子。
安娜打开大门时，汤姆必须拿住重箱子。
如果修理花一整天，这个项目可能需要更多志愿者。
安娜读完案例报告后，找到了破损的管道。
服务小组提供了过滤器和一套简短说明。
安娜在水槽下修理管道时，汤姆拿住过滤器。
水流变清后，项目负责人检查了修理结果。
这个家庭测试水后，案例就解决了。
安娜说这个项目可以提供长期帮助，因为社区一直工作到傍晚。

title: 国家博物馆的社会展览
sentences: Although rain is heavy, Anna visits the national museum with Tom.
She wants to see a social history exhibition about their city.
Perhaps the exhibition can explain why the old market closed.
Tom has already bought two tickets, so they enter before the crowd.
The museum does not allow large bags, so Anna leaves hers.
Although Anna is tired, she reads the first social display carefully.
Because the national exhibition follows one family, Tom understands the change.
Tom asks whether the museum can allow photographs of the old map.
A guide says this room can allow photographs.
Perhaps the social history becomes personal when Anna recognizes the market street.
Anna has already taken notes, so she can explain the display to class.
Although rain continues, they leave with a story.
translations: 虽然雨很大，安娜还是和汤姆参观了国家博物馆。
她想看一个关于他们城市的社会历史展览。
也许这个展览能解释老市场为什么关闭。
汤姆已经买了两张票，所以他们在人群前进去了。
博物馆不允许带大包进入，安娜把包留在服务台。
虽然安娜很累，她还是仔细阅读了第一件社会展品。
因为国家展览讲述了一个家庭的故事，汤姆开始理解这次变化。
汤姆询问博物馆是否允许拍摄那张旧地图。
导游说博物馆可以允许在这个房间拍照。
当安娜认出市场街道时，社会历史变得和她有关。
安娜已经记好了笔记，所以可以向同学解释展品。
虽然雨仍在继续，他们还是带着一个故事离开了。

title: 社区里的持续帮助
sentences: Since Monday, Tom works in the community garden.
Anna wants to continue because the first plants are weak.
The garden is not ready yet, and the soil is dry.
When a volunteer can appear at the gate, Anna explains the plan.
Tom teaches the volunteer tools, but repairs the pipe himself.
Because the community needs water, plants cannot grow alone.
Anna has filled two containers while Tom checks the pipe.
The volunteer can appear with a larger container, so work is faster.
Tom carries the container himself and pours water along the first row.
Since the rain has stopped, the garden begins to look healthier.
The plants are not ready yet, but new leaves appear beside the row.
Tom will continue helping since the garden is useful.
translations: 从星期一开始，汤姆一直在图书馆后面的社区花园工作。
因为第一批植物很虚弱，安娜想和他一起继续这个项目。
花园还没有准备好，土壤也仍然干燥。
一名新志愿者可能出现在门边，安娜便向他解释计划。
汤姆教志愿者使用工具，但第一次修理由他亲自完成。
因为社区需要水，植物没有帮助就无法继续生长。
汤姆检查旧管道时，安娜已经装满了两个容器。
志愿者带着更大的容器再次出现，所以工作变快了。
汤姆亲自搬运容器，把水倒在第一排植物旁。
雨停后，花园开始看起来更健康。
植物还没有准备好，但修好的那一排旁边出现了新叶子。
汤姆说花园终于有用了，所以他会继续帮忙。

title: 总统办公室里的小孩
sentences: Before the meeting, Tom has the least time to prepare.
Anna works near the president's office, so she offers help.
Several people wait because the president is reading a report.
A worried kid asks Tom to consider his drawing.
Although the kid is nervous, he carries the drawing for the president.
While Anna explains the question, Tom can consider the child's idea.
The president may expect Tom to describe the kid's problem clearly.
After the president reads the drawing, the room becomes quiet.
Anna says the least difficult answer is to listen first.
Several aides leave, and the kid begins to smile.
The president offers a small plan for the kid's school.
Tom can expect the meeting to help the kid, and Anna thanks the president.
translations: 会议前汤姆准备的时间最少。
安娜在总统办公室附近工作，所以她主动帮忙。
总统正在阅读报告，因此几个人在外面等候。
汤姆必须考虑一个担心的小孩提出的问题。
虽然小孩很紧张，他还是带来了一幅画给总统。
汤姆可以期待总统理解这幅画。
安娜解释问题时，汤姆可以考虑小孩的想法。
总统让汤姆清楚地描述小孩的问题。
总统读完画后，房间安静下来。
安娜说最简单的答案是先倾听。
因为小孩感到有人在听，他开始微笑。
几名助手离开办公室，让这家人可以私下交谈。

title: 车站里的实际建议
sentences: Anna wants to suggest a route towards the station.
Tom uses a local term for the route on his map.
Although the path towards the river is closed, the market road is open.
A figure near the sign points at the map.
One available road goes through the market, so Anna checks its bridge.
Actually, Anna knows the market because she worked there last year.
Tom checks the available buses while Anna watches the bridge.
When the figure returns, he explains a road behind the station.
Anna can suggest taking the bus after comparing both routes.
The bus moves towards the river, but avoids the closed path.
Tom remembers the term, and the figure points to the station entrance.
The available route is faster; actually, the market road has reopened.
translations: 出发前，安娜想建议一条通往车站的新路线。
汤姆在地图上使用了这条路线的当地术语。
虽然通往河边的小路关闭了，市场那条路还开着。
标志旁边有个人影指着地图。
一条可用的道路经过市场，所以安娜检查了那里的桥。
其实安娜很熟悉市场，因为她去年在那里工作过。
安娜观察桥梁时，汤姆查看可用的公交车。
那个人影回来后，说明了车站后面的一条短路。
安娜比较两条路线后，可以建议乘公交车。
公交车慢慢驶向河边，但避开了关闭的小路。
汤姆想起地图上的术语，并把它展示给司机。
公交车到达时，那个人影指向车站入口。

title: 耐心等待研究结果
sentences: Tom begins river research at the town library.
A guy at the library offers help because he knows the river well.
The matter concerns clean water, so Tom shows him the first notes.
The team expects a report from the water office.
Anna has less time than Tom, but she checks the oldest records.
The patient researcher compares every number before they decide.
While Tom waits for the printer, the guy finds a missing map.
Anna has less worry after the map confirms the first result.
The research can receive support from the town when the report is shared.
The matter clears after the river interview.
Tom can receive the final report by email after the office signs it.
The patient team plans research because the answer is not enough.
translations: 汤姆开始研究一条当地河流后，去了镇上的图书馆。
图书馆里有个家伙主动帮忙，因为他很了解这条河。
这件事关系到干净的水，所以汤姆把最初的笔记给他看。
团队预计会收到水务办公室的报告。
安娜的时间比汤姆少，但她检查了最早的记录。
这位耐心的研究员在得出结论前比较每个数字。
汤姆等待图书馆打印机工作时，那个家伙找到了缺失的地图。
地图证实了第一个结果后，安娜少了一些担忧。
报告分享出去后，这项研究得到了城镇的支持。
采访河流管理员后，这件事变得更清楚了。
办公室签字后，汤姆可以通过电子邮件收到最终报告。
那个耐心的团队计划继续研究，因为答案还不够。

title: 人类发展的展览
sentences: When Anna visits a major history exhibition, she brings Tom.
The guide explains the first display, including tools from an early village.
Because visitors see themselves in old photographs, they ask questions.
The exhibition itself is difficult without the guide's story.
A human story about one family gives the display a clear beginning.
Tom wants to develop a school report from that journey.
Anna reads the major dates while Tom follows the family's path.
The guide explains the human journey, including the family's move to a city.
The display itself has a video showing the same street today.
Although Tom sees the major change, he understands the family record.
The visitors recognize themselves because the street still exists.
The story helps Anna organize evidence, so she can develop Tom's report.
translations: 安娜参观一个重大的历史展览时，带上了汤姆。
导游解释第一件展品，包括一个早期村庄的工具。
因为参观者在老照片中看到了自己，他们提出了问题。
没有导游的故事，这个展览本身很难理解。
一个关于某个家庭的人类故事给展览一个清楚的开头。
汤姆想从这段旅程中写一份学校报告。
安娜阅读重要日期，汤姆沿着这个家庭的路线走。
导游解释人类旅程，包括这个家庭搬到城市的经历。
展品本身有一段视频，展示今天的同一条街。
虽然汤姆看到了重大的变化，但他理解了这份家庭记录。
参观者因为那条街依然存在而认出了自己。
这个故事帮助安娜整理证据，所以她可以完成汤姆的报告。

title: 特别服务的最后一站
sentences: Tom can serve a particular group at the museum.
Anna wants to reach the last room, so she checks the map.
The project can involve a route change.
A particular sign points to the service desk.
The lift is likely to stop because power is low.
Tom must not kill time while visitors wait.
Anna asks the desk for a route to the last room.
The map shows a likely path through a garden.
After the guide checks the path, Tom can serve water.
The group can reach the garden, but a gate blocks it.
The project can involve a safety rule, so no one should kill plants.
The desk opens the gate, and Tom serves the group.
translations: 汤姆可以在博物馆为一群特定的参观者服务。
安娜想抵达最后一个房间，所以她查看地图。
这个项目可能涉及路线变化。
一个特别的标志指向服务台。
电力不足，电梯很可能停下。
参观者等待时，汤姆不能浪费时间。
安娜向服务台询问通往最后房间的路线。
地图显示一条穿过花园的可能路线。
导游检查路线后，汤姆可以提供水。
这群人可以到达花园，但一道门挡住了路。
项目可能涉及一项安全规定，所以没人应该伤害植物。
服务台打开大门，汤姆为小组服务。

title: 国际部门的通道
sentences: Anna helps Tom prepare an international food day.
They want to raise money for a reading corner.
The school department gives them a small table, but it is too small.
Tom asks the art department for a sign while Anna sorts food.
After they carry boxes along hall, a wheel breaks.
Anna cannot raise the box alone, so Tom looks for help.
A teacher says they can use either cart, so Tom chooses one.
Tom chooses the library cart, and the boxes pass through the door.
The music cart can pass too, but it is busy.
The class places the table along the wall, so visitors have space when food arrives.
Either food sells quickly, or they need another idea.
The international day raises money, and the department thanks them.
translations: 安娜帮助汤姆在学校筹办国际美食日。
他们的目标是筹到足够的钱，建一个新的阅读角。
学校部门给了他们一张桌子，但桌子太小了。
汤姆向美术部门要一块更大的标牌，安娜则整理食物。
他们沿着大厅搬箱子时，一个轮子坏了。
安娜一个人抬不起这个重箱子，所以汤姆寻找帮助。
一位老师说，他们可以使用图书馆推车或音乐教室推车。
汤姆选择了图书馆推车，箱子安全地通过了门口。
音乐教室推车也可以通过，但它已经在使用了。
食物到达时，全班把桌子沿墙摆好，这样参观者就有空间了。
食物要是卖得快，活动就会成功；否则全班还需要另想办法。
到了晚上，国际美食日筹到了足够的钱，部门向他们表示感谢。

title: 地面上的证据
sentences: Tom and Anna join a health talk at a center.
Anna's role is to explain how a whole family stays safe.
The ground is wet, so they move the chairs.
The nurse brings evidence about clean hands, but one page is missing.
Tom would rather find the page before the talk starts.
Anna asks a doctor about a safe drug while Tom checks outside.
The doctor says the drug is for adults only.
The evidence is in the nurse's bag, so the talk begins.
Tom takes the role of helper, and he gives each visitor a card.
The whole group listens, although the wet ground keeps people inside.
Anna would rather answer questions than confuse visitors.
The doctor says the drug is safe with advice, and the group thanks them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加了中心的一场健康讲座。
安娜的职责是解释一个完整的家庭如何保持安全。
中心附近的地面很湿，所以他们挪动了椅子。
护士带来了关于清洁双手的证据，但有一页不见了。
汤姆没有马上开始讲座，而是寻找那张不见的纸。
安娜向医生询问一种安全的药物，汤姆则在外面检查地面。
医生说，这种药只能由成年人使用。
证据在护士的包里，所以讲座可以开始了。
汤姆担任助手，给每位参观者发了一张卡片。
整个小组都听着，虽然潮湿的地面让大家只能待在室内。
安娜宁愿回答问题，也不愿让参观者感到困惑。
医生再次说明这种药只有在接受建议后才安全，整个小组也向团队表示感谢。

title: 最终接受新关系
sentences: Anna and Tom join a community garden meeting before lunch.
The leader asks them to choose a safe place for a path.
According to the old map, the path passes behind the greenhouse.
Tom can accept the map, but Anna sees wet ground.
Their relationship with the gardener helps them ask for another plan.
The leader says the group shall compare both paths after rain.
Tom measures the front path while Anna carries the map.
The gardener can accept their idea because it protects plants.
Finally, the leader marks a path beside the fence.
According to the gardener, this path stays dry in winter.
Anna finally sees the plan will improve their relationship with neighbors.
The leader shall show the plan, and everyone accepts the decision.
translations: 安娜和汤姆在午饭前参加社区花园会议。
领导者请他们为一条小路选择安全位置。
根据旧地图，小路经过温室后面。
汤姆可以接受地图，但安娜发现地面很湿。
他们和园丁的关系让他们能够请求另一个计划。
领导者说小组应当在雨后比较两条路。
汤姆测量前面的小路，安娜拿着地图。
园丁可以接受他们的想法，因为它能保护植物。
最后，领导者在篱笆旁标出一条路。
根据园丁的说法，这条路冬天保持干燥。
安娜终于发现计划会改善他们与邻居的关系。
领导者应当展示计划，所有人都接受了这个决定。

title: 训练季的导演
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a theater before the new season.
The director asks them to help train a short play.
The play tells a story about a god whose statue protects a village.
Anna learns the first scene while Tom checks the stage.
The director wants clear speech, especially in the final scene.
Tom forgets the line about the god, so Anna shows the script.
Training stops when an alarm starts near the stage.
The alarm belongs to a worker whose machine broke.
The director moves rehearsal outside, where actors practise again.
Anna speaks especially slowly, and Tom remembers the line.
The new season opens safely, and the god returns.
The director thanks them for training, especially because the play is ready.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在新演出季前参观了一家剧院。
导演请他们帮助训练一部短剧。
这部戏讲述了一个神的故事，那位神的雕像保护着村庄。
安娜学习第一幕，汤姆检查舞台。
导演希望说话清楚，尤其是在最后一幕。
汤姆忘记了关于神的台词，所以安娜给他看剧本。
舞台附近响起警报时，训练停止了。
警报来自一名工人，他的机器坏了。
导演把排练移到室外，演员们在那里重新练习。
安娜特别慢地说话，汤姆想起了台词。
新演出季安全开始了，神也重新出现。
导演感谢他们的训练，尤其是因为戏剧已经准备好了。

title: 网站上的特别邀请
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a site to help a couple move boxes.
A worker asks Tom to pick up a blue box, sir.
Tom wants to apply for a weekend job there.
The site manager says a heavy box can hit the wall because it is old.
Anna picks a safe route while Tom asks the couple for space.
Tom says yes, sir, and applies the safety rule.
The couple moves a table, but a loose board may hit it.
The manager tells Tom to pick a lighter box.
Tom can apply the rule again, so he walks slowly.
The site becomes quiet when the boxes are safe.
Anna says thank you, sir, and the couple smiles.
Tom and Anna leave the site, while the couple plans to apply again.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到工地，帮助一对夫妇搬箱子。
一名工人请汤姆拿起蓝色箱子，先生。
汤姆想在那里申请一份周末工作。
工地经理说重箱子可能撞到墙，因为墙很旧。
安娜选择安全路线，汤姆请这对夫妇让出空间。
汤姆说好的，先生，然后执行安全规定。
这对夫妇搬动桌子时，一块松木板可能撞到桌子。
经理告诉汤姆拿一个更轻的箱子。
汤姆可以再次执行规定，所以他慢慢地走。
箱子安全后，工地变得安静。
安娜说谢谢你，先生，这对夫妇笑了。
汤姆和安娜离开工地，这对夫妇计划再次申请。

title: 自然数据的图像
sentences: Tom is certainly ready for a nature survey at the lake.
Anna collects data while the officer checks their pass.
They want to record an image of a rare bird.
The officer lets them enter, but the bird flies away.
Tom finds a clear image on his camera, and Anna checks the data.
The image may contain a useful mark near the bird's wing.
Anna marks the place, while Tom asks the officer for help.
The officer says the nature team should return at sunset.
Tom is certainly worried because the screen becomes dark.
Anna uses a lamp, so the screen can contain more detail.
The data show the bird's path, and the image becomes clear.
They send the report to the officer before leaving.
translations: 汤姆当然已经准备好在湖边进行自然调查。
安娜收集数据时，工作人员检查了他们的通行证。
他们想记录一只稀有鸟的图像。
工作人员让他们进入，但鸟飞走了。
汤姆在相机里找到清晰图像，安娜检查了数据。
图像可能包含鸟翅膀附近的有用标记。
安娜标出位置，汤姆向工作人员寻求帮助。
工作人员说自然小组应该在日落时回来。
汤姆当然很担心，因为屏幕变黑了。
安娜使用一盏灯，所以屏幕可以显示更多细节。
数据显示鸟的路线，图像也变清楚了。
他们在离开前把报告交给工作人员。

title: 她自己的新方法
sentences: Anna has a method for sorting letters at the community office.
Tom notices movement near the door while she opens the mail.
A recent letter asks for help with a lost child.
Anna wants to reduce the pile before the office closes.
Only a single envelope has no name or address.
Anna reads it herself, but it contains no message.
Tom checks the movement and finds a loose curtain.
The curtain caused the movement, so he closes the window.
Anna uses her method to sort recent letters into groups.
The single envelope falls behind the cabinet when Anna moves the pile.
Tom helps reduce the pile, so the envelope appears.
Anna herself opens it, and a return address leads to the child.
translations: 安娜有一套在社区办公室整理信件的方法。
汤姆在她拆信时注意到门边有动静。
一封近期来信请求帮助寻找走失的孩子。
安娜想在办公室关门前减少信堆。
只有一个信封没有姓名和地址。
安娜亲自读了它，但里面没有留言。
汤姆查看动静，发现是松动的窗帘。
窗帘造成了动静，所以他关上窗户。
安娜用她的方法把近期信件分组。
安娜移动信堆时，单独的信封掉到柜子后面。
汤姆帮助减少信堆，所以信封露了出来。
安娜亲自打开它，回信地址指向那个孩子。

title: 科技奖项的机会
sentences: Tom studies technology at college and leads a project.
Anna has a wish to show their solar device at an award.
They must catch a train because the event begins at six.
The project can achieve a result if they finish the test.
A broken computer creates a problem, so Tom must deal with it.
Anna finds a spare part in the technology room.
They repair the computer, and Tom can catch the train.
On the train, Anna checks whether the project can achieve its goal.
Tom says his wish is to win an award.
Judges ask how technology saves energy.
Anna explains the design, while Tom must deal with the final question.
The team does not win the main award, but it can achieve a useful result.
translations: 汤姆在大学学习科技，并负责一个项目。
安娜希望在颁奖活动上展示他们的太阳能设备。
他们必须赶上一班火车，因为活动六点开始。
如果完成测试，项目就能取得成果。
一台坏电脑带来问题，所以汤姆必须处理它。
安娜在科技教室找到一个备用零件。
他们修好电脑，汤姆也能赶上火车。
在火车上，安娜检查项目能否达到目标。
汤姆说他希望赢得一个奖项。
评委询问科技如何节约能源。
安娜解释设计，汤姆必须处理最后一个问题。
团队没有赢得最高奖，但可以取得有用成果。

title: 国王的能源来源
sentences: Anna finds a source about an old king in the archive.
The source says the king used river energy to light the village.
Before winter, the village is nearly out of fuel.
Tom worries the energy plan will fail, but Anna keeps reading.
The source describes how the king stored energy during floods.
A billion-year river report lies behind the old map.
Because the river still runs, Tom measures its flow.
The village is nearly ready to test a water wheel.
Anna uses the source while Tom studies the map.
Tom says the plan will not fail if they protect the wheel.
The king's method gives the team a safe way to use energy.
The report shows a billion-year change, and the wheel lights the village.
translations: 安娜在档案室找到一份关于古代国王的资料。
资料说，那位国王曾利用河流能源为村庄照明。
冬天到来前，村庄的燃料几乎用完了。
汤姆担心能源计划会失败，但安娜继续阅读。
资料描述国王如何在洪水期间储存能源。
一份十亿年历史的河流报告在旧地图后面。
因为河流仍在流淌，汤姆测量了水流。
村庄几乎准备好测试一座水车。
安娜使用资料时，汤姆研究地图。
汤姆说，只要保护水车，计划就不会失败。
国王的方法为团队提供了安全利用能源的方式。
报告显示十亿年的变化，水车也照亮了村庄。

title: 人口与机会
sentences: Tom begins to realize the town needs an evening class.
Anna sees an opportunity to teach a foreign language.
They compare the morning choice with the evening choice, while Tom checks times.
The foreign teacher says the growing population needs both classes.
Tom used the classroom last year, so he knows its lights.
Anna wants to realize the opportunity before another teacher takes it.
The first choice is too early for many workers.
The second choice fits the population better.
After checking how the room was used, Tom calls the manager.
Anna speaks with the foreign teacher about the course.
The population grows because new families move into town.
They choose the evening choice, and the opportunity helps new residents.
translations: 汤姆开始意识到镇上需要一门晚间课程。
安娜看到了教授外语的机会。
他们比较上午和晚上的选择，汤姆查看时间。
外语老师说不断增长的人口需要两种课程。
汤姆去年使用过教室，所以知道灯光很好。
安娜想在另一位老师接手前抓住机会。
第一个选择对许多上班族来说太早了。
第二个选择更适合人口情况。
汤姆检查教室以前的使用情况后，给经理打电话。
安娜和外语老师谈课程。
因为新家庭搬进镇里，人口正在增长。
他们选择晚上的课程，这个机会帮助了新居民。

title: 每个人的进步因素
sentences: After a storm, Tom sees the river rise beside the town bridge.
Anna clearly explains the danger, and they check the bridge.
The benefit of an early warning is clear to both.
Anna writes one note per house: I can check the signs myself.
The officer says rain upstream is the main factor.
The river may rise again, so Tom checks the bridge.
Families leave before the next wave arrives.
The officer checks the factor on his map, while Anna calls the town office.
Anna writes a second note: I can check the signs myself.
The bridge stays open, but the road becomes quiet because families leave.
The signs clearly show the benefit of the warning.
Tom sends one report per hour until the river falls.
translations: 暴风雨后，汤姆看见河水在城镇桥边上涨。
安娜清楚地解释了危险，他们检查了桥。
提前警告的好处对两人都很明显。
安娜给每户写了一张纸条：我可以自己检查标志。
工作人员说，主要因素是上游的雨水。
河水可能再次上涨，所以汤姆检查了桥。
下一道浪到来前，各家离开了。
工作人员查看地图上的因素，安娜则给镇办公室打电话。
安娜又写了一张纸条：我可以自己检查标志。
桥保持开放，但因为各家离开，道路变得安静。
标志清楚显示了警告的好处。
汤姆每小时发一份报告，直到河水下降。

title: 作者的写作目标
sentences: Before the contest, Anna and Tom meet in the library.
Their goal is to choose a short story by one author.
The author uses a clear pattern, but Tom sees a problem.
Tom and Anna argue about which part to read.
The teacher asks them to focus on the ending.
Tom wants to throw away the plan, but Anna stays calm.
They focus on the pattern, so the story becomes easier.
Tom and Anna argue again when the time is short.
Anna says the author repeats the goal at the end.
Tom does not throw away the notes, because they need them.
The pattern helps them choose a shorter part.
They read together, and the goal is reached.
translations: 比赛前，安娜和汤姆在图书馆碰面。
他们的目标是选出一位作者写的短篇故事。
作者在故事中使用了清晰的结构，但汤姆发现了一个问题。
汤姆和安娜争论应该朗读哪一部分。
老师让他们把注意力放在结尾上。
汤姆想把计划扔掉，但安娜保持冷静。
他们专心研究这个结构，于是故事变得更容易理解。
时间不多时，汤姆和安娜又争论了一次。
安娜说作者在结尾重复了故事目标。
汤姆没有扔掉笔记，因为他们还需要这些笔记。
这个结构帮助他们选出了一段更短的内容。
他们一起朗读，最终实现了目标。

title: 地区环境赛跑
sentences: Tom and Anna enter a nature center in a mountain region.
They want to join a series of short races for children.
The guide explains that the race protects the environment.
A further path is closed because the river is high.
Anna checks the map, while Tom asks how to enter the next race.
The region looks safe, but a fallen tree blocks the path.
They move the tree, so the race can continue.
The guide says the series will enter a new region next month.
Tom runs further than before, and Anna follows him.
The race ends near the lake, where the environment is quiet.
The guide records their names for the series.
They leave the region after the final race.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入了山区的一个自然中心。
他们想参加一系列面向孩子的短跑比赛。
向导解释说，这场比赛是在保护环境。
河水上涨了，所以更远处的一条小路被封闭。
安娜查看地图，汤姆则询问如何进入下一场比赛。
这个地区看起来很安全，但一棵倒下的树挡住了小路。
他们搬开树木，于是比赛可以继续。
向导说，下个月这一系列比赛会进入新的地区。
汤姆比以前跑得更远，安娜跟在他身后。
比赛在湖边结束了，那里环境安静。
向导为他们登记了名字，加入这系列比赛的记录。
最后一场比赛结束后，他们离开了这个地区。

title: 舞台上的个人回应
sentences: Anna and Tom visit a museum to prepare a response to a survey.
Each individual visitor can refer to a small map.
The map has a feature about a rescue scene.
The director asks for a clear response before closing.
Tom wants to save the map, but Anna sees a missing page.
They refer to the old map, while Tom checks each individual note.
The rescue scene helps them understand the missing feature.
Anna writes a response, so the director can save the report.
The feature appears on the final page.
The director asks each individual to check the scene.
Their response is clear because they refer to the same map.
They save the report, and the museum closes.
translations: 安娜和汤姆去博物馆，为一份调查准备回复。
每位参观者都可以参考一张小地图。
地图上有一项关于救援场景的特色介绍。
馆长要求他们在闭馆前给出清楚的回复。
汤姆想保存这张地图，但安娜发现少了一页。
他们参考旧地图，汤姆则检查每条个人记录。
这个救援场景帮助他们理解了缺失的特色内容。
安娜写下回复，于是馆长可以保存这份报告。
那项特色内容出现在最后一页。
馆长要求每位参观者检查这个场景。
他们的回复很清楚，因为他们参考的是同一张地图。
他们保存了报告，博物馆也关门了。

title: 保护海岸的计划
sentences: Before the cleanup, Tom and Anna manage work at the forest edge.
They want to identify a plant that may affect the river.
The guide says exactly which path to follow.
Following the path, Anna finds a small nest.
Tom wants to protect it, but the cleanup must continue.
They manage the work around the nest, while Anna marks its place.
The guide explains how pollution can affect the nest.
Tom can identify the safe area, so workers move boxes.
Exactly at noon, they finish the cleanup when the last box is gone.
Following the guide's map, they protect the river bank.
The team manages the site, and the river looks clear.
Anna identifies the plant, which does not affect the water.
translations: 清理工作开始前，汤姆和安娜在森林边缘安排工作。
他们想找出一种可能影响河流的植物。
向导准确说明了应该沿哪条小路走。
沿着小路走时，安娜发现了一个小鸟巢。
汤姆想保护鸟巢，但清理工作还必须继续。
他们绕开鸟巢安排工作，安娜同时标记了它的位置。
向导解释了污染会怎样影响鸟巢。
汤姆找出了安全区域，于是工人们搬运箱子。
正午时分，最后一个箱子搬走后，他们完成了清理。
他们跟着向导的地图，保护了河岸。
团队安排好现场，河水看起来清澈了。
安娜确认了这种植物，而且它并不会影响水质。

title: 大厅里的用户测试
sentences: At the town hall, Tom and Anna prepare a guide for each user.
A lady asks them to test the task before the meeting.
The guide shows a character, but Anna cannot recognize the face.
Tom reads the task while the lady waits beside the hall.
One user sends a message because the character appears twice.
Anna changes the light, so Tom can recognize the face.
The lady tries the task, but the screen freezes.
Tom repeats the guide for the user, while Anna checks the screen.
The character points to a map near the hall door.
Anna fixes the light, and the user can recognize the face.
The lady approves the task because the guide is clear.
The hall closes after Tom records the result.
translations: 在市政大厅，汤姆和安娜为每位用户准备一份指南。
一位女士请他们在会议前测试这项任务。
指南显示了一个角色，但安娜认不出这张脸。
女士在大厅旁等候时，汤姆阅读任务说明。
一位用户发来消息，因为这个角色出现了两次。
安娜调亮灯光，于是汤姆可以认出这张脸。
女士尝试这项任务时，屏幕却卡住了。
汤姆为这位用户重复指南，安娜同时检查屏幕。
这个角色指向大厅门边的一张地图。
安娜修好灯光，用户终于认出了这张脸。
女士认可了这项任务，因为指南很清楚。
汤姆记录结果后，大厅关门了。

title: 教授的出版计划
sentences: At a university, Tom and Anna prepare a guide for a professor.
The professor wants to publish it before a public meeting.
A lawyer finds an unclear legal example, so the team must revise it.
Anna tries to avoid the crowded office while Tom reads the professor's notes.
The professor asks Tom to express the main idea.
Tom shortens the example, and he can express the idea clearly.
The lawyer checks each page, but the printer stops.
Anna can avoid the delay by using another room.
The team wants to publish the guide anyway, because the meeting is near.
The lawyer approves the example after Tom explains it.
The professor can publish the guide when Tom finishes the cover.
They leave anyway, and the lawyer signs the final guide.
translations: 在一所大学里，汤姆和安娜为一位教授准备指南。
教授想在公众会议前出版这份指南。
一位律师发现一个法律例子不清楚，所以团队必须修改它。
汤姆阅读教授的笔记时，安娜避开拥挤的办公室。
教授请汤姆表达主要观点。
汤姆缩短了例子，也能够清楚地表达观点。
律师检查每一页时，打印机却停止了工作。
安娜换到另一间房，避免了这次延误。
会议临近了，所以团队无论如何都想出版指南。
汤姆解释之后，律师认可了这个例子。
汤姆完成封面后，教授就可以出版指南。
他们无论如何都要离开了，律师也签署了最终指南。

title: 山路上的救援队
sentences: Near a hill, Tom and Anna join a united rescue team.
They suppose the team can remove a large rock before rain.
The leader explains a strategy for the dangerous path.
Suddenly, the main rope breaks, but nobody is hurt.
Anna removes the loose rope while Tom checks the rock.
The united team waits because the ground is wet.
Tom says, I suppose another rope can move the rock safely.
The leader changes the strategy, so everyone moves back.
Suddenly, a small path appears behind the rock.
Anna marks it, and the united team can remove the remaining stones.
The strategy works because the leader gives a clear signal.
They leave the hill after they remove the rock.
translations: 在一座山附近，汤姆和安娜加入了一支联合救援队。
他们猜想团队可以在下雨前搬走一块大石头。
队长解释了应对这条危险小路的策略。
突然，主绳断了，但没有人受伤。
汤姆检查石头时，安娜拆下了松动的绳子。
地面很湿，所以联合团队等待着。
汤姆猜想，另一根绳子可以安全地移动石头。
队长改变了策略，于是所有人都后退了。
突然，石头后面出现了一条小路。
安娜标记出小路，联合团队可以移走剩下的石块。
队长发出清楚的信号后，这个策略成功了。
他们搬走石头后离开了山坡。

title: 会议中心的网络故障
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a conference at a huge center.
The network fails, so the online room does not exist.
They must replace an old screen before the guests arrive.
Anna can mention the problem while Tom checks the network.
The conference hall is huge, but the spare screen is small.
Tom asks whether an online connection can exist on the backup system.
Anna finds a network cable, so Tom calls the technician.
The team replaces the screen while the guests wait.
Tom can mention the cable, and the technician tests it.
The conference begins when the network starts.
The huge screen shows the speaker clearly.
The online room exists after the technician can replace the broken part.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一座巨大的中心准备会议。
网络出了故障，所以线上会议室并不存在。
他们必须在客人到达前更换一块旧屏幕。
汤姆检查网络时，安娜提到了这个问题。
会议大厅很大，但备用屏幕很小。
汤姆询问备用系统上是否可以建立线上连接。
安娜找到一根网络线，于是汤姆叫来了技术员。
客人等待时，团队更换了屏幕。
汤姆提到这根线，技术员便对它进行了测试。
网络启动后，会议开始了。
那块巨大的屏幕清楚地显示出发言人。
技术员更换损坏的部件后，线上会议室恢复了。

title: 博物馆里的原画
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a traditional museum to study a painting.
They want to discover whether the original painting is genuine.
A successful local artist sends a note about it.
Anna can respond to the note while Tom checks the frame.
The worker says the painting moved onto a new wall.
Tom can discover a small mark, but the artist's name is missing.
Anna checks the traditional frame, and Tom searches the archive.
The frame contains an original signature, so the answer looks close.
Anna can respond to the artist with a photograph.
When the artist says the signature is genuine, the exhibition becomes successful.
Tom can discover the original source in the museum archive.
The museum puts a label onto the painting before visitors arrive.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去一家传统博物馆研究一幅画。
他们想查明这幅原画是否真实。
一位成功的本地艺术家寄来一张便条。
汤姆检查画框时，安娜回复了这张便条。
工作人员说，这幅画被移到了另一面新墙上。
汤姆发现一个小标记，但艺术家的名字不见了。
安娜检查传统画框，汤姆则搜索档案。
画框里有一个原始签名，所以答案似乎近在眼前。
安娜把一张照片回复给艺术家。
艺术家说签名是真的，于是展览取得了成功。
汤姆在博物馆档案中找到了原始来源。
参观者到来前，博物馆给画贴上了标签。

title: 仓库里的安全搬运
sentences: Before delivery, Tom and Anna visit a warehouse.
A professional employee shows them a heavy item.
The item blocks the delivery door, so they must move it.
The employee can refuse to move it alone because the floor is unsafe.
Tom checks the equipment while Anna reads the safety note.
They want to prevent damage, but the item is too heavy.
A professional worker brings a cart, and the manager opens another door.
The employee can refuse the task without the correct equipment.
Tom and Anna move the heavy item onto the cart.
The cart reaches the correct place before the delivery begins.
The team can prevent damage because they use the cart.
The professional employee moves the final box with the team.
translations: 送货前，汤姆和安娜来到仓库。
一名专业员工给他们看一件沉重的物品。
这件物品挡住了送货门，所以他们必须搬走它。
因为地面不安全，员工可以拒绝独自搬动它。
汤姆检查设备，安娜则阅读安全说明。
他们想防止物品受损，但物品太重了。
一名专业工人带来推车，经理也打开了另一扇门。
没有正确的设备时，员工可以拒绝这项任务。
汤姆和安娜把沉重物品搬到推车上。
送货开始前，推车到达了正确的位置。
团队使用推车，所以可以防止物品受损。
专业员工和团队一起搬动了最后一个箱子。

title: 剧场里的演出安排
sentences: Tom and Anna perform a short rehearsal in a small hall.
The director gives direct instructions before the audience arrives.
A variety of performers will join the show.
The main speaker is late, so Anna begins to worry.
Tom can direct the performers while Anna checks the schedule.
The team must perform the opening scene on time.
The director calls the speaker, who arrives immediately.
Anna can perform her part after the speaker enters.
The variety of performers makes the show lively.
Clear timing has an advantage because the speaker arrives immediately.
Anna does not worry when rehearsal begins, because timing is an advantage.
The team can perform the show successfully for the audience.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在小大厅里进行短暂排练。
观众到达前，导演给出了直接的指示。
各种各样的表演者都会参加这场演出。
主要发言人迟到了，所以安娜开始担心。
安娜检查日程时，汤姆可以指导表演者。
团队必须准时表演开场场景。
导演打电话给发言人，发言人立即赶到。
发言人进场后，安娜可以表演自己的部分。
各种表演者让演出变得生动。
清楚的时间安排很有优势，因为发言人立即赶到了。
排练开始时，安娜不再担心，因为时间安排很有优势。
团队可以为观众成功完成演出。

title: 酒吧里的音乐梦想
sentences: At a community bar, Tom and Anna plan a small event.
A speaker shares a dream of helping young musicians.
The plan may depend on a small stage beside the bar.
Anna hurts her shoulder while carrying a speaker.
Tom says the event can depend on volunteers.
The speaker asks them to prepare the stage before evening.
Instead of carrying more equipment, Anna rests her shoulder.
Instead, Tom places the equipment on a table, so the bar manager checks it.
The dream seems possible because volunteers arrive.
The event can depend on a safe stage and clear music.
Anna feels better, and the speaker shares the dream with the bar.
The event begins when the bar opens, so the dream becomes real.

安娜没有继续搬更多设备，而是休息肩膀。
汤姆把设备放在桌上，于是酒吧经理检查了设备。
志愿者到达后，这个梦想似乎有可能实现。
这次活动可以依靠安全的舞台和清楚的音乐。
安娜感觉好些了，发言人也向酒吧里的人分享了梦想。
酒吧开门后活动开始了，所以梦想变成了现实。

title: 博物馆里的调查问卷
sentences: At a museum, Tom and Anna study an exhibit about an independent soldier.
An independent researcher asks them to complete a survey.
The context of the exhibit is difficult to understand.
Anna cannot answer the first question easily.

A guide explains the context while Anna reads the notes.
Tom can complete the survey easily because the guide explains the context.
The soldier appears beside an independent flag.
Anna checks the final question before leaving, and Tom explains the context.
Anna says, Ah, the context is clear, so the story is easier.
After the researcher collects the survey, they leave with better understanding.

一名独立研究员请他们完成一份调查问卷。
展览的背景很难理解。
安娜不能轻松回答第一个问题。
汤姆说：啊，旧地图解释了这名士兵的决定。
调查问卷询问这名士兵是否是独立的。
安娜阅读笔记时，一位导游解释了背景。
解释之后，汤姆可以轻松完成调查问卷。
这名士兵出现在一面独立旗帜旁。
安娜检查最后一个问题，汤姆解释了背景。
安娜说：啊，这个背景很清楚，所以故事更容易理解。
研究员收走调查问卷后，他们带着更好的理解离开了。

title: 体育馆的燃气警报
sentences: At the sports hall, Tom and Anna meet a coach before practice.
The coach can notice a gas smell near the kitchen.
A gas alarm rings, and a possibility of delay appears.

Anna worries because the delay may not fit their plan.
Tom can notice a second gas warning near the door.
The team moves outside while the coach calls the manager.
The coach checks the alarm, so the team waits.
A short delay can fit the new schedule.
Practice resumes, and the team can beat its old time.
The possibility of practice returns after the alarm stops.
The team can beat its old time when the coach says the hall is safe.
translations: 在体育馆，汤姆和安娜在训练前遇到一位教练。

教练说球队必须在训练前离开。
安娜担心延误可能无法配合他们的计划。

教练检查警报，所以球队等待着。
短暂的延误可以配合新的日程。
训练恢复了，球队也可以打破原来的用时。
警报停止后，训练的可能性回来了。
教练说大厅安全后，球队可以打破原来的用时。

title: 野生动物中心的说明会
sentences: When the families arrived, Tom and Anna prepared a wildlife talk.

Because the page was still missing, Anna used the video as a solution.
The audience watched quietly, although Tom expected questions.
Anna found the page under a map before the talk ended.
The judges gave the talk a high score after the explanation.
The score pleased them, but none left until the bear's story was clear.

文件介绍了一只从道路上救回的小熊。
观众需要有人清楚地解释这次救助。
有一页内容不见了，所以文件无法展示解决办法。
汤姆在办公室里寻找，安娜则接待观众。
她查看了旧地图，但没有一张地图显示那一页。
汤姆找到一段短视频，小熊出现在视频中。
因为那一页还没找到，安娜把视频当作解决办法。
观众安静地观看，尽管汤姆原以为他们会提问。
安娜在说明会结束前从一张地图下找到了那一页。
评委在听完解释后给这场说明会打了高分。
