title: 铁路会议的出行选择
sentences: At the railway station, Tom and Anna prepare for a conference.
They need an option that lets them attend the conference.
Their arrangement changes because one train is late.
A railway worker says only one option remains.
Anna wants to attend, but Tom may travel alone.
Tom checks the target station while Anna reads the sign.
They can attend the first session if they take the next train.
The platform opens, so the arrangement changes again.
Tom can travel alone, and Anna carries the papers.
A second sign marks the target station.
The last option reaches the conference before lunch.
They arrive together, and the arrangement works.
translations: 在火车站，汤姆和安娜为参加会议做准备。
他们需要一个能让自己参加会议的选择。
因为一列火车晚点，他们的安排发生了变化。
一名铁路工作人员说只剩下一个选择。
安娜想参加会议，但汤姆可能要独自出发。
汤姆查看目标车站，安娜则阅读标志。
如果乘坐下一班火车，他们就能参加第一场会议。
站台开放了，所以安排再次发生变化。
汤姆可以独自出发，安娜则带着文件。
第二个标志标出了目标车站。
最后一个选择能让他们在午饭前到达会议地点。
他们一起到达，出行安排成功了。

title: 森林中心的演讲稿
sentences: Before a review meeting, Tom and Anna hike to a forest center.
They plan a speech about fresh water in the forest.
A corner of the center has water, but its sign is missing.
Some equipment is missing, so the speech cannot begin.
Tom checks the equipment while Anna writes the speech.
The guide reviews the first draft when the missing items arrive.
A forest guide enters, and she points to the corner.
She finds the water sign behind a box.
Anna reviews the speech, while Tom connects the equipment.
The speech explains why fresh water matters to the forest.
The audience reviews the final message before asking questions.
The guide approves the speech, so the review ends.
translations: 评审会议前，汤姆和安娜步行到森林中心。
他们准备一场关于森林清水的演讲。
中心的一个角落有水，但标志不见了。
一些设备不见了，所以演讲无法开始。
汤姆检查设备，安娜则写演讲稿。
缺少的物品到达后，向导评审了第一稿。
一位森林向导走进来，并指向那个角落。
她在箱子后面找到了清水标志。
安娜评审演讲稿，汤姆同时连接设备。
演讲解释了清水为什么对森林很重要。
观众在提问前评审了最后的信息。
向导认可了演讲，所以评审结束了。

title: 山坡上的慈善集市
sentences: Below a hill, Tom and Anna arrive at a fair.
They want to arrange a charity sale beside the track.
The track goes around the hill, but the booth has no sign.
The uneven track may hurt Anna's foot.
Tom sees a worried expression on the volunteer's face.
The sale cannot begin before the booth has a clear sign.
A fair manager brings a sign and a map after Tom asks for help.
Anna marks the track, while Tom carries the sign.
Tom places the sign at the top of the hill.
When the fair opens, the crowd follows the track to the booth.
The sale begins, and Anna's foot does not hurt now.
The volunteer's expression becomes happy, so they close the fair.
translations: 在山坡下，汤姆和安娜到达了一场集市。
他们想在跑道旁安排一次慈善售卖。
跑道绕着山坡延伸，但摊位没有标志。
不平的跑道可能弄伤安娜的脚。
汤姆看到志愿者脸上担忧的表情。
摊位有了清楚的标志后，售卖才能开始。
汤姆请求帮助后，一位集市负责人带来了标志和地图。
安娜标记跑道时，汤姆搬着标志。
汤姆把标志放在山坡顶上。
集市开放时，人群沿着跑道走向摊位。
售卖开始了，安娜的脚现在也不疼了。
志愿者的表情变得开心，所以他们关闭了集市。

title: 营地里的研究事故
sentences: Tom and Anna set up a camp for a researcher.
The researcher needs to record the shape of a nearby hill.
The camp is normally quiet before the survey begins.
An accident breaks the main instrument, so the work stops completely.
Tom draws the shape while Anna checks the remaining equipment.
The researcher reads the map and explains the next step.
Anna finds a replacement tool after searching the camp.
The researcher records the accident before changing the survey plan.
The camp becomes busy when the replacement tool arrives.
The team normally checks the hill's shape again, and the researcher approves it.
Anna repairs the instrument, so the survey is completely ready.
The researcher closes the camp after the final shape matches the map.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为一名研究员搭建营地。
研究员需要记录附近山丘的形状。
调查开始前，营地通常很安静。
一次事故损坏了主要仪器，所以工作完全停止了。
汤姆画出山丘的形状，安娜检查剩余设备。
研究员阅读地图并解释下一步。
安娜在营地里寻找后，找到了一件替换工具。
研究员在改变调查计划前记录了这次事故。
替换工具到达时，营地变得忙碌起来。
团队通常会再次检查山丘的形状，研究员也认可了它。
安娜修好仪器，所以调查已经完全准备好了。
最终形状与地图相符后，研究员关闭了营地。

title: 舞台上的王后
sentences: At a community hall, Tom and Anna prepare a historical play.

汤姆修理风扇时，安娜慢慢数着现金。
王后的服装缺少鲜艳的布料。

汤姆找到了布料，所以王后可以嫁给国王。
汤姆修好风扇后，风扇停了下来。
王后穿着完整的服装登场。
演员们感谢每位客人，演出也结束了。

title: 节日的运输路线

title: 培训会的反馈页面
sentences: In a crowded hall, Tom and Anna attend a training session.

人群带着对任务的清楚理解离开了。

title: 野生动物记者的报道
sentences: At a wildlife reserve, Tom and Anna meet a reporter.
The reporter asks Tom to reply to a question about a wild animal.
The animal stands near the vehicle on a narrow track.
The team needs a tool to check the vehicle before moving.
The reporter waits while Anna checks the tool box.
Tom uses the tool to repair a loose part, so the vehicle can move.
Anna can reply after Tom confirms that the vehicle is safe.
The vehicle moves slowly, but the animal stays nearby.
The average distance becomes safe when the vehicle stops.
The average distance remains safe, so the wild animal leaves.
The reporter can reply to the editor with the recording.

车辆回到保护区，报道也完成了。

title: 社区餐会的准备
sentences: At a community cafe, Tom and Anna meet an employer.
The employer wants to arrange a dinner for the guests.
An active volunteer helps them count the chairs.
They must feed every guest before the concert.
A late delivery creates a problem because there is no fresh food.
Anna asks the employer to arrange another delivery, because the kitchen is ready.
Tom can arrange a second delivery after calling the kitchen.
Guests arrive while active volunteers set the tables.
The kitchen can feed the guests after the delivery arrives.
The employer says the team can earn money from the dinner.
Tom records each guest, so the team can earn money.
The guests thank the employer and the active team.
translations: 在社区咖啡馆，汤姆和安娜遇到一位雇主。

送货晚了，因为没有新鲜食物，所以出现了问题。
安娜请雇主安排另一趟送货。
汤姆打电话给厨房后，可以安排第二趟送货。

title: 诊所里的同事
sentences: After a colleague's injury, Tom and Anna visit a clinic.
The doctor says the colleague is mostly safe, but needs rest.
The nurse asks Anna to carefully count the tablets.
Tom explains the injury while the doctor checks the record.
The doctor says it is impossible for the colleague to work today.
The colleague asks whether the injury will heal soon.
Tom can count the medicine before the nurse closes the box.
Anna checks the label carefully, after counting the tablets.
The colleague is mostly ready to return home, so the nurse prepares the papers.
The doctor explains that the injury needs another check.
It is impossible to forget the medicine after the nurse gives instructions.
Tom and Anna help their colleague leave the clinic.

护士关上药盒前，汤姆可以数清药物。
数完药片后，安娜仔细检查标签。

The background photograph shows the same baseball team, so the history is clear.

Anybody can try the excellent suit before making a choice.
Tom tries the suit while Anna checks the price.
The excellent suit is extremely comfortable.
The ordinary suit is cheaper, so Tom compares both choices.
Anna says the excellent suit will suit the celebration better because it is comfortable.

他们要为一场普通的家庭庆祝活动准备礼物。

做决定前，任何人都可以试穿这套很棒的西装。

title: 博物馆修复之旅

The wall's appearance suggests water damage.
The guide says the water could destroy the old paint because it is weak.
Anna can promise to record the damage while Tom checks the sheet.
The museum worker finds a tool for the repair.
Tom reads the code before the group enters the next room, so Anna leads them.
The guide replaces the damaged sheet beside the entrance.
The repair can destroy the damp area, but it will not harm the wall.
The wall's appearance improves after the repair.
Anna keeps her promise, and the tour continues before the final room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加一场关于老建筑的博物馆之旅。
导游承诺解释这座建筑原来的编号。
入口附近的一张纸显示了每个房间的编号。
墙壁的外观表明它被水损坏了，所以油漆很脆弱。
导游说水可能毁掉旧油漆。
安娜答应记录损坏情况，汤姆则检查那张纸。
博物馆工作人员找来了一件修理工具。
团队进入下一个房间前，汤姆阅读编号，所以安娜带队前进。
导游把损坏的纸张换到了入口旁。
修理可以毁掉潮湿的部分，而不会伤害墙壁。
修理后，墙壁的外观改善了。
安娜履行承诺，参观在进入最后房间前继续进行。

title: 诊所的日常说明
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a clinic to discuss daily medicine.
A nurse gives a formal explanation before the appointment.
The usual medicine may belong to Anna's daily plan, but the label is wrong.
A wrong label makes the medicine difficult to identify.
Tom checks the label while Anna reads the formal instructions.
The doctor explains why the usual medicine is safe.
Anna finds a document that says the medicine can belong to her plan.
The nurse compares the medicine with the daily record, so the label becomes clear.
The formal explanation becomes clear after the comparison.
Tom writes the usual time beside the medicine because Anna needs a reminder.
Anna asks for another explanation before she leaves, because she wants to remember.
The medicine does belong to Anna's daily plan.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到诊所，讨论日常用药。
预约前，一位护士给出正式说明。
这种常用药可能属于安娜的日常计划，但标签是错的。
错误的标签让药物难以辨认。
汤姆检查标签，安娜则阅读正式说明。
医生解释了这种常用药为什么安全。
安娜找到一份文件，说明这种药可以属于她的计划。
护士把药物和日常记录作比较，所以标签变清楚了。
比较之后，正式说明变得清楚了。
安娜需要提醒，所以汤姆把通常的时间写在药物旁边。
安娜在离开前请求再次说明。
这种药确实属于安娜的日常计划。

title: 城堡之旅的备用路线
sentences: At a valley airport, Tom and Anna meet a pilot before a flight.
They want to succeed with an alternative flight plan.
The pilot explains that the first route is closed because of clouds.
The castle lies beyond the valley, but the weather is changing.
Tom says, We can check the alternative route ourselves before takeoff.
The pilot is careful with the map while Anna checks the weather.
The team chooses a safer route after the first route closes.
The alternative route passes beside the valley.
The pilot carefully guides the plane toward the castle.
Tom and Anna can be careful when they check the instruments.
Tom says, We can reach the castle ourselves when the clouds clear.
The team can succeed because everyone follows the alternative plan.
translations: 在山谷机场，汤姆和安娜在起飞前遇到一名飞行员。
他们想依靠一份备用飞行计划取得成功。
飞行员解释说第一条路线因为云层而关闭了。
城堡在山谷另一边，但天气正在变化。
汤姆说：我们可以在起飞前自己检查备用路线。
飞行员仔细研究地图，安娜则查看天气。
第一条路线关闭后，团队选择了更安全的路线。
备用路线经过山谷旁边。
飞行员仔细驾驶飞机朝城堡飞去。
汤姆和安娜检查仪器时都很小心。
汤姆说：云层散开时，我们可以自己到达城堡。
每个人都遵循备用计划，所以团队取得了成功。

title: 山谷里的体育节
sentences: At a valley sports festival, Tom and Anna help an attractive team.
The team plays basketball beside the golf field.
A golf winner displays a trophy near the entrance.
The winner worries someone may steal it before the final game.
Tom checks the entrance while Anna searches behind the stage.
The attractive team keeps playing basketball as the crowd waits.
A thief tries to steal the trophy, but Anna sees him.
Tom follows the thief when he runs toward the valley.
The guard closes the gate, so the team can protect the trophy.
The basketball winner returns the trophy to the golf winner.
The winner thanks Anna, and the valley becomes quiet.
Everyone celebrates, and the attractive festival ends safely.
translations: 在山谷体育节，汤姆和安娜帮助一支有吸引力的球队。
球队在高尔夫球场旁打篮球。
一位高尔夫球冠军在入口附近展示奖杯。
冠军担心有人会在决赛前偷走奖杯。
汤姆检查入口时，安娜在舞台后寻找。
人群等待时，那支有吸引力的球队继续打篮球。
小偷试图偷走奖杯，但安娜看见了他。
汤姆跟着小偷向山谷跑去。
门卫关上大门，所以团队可以保护奖杯。
篮球冠军把奖杯还给了高尔夫球冠军。
冠军感谢安娜，山谷也安静了下来。
大家庆祝起来，这场有吸引力的体育节安全结束了。

title: 湖边酒吧的失踪碗
sentences: In an ancient town beside a lake, Tom and Anna walk to a pub.
A crazy storm begins while they approach the pub.
The pub serves soup in a bowl near the window.
The bowl disappears, but the owner stays inside.
They want to solve the mystery before the storm ends.
Anna searches the pub while Tom checks the lake door.
The owner finds an ancient mark under the table.
A crazy wind pushes the bowl behind a wooden box.
Tom moves the box, so he can solve the mystery.
The bowl appears beside the pub's old stove.
Anna returns the bowl to the soup table.
The storm passes after midnight, and the ancient town becomes quiet beside the lake.
translations: 在湖边的古镇，汤姆和安娜走向一家酒吧。
他们接近酒吧时，一场疯狂的暴风雨开始了。
酒吧在窗边的碗里盛着汤。
碗不见了，但店主留在屋里。
他们想在暴风雨结束前解开这个谜团。
安娜搜索酒吧时，汤姆检查湖边的门。
店主在桌子下面发现了一个古老的标记。
疯狂的风把碗吹到了木箱后面。
汤姆移动木箱，所以可以解开谜团。
碗出现在酒吧旧炉子旁。
安娜把碗放回放汤的桌子上。
暴风雨过去了，古镇在湖边安静下来。

title: 海边酒店的时装展
sentences: At an ocean hotel, Tom and Anna attend a typical fashion show.
Every mirror is ready except the mirror beside the entrance.
The damaged mirror makes the fashion team stop, so the manager calls Tom.
The manager asks Tom to fix the mirror before the show.
Anna checks the frame while Tom searches for a tool.
The designer brings a replacement frame, so the repair can start.
The ocean wind becomes strong, and the manager closes the door.
The typical show can continue after the new frame arrives.
The mirror looks clear except for one small mark.
Tom can fix the mark when Anna holds the frame.
The fashion team checks every mirror again.
The audience enjoys the fashion show beside the ocean.
translations: 在海边酒店，汤姆和安娜参加一场普通的时装展。
除了入口旁的镜子，其他镜子都准备好了。
损坏的镜子让时装团队停下来，所以经理叫来了汤姆。
经理请汤姆在展览前修好镜子。
汤姆寻找工具时，安娜检查镜框。
设计师带来了替换镜框，所以修理可以开始。
海风变强了，经理便关上了门。
新镜框到达后，普通的展览可以继续。
镜子看起来很清楚，只剩一个小标记。
安娜扶着镜框时，汤姆可以修好这个标记。
时装团队再次检查了每一面镜子。
观众在海边欣赏这场时装展。

title: 海岸调查的桥梁
sentences: Along the coast, Tom and Anna walk with an engineer.
The engineer asks them to inspect a drawing of a bridge.
Unfortunately, the bridge is closed after a night of rain.
A visitor can complain about the delay because the gate is closed.
The team cannot find the safety equipment anywhere.
The engineer explains the coast route while Tom checks the truck.
Tom can complain to the engineer after reading the warning.
Anna finds the equipment in a box beside the drawing.
They can search anywhere for a second entrance, so Anna checks the map.
The coast path leads to a safe bridge entrance.
Unfortunately, the truck cannot cross the old bridge before the tide rises.
The engineer changes the route after checking the drawing.
translations: 沿着海岸，汤姆和安娜与一名工程师同行。
工程师请他们检查一幅桥梁图纸。
不幸的是，这座桥在一夜降雨后关闭了。
一名游客因为大门关闭而抱怨延误。
团队在任何地方都找不到安全设备。
工程师解释海岸路线时，汤姆检查卡车。
汤姆读完警告后，可以向工程师抱怨。
安娜在图纸旁的箱子里找到了设备。
他们可以在任何地方寻找第二个入口，所以安娜检查地图。
海岸小路通向一座安全的桥梁入口。
不幸的是，卡车无法通过旧桥。
工程师检查图纸后改变了路线。

title: 山顶上的英雄
sentences: At a mountain center, Tom and Anna meet a local hero.
The hero describes an ideal rescue route above the valley.
The mountain's height makes the route difficult.
Anna is surprised by the narrow path near the top.
The guide gives Tom a tip while the hero checks the rope.
The ideal route becomes safer after the guide adds a marker.
Tom measures the height carefully before the group climbs.
The hero is pleased when everyone follows the tip, so the guide opens the path.
The climbers are surprised by a clear view from the top.
The hero gives another tip after the weather improves.
Anna is pleased with the ideal route.
The height no longer worries the group, and the hero thanks them.
translations: 在山地中心，汤姆和安娜遇到一位当地英雄。
这位英雄描述了山谷上方的一条理想救援路线。
山的高度让这条路线变得困难。
狭窄的山路让安娜感到惊讶。
英雄检查绳子时，导游给了汤姆一个提示。
导游增加标记后，理想路线变得更安全。
团队攀登前，汤姆仔细测量了高度。
每个人都遵循提示时，英雄很高兴，所以导游打开了道路。
登山者从山顶看到清晰的景色，感到很惊讶。
天气好转后，英雄又给了一个提示。
安娜对这条理想路线感到满意。
高度不再让团队担心，英雄也感谢了他们。

title: 宫殿里的失窃调查
sentences: After a valuable item disappears, Tom and Anna visit a palace.
A guard says a criminal may be hiding somewhere inside.
The palace has a weak lock near a side door.
Tom hears a knock, but the hallway is empty.
Anna searches everywhere while the guard checks the main rooms.
A narrow gap appears beneath the side door.
The guard finds a note that describes the criminal's route.
Tom can knock on the door again after reading the note.
The criminal runs from the palace when the guard opens the gate.
Anna checks everywhere for the missing item.
Tom finds the item in the gap beneath a cabinet.
The weak lock explains how the criminal entered, so the guard thanks them.
translations: 一件贵重物品不见后，汤姆和安娜来到宫殿。
卫兵说一名罪犯可能藏在里面的某处。
宫殿侧门附近的锁很不牢固。
汤姆听见敲门声，但走廊空无一人。
卫兵检查主要房间时，安娜到处寻找。
侧门下面出现了一条窄缝。
卫兵找到一张便条，描述了罪犯的路线。
读完便条后，汤姆再次敲了敲门。
卫兵打开大门时，罪犯从宫殿跑了出去。
安娜到处寻找那件失踪的物品。
汤姆在柜子下面的缝隙里找到了物品。
不牢固的锁解释了罪犯如何进入，卫兵也感谢了他们。

title: 机场的慈善活动
sentences: At an airport, Tom and Anna organize a charity event.
An enormous column stands beside the arrival hall.
A passenger asks whether the event will help local families.
Tom says the charity will definitely support the families.
The passenger carries a sign to the enormous column.
Anna explains the event, while other passengers wait.
The charity table stands beneath the column.
A passenger gives money, so Anna records the donation.
The organizers celebrate when the first target is reached.
The enormous hall becomes busy before the event ends.
Tom definitely thanks every passenger who helps.
The charity team can celebrate after the airport event finishes.
translations: 在机场，汤姆和安娜组织一场慈善活动。
到达大厅旁有一根巨大的柱子。
一名乘客询问这项活动是否会帮助当地家庭。
汤姆说慈善活动一定会支持这些家庭。
这名乘客把标志带到巨大的柱子旁。
其他乘客等待时，安娜解释了这项活动。
慈善桌位于柱子下面。
一名乘客捐了钱，所以安娜记录了这笔捐款。
达到第一个目标时，组织者庆祝起来。
活动结束前，巨大的大厅变得忙碌。
汤姆一定会感谢每一位提供帮助的乘客。
机场活动结束后，慈善团队庆祝起来。

title: 湖边的钓鱼比赛
sentences: Beside a quiet lake, Tom and Anna join a fishing contest.
An unusual fish appears near Anna's boat.
A creative athlete prepares a new fishing tool.
The teams compete while the judge checks the water.
Tom's friendly personality helps the worried team.
Anna uses the old net badly, so the fish escapes.
The contest continues after the judge gives advice.
The unusual fish returns near the creative athlete.
Tom explains that the team can compete fairly because everyone follows the rules.
Anna's personality keeps everyone calm.
The team uses the new tool when the fish returns, and the fish enters the net.
The judge says the first fishing attempt went badly, but the team can compete.
translations: 在安静的湖边，汤姆和安娜参加钓鱼比赛。
一条不寻常的鱼出现在安娜的船旁。
一位有创造力的运动员准备了一件新的钓鱼工具。
各队比赛时，裁判检查水面。
汤姆友好的性格帮助了担心的队伍。
安娜糟糕地使用旧渔网，所以鱼逃走了。
裁判给出建议后，比赛继续进行。
那条不寻常的鱼回到了有创造力的运动员附近。
汤姆解释说，团队可以公平地比赛，因为每个人都遵守规则。
安娜的性格让所有人保持冷静。
鱼回来时，团队使用新工具，鱼进入了网中。
裁判说第一次钓鱼尝试很糟糕，但团队还可以比赛。

title: 实验室的空气报告
sentences: In a climate lab, Tom and Anna meet a journalist.
The lab studies the quantity of smoke in a musical hall.
A cigarette creates smoke near the test window.
The journalist asks whether the climate inside is safe.
Tom measures the quantity, while Anna checks the lab device.
The musical group waits outside because the test is not finished.
Anna explains how cigarette smoke can change the air.
The lab records the climate before the musicians enter.
The journalist compares the first quantity with a second sample, so Anna records it.
Tom removes the cigarette, so he closes the test window.
The journalist writes that the climate is safe after the test, and the musical performance can continue.
The lab reports the final quantity to the musical group before closing.
translations: 在气候实验室，汤姆和安娜遇到一名记者。
实验室研究音乐厅里的烟雾数量。
一支香烟在测试窗附近产生了烟雾。
记者询问室内气候是否安全。
汤姆测量数量，安娜则检查实验室设备。
测试尚未完成，所以音乐团队在外面等待。
安娜解释了香烟烟雾如何改变空气。
音乐家进入前，实验室记录了气候。
记者把第一个数量和第二个样本作了比较，所以安娜记录下来。
汤姆拿走香烟并关上测试窗。
记者写道气候是安全的，音乐表演可以继续。
实验室在关闭前把最后的数量报告给音乐团队。

title: 机场的幸运奖品
sentences: At an airport, Tom and Anna arrive to collect a prize.
The airline changes the schedule because one flight is late.
A lucky passenger waits beside the information desk.
The control tower sends a new message to the airline.
A clerk asks whether the suitcase is yours.
Anna checks the airline message, while Tom reads the schedule.
The control tower confirms that the flight is safe.
The clerk says the second suitcase is yours.
Tom finds the prize inside the second suitcase.
The new schedule works, when the airline opens the gate.
The lucky passenger receives another prize, so the airline opens the gate.
Tom and Anna board the flight before the schedule changes again.
translations: 在机场，汤姆和安娜到达后准备领取奖品。
因为一趟航班晚点，航空公司改变了时间表。
一位幸运的乘客在问讯处旁等待。
控制塔向航空公司发送了新消息。
工作人员问这个手提箱是不是你的。
汤姆阅读时间表时，安娜检查航空公司的消息。
控制塔确认航班是安全的。
工作人员说第二个手提箱是你的。
汤姆在第二个手提箱里找到了奖品。
航空公司打开登机口时，新时间表起作用了。
幸运的乘客又得到了一份奖品。
时间表再次变化前，汤姆和安娜登上了航班。

title: 沙漠婚礼的广告牌
sentences: Tom and Anna travel to a desert wedding.
The wedding team prepares an advertising sign near the road.
Pollution covers the road after a truck passes.
A small chip in the sign stops the advertising light.
Anna speaks quietly, while Tom checks the sign.
The desert wind moves the sign, but the wedding tent stays safe.
The wedding guests wait because the advertising sign is dark.
Tom replaces the chip after finding a spare part.
The advertising light works again, when the chip is ready.
Pollution clears from the road after the truck leaves.
Anna speaks quietly to the guests near the tent.
The wedding begins when the guests take their seats.
translations: 汤姆和安娜前往沙漠参加婚礼。
婚礼团队在道路旁准备一块广告牌。
一辆卡车经过后，污染覆盖了道路。
广告牌里的一个小芯片让广告灯停止工作。
安娜轻声说话时，汤姆检查广告牌。
沙漠里的风吹动广告牌，但婚礼帐篷很安全。
客人们等待着，因为广告牌是暗的。
找到备用零件后，汤姆更换了芯片。
芯片准备好后，广告灯又亮了。
卡车离开后，道路上的污染消散了。
安娜在帐篷附近轻声和客人交谈。
客人入座后，婚礼开始了。

title: 老板的海外骑行计划
sentences: Before a business trip, Tom and Anna cycle to the station.
Their boss sends them abroad for a short meeting.
Anna needs to pack a small bag before the train leaves.
Cycling is a useful habit for the journey.
Tom tells a joke, while Anna checks the travel papers.
The boss explains what to do abroad.
Anna packs the device after reading the instructions.
Tom can cycle to the hotel when the train arrives.
The habit helps them travel without a taxi, because the hotel is nearby.
Anna tells the same joke after the meeting.
The boss calls them, while they are abroad.
They pack the papers before returning home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在出差前骑车去车站。
他们的老板派他们出国参加一个短会。
安娜需要在火车出发前收拾一个小包。
骑车是这次旅程的一个好习惯。
安娜检查旅行文件时，汤姆讲了一个笑话。
老板解释了他们在国外要做什么。
读完说明后，安娜收拾好了设备。
火车到达后，汤姆可以骑车到酒店。
这个习惯帮助他们不用乘出租车旅行，因为酒店就在附近。
会议结束后，安娜又讲了同一个笑话。
他们在国外时，老板打电话给他们。
回家前，他们收拾好文件。

title: 停电后的戏剧演出
sentences: At a community hall, Tom and Anna attend a cooking drama.
The drama includes a sauce demonstration for the audience.
The electricity fails just before the final scene.
The failure becomes a disaster because the stage is dark.
The director is worried about an actor's illness.
Anna checks the backup electricity, while Tom speaks to the audience.
The backup system starts after the technician arrives.
Tom prepares the sauce prop when the stage becomes bright.
The drama continues, and the audience remains quiet.
The actor's illness improves before the final scene.
The director is no longer worried, because the performance can continue.
The disaster ends when the electricity works again.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加社区大厅里的烹饪戏剧。
这出戏包括为观众展示酱汁制作。
最后一幕前，电力突然中断了。
因为舞台很暗，这次故障变成了一场灾难。
导演担心一名演员的疾病。
汤姆和观众交谈时，安娜检查备用电力。
技术员到达后，备用系统启动了。
舞台变亮时，汤姆准备好酱汁道具。
戏剧继续了，观众保持安静。
最后一幕前，演员的病情有所好转。
导演不再担心，因为演出可以继续。
电力恢复后，灾难结束了。

title: 停车场里的数字物品
sentences: At a cafe parking area, Tom and Anna meet the twin.
The twin owns a shop that sells coffee bean gifts.
A parking ticket shows a digital symbol near the car.
Tom realizes his possession is missing from the car.
Anna checks the symbol, while the twin searches the parking area.
The missing possession is a digital card for the shop.
The twin finds a bean bag beside the machine, because Anna checks the ground.
Anna checks the digital card after opening the bag.
Tom's twin remembers placing the possession near the machine.
The digital symbol appears on the card, when Anna opens it.
Tom finds the possession under the bean bag before the twin returns.
The twin returns the digital card to Tom, and the parking area becomes quiet.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在咖啡馆停车区遇到汤姆的双胞胎兄弟。
这位双胞胎兄弟有一家卖咖啡豆礼物的小店。
停车票在汽车旁显示一个数字符号。
汤姆发现自己的物品不在车里。
安娜检查那个符号时，双胞胎兄弟在停车区寻找。
失踪的物品是商店的一张数字卡片。
双胞胎兄弟在售票机旁找到一个豆子袋。
打开袋子后，安娜检查数字卡片。
汤姆的双胞胎兄弟记得把物品放在机器旁。
卡片上出现了那个数字符号。
汤姆在双胞胎兄弟回来前于豆子袋下面找到了物品。
双胞胎兄弟把数字卡片还给汤姆，停车区也安静了下来。

title: 玩具设计师的新作品
sentences: At a toy exhibition, Tom and Anna meet a designer.
The designer presents an electronic toy for children.
A surprising sound makes the visitors look around.
The designer feels nervous, because the toy stops.
Anna says good luck, while Tom checks the battery.
The toy starts again after Tom changes the battery.
The electronic screen shows a new picture.
The designer explains how the toy learns from children.
Good luck helps the team when the second test begins.
The designer is less nervous after the audience applauds.
The surprising toy plays a short tune.
The designer thanks them, so the toy becomes popular.
translations: 在玩具展览上，汤姆和安娜遇到一位设计师。
设计师展示了一款给孩子们使用的电子玩具。
一个令人惊讶的声音让游客们环顾四周。
玩具停止后，设计师感到紧张。
汤姆检查电池时，安娜说祝你好运。
汤姆更换电池后，玩具又启动了。
电子屏幕显示出一幅新图画。
设计师解释了玩具如何从孩子那里学习。
第二次测试开始时，好运帮助了团队。
观众鼓掌后，设计师不那么紧张了。
这款令人惊讶的玩具播放了一段短曲。
设计师感谢他们，玩具也变得很受欢迎。

title: 办公室里的家具订单
sentences: In an office, Tom and Anna prepare new furniture.
A brilliant designer chooses a wooden table for the room.
The manager checks the salary list before ordering the furniture.
A belt lies beside a wooden chair near the door.
Anna starts a recording while Tom measures the furniture.
The wooden table is too wide, so the designer changes the plan.
The manager confirms the salary after the order is corrected.
Tom moves the belt while Anna checks the chair.
The recording shows the brilliant design on the table.
The designer orders smaller furniture when the room is measured.
The new table arrives, and the office looks ready.
The manager pays the salary, and they arrange the wooden furniture.
translations: 在办公室里，汤姆和安娜准备新家具。
一位出色的设计师为房间选择了一张木桌。
经理在订购家具前检查工资清单。
门边一把木椅旁放着一条腰带。
汤姆测量家具时，安娜开始录音。
木桌太宽了，所以设计师改变了计划。
订单修改后，经理确认了工资。
安娜检查椅子时，汤姆把腰带移开。
录音显示了桌上的出色设计。
房间测量好后，设计师订购了更小的家具。
新桌子到达了，办公室看起来准备好了。
经理付了工资，他们也摆好了木制家具。

title: 车站厨房课
sentences: At a cooking class beside a railway platform, Tom and Anna attend.
The chef gives permission to use the kitchen after the train leaves.
A recipe lies on the carpet near the classroom door.
The students must behave carefully because the platform is crowded.
Anna reads the recipe, while Tom collects the mail.
The chef sends a message when the platform becomes quiet.
Tom can behave well after the chef explains the safety rule.
Anna finds permission written in the class mail.
The recipe includes a simple dish for the students.
Tom moves the carpet away from the cooking table.
The students behave quietly, while the chef checks the food.
Anna sends the final mail, before leaving the platform.
translations: 在铁路站台旁的烹饪课上，汤姆和安娜参加课程。
火车离开后，厨师允许他们使用厨房。
教室门附近的地毯上放着一份食谱。
因为站台很拥挤，学生们必须小心行事。
汤姆收取邮件时，安娜阅读食谱。
站台安静后，厨师发来了一条消息。
厨师解释安全规则后，汤姆可以表现得很好。
安娜在课堂邮件里找到了许可。
这份食谱包括一道适合学生的简单菜肴。
汤姆把地毯从烹饪桌旁移开。
厨师检查食物时，学生们安静地行动。
离开站台前，安娜发送了最后一封邮件。

title: 音乐课的两篇文章
sentences: At music class, Tom and Anna study pop and classical songs.
The teacher asks them to write an essay before the final concert.
An extreme example makes the first essay difficult to understand.
Tom says the first idea sounds stupid, but Anna keeps reading.
A helpful teacher explains the difference between pop and classical music.
Anna changes the essay while Tom checks the examples.
The extreme example becomes clearer after the explanation.
The class listens to a pop song before discussing the essay.
The teacher plays a classical song when the discussion begins.
Tom says the second essay is helpful for the audience.
Anna says the new idea is not stupid after all.
The teacher removes the extreme example, and they finish the essay.
translations: 在音乐课上，汤姆和安娜学习流行歌曲和古典歌曲。
老师请他们在最后的音乐会前写一篇文章。
一个极端的例子让第一篇文章很难理解。
汤姆说第一个想法听起来很愚蠢，但安娜继续阅读。
一位有帮助的老师解释了流行音乐和古典音乐的区别。
汤姆检查例子时，安娜修改文章。
解释之后，极端的例子变得更清楚了。
讨论文章前，课堂听了一首流行歌曲。
讨论开始时，老师播放了一首古典歌曲。
汤姆说第二篇文章对观众很有帮助。
安娜说新想法毕竟并不愚蠢。
老师删去了极端的例子，他们也完成了文章。

title: 服装讲座的沟通
sentences: At a lecture, Tom and Anna study clothing design.
The speaker asks them to borrow clothing for a small display.
An awful costume lies beside the lecture platform.
Tom can react badly because the costume is torn.
Anna communicates with the designer, while Tom checks the clothing.
The designer explains how to borrow a better costume.
Tom can communicate the problem after reading the instructions, so the designer understands.
The designer lends a clean piece of clothing.
Anna can react calmly, when the new costume arrives.
The lecture continues after Tom removes the awful costume.
The audience can communicate with the designer about the display.
Tom can borrow the clothing again for the next lecture.
translations: 在讲座上，汤姆和安娜学习服装设计。
发言人请他们借一些服装用于小型展示。
讲台旁放着一套糟糕的服装。
因为服装破了，汤姆的反应很糟糕。
汤姆检查服装时，安娜与设计师沟通。
设计师解释了如何借到更好的服装。
读完说明后，汤姆可以传达这个问题，所以设计师明白了。
设计师借来了一件干净的服装。
新服装到达时，安娜平静地作出反应。
汤姆移走糟糕的服装后，讲座继续了。
观众就展示内容与设计师交流。
下一场讲座时，汤姆可以再次借用这件服装。

title: 技术公司的系统故障
sentences: After a system error, Tom and Anna visit a technology office.
An assistant shows them a profile of the new architecture.
A virus changes the architecture and makes one file disappear.
Tom realizes the file is lost because it contains a user's address.
Anna can disagree with the first repair plan.
The assistant checks the profile while Tom scans the system.
The team removes the virus, so the architecture becomes stable.
Tom finds the virus in an old file.
Anna checks the profile again before saving it.
The assistant restarts the system, and the lost file returns.
Anna does not disagree with the new repair plan.
The assistant records the result, and the system works.
translations: 系统出错后，汤姆和安娜来到一家技术公司。
一名助理给他们看新系统架构的简介。
病毒改变了系统架构，还让一个文件消失了。
汤姆发现文件丢失了，里面有一位用户的地址。
安娜可以不同意第一个修复计划。
汤姆扫描系统时，助理检查简介。
团队移除病毒，所以系统架构稳定了。
汤姆在一个旧文件里找到了病毒。
安娜在保存简介前再次检查它。
助理重启系统，丢失的文件回来了。
安娜不同意新的修复计划。
助理记录了结果，系统也恢复工作了。

title: 建筑师的失踪线索
sentences: Tom and Anna join an adventure with an architect.
A detective asks them to lend a map of the old building.
The architect describes a second entrance near the river.
The detective says the missing key is nowhere in the office, so they check the rooms.
Tom can lend his lamp while Anna checks the map.
The adventure continues after the architect opens the first room.
Secondly, the detective checks the stairs behind the room.
Anna finds a mark that points nowhere on the map.
The architect lends a small tool to the detective.
The detective finds the key when Tom moves the lamp.
The adventure becomes safer after the second door opens.
Secondly, Anna checks the river entrance with the architect before leaving.
translations: 汤姆和安娜与一位建筑师参加一次冒险。
一名侦探请他们借出老建筑的地图。
建筑师描述了河边的第二个入口。
侦探说办公室里到处都找不到失踪的钥匙，所以他们检查房间。
安娜检查地图时，汤姆可以借出自己的灯。
建筑师打开第一个房间后，冒险继续了。
其次，侦探检查房间后面的楼梯。
安娜找到一个在地图上指向无处的标记。
建筑师借给侦探一件小工具。
汤姆移动灯时，侦探找到了钥匙。
第二扇门打开后，冒险变得更安全了。
其次，安娜和建筑师检查了河边入口。

title: 酒店里的音乐会
sentences: Before a concert, Tom and Anna arrive at a hotel reception.
A musician leaves a diary beside the reception desk.
The hotel must repair a light before the celebrity arrives.
Anna feels scared because the musician cannot find the diary.
Tom checks the reception, while Anna searches the guest room.
The musician asks the hotel assistant to repair the light.
The assistant finds the diary after the repair begins.
The celebrity arrives when the reception lights turn on.
Anna is no longer scared, so she gives the diary to the musician.
The musician reads a song from the diary.
The hotel finishes the repair, before the concert.
The celebrity thanks the musician at the reception.
translations: 音乐会前，汤姆和安娜到达酒店前台。
一名音乐家把日记放在前台旁。
酒店必须在名人到达前修好一盏灯。
音乐家找不到日记，所以安娜感到害怕。
安娜搜索客房时，汤姆检查前台。
音乐家请酒店助理修理灯。
修理开始后，助理找到了日记。
前台灯亮起时，名人到达了。
安娜不再害怕了，所以她把日记交给音乐家。
音乐家从日记里读了一首歌。
音乐会前，酒店完成了修理。
名人在前台感谢了音乐家。

title: 山谷里的滑雪旅行
sentences: In a mountain valley, Tom and Anna meet a traveller.
The traveller tells a clever story about an incredible ski trip.
A van waits near the ski station before the snow begins.
Tom is asleep when the van waits.
Anna checks the van, while the traveller reads the map.
The driver says the ski route is safe after the storm.
The traveller gives Tom a clever tip, because the first slope is steep.
The incredible view appears when the van reaches the valley.
Tom is no longer asleep after Anna calls his name.
The traveller checks the ski equipment carefully.
Anna follows the clever tip before crossing the slope.
The van returns to the station after the trip, and the incredible journey makes the traveller smile.
translations: 在山谷里，汤姆和安娜遇到一位旅行者。
旅行者讲了一个关于难以置信的滑雪旅行的聪明故事。
雪开始下之前，一辆面包车停在滑雪站附近。
面包车等待时，汤姆睡着了。
旅行者阅读地图时，安娜检查面包车。
司机说暴风雪后滑雪路线是安全的。
因为第一条雪道很陡，旅行者给汤姆一个聪明提示。
面包车到达山谷时，难以置信的景色出现了。
安娜叫汤姆的名字后，他不再睡着了。
旅行者仔细检查滑雪设备。
穿过雪坡前，安娜遵循了这个聪明提示。
面包车返回车站，这次难以置信的旅行让旅行者笑了。

title: 办公室的非正式生活方式
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a uniform office event.
A printer shows a page about a healthy lifestyle.
Anna says the blue jacket is hers, not the office uniform.
Tom checks the printer, while Anna reads the informal invitation.
The manager asks everyone to leave the petrol area.
The lifestyle talk begins after the printer works again.
Anna explains why the informal event is useful.
Tom finds another jacket and says it is hers.
The printer produces the final invitation.
The manager checks the uniform before guests arrive.
The petrol area is empty when the event starts.
Anna's lifestyle advice is informal, but clear.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备一场统一着装的办公室活动。
打印机显示了一页关于健康生活方式的内容。
安娜说蓝色夹克是她的，不是办公室制服。
安娜阅读非正式邀请时，汤姆检查打印机。
经理请所有人离开汽油区域。
打印机再次工作后，生活方式讲座开始了。
安娜解释了这场非正式活动为什么有用。
汤姆找到另一件夹克，并说那是她的。
打印机打印出了最后一张邀请函。
客人到达前，经理检查了制服。
活动开始时，汽油区域是空的。
安娜的生活方式建议非正式但清楚。

title: 厨房里的慈善晚餐
sentences: At a cooking class, Tom and Anna join a famous chef.
The chef reads an invitation for a charity dinner.
Anna cuts a lemon while Tom prepares the soup.
The electrical oven stops because rubbish blocks its air vent.
The chef works differently when the oven becomes cold.
Tom removes the rubbish, and Anna calls the electrical manager.
The manager repairs the electrical oven after lunch.
The chef tastes the soup before adding another lemon.
Anna writes the invitation while Tom cleans the table.
The chef cooks differently, so everyone watches closely.
The invitation gives the chef a new dinner time.
Anna squeezes a lemon into the soup, and the class ends.
translations: 在烹饪课上，汤姆和安娜加入了一位有名厨师的课程。
厨师读了一封慈善晚餐的邀请函。
安娜切柠檬时，汤姆准备汤。
因为垃圾堵住了通风口，电烤箱停止工作。
烤箱变冷时，厨师换了一种方式工作。
汤姆清理垃圾，安娜给电工经理打电话。
经理午餐后修好了电烤箱。
厨师在加入另一片柠檬前尝了尝汤。
安娜写邀请函时，汤姆擦桌子。
厨师换了一种方式做菜，所以大家仔细观看。
邀请函给厨师安排了新的晚餐时间。
汤味道平淡，所以安娜把柠檬汁挤进汤里，课程也结束了。

title: 体育馆里的日常训练
sentences: At a community sports hall, Tom and Anna meet an instructor.
The instructor starts everyday running practice before breakfast.
Tom brings his pet because it enjoys the morning walk.
Anna watches a comedy while the runners stretch.
The instructor gives the exact route, and every runner listens.
Tom begins running after the comedy ends.
The pet waits beside Anna when Tom reaches the first corner.
The comedy makes Anna laugh, so the group feels relaxed.
Anna reads the exact time on the hall clock.
The everyday practice continues, although the rain starts outside.
The instructor changes the running route because the floor is wet.
The pet joins the runners after Anna opens the side door.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在社区体育馆遇到一位教练。
教练在早餐前开始每天的跑步训练。
汤姆带着他的宠物，因为它喜欢晨间散步。
跑步者们伸展时，安娜看了一部喜剧。
教练把准确路线告诉每一位跑步者。
喜剧结束后，汤姆开始跑步。
汤姆到达第一个拐角时，宠物在安娜身边等待。
喜剧让安娜笑了，所以大家都放松下来。
安娜看了体育馆时钟上的准确时间。
虽然外面下起雨，每天的训练仍在继续。
因为地面很湿，教练改变了跑步路线。
安娜打开侧门后，宠物加入了跑步者。

title: 学校运动会
sentences: At a small farming school fair, Tom and Anna visit.
A painter hangs a poster beside the soccer field.
The children greet the farmer before the games begin.
A lamp falls because a goat touches the table.
Tom moves the lamp while Anna protects the poster.
The painter repairs the poster after the wind stops.
The farmer explains the farming work, so everyone listens.
Laughter rises when a child kicks the soccer ball away.
Anna helps the children greet the visitors at the gate.
The painter places the poster under a bright lamp.
The soccer game starts after the field becomes dry.
Tom joins the farming team, and laughter continues while Anna keeps score.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去一所小型农场学校参加集市。
一位画家把海报挂在足球场旁。
比赛开始前，孩子们向农民问好。
一只山羊碰到桌子，所以一盏灯掉了下来。
汤姆移动灯时，安娜保护着海报。
风停后，画家修好了海报。
农民解释农场工作，所以大家都认真听。
一个孩子把足球踢远时，笑声响了起来。
安娜在门口帮助孩子们向来宾问好。
画家把海报放在明亮的灯下。
场地变干后，足球比赛开始了。
汤姆加入农场队，笑声继续着，安娜则负责记分。

title: 市场上的新发明
sentences: At a busy market, Tom and Anna meet a businessman.
The businessman wants to invent a safer delivery cart.
He shows them a small physics machine beside a lorry.
A missing wheel stops the cart, because the lorry moved.
Tom looks for the missing wheel while Anna checks the beef stall.
The businessman explains the physics of the cart, after lunch.
Anna finds the wheel under a box of beef.
The lorry returns when the businessman calls the driver.
Tom helps invent a new lock for the cart.
The businessman tests the physics machine before the market closes.
The missing wheel fits correctly, so the cart moves again.
The businessman thanks them, and the lorry leaves.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在热闹的市场遇到一位商人。
商人想发明一辆更安全的送货车。
他在卡车旁给他们看一台小型物理机器。
因为卡车开走了，一个失踪的轮子让小车停下。
汤姆寻找失踪的轮子时，安娜检查牛肉摊。
午餐后，商人解释了小车的物理原理。
安娜在一箱牛肉下面找到了轮子。
商人叫来司机时，卡车回来了。
汤姆帮助发明了小车的新锁。
市场关门前，商人测试了物理机器。
失踪的轮子安装正确，所以小车又能移动了。
商人感谢他们，卡车也离开了。

title: 科学展览会
sentences: In a science hall, Tom and Anna attend a school contest.
An intelligent student presents chemistry and mathematics projects.
The student explains a map of every continent.
Anna feels unhappy because the first experiment fails.
Tom checks the chemistry table, while Anna reads the mathematics notes.
The intelligent student repeats the experiment before the judges arrive.
The chemistry mixture changes colour after the student adds water.
Anna solves the mathematics problem correctly, so the team smiles.
Tom points to the continent map during the talk.
The intelligent student writes the result correctly on a card.
Anna is no longer unhappy when the judges applaud.
The chemistry project wins, because the explanation is clear.
translations: 汤姆和安娜进入科学馆参加学校比赛。
一名聪明的学生展示化学和数学项目。
学生解释了一张包含每个大陆的地图。
因为第一次实验失败，安娜感到不开心。
安娜阅读数学笔记时，汤姆检查化学桌。
聪明的学生在评委到达前重复实验。
学生加水后，化学混合物改变了颜色。
安娜正确地解出了数学题，所以队伍笑了。
汤姆在演讲中指向大陆地图。
聪明的学生把结果正确地写在卡片上。
评委鼓掌时，安娜不再不开心。
化学项目获胜，因为解释很清楚。

title: 机场的雨天
sentences: At an airport, Tom and Anna wait before flying to Spain.
A child leaves a towel beside the travel desk.
Anna puts the towel in a cupboard while Tom checks the gate.
The flight is delayed because a web notice shows heavy rain.
Tom feels sadly about the delay, but Anna stays calm.
The airport worker sadly reads the web notice before opening the gate.
A flying lesson starts when the rain becomes lighter.
Wow, the child finds the towel after checking the cupboard.
Anna smiles because the child is no longer worried.
Tom reads another web message about the new flight time.
The flying lesson ends before the airport announces boarding.
The child says wow when the plane appears outside.
translations: 在机场，汤姆和安娜等待飞往西班牙的航班。
一个孩子把毛巾放在旅行服务台旁。
汤姆检查登机口时，安娜把毛巾放进橱柜。
因为网页通知显示大雨，航班延误了。
汤姆为延误感到难过，但安娜保持冷静。
机场工作人员在打开登机口前阅读网页通知。
雨变小后，一堂飞行课开始了。
孩子检查橱柜后找到了毛巾，哇。
因为孩子不再担心，安娜笑了。
汤姆阅读了另一条关于新航班时间的网页消息。
机场宣布登机前，飞行课结束了。
孩子在飞机出现在外面时说了声哇。

title: 青少年的爵士乐演出
sentences: At a teenage music club, Tom and Anna visit after school.
A trainer prepares young players for a jazz show.
A teenage singer puts a poster beside the stage.
Tom hurts his ankle, because a cable lies near the door.
Anna helps Tom, while the trainer moves the cable.
The jazz band practises happily after the floor becomes clear.
The trainer checks Tom's ankle before the show begins.
The teenage singer reads the poster to the audience.
Tom walks happily when the pain becomes smaller.
Anna keeps the jazz music quiet during the break.
The trainer gives the teenage players new steps.
The band plays jazz happily, and the show begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜放学后来到一家青少年音乐俱乐部。
一位教练为年轻演奏者准备爵士乐演出。
一名青少年歌手把海报放在舞台旁。
因为门边有一根电缆，汤姆的脚踝受伤了。
教练移动电缆时，安娜帮助汤姆。
地面清理干净后，爵士乐队开心地练习。
演出开始前，教练检查了汤姆的脚踝。
那名青少年歌手向观众读了海报。
疼痛减轻后，汤姆开心地走路。
休息时，安娜让爵士乐保持安静。
教练给青少年演奏者示范了新的步骤。
乐队开心地演奏爵士乐，演出开始了。

title: 博物馆里的失窃事件
sentences: Before a new exhibition opens, Tom and Anna enter a museum.
A guard warns them about a scary alarm near the door.
The museum wants to advertise a rare painting.
A thief takes a small statue while the guard checks the alarm.
Firstly, Anna looks at the empty case because Tom calls security.
The guard checks the washing room after the alarm sounds.
Fortunately, Tom finds a wet mark beside the back door.
The thief hides behind a poster when visitors leave.
Anna feels less scary after the security team arrives.
Firstly, the guard follows the wet marks across the hall.
The museum can advertise the exhibition after the statue returns.
Fortunately, the security team catches the thief near the washing room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在新展览开放前进入博物馆。
保安提醒他们门边有一个吓人的警报器。
博物馆想为一幅稀有画作做广告。
保安检查警报器时，一个小偷拿走了一座小雕像。
首先，汤姆打电话给保安，安娜查看空展柜。
警报响起后，保安检查了洗衣房。
幸运的是，汤姆在后门旁发现了湿痕。
游客离开时，小偷藏在一张海报后面。
保安队到达后，安娜不那么害怕了。
首先，保安跟着湿痕穿过大厅。
雕像找回后，博物馆可以为展览做广告了。
幸运的是，保安队在洗衣房附近抓住了小偷。

title: 赛跑前的科学课
sentences: At a school event, Tom and Anna meet a famous runner.
The runner shows a cartoon on a large screen.
Anna brings a biscuit while Tom studies biology notes.
The runner feels weak because the water box is empty.
Tom asks the biology teacher to explain the problem.
Anna finds a kettle, and it starts to boil water.
The cartoon makes children laugh before the race.
The runner drinks water when the kettle stops.
The biology teacher checks the runner's pulse.
Tom gives the runner a biscuit, so he feels stronger.
The race clock returns to zero before the start, and the kettle can boil more water.
The runner crosses the line, and the score is zero.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加学校举办的一项活动，那里有一位著名跑步者。
跑步者在大屏幕上播放一部卡通片。
汤姆学习生物笔记时，安娜带来了一块饼干。
因为水箱空了，跑步者感到虚弱。
汤姆请生物老师解释这个问题。
安娜找到水壶，开始烧水。
比赛前，卡通片让孩子们笑了起来。
水壶停止工作时，跑步者喝了水。
生物老师检查跑步者的脉搏。
汤姆给跑步者一块饼干，所以他感觉更有力气了。
比赛开始前，计时器回到了零。
跑步者冲过终点，比分是零。

title: 手机上的旅行节目
sentences: On a cold morning, Tom and Anna visit a tourism office.
A listener sends a chat about a hockey tour.
The mobile screen stays blank after Anna opens the message.
Tom feels worried because the tourism map is missing.
Anna asks the listener to repeat the chat, while Tom checks the desk.
The hockey coach waits near the office entrance.
The listener sends another chat, when the mobile works again.
Tom finds the tourism map under a blank form.
The hockey tour begins after the coach signs the form.
Anna reads the mobile message to the listener.
The listener explains the exact meeting place in the chat.
Before the office closes, the blank screen changes when Tom charges the mobile.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在寒冷的早晨参观旅游办公室。
一位听众发来关于曲棍球之旅的聊天消息。
安娜打开消息后，手机屏幕仍然是空白的。
因为旅游地图不见了，汤姆感到担心。
汤姆检查桌子时，安娜请听众重复聊天内容。
曲棍球教练在办公室入口附近等待。
手机恢复工作后，听众又发来一条聊天消息。
汤姆在一张空白表格下面找到了旅游地图。
教练签完表格后，曲棍球之旅开始了。
安娜把手机上的消息读给听众听。
听众在聊天中说明了准确的集合地点。
汤姆给手机充电时，空白屏幕发生了变化。

title: 拥挤商场里的健康讲座
sentences: After work, Tom and Anna enter a crowded shopping centre.
Anna wears jewellery for a health talk upstairs.
Tom carries a tablet with the speaker's notes.
Anna gets a headache, because the hall is too crowded.
Tom finds a quiet seat, while Anna checks the tablet.
The speaker asks everyone to pronounce a health word.
Anna removes her jewellery when the headache becomes worse.
The crowded hall becomes quiet after the smoking warning.
Tom reads the tablet notes to the speaker.
The speaker helps Anna pronounce the word correctly.
Anna's headache ends when she drinks water.
The speaker explains why smoking is dangerous, although the talk is short.
translations: 汤姆和安娜下班后进入拥挤的购物中心。
安娜戴着珠宝去楼上的健康讲座。
汤姆带着装有演讲者笔记的平板电脑。
因为大厅太拥挤，安娜头疼起来。
安娜检查平板电脑时，汤姆找到了一个安静的座位。
演讲者请大家读出一个健康词汇。
头疼加重后，安娜摘下了珠宝。
发出吸烟警告后，拥挤的大厅安静下来。
汤姆把平板电脑上的笔记读给演讲者听。
演讲者帮助安娜正确地读出那个词。
安娜喝水后，头疼结束了。
演讲者解释了吸烟为什么危险，尽管讲座很短。

title: 地下车站的滑雪旅行
sentences: At an underground station, Tom and Anna meet a polite guide.
The guide plans a skiing trip for the weekend.
A small frog sits beside the noisy ticket machine.
The train stops because a door makes a noisy sound.
Tom speaks politely to the guard, while Anna watches the frog.
The guide checks the skiing bags before calling the driver.
The driver repairs the door after the station becomes quiet.
The frog jumps away when the train starts again.
The polite guard accepts Anna's thanks for his help.
The skiing trip begins after the train leaves the underground station.
Tom hears the noisy machine, so the trip ending is announced.
The guide explains the ending of the trip before they arrive.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在地下车站遇到一位有礼貌的向导。
向导计划周末去滑雪。
一只小青蛙坐在嘈杂的售票机旁。
因为车门发出嘈杂的声音，火车停了下来。
安娜看着青蛙时，汤姆礼貌地和警卫说话。
向导在打电话给司机前检查了滑雪包。
车站安静后，司机修好了车门。
火车再次启动时，青蛙跳走了。
安娜礼貌地感谢了警卫的帮助。
火车离开地下车站后，滑雪旅行开始了。
警卫听见嘈杂的机器，所以宣布了旅行结束安排。
向导在到达前解释了旅行的结尾。

title: 厨房里的感冒
sentences: In a noisy family kitchen, Tom and Anna prepare breakfast.
Anna speaks loudly, because Tom has the flu.
Tom opens the fridge and finds a jar of jam.
A spider falls near Anna, so she thinks it is rude and feels angry.
Tom feels worse from the flu when the spider hides under the fridge.
Anna moves quietly while Tom looks for a clean plate.
The spider appears again after Anna closes the fridge.
Tom speaks loudly, but Anna catches the spider with a cup.
The jam stays safe when the cup covers the spider.
Anna says the spider is not rude; it is only lost.
Tom feels better from the flu after he drinks warm water.
Anna puts the jam back in the fridge before lunch.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在嘈杂的家庭厨房准备早餐。
因为汤姆得了流感，安娜大声说话。
汤姆打开冰箱，发现一罐果酱。
一只蜘蛛掉到安娜附近，所以她觉得它很失礼，也感到生气。
蜘蛛藏到冰箱下面时，流感让汤姆感觉更糟了。
汤姆寻找干净盘子时，安娜轻轻地走动。
安娜关上冰箱后，蜘蛛又出现了。
汤姆大声说话，但安娜用杯子抓住了蜘蛛。
杯子盖住蜘蛛时，果酱保持安全。
安娜说蜘蛛并不失礼，它只是迷路了。
汤姆喝了温水后，流感症状有所好转。
安娜在午餐前把果酱放回冰箱。

title: 海边的环保日
sentences: Before a sailing lesson, Tom and Anna arrive at a beach.
A dentist brings a laptop for the recycling project.
Anna studies maths while Tom checks a motorcycle outside.
The sailing boat waits because the tide is low.
Tom must recycle bags while Anna opens the laptop.
The dentist explains the maths, before lunch.
The motorcycle starts after Tom charges its battery.
Anna finds a plan to recycle on the laptop.
The sailing lesson begins when the tide rises.
Tom uses the plan to recycle the bags correctly.
The dentist checks the laptop, while Anna watches the boat.
The motorcycle carries the recycling boxes, and the beach is cleaner.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在帆船课前到达海滩。
一位牙医带着笔记本电脑参加回收项目。
汤姆在外面检查摩托车时，安娜学习数学。
因为潮水很低，帆船在等待。
安娜打开笔记本电脑时，汤姆搬运回收袋。
午餐前，牙医解释了潮水的数学规律。
汤姆给电池充电后，摩托车启动了。
安娜在笔记本电脑上找到了一份回收方案。
潮水上涨后，帆船课开始了。
汤姆用这个方案正确地回收袋子。
安娜观看帆船时，牙医检查笔记本电脑。
摩托车把回收箱运到海滩，海滩也更干净了。

title: 厨房里的歌声
sentences: Before a family dinner, Tom and Anna clean a kitchen.
Tom feels lazy, but Anna starts singing near the cooker.
A download on the laptop shows a new recipe.
The cooker becomes worse because its timer stops.
Tom keeps the kitchen tidy, while Anna checks the recipe.
The family sings together after the download finishes.
Anna opens the cooker carefully before the soup burns.
Tom feels less lazy when the music becomes louder.
The tidy table holds plates for every guest.
Anna says the old cooker is worse than the new one.
Tom downloads another recipe, while Anna keeps singing.
The cooker works again after Tom fixes the timer.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在家庭晚餐前打扫厨房。
汤姆感到懒散，但安娜在炉灶旁开始唱歌。
笔记本电脑上的下载内容显示了一份新食谱。
因为计时器停止，炉灶的状况变得更糟。
安娜检查食谱时，汤姆让厨房保持整洁。
下载完成后，全家一起唱歌。
汤快烧干前，安娜小心地打开炉灶。
音乐变大后，汤姆不再那么懒散。
整洁的桌子摆放着每位客人的盘子。
安娜说旧炉灶比新炉灶更糟。
安娜继续唱歌时，汤姆又下载了一份食谱。
汤姆修好计时器后，炉灶又工作了。

title: 露营地的家庭聚会
sentences: At a camping site near a quiet lake, Tom and Anna arrive.
Anna meets her divorced uncle beside the first tent.
Tom carries a curly rope while Anna checks the connected lights.
The worst rain begins, because the tent door is open.
Anna closes the door, while Tom ties the curly rope.
The family shares a camping meal after the rain stops.
Anna's uncle explains that every guest is included.
Tom finds the connected lights under a wet blanket.
The worst wind passes when the lake becomes calm.
Anna happily welcomes the divorced uncle to the meal.
The curly rope holds the tent before night arrives.
Tom checks the included guest list, beside the fire.
translations: 汤姆和安娜到达宁静湖泊旁的露营地。
安娜在第一顶帐篷旁见到了离婚的叔叔。
安娜检查连接好的灯时，汤姆拿着卷曲的绳子。
因为帐篷门开着，最糟糕的雨开始下了。
汤姆系卷曲的绳子时，安娜关上了门。
雨停后，全家分享了一顿露营餐。
安娜的叔叔解释说每位客人都包括在内。
汤姆在湿毯子下面找到了连接好的灯。
湖面变得平静时，最糟糕的风过去了。
安娜开心地欢迎离婚的叔叔参加晚餐。
夜晚到来前，卷曲的绳子固定住了帐篷。
汤姆在火堆旁检查包括在内的客人名单。

title: 市场广告调查
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at the town market to write a report about a small shop.
Its old-fashioned window displays an ad for the latest goods.
The owner hopes the ad will attract visitors before closing time.
Anna follows a narrow path, while Tom notices that some goods have no grade.
The seller says the old-fashioned goods come from local families.
He adds that the latest delivery arrived late, so the grade is not final.
Tom compares prices, and Anna writes the details in their notebook.
When rain begins, the owner moves the ad, but the path becomes slippery.
Anna helps a customer along the path, while the seller covers the goods.
A visitor reads the ad and chooses an old-fashioned clock.
The seller gives the clock a high grade after checking it.
Tom sees that the latest goods are not always the best.
They suggest a clearer ad, with each grade beside its goods.
The owner accepts the idea, and they send the report before closing.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到城镇市场，为一家小商店写报告。
商店的橱窗是老式的，里面展示着最新商品的广告。
店主希望广告能在关门前吸引顾客。
安娜沿着一条窄路走，汤姆发现有些商品没有等级。
卖家说这些老式商品来自当地家庭。
他补充说最新一批货到得很晚，所以等级还没有最终确定。
汤姆比较价格，安娜把细节写进笔记本。
开始下雨时，店主把广告移到雨篷下，但小路变得很滑。
安娜扶一位顾客沿小路走，卖家则把商品盖好。
一位访客读了广告，选择了一只老式钟。
卖家检查钟后，给它评了很高的等级。
汤姆发现最新商品并不总是最好的。
他们建议使用更清楚的广告，在每件商品旁写上等级。
店主接受了这个想法，他们在关门前提交了报告。

title: 法院附近的轮胎问题
sentences: Tom and Anna drive to court with documents for a public hearing.
Within the first mile, a sharp stone damages one tyre.
The company policy says every issue must be reported before the car moves on.
Tom stops safely, while Anna opens a set of tools.
The tyre issue looks small, but traffic is moving quickly around them.
Anna calls the court, and the clerk promises to hold the hearing for ten minutes.
Tom tries to use the set, although one tool is missing.
He finds a spare tyre in the boot, so the repair can continue.
The company policy also requires a second check after every repair.
Anna reads the policy aloud, while Tom tightens the bolts.
Within a few minutes, the tyre feels firm again.
They test the car slowly, but a new issue appears near the court gate.
Tom discovers a loose cover and fixes it with the spare tool.
The court clerk meets them outside, and the judge hears their report.
Because they reported the issue and followed policy, the hearing begins without delay.
translations: 汤姆和安娜带着公共听证会的文件开车去法院。
不到一英里，一块尖石就损坏了一个轮胎。
公司政策规定，汽车继续行驶前必须报告每个问题。
汤姆安全停车，安娜打开一套工具。
轮胎问题看起来不大，但周围的车辆开得很快。
安娜给法院打电话，书记员答应把听证会保留十分钟。
汤姆试着使用这套工具，虽然少了一件工具。
他在后备箱里找到备用轮胎，所以修理可以继续。
公司政策还要求每次修理后进行第二次检查。
安娜大声读出政策，汤姆则拧紧螺栓。
几分钟内，轮胎又变得牢固了。
他们慢慢测试汽车，但法院门口附近又出现了一个问题。
汤姆发现一个松动的盖子，用备用工具把它修好。
书记员在外面接待他们，法官也听取了他们的报告。
由于他们报告了问题并遵守政策，听证会没有延迟就开始了。

title: 湖区经济计划
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a council meeting about the lake district.
The council must decide whether to approve an economic plan before winter.
The plan would require a bridge, because the old road often floods.
Anna asks whether local shops can remain open during construction.
The mayor presents the economic figures, while Tom studies a map.
Several residents fear that the bridge will require too much money.
Tom explains that the road may remain unsafe, even after repairs.
The mayor listens carefully, although one resident says the plan is unnecessary.
Anna finds a cheaper bridge design upon reading the engineer's note.
Upon approval, the design will let the old road remain open for most of the work.
The council checks the new figures, therefore the meeting lasts longer.
The cost is lower than expected, so the economic risk becomes smaller.
The mayor delays the final vote, therefore residents can read the plan.
Tom and Anna leave after the council promises another meeting.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加湖区委员会的一次会议。
委员会必须在冬天前决定是否批准一项经济计划。
这项计划需要一座桥，因为旧路经常被洪水淹没。
安娜询问施工期间当地商店是否能保持营业。
市长展示经济数据，汤姆则研究地图。
几位居民担心这座桥需要太多资金。
汤姆解释说，即使修理过，旧路也可能仍然不安全。
市长认真听取意见，尽管一位居民说计划没有必要。
安娜读了工程师的笔记后，找到了一种更便宜的桥梁设计。
如果获得批准，这种设计能让旧路在大部分施工期间保持开放。
委员会检查新的数据，因此会议持续了更长时间。
费用低于预期，所以经济风险也变小了。
市长推迟最终投票，因此居民可以阅读这项计划。
委员会承诺再次开会后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 图书馆员工会议
sentences: Tom and Anna join the library staff before a meeting about a new service desk.
Management wants a central desk, so visitors can ask questions more easily.
Anna makes an effort to collect every staff member's opinion.
The union raises an issue, because the central desk may reduce jobs.
Tom reads the management plan, while Anna speaks with the union representative.
The staff remain calm, although the issue worries several older workers.
The manager particularly explains that the desk needs extra staff, not fewer.
Anna particularly notes that the plan gives no training time.
She says the staff effort will fail unless management listens to them.
The union suggests a short training course for the central desk.
Management checks the budget, and discovers that the course is affordable.
The manager changes the plan, so existing staff can apply for the new roles.
The union accepts the change, and the staff effort receives public thanks.
Tom and Anna leave after the meeting ends, while the library stays open.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一次关于新服务台的会议前加入图书馆员工队伍。
管理层想设置一个中央服务台，让访客更容易提问。
安娜努力收集每一位员工的意见。
工会提出一个问题，因为中央服务台可能会减少工作岗位。
汤姆阅读管理层的计划，安娜则与工会代表交谈。
员工保持冷静，尽管这个问题让几位老员工感到担忧。
经理特别解释说，服务台需要更多员工，而不是更少。
安娜特别指出，计划没有安排培训时间。
她说如果管理层不听取意见，员工的努力就会失败。
工会建议为中央服务台安排一门短期培训课。
管理层查看预算，发现这门课程负担得起。
经理修改了计划，因此现有员工可以申请新的岗位。
工会接受了修改，员工的努力也得到了公开感谢。
会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了，而图书馆仍然开放。

title: 档案馆的财务章节
sentences: Tom and Anna visit an archive to check an official report.
The report contains a claim about an old financial project.
An official asks them to read one chapter before lunch.
Anna finds the claim difficult, because several pages are missing.
Tom simply compares the financial figures with a newspaper.
The archivist says the official record is indeed incomplete.
Anna searches another chapter, while Tom checks the storage room.
He finds an official letter with the same claim inside a cabinet.
The letter says the financial estimate changed after the project began, although the claim was not updated.
Anna reads the final chapter, but it refers to a missing table.
Tom simply checks the newspaper again, and notices the same figure.
The archivist looks in a locked box, where the missing pages are kept.
Indeed, the pages show that the claim was based on an early estimate.
Tom and Anna explain the result, and the official corrects the report.
They leave the archive after every financial detail is clear, and the official keeps the corrected report.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到档案馆，核对一份官方报告。
报告包含一项关于旧财务项目的声明。
一位工作人员请他们在午餐前阅读一章。
因为几页缺失，安娜发现这项声明很难核实。
汤姆只是把财务数字与一份报纸进行比较。
档案管理员说官方记录确实不完整。
安娜搜索另一章，汤姆则检查储藏室。
他在柜子里找到一封带有同样声明的官方信件。
信中说，项目开始后财务估算发生了变化，尽管这项声明没有更新。
安娜阅读最后一章，但这一章提到一张缺失的表格。
汤姆只是再次检查报纸，发现了同一个数字。
档案管理员查看一个上锁的箱子，缺失的页面就放在那里。
这些页面确实表明，这项声明是根据早期估算得出的。
汤姆和安娜解释了结果，工作人员于是更正了报告。
所有财务细节都清楚后，他们离开了档案馆，工作人员也保留了更正后的报告。

title: 工厂的竞选活动
sentences: Tom and Anna join an election campaign at a local factory.
The candidate needs an application before the campaign can begin.
The factory manager explains how production affects nearby families.
A security alarm starts to ring while Anna checks the campaign posters.
Tom calls security, and the guard asks everyone to leave the loading area.
The team carries the application files to a safe room.
Production stops briefly, because a loose wire may cause another alarm to occur.
The guard finds the wire, but he cannot repair it alone.
Anna keeps the campaign calm, while Tom asks the manager for help.
An electrician checks the wire, and the second security alarm does not occur.
The manager explains that production must not affect the election.
The candidate updates the application after hearing the workers' concerns.
The election office approves the application, so the campaign can continue.
Tom and Anna leave after the meeting, while the factory returns to work.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入一家当地工厂的竞选活动。
候选人在竞选开始前需要提交申请。
工厂经理解释生产如何影响附近的家庭。
安娜检查竞选海报时，一只安全警报开始响起。
汤姆呼叫保安，保安要求大家离开装货区。
团队把申请文件带到一个安全的房间。
生产短暂停止，因为一根松动的电线可能导致另一场警报发生。
保安找到了电线，但他一个人无法修好。
安娜让竞选活动保持平静，汤姆则向经理求助。
电工检查了电线，第二次安全警报没有发生。
经理解释说生产不能影响选举。
候选人听取工人的担忧后更新了申请。
选举办公室批准了申请，因此竞选可以继续。
会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了，工厂也恢复了工作。

title: 社区经济调查
sentences: Tom and Anna conduct an economic survey for several local shops.
Various owners say their shops represent different parts of the town economy.
One shop faces a risk because its delivery standard has fallen.
Anna compares various products, while Tom interviews the owner.
The owner wants to prove that the shop can improve.
Tom checks the standard, and the owner shows him last month's figures.
The figures prove that weekend sales remain strong, despite the risk.
Anna asks whether various services represent different customers.
The owner admits that the local economy is uncertain, but he accepts the risk.
Tom suggests a new standard for delivery, so fewer goods will arrive late.
The survey shows that the economy changes when prices rise.
Anna helps prove the plan with figures from every shop.
At a final meeting, the owners represent their concerns and agree to cooperate.
Tom and Anna finish the survey after checking the new standard.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为几家当地商店进行经济调查。
几位店主说，他们的商店代表城镇经济的不同部分。
一家商店的配送标准下降了，所以它面临风险。
安娜比较各种商品，汤姆则采访店主。
店主想证明商店能够改善。
汤姆检查标准，店主给他看上个月的数据。
数据证明周末销售仍然强劲，尽管存在风险。
安娜询问各种服务是否代表不同的顾客。
店主承认当地经济不确定，但他接受这个风险。
汤姆建议新的配送标准，这样迟到的货物会减少。
调查显示，价格上涨时经济会发生变化。
安娜用每家商店的数据帮助证明这个计划。
在最后一次会议上，店主们代表各自的担忧，并同意合作。
检查新标准后，汤姆和安娜完成了调查。

title: 皇家剧院的演出
sentences: Tom and Anna arrive at a royal theatre before an evening performance.
The manager asks them to charge the stage lights and check the equipment.
A famous actor feels pressure, despite months of practice.
Anna checks the performance list while Tom carries a heavy cable.
The manager explains the charge for every extra seat.
During rehearsal, one light fails and the actor misses a line.
Tom looks for the basis of the lighting problem near the curtain.
Royal guests arrive, although the stage remains dark.
Anna charges a spare battery, while Tom finds a loose connection.
The loose connection is the basis of the failure, so Tom repairs it.
The actor repeats the scene, despite the pressure from the waiting audience.
The performance begins, and the royal guests watch quietly.
They applaud when the actor finishes the difficult scene.
The actor says trust was the basis of the performance, and the staff smile.
Tom and Anna leave after the theatre staff complete the final charge.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在晚间演出前到达皇家剧院。
经理请他们给舞台灯充电并检查设备。
尽管练习了几个月，一位著名演员仍然感到压力。
安娜检查演出清单，汤姆则搬运一根沉重的电缆。
经理解释每个额外座位的收费。
排练时，一盏灯坏了，演员也漏掉了一句台词。
汤姆在帷幕附近寻找灯光问题的根源。
皇家宾客到了，尽管舞台仍然很暗。
安娜给备用电池充电，汤姆则找到了一个松动的连接处。
松动的连接处就是故障的根源，所以汤姆修好了它。
演员重新演这一幕，尽管等待中的观众给了他压力。
演出开始了，皇家宾客安静地观看。
演员完成这场困难的戏后，宾客们鼓起掌来。
演员说信任是演出的基础，工作人员都笑了。
剧院员工完成最后的充电后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 十年电影记录
sentences: Tom and Anna analyse a film about a town clinic.
The film shows how a decade of changes relate to the clinic.
Anna plans to shoot an interview with the oldest doctor.
The doctor needs a new treatment, because the archive is incomplete.
Tom studies the analysis while Anna checks the camera.
The doctor explains how the treatment relates to the decade of work.
Anna shoots the interview after the camera battery is full.
Whatever the answer, Tom records each detail carefully.
The analysis shows that the clinic changed its treatment twice, although the budget was small.
The doctor says the decade remains important to local families.
Anna plans to shoot a final scene when the clinic closes.
Tom asks whatever questions relate to the old records before leaving.
The completed analysis helps the clinic explain its history.
The doctor approves the treatment notes, and Tom saves the film.
Tom and Anna leave after the interview ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜分析一部关于城镇诊所的电影。
电影展示了十年来的变化如何与诊所产生联系。
安娜计划拍摄一位最年长医生的采访。
因为档案不完整，医生需要一种新的治疗方法。
汤姆研究分析内容，安娜则检查摄像机。
医生解释这种治疗如何与十年的工作相关。
摄像机电池充满后，安娜拍摄了采访。
无论答案是什么，汤姆都仔细记录每个细节。
分析显示诊所改变过两次治疗方法，尽管预算很少。
医生说这十年对当地家庭仍然很重要。
诊所关门时，安娜计划拍摄最后一个场景。
汤姆在离开前询问所有与旧记录相关的问题。
完成的分析帮助诊所解释自己的历史。
医生批准了治疗记录，汤姆也保存了电影。
采访结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 法律援助中心
sentences: Tom and Anna volunteer at a legal advice centre for one day.
A lawyer explains the difficulty of a housing case.
The centre needs a resource list before the client arrives.
Anna reads the legal documents while Tom checks the computer.
The lawyer must determine which rule can help the client.
A missing form can indicate that the case may take longer.
Tom searches the legal resource database, although it is slow.
Anna asks what function the missing form serves, because the client may need an explanation.
The client arrives, and the lawyer explains the difficulty again.
Tom finds a resource that can indicate a similar case.
The team compares both files to determine the correct rule.
The legal adviser describes the form's function clearly.
The client understands the plan, so the difficulty becomes smaller.
The resource list indicates that the rule is still legal, so the team can use it.
Tom and Anna leave after the legal centre closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在法律咨询中心做一天志愿者。
律师解释一宗住房案件的困难。
客户到达前，中心需要一份资源清单。
安娜阅读法律文件，汤姆则检查电脑。
律师必须确定哪条规定能帮助客户。
一张缺失的表格表明案件可能需要更长时间。
虽然法律资源数据库很慢，汤姆仍然搜索它。
因为客户可能需要解释，安娜询问缺失表格发挥什么作用。
客户到了，律师又解释了一遍困难。
汤姆找到了一项能指出类似案件的资源。
团队比较两个档案，以确定正确的规定。
法律顾问清楚地说明了表格的作用。
客户理解了计划，所以困难变小了。
资源清单表明这条规定仍然有效，所以团队可以使用它。
法律中心关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 河边环保工程
sentences: Tom and Anna join an environmental project beside the river.
They wonder why the water level has fallen after a dry month.
The mayor will announce a clean-up plan before noon.
Several fish suffer because rubbish blocks the stream.
Anna helps lay boards across the wet ground, while Tom collects waste.
The environmental team checks the bank, and volunteers mark dangerous places.
Neither the boats nor the workers can enter the blocked area.
Tom cannot help but wonder whether a pump can save the small pool.
After lunch, the mayor announces that the pump is ready, but its hose is too short.
Anna helps lay a narrow pipe beside the river, while Tom clears stones.
Clean water enters the pool, so the fish suffer less.
The environmental report mentions neither smoke nor chemicals, although pollution remains.
The volunteers announce the result to their neighbours, and the mayor promises regular checks.
They leave after the river becomes safe again.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入河边的环保项目。
一个月没有下雨后，他们想知道水位为什么下降了。
市长将在中午前宣布清理计划。
因为垃圾堵住了溪流，几条鱼受到伤害。
安娜帮忙把木板铺在湿地上，汤姆则收集废物。
环保团队检查河岸，志愿者标记危险地点。
船和工人都不能进入堵塞区域。
汤姆忍不住想知道水泵能否拯救小水池。
午餐后，市长宣布水泵已经准备好，但水管太短。
安娜帮忙在河边铺设一根窄管，汤姆则清理石头。
清水进入水池，所以鱼受到的伤害减轻了。
环保报告既没有提到烟雾，也没有提到化学品，尽管污染仍然存在。
志愿者向邻居宣布了结果，市长也答应定期检查。
河流再次安全后，他们离开了。

title: 工厂设备检查
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a factory after a previous machine failure.
The manager gives Anna responsibility for the safety check.
The total cost includes every damaged element.
Tom reviews his previous notes, while Anna checks the control room.
The manager says every worker has a duty to report faults.
Some machines tend to overheat when production becomes busy.
Anna accepts responsibility, because the inspection is urgent.
The total report grows after Tom finds another damaged element.
The workers tend to use the old machine, although it is unsafe.
Tom explains that the duty belongs to the whole team, so no fault is ignored.
Anna compares the previous repair with the current failure.
The manager reduces the total cost after checking the warranty.
Every element receives a label before the factory restarts.
Tom and Anna leave after completing their responsibility.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一台机器发生故障后检查工厂。
经理让安娜负责安全检查。
总费用包括每个损坏的部件。
汤姆查看以前的笔记，安娜则检查控制室。
经理说每位工人都有报告故障的责任。
生产变忙时，一些机器往往会过热。
因为检查很紧急，安娜接受了这项责任。
汤姆发现另一个损坏部件后，总报告变长了。
工人们往往使用旧机器，尽管它并不安全。
汤姆解释说这项职责属于整个团队，所以不能忽略任何故障。
安娜把以前的修理和当前故障作比较。
经理检查保修后降低了总费用。
工厂重新启动前，每个部件都贴上了标签。
完成责任范围内的工作后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 历史课堂的真相
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a history class throughout the morning.
The teacher asks students to find the truth about an old battle.
A witness says the soldiers treat the village fairly, but a diary suggests otherwise.
Several old letters hang beside the classroom map.
Tom searches for the truth while the teacher explains the records.
The letters generally describe life throughout the difficult winter, because supplies were low.
The teacher will encourage the class to compare every source.
One letter says the soldiers treat the villagers kindly.
Tom uses a rope to hang a timeline beside the map after checking the dates.
Anna generally agrees with the witness, although one date is wrong.
The truth becomes clearer when the class finds a second diary.
The diary can encourage students to question the first story, because it is detailed.
Tom and Anna treat the evidence carefully before presenting it.
They finish the class after studying the history throughout the day.
translations: 汤姆和安娜整个上午参加历史课。
老师请学生找出一场旧战役的真相。
一位目击者说士兵公平地对待村庄，但一本日记却提出了不同说法。
几封旧信挂在教室地图旁。
老师解释记录时，汤姆寻找真相。
这些信件通常描述艰难冬季的生活，因为当时物资很少。
老师鼓励全班比较每个来源。
一封信说士兵友善地对待村民。
核对日期后，汤姆用绳子把时间线挂在地图旁。
虽然有一个日期错误，安娜通常同意目击者的说法。
全班找到第二本日记时，真相变得更清楚了。
这本日记内容详细，因此鼓励学生质疑第一个故事。
汤姆和安娜在展示证据前仔细对待它。
学习了一整天的历史后，他们结束了课程。

title: 咨询中心的客户
sentences: Tom and Anna volunteer at a centre that supports religious families.
A client asks for advice about a difficult family letter, because he cannot understand it.
The centre has a religious adviser who can reflect before speaking.
Anna must admit that the letter is unclear unless the client explains its background.
Tom reads the letter, while the adviser speaks with the client.
The client obviously needs help with a housing form.
The adviser must reflect on the client's situation before answering.
Anna can admit that the basic form is missing a signature.
The religious adviser offers another meeting unless the form changes.
Tom explains the problem clearly, so the client feels calmer.
The client obviously understands the next step, although the form is long.
Anna takes time to reflect on the advice while Tom copies the form.
The adviser must admit that the centre can support the client again.
Tom and Anna leave after the client thanks the religious adviser, while the centre prepares another appointment.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一个支持宗教家庭的中心做志愿者。
一位客户因为看不懂一封困难的家庭信件而寻求建议。
中心有一位宗教顾问，他在说话前会思考。
安娜必须承认信件不清楚，除非客户解释它的背景。
汤姆阅读信件，顾问则与客户交谈。
客户显然需要住房表格方面的帮助。
顾问在回答前必须思考客户的处境。
安娜可以承认基本表格缺少一个签名。
除非表格发生变化，宗教顾问会提供另一次会面。
汤姆清楚地解释问题，所以客户平静下来。
客户显然理解了下一步，尽管表格很长。
安娜花时间思考这个建议，汤姆则复印表格。
顾问必须承认中心可以再次支持客户。
客户感谢宗教顾问后，汤姆和安娜离开了，而中心准备安排下一次会面。

title: 校园安全讲座
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a basic safety course at a college.
The teacher explains the impact, and they intend to learn about the weapon alarm.
Students learn to stay aware when they cross the campus.
Anna notices a strange box beside the lecture hall.
Tom checks the basic security plan, while Anna calls the teacher.
The teacher says the box is a training weapon, not a real one.
The impact of the alarm makes several students nervous.
Anna and Tom intend to record the safety instructions for absent students.
Tom remains aware of every exit and keeps a calm attitude during the exercise.
The teacher explains why a weapon must never be touched, although it looks harmless.
The basic plan works because students follow each instruction after the teacher explains it.
The impact becomes smaller when the alarm stops, so students relax.
Anna is aware that a calm attitude improved campus safety.
Tom and Anna leave after the teacher ends the course.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大学参加基础安全课程。
老师解释警报的影响，他们打算了解武器警报。
学生学习在穿过校园时保持警觉。
安娜注意到讲堂旁有一个奇怪的盒子。
汤姆检查基础安全计划，安娜则给老师打电话。
老师说盒子是训练用武器，并不是真的武器。
警报的影响让几名学生感到紧张。
安娜和汤姆打算为缺席的学生记录安全说明。
练习期间，汤姆留意每一个出口，并保持冷静的态度。
老师解释为什么绝不能触碰武器，尽管它看起来无害。
因为学生遵守老师解释的每条指示，基础计划很有效。
警报停止后，影响变小了，所以学生放松下来。
安娜意识到冷静的态度提高了校园安全。
老师结束课程后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 文化节的纪录片
sentences: Tom and Anna make a film about a cultural festival.
The project follows employment among young artists in the town.
Anna chooses a filming technique, and it uses a medium camera.
Tom interviews a singer while local politics fills the news.
The cultural centre offers employment to several performers, but the budget is small.
Anna tests the technique before the first version is recorded.
The singer explains how politics affects cultural funding.
Tom checks the medium camera, because its screen suddenly goes dark.
They switch to a second version after the first one loses sound.
Anna changes the technique when the crowd grows.
The cultural festival continues, although the politics discussion is tense.
Tom edits the medium shots after recording the final version.
The centre says employment is important for cultural life.
They present the final version after the festival ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜制作一部关于文化节的电影。
这个项目关注城镇年轻艺术家的就业情况。
安娜选择一种拍摄技术，而这项技术使用中型摄像机。
当地政治占据新闻时，汤姆采访一位歌手。
文化中心为几位表演者提供就业机会，但预算很少。
第一版录制前，安娜测试了这项技术。
歌手解释政治如何影响文化资金。
汤姆检查中型摄像机，因为它的屏幕突然变黑了。
第一版失去声音后，他们改用第二个版本。
人群变大时，安娜改变了拍摄技术。
文化节仍在继续，尽管政治讨论很紧张。
录完最终版本后，汤姆编辑了中景镜头。
中心说就业对文化生活很重要。
文化节结束后，他们展示了最终版本。

title: 候选人的新闻发布会
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a press event for a local candidate.
The candidate faces a challenge about an old building.
A reporter asks whether the building's surface is safe.
Anna checks the press notes, while Tom studies the building.
The candidate says the repair is worth the cost.
Tom finds loose stuff near the entrance after the rain.
The challenge grows because the surface has several cracks.
The candidate asks the press to wait while an engineer examines the wall.
Anna explains why the repair is worth supporting, so the candidate can answer questions.
Tom removes the loose stuff, although the doorway is narrow.
The engineer says the damage reaches the lower wall, so the repair must begin soon.
The candidate accepts the challenge before workers begin the repair.
Workers repair the surface, and the press reports the decision honestly.
Tom and Anna leave once the worth of the work is clear.

记者询问建筑表面是否安全。
安娜检查新闻笔记，汤姆则研究建筑。
候选人说修理费用是值得的。
下雨后，汤姆在入口附近发现了松散的杂物。
因为表面有几条裂缝，挑战变得更大。

安娜解释为什么值得支持这次修理，这样候选人就能回答问题。
虽然门口很窄，汤姆还是清除了松散杂物。
工程师说损坏已经延伸到下方的墙面，所以修理必须尽快开始。

工人修理了表面，新闻媒体也诚实地报道了这个决定。
工作价值清楚后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 婚姻咨询资料
sentences: Tom and Anna organise access to a family advice centre.
A counsellor prepares an effective western marriage workshop.
The workshop uses a reference book about communication.

The counsellor explains that sexual health is part of marriage advice.
The western method becomes effective when couples speak openly.

The client says the marriage workshop is useful, despite its difficult topic.
Anna arranges access to the private room before the session, so the client can speak privately.
The counsellor uses the reference book to answer a sexual health question.
The effective discussion continues, although the western examples are unfamiliar.
Tom closes the room after the marriage workshop ends.
Tom and Anna leave when the centre records the final access request.

一位顾问准备了一个有效的西方婚姻讲座。
讲座使用一本关于沟通的参考书。
一位客户请求进入私人房间。
安娜检查参考书目，汤姆则准备椅子。

夫妻坦诚交谈时，这种西方方法变得有效。
汤姆找到第二本关于家庭进入权的参考书。
客户说婚姻讲座很有用，尽管话题很困难。
课程开始前，安娜安排进入私人房间，所以客户可以私下交谈。
顾问用参考书回答一个性健康问题。
尽管西方例子不熟悉，有效的讨论仍在继续。
婚姻讲座结束后，汤姆关上了房间。
中心记录最后一次进入请求时，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 广告代理公司的新项目
sentences: Tom and Anna meet an agent before a commercial meeting.
The agent explains the importance of a new campaign.
A younger generation will appear in the commercial video.
Anna reads the script, while Tom checks the studio lights.
The agent says several local artists are involved in the project.
Tom prepares the studio ahead of the client visit.
The commercial must show the importance of clean transport.
Anna asks whether the younger generation is involved enough.
The agent changes the script, because the first version is unclear.
Tom moves the lights ahead of the camera test when the studio opens.
The client explains that the commercial should involve local shops, although the budget is small.
The younger generation appears after the agent approves the script, so the recording starts.
Anna describes the importance of every person involved.
Tom and Anna leave after the commercial recording ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在商业广告会议前见到一位代理人。
代理人解释一个新活动的重要性。

安娜阅读剧本，汤姆则检查摄影棚灯光。
代理人说几位当地艺术家参与了这个项目。
客户来访前，汤姆提前准备好摄影棚。
商业广告必须展示清洁交通的重要性。
安娜询问年轻一代是否充分参与。
因为第一版不清楚，代理人改变了剧本。
摄影棚开放时，汤姆提前移动灯光进行摄像机测试。
客户解释商业广告应该让当地商店参与，尽管预算很少。
代理人批准剧本后，年轻一代出现了，所以录制开始。
安娜描述每位参与者的重要性。
商业广告录制结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 仓库物资清点
sentences: Tom and Anna examine the reality of a warehouse shortage.
The manager shows them a yard full of empty boxes.
A collection of old records describes the missing supply.
Anna improves communication, while Tom checks the storage shelves.
The manager says the reality is worse than the report suggests.
Tom can examine each yard entrance, because deliveries keep arriving.
Anna finds a collection of messages about a late supply.
The team uses clear communication, when the trucks enter the yard.
Tom checks whether the missing supply appears in the old collection.
The manager explains that reality changed after the storm, so the records need checking.
Anna examines the records again, although the numbers look correct.
The collection shows that one supply order went to another yard.
Tom and Anna improve communication before the next delivery.
They leave after examining the warehouse reality together.
translations: 汤姆和安娜检查仓库物资短缺的真实情况。
经理给他们看一个堆满空箱子的院子。
一批旧记录描述了缺失的物资。
安娜改善沟通，汤姆则检查储物架。
经理说真实情况比报告显示的更糟。
因为货物不断到达，汤姆可以检查院子的每个入口。
安娜找到一批关于物资延迟的消息。
卡车进入院子时，团队使用清楚的沟通方式。
汤姆检查旧记录中是否有缺失物资。
经理解释暴风雨后真实情况发生了变化，所以记录需要重新检查。
虽然数字看起来正确，安娜再次检查记录。
这批记录显示一份物资订单去了另一个院子。
下一次送货前，汤姆和安娜改善了沟通。
一起检查完仓库的真实情况后，他们离开了。

title: 消费者投票调查
sentences: Tom and Anna conduct a consumer survey before a town vote.
A software company asks consumers to define their needs.
One victim says false reviews influence every purchase.
Anna interviews the victim, while Tom checks the voting forms.
The software can define which reviews influence consumers.
Tom explains that a consumer should not ignore a warning, because the vote depends on clear information.
The victim agrees to vote after the company offers clear information.
Anna studies how the software changes the influence of online comments.
The company promises to support every victim before the vote.
Tom asks consumers to vote directly through the software.
The survey shows that false reviews influence the final result, although the sample is small.
Anna helps define a safer rule for every consumer when the vote begins.
The victim votes because the new rule protects users, so the survey closes.
Tom and Anna leave after the consumer survey closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在城镇投票前进行消费者调查。
一家软件公司请消费者定义自己的需求。
一位受害者说虚假评论影响每次购买。
安娜采访受害者，汤姆则检查投票表格。
这个软件可以定义哪些评论影响消费者。
汤姆解释消费者不应该忽略警告，因为投票取决于清楚的信息。
公司提供清楚信息后，受害者同意投票。
安娜研究软件如何改变网上评论的影响。
公司承诺在投票前支持每一位受害者。
汤姆请消费者直接通过软件投票。
调查显示虚假评论影响了最终结果，尽管样本很小。
安娜帮助为每位消费者定义更安全的规则，投票也开始了。
因为新规则保护用户，受害者投了票，所以调查结束了。
消费者调查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 南方城市的全球节日
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a southern city for a global food festival.
The festival is a highly important occasion for local cooks.
A lack of clean water threatens the global event.
Anna speaks with a southern farmer, while Tom checks the stalls.
The organisers eventually find a second water supply, but the pump is weak.
A highly trained team tests the water before serving food.
The occasion attracts visitors from every global region.
Tom explains that the lack of water affects southern families.
Anna helps the organisers eventually open the main kitchen after the tanks arrive.
The highly popular festival continues, although the rain begins.
The southern farmers share a local dish with visitors.
The global event becomes safer when the water supply arrives.
Tom describes the occasion as highly successful despite the delay, so the organisers celebrate.
Tom and Anna leave after the festival ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去南方城市参加全球美食节。

缺少干净的水威胁着全球活动。
安娜和一位南方农民交谈，汤姆则检查摊位。
组织者最终找到了第二个供水源，但水泵很弱。

汤姆解释缺水影响南方家庭。
水箱到达后，安娜帮助组织者最终打开了主厨房。

南方农民和游客分享一道当地菜。
供水到达后，全球活动变得更安全。
尽管有所延误，汤姆说这个场合非常成功，所以组织者庆祝起来。
节日结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 实验室安全演练
sentences: Tom and Anna join a safety drill in a science laboratory.

The technician says the drill was absolutely successful.
The students release the tension after the alarm stops.
Tom is absolutely calm when the laboratory becomes clear.
Tom and Anna leave after the safety team ends the drill.

在机器旁边，汤姆几乎听不清指示。

警报响起，所以技术员释放了训练气体。

警报停止后，学生们释放了紧张情绪。

安全团队结束演练后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 档案馆的关键文件

title: 电影摄影棚的科学短片

title: 青年电影工作坊

title: 展览馆的分类工作

The visitor fairly asks why one category has fewer objects.

尽管物品不同，安娜说展览平等地对待每一位发明家。

title: 北方老房子的修缮

The builder must combine a modern roof with the historical walls.
Anna notices a sharp contrast between the two designs.

The gentleman explains that northern weather causes the damage.

Anna compares the contrast, while Tom measures the roof.
The builder chooses a proper colour after testing both samples, although the choice is difficult.
The northern wind becomes stronger, so the team works inside.
The gentleman says the improvement should respect the old design when the work is finished.
Tom combines the final materials before the roof is closed.
The proper repair removes the contrast between the walls and roof.
Tom and Anna leave after the northern house becomes safe.

title: 王子的历史讲座

The speaker wants to remind students of the prince's reforms.

The prince's reforms attract attention because they changed trade.
The academic speaker explains why the map is unable to fit the case.
Anna finds the historical map behind a large display, while the lecture continues.
Tom can remind the guide to label the new location.

Anna is unable to ignore the damaged corner of the map.
The speaker says the academic lesson is historically important.
Tom and Anna leave after the lecture reminds them of the past.

导游会提醒他们地图昨天被移动了，所以他们寻找新的位置。
因为王子的改革改变了贸易，所以它们吸引了注意。

title: 社区音乐工作坊

Tom checks a familiar address, while Anna calls the studio manager.
The manager says the new room can consist of two spaces.
The students participate in a rehearsal after lunch.
Anna uses the tape to compare the old and new versions, while the students warm up.
Tom can hire the studio when the manager offers a lower price.
The familiar song sounds different in the larger room, although the melody is unchanged.
The teacher can reject a noisy instrument before the recording.
The final performance can consist of three short songs.
The students participate happily, because the workshop is successful.
Tom and Anna leave after returning the tape.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在熟悉的大厅参加音乐工作坊。
老师请学生租一个小摄影棚练习。
一盘磁带录音里有一首大家都熟悉的歌。
因为窗户坏了，安娜拒绝了第一个房间。
汤姆检查熟悉的地址，安娜则给摄影棚经理打电话。
经理说新房间可以由两个空间组成。
午餐后，学生们参加了排练。
安娜用磁带比较旧版本和新版本，学生们则进行热身。
经理提供较低价格后，汤姆租下了摄影棚。
熟悉的歌曲在更大的房间里听起来不同，尽管旋律没有改变。
录音前，老师拒绝了一件嘈杂的乐器。
最终演出由三首短歌组成。
因为工作坊很成功，学生们开心地参加活动。
归还磁带后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 东部就业说明会
sentences: Tom and Anna attend an employment meeting in an eastern town.
The speaker explains how unemployment affects young workers.
An eastern company offers training before the interview begins.
Anna can warn a visitor, because the application deadline is close.
Tom checks the speaker's intention while Anna reads the job list.
The company surely wants to reduce unemployment through training, so applicants can work sooner.
The eastern manager defines the intention of the new programme.
Anna warns that the definition may confuse older applicants, although the intention is good.
Tom asks whether the training can lower unemployment.
The manager surely explains every step before the interviews when the room is ready.
The eastern company accepts more applications after the talk, so the manager stays late.
Anna says the intention is clear although the definition is long.
Tom can warn the visitors to check their documents although the deadline is near.
Tom and Anna leave after the employment meeting ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在东部城镇参加就业会议。
演讲者解释失业如何影响年轻工人。
东部一家公司在面试前提供培训。
安娜可以提醒一位访客，因为申请截止日期临近。
安娜阅读工作清单时，汤姆检查演讲者的意图。
公司肯定想通过培训减少失业，这样申请人就能更快工作。
东部经理定义了新项目的意图。
安娜警告说这个定义可能让年长申请人困惑，尽管意图是好的。
汤姆询问培训是否能降低失业。
经理肯定会在面试前解释每一步。
谈话结束后，东部公司接受了更多申请。
安娜说意图很清楚，虽然定义很长。
汤姆提醒访客检查文件。
就业会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 图书馆的阅读选择
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a library to choose suitable literature.
The librarian can divide the books into sections for each age.
A leading writer gives an immediate talk about reading.
Anna cannot find a suitable book, because the shelves are full.
Tom checks the literature list while Anna asks the librarian.
The librarian says students ought to read different styles, so they can compare them.
The leading writer can divide the talk into three short parts.
Anna finds a suitable novel after the librarian checks the catalogue, so she stops searching.
Tom makes an immediate note of the writer's advice.
The students ought to compare the literature before choosing.
The leading writer explains why the book remains popular, although its language is old.
Anna chooses suitable literature although the final section is long.
Tom returns the list after the immediate talk ends.
Tom and Anna leave with their books after the library closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去图书馆选择合适的文学作品。
图书管理员把书按年龄分成几个区域。
