一位知名作家立即发表关于阅读的演讲。
因为书架已经满了，安娜找不到合适的书。
安娜询问图书管理员时，汤姆检查文学书目。
图书管理员说学生应该阅读不同的风格，这样他们就能进行比较。
知名作家把演讲分成三个短部分。
图书管理员查看目录后，安娜找到了一本合适的小说。
汤姆立即记下作家的建议。
学生在选择前应该比较文学作品。
尽管书中的语言很古老，知名作家仍解释这本书为什么受欢迎。
虽然最后一部分很长，安娜还是选择了合适的文学作品。
即时演讲结束后，汤姆归还了书目。
图书馆关门后，汤姆和安娜带着书离开了。

title: 学校辅导预约
sentences: Tom and Anna attend an educational appointment at a college.
A counsellor helps them explore a new study programme.
The programme can expand access to mental health support.
Anna misses her appointment, because a bus runs out of fuel.
Tom checks the educational schedule, while Anna calls the office.
The counsellor offers an immediate appointment after lunch.
The college wants to expand the programme before autumn, so more students can use it.
Anna can explore a mental health guide during the wait, while Tom calls the office.
The bus receives fuel when the driver reaches a station.
Tom asks how educational support can expand across the college.
The counsellor confirms the new appointment by email.
Anna explores the programme although the mental guide is difficult.
The college provides fuel support for students who travel far.
Tom and Anna leave after the educational appointment ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大学参加教育预约。
一位辅导员帮助他们探索新的学习项目。
这个项目可以扩大心理健康支持的范围。
因为公交车没油了，安娜错过了预约。
汤姆检查教育日程，安娜则给办公室打电话。
辅导员提供午餐后的即时预约。
大学希望在秋天前扩大这个项目，这样更多学生就能使用它。
等待时，安娜可以探索一份心理健康指南，汤姆则给办公室打电话。
司机到达加油站后，公交车获得了燃料。
汤姆询问教育支持如何扩展到整个大学。
辅导员通过电子邮件确认了新的预约。
虽然心理指南很难，安娜仍然探索这个项目。
大学为长途出行的学生提供燃料支持。
教育预约结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 科学频道的战争纪录片
sentences: Tom and Anna produce a scientific programme for a news channel.
The programme examines how an enemy affected a coastal town.
A historian says the town was totally changed by the battle.
Anna checks the channel schedule, while Tom studies the map.
The scientific team visits the old defence site, while the historian prepares the map.
The historian explains that people frequently feared another attack.
Tom records the channel interview although the wind is strong.
Anna takes the enemy story seriously because families still remember it.
The scientific report becomes totally different after new evidence appears, so the team records it again.
The historian frequently checks the date before each recording.
Tom asks the channel to release the final programme.
Anna seriously edits the section about the enemy, so the story is clear.
The programme explains how the scientific evidence changed the conclusion.
Tom and Anna leave after the channel approves the film.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为新闻频道制作科学节目。
节目研究敌人如何影响一个海滨城镇。
历史学家说这座城镇被战役完全改变了。
安娜检查频道日程，汤姆则研究地图。
科学团队参观旧防御地点，历史学家则准备地图。
历史学家解释人们经常害怕再次受到攻击。
虽然风很大，汤姆还是录下了频道采访。
因为家庭仍然记得这件事，安娜认真对待敌人的故事。
新的证据出现后，科学报告完全不同了，所以团队重新录制。
历史学家在每次录制前经常检查日期。
汤姆请频道发布最终节目。
安娜认真编辑关于敌人的部分。
节目解释科学证据如何改变了结论。
频道批准电影后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 船长的航海结论
sentences: Tom and Anna join a captain on a properly prepared research ship.
The captain explains the theme of the ocean survey.
An unlikely storm appears before the first measurement.
Anna checks the equipment, while Tom reads the route.
The captain says the crew must work properly despite the waves.
The ship changes direction, because the storm is serious.
Tom can conclude that the original route is unlikely to be safe.
Anna says the new route is not necessarily shorter, but it is safer.
The captain properly records every change in the log, while the crew waits.
The theme of the survey remains clear when the sea calms.
Tom can conclude the first part after checking the final sample although the data is incomplete.
The crew does not necessarily need to return before sunset.
The captain says the unlikely delay improved the research.
Tom and Anna leave after the captain concludes the survey.
translations: 汤姆和安娜登上一艘准备妥当的研究船，船长也在船上。
船长解释海洋调查的主题。
第一次测量前，一场不太可能出现的暴风雨来了。
安娜检查设备，汤姆则阅读路线。
尽管海浪很大，船长说船员必须正确地工作。
因为暴风雨很严重，船改变了方向。
汤姆得出结论，原来的路线不太可能安全。
安娜说新路线不一定更短，但它更安全。
船长正确地记录航海日志中的每次变化，船员则等待。
海面平静后，调查主题仍然清楚。
检查最后样本后，汤姆结束了第一部分。
船员不一定需要在日落前返回。
船长说这次不太可能的延误改善了研究。
船长结束调查后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 博物馆的失踪地图
sentences: Tom and Anna investigate a missing map at the city museum.
The curator says the map may locate an old escape route.
A sudden shift in the display schedule causes confusion, so the search starts late.
Anna follows a new trend in the visitor records.
Tom can investigate the storage room, while Anna checks the map case.
The curator cannot afford to close the museum for long.
A guard says the map can locate the route after the lights shift.
Anna finds an escape mark behind a second display.
The visitor trend changes when the museum announces the search.
Tom can investigate the mark because it matches the old route.
The curator can afford a new case after the map returns, so the damaged case can be replaced.
Anna locates the missing map inside a locked drawer.
The escape route becomes clear, so the museum reopens the room although the case is damaged.
Tom and Anna leave after the investigation ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜调查城市博物馆里一张失踪的地图。
馆长说这张地图可能标出一条旧逃生路线。
展览日程突然改变，造成了混乱，所以寻找工作开始得很晚。
安娜在访客记录中发现了一个新趋势。
汤姆可以调查储藏室，安娜则检查地图展柜。
馆长无法长时间关闭博物馆。
警卫说灯光改变后地图可以标出路线。
安娜在第二个展品后找到一个逃生标记。
博物馆宣布寻找地图时，访客趋势改变了。
因为标记与旧路线相符，汤姆调查了它。
地图回来后，馆长可以负担一个新展柜，所以损坏的展柜可以更换。
安娜在上锁抽屉里找到了失踪的地图。
逃生路线变清楚了，所以博物馆重新开放了房间。
调查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 花园里的紧急演练
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a garden setting for a beauty event.
The organiser will advise everyone to keep an emergency path clear.
A beauty expert arrives with a carefully prepared display, before the guests come.
Anna can appreciate the setting although the weather is cold.
Tom checks the emergency supplies, while the expert can advise the staff.
The organiser says the team is prepared for sudden rain.
A bell rings because the emergency drill begins.
The beauty expert helps locate the prepared first-aid box, while Tom clears the path.
Anna can appreciate the setting more when the lights turn on.
Tom advises visitors to follow the emergency path.
The team is prepared, so the drill finishes quickly.
The expert says the beauty display can remain outside.
Anna appreciates the organiser's advice before the guests arrive.
Tom and Anna leave after the beauty event ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为美容活动准备花园场景。
组织者建议大家保持紧急通道畅通。
一位美容专家带着精心准备的展台，在客人到来前抵达。
虽然天气很冷，安娜仍然欣赏这个场景。
汤姆检查紧急物资，专家则可以给员工建议。
组织者说团队已经准备好应对突然的雨。
紧急演练开始时，一只铃响了。
美容专家帮助找到准备好的急救箱，汤姆则清理通道。
灯亮后，安娜更加欣赏这个场景。
汤姆建议访客沿着紧急通道走。
团队准备充分，所以演练很快结束了。
专家说美容展台可以留在外面。
客人到达前，安娜感谢组织者的建议。
美容活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 农场的灌溉计划
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a farm where a dry field needs water.
The farmer explains how water should flow through the soil.
Anna must mix two types of soil before planting.
A local politician promises support during the farm meeting.
Tom checks the percentage of dry ground, while Anna studies the pipes.
The farmer tries to persuade the politician to fund a pump, because the field is failing.
Water begins to flow when Tom opens the first valve.
The soil absorbs the mix, although the field remains dry.
The politician says a higher percentage of water is necessary.
Anna can persuade the farmer to combine two small channels.
The water flow improves after the channels join.
Tom measures the soil because the percentage changes quickly.
The politician supports the plan, so the farm receives a pump.
Tom and Anna leave after the water begins to flow evenly.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一个需要给干旱田地供水的农场。
农民解释水应该如何流过土壤。
安娜必须在播种前混合两种土壤。
一位当地政治家在农场会议上承诺提供支持。
汤姆检查干燥土地的百分比，安娜则研究管道。
农民试图说服政治家为水泵提供资金，因为田地正在失收。
汤姆打开第一个阀门时，水开始流动。
尽管田地仍然干燥，土壤吸收了混合物。
政治家说需要更高比例的水。
安娜说服农民合并两条小水道。
水道连接后，水流改善了。
因为百分比变化很快，汤姆测量土壤。
政治家支持这个计划，所以农场得到了一台水泵。
水开始均匀流动后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 工程展会的纪录片
sentences: Tom and Anna produce a film about engineering at a trade show.
A host introduces a rare machine made by a young producer, while the audience gathers.
The machine creates a strong impression on the visitors, although it is small.
Anna checks the technical setting while Tom interviews the host.
The producer explains how engineering can solve rare problems, so the host records him again.
Tom records the host because the first interview is unclear.
The machine works effectively when the producer changes one part.
Anna asks the producer to describe the engineering process.
The host says the rare machine has an important purpose.
Tom edits the impression of the first demonstration, while Anna checks the setting.
The producer tests the machine effectively before the audience.
Anna changes the setting although the trade show is crowded.
The film shows how engineering affects everyday work.
Tom and Anna leave after the host approves the final film.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在贸易展上制作一部关于工程的电影。
一位主持人介绍一台年轻生产者制造的稀有机器。
这台机器给访客留下了深刻印象，尽管它很小。
汤姆采访主持人时，安娜检查技术场景。
生产者解释工程如何解决稀有问题，所以主持人再次录下了他的说明。
因为第一次采访不清楚，汤姆录下了主持人的采访。
生产者改变一个部件后，机器有效地工作了。
安娜请生产者描述工程过程。
主持人说这台稀有机器有重要用途。
汤姆编辑第一次演示留下的印象，安娜则检查场景。
生产者在观众面前有效地测试机器。
虽然贸易展很拥挤，安娜还是改变了场景。
电影展示工程如何影响日常工作。
主持人批准最终电影后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 市场活动的策划
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a marketing event in a busy hall.
The manager asks them to attach signs to every table, before the doors open.
The atmosphere changes when a smart speaker arrives, and the staff stop talking.
Anna reads a marketing clause, while Tom prepares the stage.
The manager gives a warning about a late delivery.
Meanwhile, the smart speaker tests the sound system.
Tom can attach the final sign before the guests enter.
The marketing team checks whether the clause is clear, so no visitor is confused.
The atmosphere improves because the delivery arrives.
Anna says the smart presentation should attract younger visitors.
Meanwhile, Tom explains the warning to the event staff.
The manager changes the marketing plan although the budget is small.
The atmosphere becomes lively when the speaker starts.
Tom and Anna leave after the marketing event ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在繁忙大厅组织营销活动。
经理请他们在开门前把标牌贴到每张桌子上。
一位聪明的演讲者到达时，气氛发生了变化，员工也停止了交谈。
安娜阅读营销条款，汤姆则准备舞台。
经理提醒大家有一批货物晚到。
与此同时，聪明的演讲者测试音响系统。
客人进入前，汤姆贴好最后一个标牌。
营销团队检查条款是否清楚，所以不会让访客困惑。
因为货物到了，气氛改善了。
安娜说聪明的演示应该吸引年轻访客。
与此同时，汤姆向活动员工解释警告。
虽然预算很少，经理还是改变了营销计划。
演讲者开始讲话时，气氛变得热烈。
营销活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 冠军的安全演示
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a sports centre to meet a champion.
The champion gives a warning before a training demonstration.
A prisoner from a theatre play carries a heavy box onto the training stage.
Anna can pour water into a cup, while Tom checks the stage.
The champion asks everyone to switch off the stage lights during training, before the exercise begins.
The warning says the prisoner should stay behind the line during the training demonstration.
Tom can pour more water after the champion explains the training exercise.
The champion switches on a red signal near the exit during the demonstration.
Anna specifically checks the box, because it looks unstable.
The prisoner follows the warning during training and moves slowly.
The champion specifically demonstrates how to switch the safety lock.
Tom pours the final water when the exercise ends.
The team thanks the champion after the warning is removed, so the demonstration ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the sports centre closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去体育中心见一位冠军。
冠军在训练演示前发出警告。
一位来自戏剧的囚犯搬着一个重箱子。
安娜把水倒进杯子，汤姆则检查舞台。
冠军请大家在练习开始前关掉舞台灯。
警告说囚犯应该留在线后。
冠军解释练习后，汤姆又倒了些水。
冠军打开出口附近的一盏红色信号灯。
因为箱子看起来不稳定，安娜特别检查了它。
囚犯遵循警告，慢慢地移动。
冠军特别演示如何切换安全锁。
练习结束时，汤姆倒完最后的水。
警告解除后，团队感谢了冠军。
体育中心关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 志愿者的成就
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a charity race beside the river.
A signal tells runners when the race will start.
The volunteers stand apart, while Anna checks the route.
Tom strongly believes the event can support local children, even in bad weather.
The team has plenty of water before the runners arrive.
A proud volunteer describes last year's achievement, while the runners warm up.
The signal changes when the safety officer raises a flag, so the runners wait.
Anna places the runners apart because the path is narrow.
Tom strongly encourages the volunteers to help each other.
The race begins after everyone receives plenty of water.
The proud team celebrates a new achievement near the finish.
Anna says the signal worked well although the wind was strong.
Tom feels proud when the children cross the line.
Tom and Anna leave after the charity race ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在河边组织慈善赛跑。
一个信号告诉跑步者比赛何时开始。
志愿者们分开站着，安娜则检查路线。
汤姆坚信活动可以支持当地儿童，即使天气很差。
跑步者到达前，团队准备了充足的水。
一位自豪的志愿者描述去年的成就，跑步者们则进行热身。
安全员举旗时，信号发生了变化，所以跑步者等待。
因为小路很窄，安娜让跑步者分开。
汤姆强烈鼓励志愿者互相帮助。
每个人拿到充足的水后，比赛开始了。
自豪的团队在终点附近庆祝新的成就。
安娜说信号工作得很好，虽然风很大。
孩子们冲过终点时，汤姆感到自豪。
慈善赛跑结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 旧工厂的投诉
sentences: Tom and Anna investigate a complaint about an old factory.
The owner originally planned to invest in safer equipment.
A small bomb appears in a box near the entrance.
Anna reports the odd object, while Tom calls the police.
The complaint concerns noise that typically begins at night, so neighbours cannot sleep.
A security officer says the bomb is probably a training device.
The owner will invest in a new alarm after the inspection.
Tom checks the box, because its label looks odd.
Anna originally believed the complaint came from one neighbour.
The police remove the bomb when the area is safe.
The factory typically receives fewer complaints after repairs.
The owner invests in sound protection although the cost is high, so the complaint ends.
Tom explains that the complaint helped reveal the problem.
Tom and Anna leave after the factory becomes quiet.
translations: 汤姆和安娜调查一宗关于旧工厂的投诉。
厂主原计划投资更安全的设备。
入口附近的箱子里出现了一枚小炸弹。
安娜报告了这个奇怪物体，汤姆则报警。
投诉涉及通常在夜间开始的噪音，所以邻居无法睡觉。
安全员说炸弹可能是训练装置。
检查后，厂主将投资一套新警报器。
因为箱子的标签看起来奇怪，汤姆检查了它。
安娜原以为投诉来自一位邻居。
区域安全后，警察移走了炸弹。
修理后，工厂通常收到更少的投诉。
虽然费用很高，厂主还是投资了隔音保护。
汤姆解释投诉帮助发现了问题。
工厂安静下来后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 艺术家的住宿安排
sentences: Tom and Anna arrange accommodation for a visiting artist.
The artist has talent and wants to quote a local poem.
A host says the rooms are similarly priced near the station, so the artist can choose.
Anna checks whether the guest can convince the gallery manager, while Tom prepares the room.
Tom prepares the accommodation while the artist visits the gallery.
The artist performs perfectly, although the room is small.
The host similarly welcomes every visiting performer.
Anna quotes the poem because it relates to the exhibition.
Tom tries to convince the manager that the artist has talent.
The artist can quote the poem perfectly from memory.
The accommodation becomes available when another guest leaves.
The manager is convinced after hearing the artist perform.
Anna says the similarly simple rooms are comfortable, so the guest agrees.
Tom and Anna leave after the artist settles into the accommodation.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为一位来访艺术家安排住宿。
这位艺术家很有天赋，想引用一首当地诗歌。
主人说车站附近的房间价格相近，所以艺术家可以选择。
安娜检查客人是否能说服画廊经理，汤姆则准备房间。
艺术家参观画廊时，汤姆准备住宿。
尽管房间很小，艺术家仍然表演得非常完美。
主人同样欢迎每一位来访表演者。
因为诗歌与展览有关，安娜引用了它。
汤姆试图说服经理这位艺术家很有天赋。
艺术家可以完美地背诵这首诗。
另一位客人离开后，住宿空出来了。
听完艺术家的表演后，经理被说服了。
安娜说这些相似的简单房间很舒适。
艺术家安顿到住宿处后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 校园身份调查
sentences: Tom and Anna help a supporter at the university campus.
The supporter says an immigrant student has lost a document.
A guard finds an illegal entry on the campus register.
Anna checks the identity list, while Tom speaks with the student.
The student feels guilty because the form contains a mistake, although the error is small.
The supporter explains that the illegal entry was accidental.
Tom searches the campus office for the missing document.
The guard checks the immigrant student's identity again, while Anna searches the register.
Anna says the guilty student should not lose access to classes although the form is wrong.
The supporter offers help after the office confirms the error, so the student relaxes.
The illegal entry disappears when the register is corrected.
The student will forever protect the new document after receiving it.
Tom and Anna thank the supporter because the identity is clear, and the record will last forever.
They leave the campus after the student returns to class.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大学校园帮助一位支持者。
支持者说一名移民学生丢失了一份文件。
警卫在校园登记册中发现一条非法进入记录。
安娜检查身份清单，汤姆则和学生交谈。
因为表格有错误，学生感到内疚，尽管错误很小。
支持者解释非法记录是意外造成的。
汤姆在校园办公室寻找丢失的文件。
警卫再次检查移民学生的身份，安娜则搜索登记册。
安娜说内疚的学生不应该失去上课机会。
办公室确认错误后，支持者提供了帮助。
登记册更正后，非法记录消失了。
学生答应永远保管新文件。
因为身份已经清楚，汤姆和安娜感谢了支持者。
学生回到课堂后，他们离开了校园。

title: 毕业典礼的多种传统
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a graduation ceremony in the countryside.
A graduate gives a naturally warm speech about childhood.
The ceremony includes a secondary prayer for families.
Anna checks the currency display, while Tom welcomes the guests.
The graduate says childhood memories naturally shape a career, so the families listen.
A teacher explains that the secondary prayer is optional.
Tom helps graduates exchange currency for the charity collection.
Anna naturally joins the family song after the prayer, although the tune is unfamiliar.
The teacher checks the secondary list before the speeches begin when the guests are seated.
The graduate thanks everyone who supported the childhood project, so the families applaud.
Tom says the currency collection will graduate into a larger fund.
Anna records the prayer because the ceremony is meaningful.
The graduate naturally answers questions about the next year.
Tom and Anna leave after the graduation ceremony ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在乡下参加毕业典礼。
一名毕业生自然地发表关于童年的温暖演讲。
典礼包括为家庭准备的第二次祈祷。
安娜查看货币展示，汤姆则欢迎客人。
毕业生说童年记忆自然地塑造职业，所以家庭成员认真听讲。
老师解释第二次祈祷是可选的。
汤姆帮助毕业生把货币换成慈善募款。
祈祷后，安娜自然地加入家庭歌曲，尽管曲调并不熟悉。
演讲开始前，老师检查第二份名单。
毕业生感谢所有支持童年项目的人。
汤姆说货币募款将逐渐发展成更大的基金。
因为典礼很有意义，安娜记录了祈祷。
毕业生自然地回答关于下一年的问题。
毕业典礼结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 商店里的调查
sentences: Tom and Anna analyse a theft at a busy department store.
The manager says emotion rarely helps a difficult investigation.
A guard wants to arrest the person seen near the exit.
Anna checks the camera, while Tom speaks with the guard.
The manager can analyse the receipt, because the amount is unusual.
The store is heavily crowded before the holiday, so the guard closes one door.
Tom asks whether the guard can arrest the right person.
Anna says the missing receipt can bother the guard, although she rarely trusts one image.
The manager finds a second receipt when the emotion settles.
Tom can analyse the shopping route before making a report.
The guard says the missing receipt can bother the investigation.
The heavily crowded entrance hides a second witness.
Anna says emotion should not decide the investigation.
Tom and Anna leave after the manager solves the case.
translations: 汤姆和安娜分析一家繁忙百货商店里的盗窃案。
经理说情绪很少能帮助解决困难的调查。
警卫想逮捕在出口附近出现的人。
安娜检查摄像机，汤姆则和警卫交谈。
因为金额不寻常，经理分析收据。
节日前，商店里非常拥挤，所以警卫关上了一扇门。
汤姆询问警卫是否能逮捕正确的人。
安娜说失踪的收据可能让警卫烦恼，尽管她很少相信单独的一张画面。
情绪平静后，经理找到第二张收据。
汤姆在写报告前分析购物路线。
警卫说逮捕必须遵守商店规则。
拥挤的入口挡住了第二位证人。
安娜说情绪不应该决定调查。
经理解决案件后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 港口的诗歌之夜
sentences: Tom and Anna assist a poet at a silent port exhibition.
The poet reads a poem about ships and distant islands.
A worker carries a layer of boxes across the dock.
Anna ties a string around the poem book, while Tom checks the lights.
The port becomes silent, because a ship has stopped loading.
Tom can assist the worker after a box falls near the entrance, so the crowd moves back.
The poet adds a second layer of colour to the display.
Anna reads the poem again when the lights return, although the port remains noisy.
Tom ties the string more tightly before the visitors arrive.
The port worker says the silent break will last ten minutes.
The poet can assist Anna with the final layer of the display.
The poem sounds stronger after the ship starts moving.
Tom and Anna keep the string safe while guests look around.
They leave after the port exhibition ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在安静的港口展览帮助一位诗人。
诗人朗读一首关于船和远方岛屿的诗。
一名工人把一层箱子搬过码头。
安娜把绳子系在诗集上，汤姆则检查灯光。
因为一艘船停止装货，港口变得安静。
箱子在入口附近掉下来后，汤姆帮助工人，所以人群向后退。
诗人给展台增加了第二层颜色。
灯光恢复后，安娜再次阅读这首诗，尽管港口仍然很吵。
访客到达前，汤姆把绳子系得更紧。
港口工人说安静的休息会持续十分钟。
诗人帮助安娜完成展台的最后一层。
船开始移动后，这首诗听起来更有力。
客人四处观看时，汤姆和安娜让绳子保持安全。
港口展览结束后，他们离开了。

title: 职业建议会
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a profession fair at a college.
A career adviser gives a recommendation to every visitor.
Anna feels glad when a company offers a practical course, because it suits her.
Tom avoids alcohol while he waits beside the information table.
The adviser can bend a paper to mark an important contact.
The recommendation is unlike the usual advice, because it includes training.
Anna says she is glad to explore a new profession.
Tom can bend the paper back after copying the contact.
The adviser recommends a profession that suits Anna's skills, because she enjoys practical work.
The company is unlike its competitors because it supports beginners and avoids alcohol.
Anna feels glad, although the course requires a long journey.
Tom checks the recommendation before the fair closes.
The adviser says the profession can provide useful experience.
Tom and Anna leave after thanking the career adviser.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大学参加职业展。
一位职业顾问给每位访客一份建议。
一家公司提供实用课程时，安娜感到高兴，因为课程很适合她。
汤姆在信息桌旁等待时不喝酒。
顾问折叠一张纸，标记一个重要联系人。
这个建议不同于通常的建议，因为它包括培训。
安娜说她很高兴探索新的职业。
汤姆抄下联系人后把纸折回去。
顾问推荐了一个适合安娜技能的职业，因为她喜欢实践工作。
这家公司与竞争者不同，因为它支持初学者。
尽管课程需要长途旅行，安娜仍然很高兴。
展会关闭前，汤姆检查了建议。
顾问说这个职业可以提供有用的经验。
汤姆和安娜感谢职业顾问后离开了。

title: 乡间小屋的唱片
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a cottage in the countryside to find an old album.
The owner says the album contains valuable folk songs.
A small company exports local music from the cottage.
Anna checks the album, while Tom walks around the countryside.
The owner regularly plays one song before dinner, so the room feels familiar.
Tom finds a valuable letter beside the export boxes.
The folk singer says the album was recorded in the cottage.
Anna regularly compares the songs with an old list.
The company exports the music after the owner signs a form.
Tom protects the valuable album, because its cover is weak.
The countryside becomes quiet when the last song ends.
The owner plays the folk album again for the visitors, so the room becomes lively.
Anna says the export project will support local music.
Tom and Anna leave after the cottage closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去乡间小屋寻找一张旧唱片。
主人说唱片包含珍贵的民歌。
一家小公司从小屋出口当地音乐。
安娜检查唱片，汤姆则在乡间散步。
主人经常在晚餐前播放一首歌，所以房间让人感到熟悉。
汤姆在出口箱子旁找到一封珍贵的信。
民歌歌手说唱片是在小屋里录制的。
安娜经常把歌曲和旧清单比较。
主人签好表格后，公司出口了这些音乐。
因为封面很脆弱，汤姆保护着珍贵唱片。
最后一首歌结束时，乡间变得安静。
主人再次为访客播放民歌唱片。
安娜说出口项目会支持当地音乐。
小屋关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 诊所的健康记录
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a clinic after a relative reports a strange symptom.
The doctor asks the patient to breathe slowly before the examination.
Anna is keen to understand the symptom and its possible cause.
Tom checks the arrival list, while the doctor reads the relative's notes.
The doctor says the patient can breathe normally after resting, so the test can continue.
A keen nurse shows passion for careful work, before the treatment begins.
The relative arrives when the doctor calls the family.
Anna asks whether the symptom relates to a recent journey.
Tom helps the patient breathe during a short test.
The doctor explains that the arrival of fresh air may help.
The keen nurse checks the notes, although the symptom is mild.
The relative feels better after the patient can breathe freely.
Anna records the arrival time because her passion for care is clear.
Tom and Anna leave after the doctor finishes the examination.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一位亲戚报告奇怪症状后去诊所。
医生请病人在检查前慢慢呼吸。
安娜很想了解症状及其可能原因。
医生阅读亲戚的笔记时，汤姆检查到诊名单。
医生说病人休息后可以正常呼吸，所以测试可以继续。
一位热心的护士在治疗开始前记录症状。
医生给家庭打电话后，亲戚到达了。
安娜询问症状是否与最近的一次旅行有关。
汤姆在短暂测试中帮助病人呼吸。
医生解释新鲜空气的到来可能有帮助。
虽然症状很轻，热心护士仍检查了笔记。
病人可以自由呼吸后，亲戚感觉好些了。
因为诊所需要到诊时间，安娜记录了它。
医生完成检查后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 教堂的志愿者演讲
sentences: Tom and Anna volunteer at a church event for retired workers.
A priest prepares a presentation about competitive sport.
A volunteer puts a cap beside the entrance table.
Anna checks the presentation, while Tom welcomes the retired guests.
The priest says the competitive team needs more volunteers.
Tom can retire the old microphone, because it makes noise.
The priest begins the presentation after the guests sit down, while Tom checks the microphone.
Anna explains that the cap belongs to a volunteer.
The competitive team raises money when the presentation ends.
Tom finds a new cap near the church door.
The retired workers can retire old equipment before the next event.
The priest says the achievement is important, although the team lost, so retired workers applaud.
Anna gives the final presentation note to the priest.
Tom and Anna leave after the church event ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在教堂为退休工人举办的活动中做志愿者。
一位牧师准备关于竞技运动的演讲。
一位志愿者把帽子放在入口桌旁。
汤姆欢迎退休客人时，安娜检查演讲。
牧师说竞技队需要更多志愿者。
因为旧麦克风发出噪音，汤姆让它退役。
客人坐下后，牧师开始演讲，汤姆则检查麦克风。
安娜解释帽子属于一位志愿者。
演讲结束时，竞技队筹集了资金。
汤姆在教堂门边找到一顶新帽子。
退休工人自愿帮助下一次活动。
牧师说这项成就很重要，虽然队伍输了。
安娜把最后一张演讲笔记交给牧师。
教堂活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 实验室里的谜题
sentences: Tom and Anna explore a laboratory during a school mystery day.
Whenever the lights turn pale, a strange sound begins.
The teacher says the mystery may relate to the students' mood.
Anna checks a laboratory table, while Tom reads the experiment notes.
The students feel pale because the room is cold, so the teacher opens a window.
A poverty project occupies the next laboratory room.
Whenever the sound returns, the teacher checks the heating system, while Anna watches.
Tom finds a small speaker behind the mystery display.
Anna's mood improves when the teacher explains the trick.
The laboratory becomes quiet after Tom removes the speaker, so the visitors relax.
The teacher says the poverty project can use the extra room.
Whenever visitors ask, Anna explains the mystery carefully.
Tom checks the pale lights although the sound has stopped.
Tom and Anna leave after the laboratory closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在学校谜题日探索一个实验室。
每当灯光变淡，一种奇怪的声音就开始了。
老师说谜题可能与学生的情绪有关。
汤姆阅读实验笔记时，安娜检查实验室桌子。
因为房间很冷，学生们脸色苍白。
一个贫困项目占用了下一个实验室房间。
每当声音回来，老师就检查供暖系统。
汤姆在谜题展台后找到一个小扬声器。
老师解释这个戏法后，安娜的心情改善了。
汤姆移走扬声器后，实验室安静下来。
老师说贫困项目可以使用额外的房间。
每当访客询问，安娜就仔细解释谜题。
虽然声音已经停止，汤姆仍检查苍白的灯光。
实验室关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 租房预算会议
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a meeting about spending in a rented flat.
The owner explains the custom of sharing entertainment costs.
The monthly rent is approximately higher than last year.
Anna checks the budget, while Tom lists each qualification for support.
The owner says spending must remain below the rent, so the tenants review the plan.
A local custom allows neighbours to share a television.
The tenants discuss entertainment, because the budget is small.
Tom calculates that the rent is approximately half their income.
Anna records the spending plan before signing the agreement.
The owner explains that a qualification may reduce the rent.
The custom continues, although the entertainment choices change.
Tom checks the qualification list when the meeting ends.
Anna says careful spending will protect the rented flat.
Tom and Anna leave after agreeing on the new budget.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于租住房屋支出的会议。
房主解释分享娱乐费用的习俗。
月租金大约比去年更高。
汤姆列出每项支持资格时，安娜检查预算。
房主说支出必须保持在租金以下，所以租客重新查看计划。
当地习俗允许邻居共享一台电视。
因为预算很少，租客讨论娱乐活动。
汤姆计算租金大约是他们收入的一半。
安娜在签协议前记录支出计划。
房主解释某项资格可能降低租金。
虽然娱乐选择改变，习俗仍然继续。
会议结束时，汤姆检查资格清单。
安娜说谨慎支出会保护租住房屋。
同意新预算后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 厨房里的纪念活动
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a memorial meal in a community kitchen.
A chef asks them to bury a small time capsule near the entrance.
The recipe uses a mixture of herbs and vegetables.
Anna checks the entrance, while Tom heats a large pan.
The chef says the memorial should include every family, so families pray together.
Tom can bury the capsule after the guests arrive.
A viewer records the meal when the kitchen becomes busy.
Anna stirs the mixture, because the pan is very deep.
The entrance remains clear although many guests arrive.
Tom finds a note inside the pan before serving the food.
The chef explains that the note belongs in the capsule.
Anna can bury the capsule when the memorial ends.
The viewer thanks the team because the meal is meaningful, and the families pray again.
Tom and Anna leave after the community kitchen closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在社区厨房准备纪念餐。
厨师请他们在入口附近埋一个小时间胶囊。
食谱使用香草和蔬菜的混合物。
汤姆加热大锅时，安娜检查入口。
厨师说纪念活动应该包括每个家庭。
客人到达后，汤姆可以埋下胶囊。
厨房变忙时，一位观众录下了这顿饭。
因为锅很深，安娜搅拌混合物。
虽然许多客人到达，入口仍然畅通。
上菜前，汤姆在锅里找到一张纸条。
厨师解释纸条应该放进胶囊。
纪念活动结束时，安娜可以埋下胶囊。
因为这顿饭很有意义，观众感谢了团队。
社区厨房关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 历史档案的最后记录
sentences: Tom and Anna examine a historic journal in the town archive.
The journal describes how workers successfully built a bridge.
Anna must weigh a metal tube mentioned in the record.
Tom checks the historic dates, while the archivist opens a drawer.
The workers successfully tested the tube before the bridge opened, so the record is useful.
Anna refuses to quit, because the journal may solve the mystery.
The archivist says the metal can weigh more after rust develops.
Tom reads a second journal when the first page tears.
Anna successfully compares both records with the bridge plan.
The historic tube matches the weight in the final entry.
The archivist asks Tom not to quit before copying the date.
Anna weighs the tube again, although the scale is old.
The journal confirms that the bridge was successfully repaired.
Tom and Anna leave after the historic record is saved.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在城镇档案馆查看一本历史日志。
日志描述工人如何成功建造一座桥。
安娜必须称量记录中提到的一根金属管。
档案管理员打开抽屉时，汤姆检查历史日期。
桥开放前，工人成功测试了管子。
因为日志可能解开谜团，安娜拒绝放弃。
档案管理员说金属生锈后可能会更重。
第一页撕破时，汤姆读了第二本日志。
安娜成功地把两份记录与桥梁计划作比较。
历史管子的重量与最后一条记录相符。
档案管理员请汤姆在抄下日期前不要放弃。
虽然秤很旧，安娜还是再次称量了管子。
日志确认桥梁成功修复。
历史记录保存好后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 品牌发布会
sentences: Tom and Anna attend an honest product launch for a new brand.
A giant screen shows a written message from the designer.
The company presents an advanced shell for outdoor equipment.
Anna checks the brand display while Tom speaks with the designer.
The designer gives an honest explanation of the shell material.
The giant screen freezes because the written file is damaged, so the launch pauses.
Tom repairs the advanced display after the announcement pauses.
Anna reads the written message, while the designer answers questions.
The brand promises to make an honest report about the shell.
The giant screen works when Tom changes the cable.
The advanced equipment attracts visitors, although the launch is late.
The designer says the written plan will improve the brand, if the screen works again.
Anna checks the shell before the final product test.
Tom and Anna leave after the honest launch ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加一个新品牌的诚实产品发布会。
一块巨大的屏幕显示设计师写下的信息。
公司展示户外设备用的先进外壳。
汤姆和设计师交谈时，安娜检查品牌展台。
设计师诚实地解释外壳材料。
因为书面文件损坏，巨大屏幕冻结了。
发布暂停后，汤姆修好了先进的显示设备。
设计师回答问题时，安娜阅读书面信息。
品牌承诺诚实地报告外壳情况。
汤姆更换电缆后，巨大屏幕恢复工作。
虽然发布会迟到了，先进设备仍吸引了访客。
设计师说书面计划会改善品牌，如果屏幕再次工作。
最终产品测试前，安娜检查了外壳。
诚实的发布会结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 诗人的烹饪课
sentences: Tom and Anna join a cooking class led by a local poet.
The poet labels each ingredient before the lesson begins.
Anna feels mad because the kitchen sink is blocked.
Tom checks the ingredient list, while the poet reads a poem.
The poet asks everyone to label the bowls clearly, so no dish is confused.
Anna can sink the dirty dishes after Tom clears the drain.
The chef says the poem describes every ingredient.
Tom feels less mad and confident when the sink begins to work.
The poet labels a second bowl because the first one is wet.
Anna mixes the ingredient, while Tom reads the poem aloud.
The sink stays clear after the students wash the bowls, so the lesson continues.
Tom says the poet can label the final dish, and the poet feels confident.
Anna is no longer mad when the class tastes the food.
Tom and Anna leave after thanking the poet.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加一位当地诗人主持的烹饪课。
课程开始前，诗人为每种食材贴上标签。
因为厨房水槽堵了，安娜感到生气。
诗人朗读诗歌时，汤姆检查食材清单。
诗人请大家清楚地给碗贴标签。
汤姆清理排水管后，安娜可以把脏盘子放进水槽。
厨师说诗歌描述了每种食材。
水槽开始工作后，汤姆不那么生气了。
因为第一个碗湿了，诗人给第二个碗贴标签。
汤姆大声朗读诗歌时，安娜混合食材。
学生们洗完碗后，水槽保持畅通。
汤姆说诗人可以给最后一道菜贴标签。
全班品尝食物时，安娜不再生气。
感谢诗人后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 画廊的毕业典礼
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a portrait exhibition for a college ceremony.
An impressive portrait hangs below the high ceiling.
Anna checks the fence around the display, while Tom welcomes guests.
A personally written note describes the ceremony schedule.
The artist says the impressive portrait took one year, because every detail mattered.
Tom repairs the fence because a visitor touches it.
The ceremony begins when the college president arrives, so the guests take their seats.
Anna personally explains the portrait to a group of students.
The high ceiling makes the gallery feel larger.
Tom checks the written note before the speeches begin.
The impressive display attracts attention, although the room is small.
Anna closes the fence after the ceremony ends.
The artist personally thanks Tom for protecting the portrait.
Tom and Anna leave after the gallery closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为大学典礼准备肖像画展。
一幅令人印象深刻的肖像画挂在高高的天花板下。
汤姆欢迎客人时，安娜检查展品周围的围栏。
一张亲自写的纸条描述典礼日程。
艺术家说这幅令人印象深刻的肖像画花了一年时间。
因为一位访客碰了围栏，汤姆修好了它。
大学校长到达后，典礼开始了。
安娜亲自向一群学生解释这幅肖像画。
高高的天花板让画廊感觉更大。
演讲开始前，汤姆检查了书面纸条。
虽然房间很小，令人印象深刻的展品仍然吸引注意。
典礼结束后，安娜关上了围栏。
艺术家亲自感谢汤姆保护肖像画。
画廊关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 偏远岛屿的公主故事
sentences: Tom and Anna travel to a remote island for a history project.
A princess tells a stranger the story of an old lighthouse.
Anna prepares a summary of the island's related legends, while the princess waits.
Tom checks whether the stranger can qualify as a guide.
The remote road closes because a storm reaches the island, so the interview must wait.
The princess says the summary should qualify every legend.
Anna asks the stranger to relate the lighthouse story to the map.
Tom finds a remote shelter after the rain becomes heavy.
The stranger qualifies the summary with a local detail.
The princess explains why the legends are related, although the map is old.
Anna writes a second summary, while Tom checks the shelter.
The road reopens when the storm passes, so the guide prepares to leave.
The princess thanks the stranger because the history project is complete.
Tom and Anna leave the remote island after the interview.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去偏远岛屿做历史项目。
一位公主向陌生人讲述一座旧灯塔的故事。
安娜准备一份与岛上相关传说的摘要，公主则在旁边等待。
汤姆检查陌生人是否能成为合格的向导。
因为暴风雨到达岛屿，偏远的道路关闭了。
公主说摘要应该涵盖每个传说。
安娜请陌生人把灯塔故事与地图联系起来。
雨变大后，汤姆找到一个偏远的避难所。
陌生人用一个当地细节完善了摘要。
公主解释为什么这些传说互相关联。
汤姆检查避难所时，安娜写了第二份摘要。
暴风雨过去后，道路重新开放。
因为历史项目完成了，公主感谢了陌生人。
采访结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了偏远岛屿。

title: 诗歌翻译工作坊
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a poetry workshop in a quiet village.
The teacher asks them to translate a poem about leisure.
A small amount of dirt covers the first page.
Anna checks an import dictionary, while Tom cleans the desk.
The teacher says the poem has an innocent tone.
Tom translates one line, although the dirt hides two words.
The import dictionary explains a phrase about leisure.
Anna removes the dirt after the teacher finds a brush, so the text becomes clear.
Tom translates the second line when the page becomes clear.
The innocent poem describes a child near the sea.
Anna checks the import note because the meaning is unusual.
The teacher says poetry can translate emotion between languages, so the class compares versions.
Tom and Anna share the translation after the workshop ends.
They leave after returning the poetry book.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在安静的村庄参加诗歌工作坊。
老师请他们翻译一首关于休闲的诗。
少量灰尘盖住了第一页。
安娜检查进口词典，汤姆则清洁桌子。
老师说这首诗有一种天真的语气。
尽管灰尘遮住两个词，汤姆还是翻译了一行。
进口词典解释了一个关于休闲的短语。
老师找到刷子后，安娜清除了灰尘，所以文字变清楚了。
页面变清楚后，汤姆翻译了第二行。
这首天真的诗描述一个海边的孩子。
因为意思不寻常，安娜检查进口注释。
老师说诗歌可以在语言之间翻译情感。
工作坊结束后，汤姆和安娜分享了译文。
归还诗集后，他们离开了。

title: 橄榄球比赛的暂停
sentences: Tom and Anna volunteer at a rugby match on a cold afternoon.
A gentle coach asks the players to favour safe passes.
One silly mistake makes the referee stop the match.
Anna checks the field, while the cold can freeze the grass and Tom carries warm drinks.
The coach says a sensible team can recover from a mistake.
Tom gives a favour to the injured player by finding a blanket.
The rugby captain speaks in a gentle voice to the worried team, so they listen.
The coach gives a gentle warning, because the silly ball can freeze.
The coach asks players to use a sensible plan after the break.
Tom keeps the drinks warm while the field begins to thaw.
The team plays rugby more gently when the referee restarts the match.
Anna favours the sensible plan, although the score is close.
The captain thanks the volunteers because the players stay safe.
Tom and Anna leave after the rugby match ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在寒冷的下午为橄榄球比赛做志愿者。
一位温和的教练请球员优先选择安全传球。
一个愚蠢的失误让裁判暂停比赛。
安娜检查场地，寒冷可能让草结冰，而汤姆端着热饮。
教练说明智的队伍可以从失误中恢复。
汤姆找到毯子帮助受伤的球员。
橄榄球队长温和地和担心的队伍说话。
教练温和地警告，因为愚蠢的球可能会冻住。
教练请球员休息后使用明智的计划。
场地开始解冻时，汤姆让饮料保持温暖。
裁判重新开始比赛时，队伍更温和地打橄榄球。
尽管比分接近，安娜仍支持明智的计划。
因为球员保持安全，队长感谢志愿者。
橄榄球比赛结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 电视节目的烘焙比赛
sentences: Tom and Anna watch a baking competition for a television programme.
The host makes an announcement about a new episode.
A ban on one ingredient surprises the unemployed contestants.
Anna checks the oven, while Tom reads the episode notes.
The host says the baking rule will highlight local recipes.
Tom helps an unemployed contestant bake without the banned ingredient, so the recipe can continue.
The announcement repeats when the second team arrives.
Anna can highlight a safe recipe on the programme card.
The contestant can bake a cake after Tom finds a replacement.
The host explains why the ban protects the competition, so the teams continue.
The new episode highlights the skill of every contestant.
Tom checks the oven, although the announcement is finished.
The unemployed contestant thanks the team because the cake wins.
Tom and Anna leave after the baking programme ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜观看电视节目中的烘焙比赛。
主持人宣布一集新节目。
一种食材被禁止，让失业的参赛者感到惊讶。
安娜检查烤箱，汤姆则阅读节目笔记。
主持人说烘焙规则会突出当地食谱。
汤姆帮助一位失业参赛者不用被禁食材烘焙，这样食谱可以继续。
第二队到达时，公告又重复了一遍。
安娜在节目卡上突出一个安全食谱。
汤姆找到替代品后，参赛者烤出了蛋糕。
主持人解释禁令为什么保护比赛。
新节目突出了每位参赛者的技能。
尽管公告已经结束，汤姆仍检查烤箱。
因为蛋糕获胜，失业参赛者感谢了团队。
烘焙节目结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 车站的送别活动
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a pleasant departure party at the station.
A grateful guest thanks the staff for an exciting journey.
An aged musician agrees to play before the train leaves.
Anna checks the platform, while Tom arranges the decorations.
The pleasant setting creates excitement among the guests.
The musician can pretend to forget the song, but he smiles.
A grateful child gives the musician a small card.
Tom welcomes an aged traveller when the train arrives, and checks the ticket.
The musician plays a pleasant tune after the announcement.
Anna feels grateful because the departure party is successful.
The guests pretend to be calm, although the excitement grows.
Tom checks the aged traveller's ticket before boarding.
The train leaves after the pleasant music ends.
Tom and Anna wave goodbye at the departure platform.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在车站准备愉快的送别会。
一位感激的客人感谢员工带来令人兴奋的旅程。
一位年长的音乐家同意在火车离开前演奏。
安娜检查站台，汤姆则布置装饰。
愉快的场景让客人们感到兴奋。
音乐家假装忘记歌曲，但他笑了。
一名感激的孩子给音乐家一张小卡片。
火车到达时，汤姆欢迎一位年长的旅客，并检查车票。
公告之后，音乐家演奏了一首愉快的曲子。
因为送别会很成功，安娜感到感激。
尽管兴奋越来越强，客人们假装很平静。
登车前，汤姆检查年长旅客的车票。
愉快的音乐结束后，火车开走了。
汤姆和安娜在送别站台挥手。

title: 警报声中的庆祝会
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a continuous film night at a community hall.
The programme includes a horror film about a lost coin.
An alarm interrupts the first scene before the celebration begins.
Anna checks the continuous power supply, while Tom guides visitors out.
The film's plot becomes difficult to follow because the screen goes dark, so visitors wait.
Tom finds the alarm switch behind the ticket desk.
The organiser says the celebration can continue after the alarm stops.
Anna discovers that the coin belongs to the film's plot.
The continuous power returns when Tom resets the switch.
Visitors discuss the horror film, although the interruption was short.
The celebration begins again after the organiser checks the hall.
Tom explains the plot while Anna shows the lost coin prop.
The alarm remains silent, so the film reaches its ending.
Tom and Anna leave after the celebration ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在社区大厅组织连续电影之夜。
节目包括一部关于丢失硬币的恐怖电影。
庆祝活动开始前，警报打断了第一个场景。
安娜检查持续的电力供应，汤姆则带访客出去。
因为屏幕变黑，电影情节变得难以理解，所以访客等待。
汤姆在售票桌后找到了警报开关。
警报停止后，组织者说庆祝活动可以继续。
安娜发现硬币属于电影情节。
汤姆重新设置开关后，持续电力恢复了。
尽管中断很短，访客们仍讨论恐怖电影。
组织者检查大厅后，庆祝活动再次开始。
安娜展示丢失的硬币道具时，汤姆解释情节。
警报保持安静，所以电影到达了结尾。
庆祝活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 友谊日的安全教育
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a friendship day at the community centre.
A teacher wants to educate children about fire safety.
The kitchen must not consume too much power during the event.
An explosion in a training video frightens the younger visitors.
Anna checks the exits, while Tom explains the painful alarm sound.
The teacher says an injured person should receive help quickly, before the video continues.
The friendship group learns how an explosion can injure someone, when the video pauses.
Tom can educate the children about safe ways to consume electricity.
Anna shows a friendship game after the safety lesson ends.
The painful alarm becomes quieter when the teacher changes the setting although the video continues.
The children promise not to consume unsafe materials.
Tom learns how a fall can injure an actor in the training video, so he checks the exits.
The friendship day finishes peacefully because everyone understands the lesson.
Tom and Anna leave after the community centre closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在社区中心组织友谊日。
一位老师想教育孩子们了解消防安全。
活动期间，厨房不能消耗太多电力。
训练视频中的爆炸吓到了年幼的访客。
安娜检查出口，汤姆则解释刺耳的警报声。
老师说受伤的人应该在视频继续前迅速得到帮助。
视频暂停时，友谊小组学习爆炸如何伤害人。
汤姆教育孩子们安全用电。
安全课结束后，安娜展示了一个友谊游戏。
老师改变设置后，刺耳的警报声变小了。
孩子们答应不消耗不安全的材料。
汤姆帮助训练视频中的受伤演员。
因为大家理解了课程，友谊日平静地结束了。
社区中心关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 商场里的摄影师
sentences: Tom and Anna make a reservation for a photographer at the mall.
The photographer plans a narrative about local families.
Anna must hurry because the mall closes before the appointment.
Tom checks a small tent display, while the photographer prepares.
The reservation includes a quiet room beside the main hall.
The photographer explains how each narrative needs a clear ending, so the families can follow it.
Anna can hurry to the room after the mall announces closing time.
Tom moves the tent because it blocks the camera.
The reservation changes when a second family arrives, so the photographer adds time.
The photographer captures a narrative about the mall's history.
Anna checks the tent before the final photograph.
Tom can hurry back, although the photographer is still working.
The families thank the photographer after the reservation ends.
Tom and Anna leave the mall before the doors close.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在商场为一位摄影师预订了时间。
摄影师计划讲述当地家庭的故事。
因为商场在预约前关门，安娜必须赶快。
汤姆检查一个小帐篷展台，摄影师则准备工作。
预约包括主厅旁的安静房间。
摄影师解释每个故事都需要清楚的结尾，这样家庭成员就能理解。
商场宣布关门时间后，安娜赶往房间。
因为帐篷挡住摄像机，汤姆移动了它。
第二个家庭到达时，预约发生了变化，所以摄影师增加了时间。
摄影师拍摄了一个关于商场历史的故事。
最后一张照片前，安娜检查了帐篷。
尽管摄影师还在工作，汤姆还是赶了回来。
预约结束后，家庭们感谢了摄影师。
商场关门前，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 直升机课程
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a helicopter school for a flight assignment.
A pilot explains how to explode a training balloon safely.
The school keeps a helicopter beside a large garage.
Anna reads the assignment, while Tom checks the control panel.
A romantic song plays when the helicopter lesson begins.
The pilot offers a discount for students who complete the assignment.
Tom moves the helicopter after the garage door opens, so the class can begin.
The pilot says the balloon will explode only at a safe height.
Anna finishes the assignment, while the romantic song continues.
The school gives Tom a discount because he helps clean the garage.
The helicopter rises when the pilot checks the controls.
Tom explains the assignment to another student before landing, so the lesson is complete.
The romantic music stops after the helicopter returns.
Tom and Anna leave after the flight lesson ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜去直升机学校完成飞行作业。
飞行员解释如何安全引爆训练气球。
学校把一架直升机停在大车库旁。
安娜阅读作业，汤姆则检查控制面板。
直升机课程开始时，一首浪漫的歌曲响起。
飞行员为完成作业的学生提供折扣。
车库门打开后，汤姆移动了直升机，所以课程可以开始。
飞行员说气球只会在安全高度爆炸。
浪漫歌曲继续时，安娜完成了作业。
因为汤姆帮助清理车库，学校给他折扣。
飞行员检查控制器后，直升机升空。
着陆前，汤姆向另一名学生解释作业。
直升机返回后，浪漫音乐停止了。
飞行课程结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 慈善竞赛
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a charity contest for a local shelter.
A generous sponsor supports the champion before the final round.
Each competitor shares an ambition to improve the shelter.
Anna checks the battery, while Tom prepares the ugly fighting area.
The sponsor says the prize is generous, although the budget is small.
Tom charges the battery before the competitors enter.
The champion explains how fighting can remain safe.
Anna says the competitor with the strongest ambition may win, if the battery lasts.
The battery works when the final round begins.
The generous sponsor gives every competitor a small gift.
The ugly fighting contest ends after the champion scores.
Tom checks the battery, because the lights begin to fade.
The competitor thanks Anna for supporting the ambition of the shelter.
Tom and Anna leave after the charity contest ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为当地收容所组织慈善竞赛。
一位慷慨的赞助者在决赛前支持冠军。
每位参赛者都分享改善收容所的抱负。
安娜检查电池，汤姆则准备丑陋的比赛区。
尽管预算很少，赞助者说奖品很慷慨。
参赛者进入前，汤姆给电池充电。
冠军解释如何保持安全地进行搏斗。
安娜说抱负最强的参赛者可能获胜，如果电池能坚持。
决赛开始时，电池正常工作。
慷慨的赞助者给每位参赛者一份小礼物。
冠军得分后，搏斗竞赛结束了。
因为灯光开始变暗，汤姆检查了电池。
参赛者感谢安娜支持收容所的抱负。
慈善竞赛结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 剧院里的鬼故事
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a theatre script for a ghost story.
The director wants to highlight the headline before the show.
A reliable actor plays a ghost near the old staircase.
Anna checks the script, while Tom tests the stage lights.
The headline describes a mysterious killing from the past, so the audience becomes curious.
The director says the actor can admire the old theatre safely.
Tom finds a reliable clue behind the stage curtain.
Anna reads the script again when the ghost appears, while Tom watches the stairs.
The killing in the headline becomes part of the final scene.
The actor can admire the reliable stage design.
Tom highlights the clue before the audience enters.
The director explains the ghost story although the theatre is dark, so the audience listens.
Anna checks the headline after the rehearsal ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the theatre show closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为一个鬼故事准备剧院剧本。
导演想在演出前突出新闻标题。
一位可靠的演员在旧楼梯旁扮演鬼。
安娜检查剧本，汤姆则测试舞台灯光。
标题描述过去的一起神秘杀人案，所以观众感到好奇。
导演说演员可以安全地欣赏旧剧院。
汤姆在舞台帷幕后找到一个可靠的线索。
鬼出现时，安娜再次阅读剧本，汤姆则看着楼梯。
标题中的杀人案成为最后一幕的一部分。
演员欣赏可靠的舞台设计。
观众进入前，汤姆突出这个线索。
虽然剧院很暗，导演仍解释鬼故事。
排练结束后，安娜检查了标题。
剧院演出结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 健身中心的线索
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a fitness centre after a charity race.
A coach finds a clue inside a blue container.
Anna cuts a slice of fruit, while Tom checks the rope.
The rope begins to shine under the centre lights.
The coach says the container belongs to a missing runner, so they call him.
Tom follows the clue while Anna tests the fitness equipment.
The runner returns when the coach calls the emergency number.
Anna puts the fruit slice beside the container, while Tom follows the clue.
Tom checks whether the rope can shine outside the centre.
The clue leads to a second container near the entrance, so the coach smiles.
The coach explains the fitness plan after the runner arrives although the group is tired.
Anna cuts another slice because the runner is hungry.
Tom and Anna return the rope after the mystery ends.
They leave the fitness centre when the lights turn off.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加慈善赛跑后来到健身中心。
教练在一个蓝色容器里找到线索。
汤姆检查绳子时，安娜切了一片水果。
绳子在健身中心的灯光下开始发亮。
教练说容器属于一名失踪的跑步者。
安娜测试健身器材时，汤姆跟随线索。
教练拨打紧急号码后，跑步者回来了。
安娜把水果片放在容器旁。
汤姆检查绳子是否能在中心外发亮。
线索通向入口附近的第二个容器。
跑步者到达后，教练解释健身计划。
因为跑步者饿了，安娜又切了一片水果。
谜题结束后，汤姆和安娜归还了绳子。
灯光关闭时，他们离开了健身中心。

title: 摄影师的天气预报
sentences: Tom and Anna meet an experienced photographer before a mountain trip.
The photographer is disappointed by the poor weather prediction.
A mess of wet equipment fills the outdoor shelter.
Anna feels upset because the group expected clear skies, so they wait.
Tom asks the experienced guide to check the prediction again.
The guide says the frightened hikers should wait inside.
The photographer cleans the mess, while Anna dries the camera.
A second prediction appears when the radio signal returns.
The photographer is not disappointed, and Tom is not upset because the weather improves.
The experienced photographer prepares a new outdoor route.
The hikers feel less frightened after the guide explains the plan, although the wind continues.
Anna checks the expected arrival time before leaving.
The shelter becomes tidy although the first prediction was wrong.
Tom and Anna leave after the photographer packs the equipment.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在登山旅行前见到一位有经验的摄影师。
摄影师因为糟糕的天气预报感到失望。
户外避难所里堆满了湿设备。
因为团队期待晴天，安娜感到烦恼。
汤姆请有经验的向导再次检查预报。
向导说受惊的徒步者应该在里面等待。
安娜晾相机时，摄影师清理杂物。
无线电信号恢复时，第二份预报出现了。
因为天气好转，汤姆不再烦恼。
有经验的摄影师准备了一条新的户外路线。
向导解释计划后，徒步者不那么害怕了。
离开前，安娜检查预计到达时间。
虽然第一份预报错了，避难所还是变整洁了。
摄影师收拾好设备后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 雕塑展的供暖问题
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a sculpture exhibition in an old hall.
A magician plans a hunt for a hidden piece of art.
The heating system stops before the visitors arrive.
Anna checks a convenient room, while Tom carries flour for the workshop.
The sculpture stands beside a table covered with flour.
The magician says the hunt can continue, despite the cold.
Tom repairs the heating after finding a loose wire.
Anna follows the magic clue to a small storage room.
The magic sculpture appears when the magician opens the container.
The flour remains dry because the room is finally warm, so the workshop continues.
The convenient room becomes the final exhibition space.
Tom checks the heating, while Anna cleans the sculpture.
The magician thanks the team after the hunt ends.
Tom and Anna leave when the exhibition closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一座旧大厅准备雕塑展。
一位魔术师计划寻找一件隐藏的艺术品。
访客到达前，供暖系统停止了。
汤姆搬面粉去工作坊时，安娜检查一个方便的房间。
雕塑立在一张铺满面粉的桌子旁。
魔术师说尽管很冷，寻找活动仍可以继续。
找到一根松动的电线后，汤姆修好了供暖。
安娜跟随魔法线索来到一个小储藏室。
魔术师打开容器时，雕塑出现了。
因为房间终于暖和了，面粉保持干燥。
方便的房间成为最后的展览空间。
安娜清洁雕塑时，汤姆检查供暖。
寻找活动结束后，魔术师感谢了团队。
展览关闭时，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 户外活动的洪水预报
sentences: Tom and Anna plan an outdoor walk near a river valley.
A weather prediction warns of a possible flood.
The path becomes difficult because deep mud covers the bridge, so the group stops.
Anna feels confused while Tom checks the map.
The guide explains the disadvantage of crossing the river today, which can confuse hikers.
Tom follows the prediction, although the sky is still clear.
The flood reaches the lower path after heavy rain.
Anna finds a safer outdoor route beyond the hill.
Tom explains why the mud creates a serious disadvantage.
The guide changes the prediction when the rain moves east.
The outdoor group follows the safer route because the bridge is weak.
Anna says the map can confuse hikers, so Tom marks it clearly.
The flood passes while the group rests on higher ground, and the walk can end.
Tom and Anna leave after the outdoor walk ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜计划在河谷附近进行户外散步。
天气预报警告可能发生洪水。
因为深泥盖住桥，小路变得很难走。
汤姆检查地图时，安娜感到困惑。
向导解释今天过河的缺点。
虽然天空仍然晴朗，汤姆还是遵循预报。
大雨后，洪水到达低处的小路。
安娜在山的另一边找到更安全的户外路线。
汤姆解释泥土为什么造成严重缺点。
雨向东移动时，向导改变了预报。
因为桥很弱，户外团队走更安全的路线。
汤姆标记地图后，安娜不再困惑。
团队在高地休息时，洪水退去了。
户外散步结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 和平展览的颜色
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a peaceful art exhibition at school.
A confused student brings a brightly coloured poster.
The teacher says an unfair rule is unnecessary for the display.
Anna checks an uncomfortable chair, while Tom moves the tables.
The student feels confused because the colour label is missing, so Anna makes one.
Tom explains that every artist deserves a peaceful space.
The teacher removes the unfair rule after the class discusses it.
Anna adds a coloured label to the poster.
The student is no longer confused when the display is explained.
Tom replaces the uncomfortable chair with a softer one.
The peaceful exhibition opens although the room is small.
Anna says the unnecessary rule will not return, because the class rejected it.
The coloured posters make the display bright and welcoming, so visitors stay longer.
Tom and Anna leave after the school exhibition closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在学校准备和平艺术展。
一名困惑的学生带来一张颜色鲜艳的海报。
老师说不公平的规则对展览没有必要。
汤姆移动桌子时，安娜检查一把不舒服的椅子。
因为缺少颜色标签，学生感到困惑。
汤姆解释每位艺术家都应该拥有和平的空间。
全班讨论后，老师取消了不公平的规则。
安娜给海报加上了彩色标签。
展览解释清楚后，学生不再困惑。
汤姆用更柔软的椅子替换了不舒服的椅子。
虽然房间很小，和平展览仍然开放了。
安娜说没有必要的规则不会回来。
彩色海报让展览明亮而受欢迎。
学校展览关闭后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 退休工人的冬日聚会
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a winter party for retired workers.
A guest arrives drunk and knocks over a frozen display.
The organiser says the accident is horrible but mild.
Anna checks the frozen food, while Tom opens the windows.
The guest tries to apologize before the party continues, so the organiser waits.
A retired worker helps clean the horrible mess.
Tom says the mild weather should keep the food frozen.
The guest can apologize to the organiser after resting.
Anna moves the frozen display beside the kitchen.
The retired workers discuss the drunk guest calmly, while the music stops.
The organiser says the horrible accident will not ruin the party, so the music continues.
Tom checks the mild soup while Anna serves the guests.
The guest apologizes again when the party ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the retired workers go home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为退休工人组织冬日聚会。
一位客人喝醉了，撞倒了冷冻展品。
组织者说事故很糟糕，但问题不大。
汤姆打开窗户时，安娜检查冷冻食物。
聚会继续前，客人试图道歉。
一位退休工人帮助清理糟糕的混乱。
汤姆说温和的天气应该让食物保持冷冻。
客人休息后可以向组织者道歉。
安娜把冷冻展品移到厨房旁。
退休工人们平静地讨论喝醉的客人。
组织者说糟糕的事故不会毁掉聚会。
安娜招待客人时，汤姆检查温和的汤。
聚会结束时，客人再次道歉。
退休工人回家后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 孤独旅客的地图
sentences: Tom and Anna help a lonely traveller read a mountain map.
A brave guide draws a diagram of the backwards route.
The traveller wants to click a fancy location on the phone.
Anna checks the lonely traveller's bag, while Tom studies the map.
The guide says the brave group should not walk backwards.
Tom can click the map after the phone finds a signal.
The diagram shows a bridge near the destination, so the route is clear.
The fancy phone displays the route when Anna changes the setting.
The lonely traveller feels brave after meeting the group.
Tom draws the diagram again, because the first line is unclear.
Anna clicks the destination before the hikers leave.
The guide checks the backwards path, although it is longer.
The lonely traveller thanks the brave guide at the bridge.
Tom and Anna leave after the mountain walk ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助一位孤独的旅客阅读山地图。
一位勇敢的向导画出一条反向路线图。
旅客想在手机上点击一个漂亮的地点。
汤姆研究地图时，安娜检查孤独旅客的包。
向导说勇敢的队伍不应该向后走。
手机找到信号后，汤姆点击了地图。
图表显示目的地附近有一座桥。
安娜改变设置后，漂亮的手机显示了路线。
遇到团队后，孤独的旅客感到勇敢。
因为第一条线不清楚，汤姆再次画了图表。
徒步者离开前，安娜点击了目的地。
虽然反向小路更长，向导仍检查了它。
孤独的旅客在桥边感谢勇敢的向导。
山地行程结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 博物馆的雕像更新
sentences: Tom and Anna update a museum display about an ancient destination.
A statue shows a fascinating story about the first travellers.
The curator wants to punish visitors who touch the statue.
Anna checks the happiness survey, while Tom cleans the display.
The curator says the rule should update after the renovation.
Tom explains that punishment will not improve happiness.
The statue moves to a safer destination near the entrance.
Anna finds a fascinating note behind the old display, so the story can be updated.
The curator updates the note before visitors arrive although the display is unfinished.
Tom asks whether the museum can punish careless visitors fairly, so the curator listens.
The happiness survey improves when the statue is visible.
Anna describes the fascinating destination in a new label.
The curator updates the museum rule after the discussion, when the visitors leave.
Tom and Anna leave after the museum closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜更新博物馆里关于古代目的地的展览。
一座雕像展示了关于第一批旅行者的迷人故事。
馆长想惩罚触碰雕像的访客。
汤姆清洁展台时，安娜查看幸福感调查。
馆长说翻修后规则应该更新。
汤姆解释惩罚不会提高幸福感。
雕像移动到入口附近更安全的目的地。
安娜在旧展台后找到一张迷人的纸条。
访客到达前，馆长更新了纸条。
汤姆询问博物馆是否能公平地惩罚粗心访客。
雕像变得可见后，幸福感调查改善了。
安娜在新标签中描述了迷人的目的地。
讨论后，馆长更新了博物馆规则。
博物馆关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 社区摄影展
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a photography show in their neighbourhood.
A diamond necklace appears in a portrait of the old street.
The gallery asks whether the picture is ours or borrowed, before the show opens.
Anna checks the translation, while Tom decorates the entrance.
The neighbourhood committee says the display should represent everyone.
Tom can decorate the wall after the photographer signs the form.
The diamond belongs to a resident who lives nearby.
Anna finds a second translation of the portrait notes, although the first is clear.
The gallery confirms the necklace is ours for the evening, so the show can open.
Tom can decorate the frame because the first colour is dull.
The neighbourhood welcomes visitors when the photography show opens.
Anna explains the translation, while the resident watches the portrait.
The diamond returns to its owner after the exhibition.
Tom and Anna leave after the community show ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在他们的社区准备摄影展。
一条钻石项链出现在老街的肖像画中。
画廊询问照片是我们的还是借来的。
汤姆装饰入口时，安娜检查翻译。
社区委员会说展览应该代表每个人。
摄影师签好表格后，汤姆可以装饰墙壁。
钻石属于住在附近的一位居民。
安娜找到肖像画笔记的第二份翻译。
画廊确认今晚项链是我们的。
因为第一种颜色很暗，汤姆装饰了画框。
摄影展开放时，社区欢迎访客。
居民观看肖像画时，安娜解释翻译。
展览结束后，钻石回到了主人那里。
社区展览结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 慈善扫描活动
sentences: Tom and Anna organise a charity scan at a local hospital.
A talented doctor explains the similarity between two images.
The hospital needs a definite donation before the scan begins.
Anna checks the scanner, while Tom welcomes the determined volunteers.
The doctor says the scan can confirm a similar condition.
A talented nurse offers to donate her time to the event.
The determined team scans each image carefully, while the doctor watches.
Tom compares the similarity after the first scan finishes.
Anna confirms the definite appointment with every visitor.
The doctor explains why the images are related, so the visitors understand.
The nurse can donate more supplies when the hospital calls.
The talented team completes the scan despite the long queue, so the doctor smiles.
Tom thanks the determined volunteers because the charity succeeds.
Tom and Anna leave after the hospital closes the scan desk.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在当地医院组织慈善扫描活动。
一位有天赋的医生解释两张图像的相似之处。
扫描开始前，医院需要一笔确定的捐款。
汤姆欢迎坚定的志愿者时，安娜检查扫描仪。
医生说扫描可以确认相似的病情。
一位有天赋的护士提出捐出时间参加活动。
坚定的团队仔细扫描每一张图像。
第一次扫描结束后，汤姆比较了相似之处。
安娜向每位访客确认了确定的预约。
医生解释这些图像为什么有关联。
医院打电话后，护士可以捐出更多物资。
尽管队伍很长，有天赋的团队仍完成了扫描。
因为慈善活动成功了，汤姆感谢坚定的志愿者。
医院关闭扫描台后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 体育场的纪录片
sentences: Tom and Anna film a documentary about a stadium concert.
A drummer practises, while a bubble machine fills the stage.
Anna checks a colourful costume, while Tom tests the camera.
The stadium becomes calm before the documentary interview.
The drummer says the bubble show will entertain young viewers, so the director keeps filming.
Tom records the costume rehearsal, while Anna holds the microphone.
A large bubble covers the camera, so the music stops.
The drummer stops playing, because the stage becomes slippery.
Anna cleans the floor, before the documentary continues.
The stadium becomes calm, after the bubbles disappear.
Tom films the drum team's final performance.
The drum shines when the stadium lights return.
The documentary entertains the viewers although the rehearsal was difficult, and the director saves the recording.
Tom and Anna leave after the concert ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜拍摄一部关于体育场音乐会的纪录片。
泡泡机充满舞台时，鼓手练习演奏。
汤姆测试摄像机时，安娜检查彩色服装。
纪录片采访前，体育场变得安静。
鼓手说泡泡表演会娱乐年轻观众。
安娜拿着麦克风时，汤姆录制服装排练。
音乐开始时，一个大泡泡盖住了摄像机。
因为舞台变滑，鼓手停止演奏。
纪录片继续前，安娜清理地面。
泡泡消失后，体育场变得安静。
汤姆拍摄鼓手的最后一次表演。
体育场灯光恢复时，彩色服装闪闪发光。
虽然排练很困难，纪录片仍然娱乐了观众。
音乐会结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 地震后的远征
sentences: Tom and Anna join an expedition after an earthquake in the hills.
An ambitious engineer leads the qualified rescue team.
An indirect road blocks the way to the remote village, so the team must stop.
Anna checks the equipment, while Tom reads the expedition map.
The earthquake makes the indirect road unsafe, and the guide closes it.
The engineer says an ambitious team can find another route.
Tom follows a qualified guide across the damaged bridge, while Anna carries the map.
The team incredibly reaches the village before nightfall, so the first rescue begins.
Anna records the expedition details after the first rescue.
The engineer finds an indirect path around the fallen rocks.
The team incredibly records the ambitious volunteers although the work is dangerous.
The qualified team returns when the road becomes safe.
The earthquake report explains why the expedition changed direction.
Tom and Anna leave after the rescue expedition ends.
translations: 地震发生后，汤姆和安娜加入山丘上的救援远征。
一位有抱负的工程师带领合格的救援队。
一条间接道路堵住了通往偏远村庄的路。
汤姆阅读远征地图时，安娜检查设备。
地震使间接道路变得不安全。
工程师说有抱负的队伍可以找到另一条路线。
汤姆跟随合格的向导穿过受损的桥。
团队不可思议地在夜幕降临前到达村庄。
第一次救援后，安娜记录了远征细节。
工程师在落石周围找到一条间接小路。
虽然工作很危险，汤姆仍赞扬有抱负的志愿者。
道路安全后，合格的团队返回了。
地震报告解释远征为什么改变方向。
救援远征结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 世界范围的广播节目
sentences: Tom and Anna host a worldwide radio programme for shy listeners.
A guest warns people not to cheat during the music quiz.
Anna checks the breathing exercise, while Tom welcomes callers.
The studio becomes relaxed, and the producer starts the quiz.
The host wants to entertain listeners from every country, so he explains the rules slowly.
A shy caller explains why the quiz feels difficult, because the music is unclear.
Tom says the worldwide audience can join the next round.
Anna leads a breathing exercise because one caller feels nervous.
The guest reminds everyone not to cheat because cheating ruins the game.
The relaxed caller answers the question after the exercise.
The programme can entertain listeners although the connection is weak.
Tom checks the worldwide messages before the final song.
The shy caller thanks Anna for making the studio relaxed.
Tom and Anna end the programme after the quiz.
translations: 汤姆和安娜主持一个面向害羞听众的全球广播节目。
一位嘉宾提醒大家不要在音乐问答中作弊。
汤姆欢迎来电者时，安娜检查呼吸练习。
第一首歌开始时，录音室变得放松。
主持人想娱乐来自每个国家的听众。
一位害羞的来电者解释问答为什么困难。
汤姆说全世界的听众都可以参加下一轮。
因为一位来电者紧张，安娜带领呼吸练习。
嘉宾提醒大家作弊会毁掉游戏。
练习后，放松的来电者回答了问题。
虽然连接很弱，节目仍然娱乐了听众。
最后一首歌前，汤姆检查全球消息。
害羞的来电者感谢安娜让录音室变得放松。
问答结束后，汤姆和安娜结束了节目。

title: 飓风后的机器人展
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a robot exhibition after a hurricane.
A robot prints a report about the unpleasant weather.
Anna feels embarrassed, because a strip of fur is stuck to her coat.
Tom checks the printing desk, while the guide cleans the hall.
The hurricane damaged an unpleasant section of the exhibition, so the guide closes it.
The robot can print a new map, so Tom checks its cables.
Anna removes the fur, and the guide checks her coat.
Tom repairs the robot although the storm was powerful.
The guide says the printing system is ready again.
Anna is less embarrassed after the robot prints a message.
The hurricane report explains why the hall became unpleasant.
Tom checks the robot before visitors return.
The fur disappears from Anna's coat, so the tour continues.
Tom and Anna leave after the exhibition closes.
translations: 飓风过后，汤姆和安娜检查机器人展览。
一台机器人打印关于糟糕天气的报告。
因为外套上粘着一条毛皮，安娜感到尴尬。
导游清理大厅时，汤姆检查打印桌。
飓风损坏了展览中令人不愉快的一部分。
电力恢复后，机器人可以打印新地图。
导游找到刷子后，安娜取下了毛皮。
虽然暴风雨很强，汤姆仍修好了机器人。
导游说打印系统又准备好了。
机器人打印消息后，安娜没那么尴尬了。
飓风报告解释大厅为什么变得令人不愉快。
访客回来前，汤姆检查机器人。
安娜外套上的毛皮消失了，所以参观继续。
展览关闭后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 婚礼的队列安排
sentences: Tom and Anna help an organised bride prepare a fashionable wedding.
The bride asks them to revise the guest list.
A long queue forms beside the entrance before the ceremony.
Anna checks the fashionable decorations, while Tom guides guests.
The bride can dislike the first seating plan, because it is confusing.
Tom can revise the plan, so the organiser opens another room.
The queue moves when the bride enters the hall.
Anna says the organized plan is easier to follow, so guests relax.
The fashionable flowers match the bride's dress.
Tom can revise the guest list before the dinner begins.
The bride can dislike the seating plan less after the changes.
The queue becomes shorter after the ceremony.
The wedding can be organized with a fashionable dance.
Tom and Anna leave after the guests go home.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助一位有条理的新娘准备时尚婚礼。
新娘请他们修改宾客名单。
典礼前，入口旁排起了长队。
汤姆引导客人时，安娜检查时尚装饰。
因为第一个座位安排令人困惑，新娘不喜欢它。
组织者打开另一个房间后，汤姆修改了计划。
新娘进入大厅时，队伍移动了。
安娜说有条理的计划更容易遵循。
时尚的花朵与新娘的礼服相配。
晚餐开始前，汤姆修改了宾客名单。
新娘不再不喜欢座位安排。
典礼结束后，队伍变短了。
有条理的婚礼以一场时尚舞会结束。
客人回家后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 水手的闪亮庆典
sentences: Tom and Anna help an organizer welcome a sailor at the harbour.
The cheerful sailor arrives on a shiny luxury boat.
A loud horn can frighten visitors near the entrance, so Tom covers it.
Anna checks the organizer's list, while Tom guides the guests.
The sailor says the luxury boat is ready, and the guests gather.
The cheerful guests wear shiny badges, so the organizer starts the celebration.
The organizer asks Tom to frighten nobody with the old horn.
Anna finds a shiny key beside the luxury cabin.
The sailor gives a cheerful speech after the horn is covered.
Tom checks the organizer's list before the boat leaves.
The luxury tour begins when the harbour becomes quiet.
Anna says the shiny badges make the guests look cheerful.
The sailor thanks the organizer because the celebration succeeds, so the guests applaud.
Tom and Anna leave after the boat returns.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在港口帮助组织者欢迎一位水手。
这位开朗的水手乘坐一艘闪亮的豪华船到达。
入口附近响亮的喇叭可能吓到访客。
汤姆引导客人时，安娜检查组织者的名单。
水手说豪华船已经准备好进行短途游览。
庆祝期间，开朗的客人戴着闪亮徽章。
组织者请汤姆不要用旧喇叭吓到任何人。
安娜在豪华船舱旁找到一把闪亮的钥匙。
喇叭盖好后，水手发表了开朗的演讲。
船离开前，汤姆检查组织者的名单。
港口安静后，豪华游览开始了。
安娜说闪亮徽章让客人看起来很开朗。
因为庆祝活动成功了，水手感谢了组织者。
船返回后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 键盘上的演讲摘要
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a summary of an educational lecture.
A quotation appears on the screen beside a keyboard.
An injured speaker says the quotation is theirs, not the editor's.
Anna checks the keyboard, while Tom reads the lecture notes.
The embarrassing mistake happens, because one name is missing.
Tom asks the speaker to summarize the quotation again, so the title is clear.
The injured speaker types the correct name on the keyboard, while Anna watches.
Anna finds a second quotation when the file opens.
Tom can summarize the lecture after the speaker checks the notes.
The speaker says both quotations are theirs.
The keyboard works although one key remains broken.
Anna removes the embarrassing line before publishing the summary.
Tom checks the injured speaker's notes because accuracy matters.
Tom and Anna leave after the lecture summary is complete.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备一场教育讲座的摘要。
键盘旁边的屏幕上出现了一段引文。
受伤的演讲者说引文是他们的，不是编辑的。
汤姆阅读讲座笔记时，安娜检查键盘。
因为缺少一个名字，这个错误令人尴尬。
汤姆请演讲者再次总结这段引文。
受伤的演讲者在键盘上输入正确的名字。
文件打开时，安娜找到了第二段引文。
演讲者检查笔记后，汤姆总结了讲座。
演讲者说两段引文都是他们的。
虽然一个按键坏了，键盘仍然工作。
发表摘要前，安娜删除了令人尴尬的句子。
因为准确性很重要，汤姆检查受伤演讲者的笔记。
讲座摘要完成后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 室内学习会
sentences: Tom and Anna attend an indoor study meeting about science.
A frightening film shows a repeated experiment in a laboratory, before the teacher explains it.
The educated teacher explains, why the result is disappointing.
Anna checks the indoor projector, while Tom reads the notes.
The students feel amazed, and they take new notes when the experiment works again.
The teacher repeats the experiment because the first result was weak.
Tom says the frightening image is only part of the film.
Anna records the educated teacher's explanation.
The repeated result is disappointing, but it makes the students less worried.
The teacher is amazed by the accurate measurement.
The indoor meeting continues although the weather is loud outside.
Tom removes the frightening scene before sharing the film.
Anna summarizes the experiment after the final result.
Tom and Anna leave after the indoor meeting ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于科学的室内学习会。
一部吓人的电影展示实验室里重复的实验。
受过教育的老师解释结果为什么令人失望。
汤姆阅读笔记时，安娜检查室内投影仪。
实验再次成功时，学生们感到惊讶。
因为第一次结果很弱，老师重复了实验。
汤姆说吓人的画面只是电影的一部分。
安娜记录受过教育的老师的解释。
重复的结果让学生没那么失望了。
准确的测量让老师感到惊讶。
虽然外面天气喧闹，室内会议仍在继续。
分享电影前，汤姆删除了吓人的场景。
最后结果出来后，安娜总结了实验。
室内会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 舞台上的想象故事
sentences: Tom and Anna rehearse an imaginary play in a small theatre.
The director asks an actor to fasten a silver costume.
A spoken story mentions a strange pair of underwear, so the actor changes the line.
Anna checks the imaginary set, while Tom prepares the props.
The actor feels annoyed, because the costume will not fasten.
Tom helps fasten the costume, after finding a new button.
The director says the actor can fry a small snack backstage before the spoken story.
Anna removes the underwear prop when the scene changes.
The imaginary character appears after the costume is ready.
Tom can fry a second snack and repeat the spoken line although the actor is annoyed.
The director fastens a second costume before the final scene.
Anna says the imaginary story is clearer after rehearsal.
The actor is no longer annoyed when the audience applauds.
Tom and Anna leave after the theatre closes.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在小剧院排练一个想象故事。
导演请演员系紧银色服装。
一段口述故事提到一条奇怪的内衣。
汤姆准备道具时，安娜检查想象中的布景。
因为服装无法扣紧，演员感到烦恼。
找到新纽扣后，汤姆帮助扣紧服装。
导演说口述故事应该听起来有趣。
场景变化时，安娜移走了内衣道具。
服装准备好后，想象中的角色出现了。
虽然演员很烦恼，汤姆仍重复了口述台词。
最后一幕前，导演扣紧了第二套服装。
安娜说排练后想象故事更清楚了。
观众鼓掌时，演员不再烦恼。
剧院关门后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 户外烹饪课程
sentences: Tom and Anna join an outdoor cooking course near the forest.
The chef asks everyone to work outdoors, before the rain.
A careless student adds an alcoholic sauce to the spicy soup, so the chef stops the lesson.
Anna checks the indoor kitchen, while Tom warns the student.
The chef says the sauce may annoy people with allergies, because one guest is allergic.
Tom removes the alcoholic sauce before serving the soup.
The spicy soup becomes safer when the chef adds fresh water.
Anna moves the lesson indoors because the rain starts.
The careless student apologizes after the chef explains the danger.
Tom works outdoors again when the weather becomes clear.
The chef says careful cooking will not annoy the guests.
Anna checks whether guests can remain indoors before the final meal.
The spicy dish tastes good although it contains no alcohol.
Tom and Anna leave after the outdoor course ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在森林附近参加户外烹饪课。
厨师请大家在下雨前到户外工作。
一名粗心的学生把含酒精的酱汁加进辣汤。
汤姆提醒学生时，安娜检查室内厨房。
厨师说酱汁可能会让过敏的人不舒服。
上汤前，汤姆移走了含酒精的酱汁。
厨师加入清水后，辣汤变得更安全。
因为开始下雨，安娜把课程移到室内。
厨师解释危险后，粗心的学生道歉了。
天气放晴时，汤姆再次到户外工作。
厨师说细心烹饪不会让客人不舒服。
最后一餐前，安娜检查了室内桌子。
虽然不含酒精，辣菜尝起来很好。
户外课程结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 放松的赛车统计
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a racing event beside a quiet lake.
A statistic shows that annoying noise affects the racers, so the organisers change the sound plan.
The organisers cover the speakers, so the first race can begin safely.
Anna checks a poisonous warning, while Tom studies the race list.
The covered speakers make the waiting area more relaxing, so the racers stay calm.
A racer says the statistic needs a second example.
Tom explains that poisonous smoke can harm the audience, so everyone moves away.
Anna finds an annoying alarm near the entrance.
The organisers cover the alarm when the race begins.
The racing track becomes relaxing after the noise stops.
Tom records a second statistic before the final lap.
Anna checks the poisonous warning although the air is clear.
The racers thank the team because the covered area is safe.
Tom and Anna leave after the racing event ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在安静的湖边参加赛车活动。
一项统计显示令人讨厌的噪音影响赛车手。
第一场比赛前，组织者盖住了扬声器。
汤姆研究比赛清单时，安娜检查有毒警告。
被盖住的扬声器让等候区更放松。
一位赛车手说统计需要第二个例子。
汤姆解释有毒烟雾可能伤害观众。
安娜在入口附近发现一个令人讨厌的警报。
比赛开始时，组织者盖住了警报器。
噪音停止后，赛道变得令人放松。
最后一圈前，汤姆记录了第二项统计。
虽然空气很清新，安娜仍检查有毒警告。
因为覆盖区域很安全，赛车手感谢了团队。
赛车活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 订婚晚宴的布置
sentences: Tom and Anna help an engaged couple prepare a family dinner.
The couple is planning a small celebration at home, so they need more chairs.
Anna checks the located tables, while Tom carries the flowers.
The guests are dressed, and the organiser opens the room.
The engaged couple asks Tom to revise the seating plan, because two guests changed places.
Anna helps the couple continue planning after a guest arrives early.
The organiser says the located gifts should stay near the door.
Tom checks whether everyone is dressed for the photographs.
The engaged couple welcomes the guests when dinner begins.
Anna finishes planning the table decorations before the speeches, so the room looks ready.
The guests admire the located flowers beside the entrance.
Tom helps the organiser move the dressed chairs into a line.
The engaged couple thanks them because the planning is complete.
Tom and Anna leave after the family dinner ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜帮助一对订婚情侣准备家庭晚餐。
这对情侣正在计划一场小型庆祝活动。
汤姆搬花时，安娜检查摆放好的桌子。
组织者打开房间前，客人们已经穿好衣服。
订婚情侣请汤姆修改座位安排。
一位客人提前到达后，安娜帮助情侣继续计划。
组织者说摆放好的礼物应该留在门边。
拍照前，汤姆检查每个人是否穿戴整齐。
晚餐开始时，订婚情侣欢迎客人。
演讲前，安娜完成了餐桌装饰计划。
客人欣赏入口旁摆放好的花。
汤姆帮助组织者把穿好装饰的椅子排成一行。
因为计划完成了，订婚情侣感谢他们。
家庭晚餐结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 工厂的开放日
sentences: During an open day, Tom and Anna visit a lovely factory.
The manager gives them an invite for the final tour.
A new device controls the factory gate.
Anna can search for a missing key while Tom checks the office.
The guide asks Tom to tie a safety rope near the gate.
The manager says visitors can search the old workshop after lunch.
The device works when Anna finds the key.
Tom can tie the rope before the factory tour starts.
The lovely workshop shows how workers make tools, although the tour is short.
Anna reads the invite, while the guide welcomes visitors.
Tom can invite the manager to the next open day.
They leave the factory after the device closes the gate.
translations: 开放日当天，汤姆和安娜参观一家漂亮的工厂。
经理给他们一张最后参观的邀请函。
一台新设备控制着工厂大门。
安娜寻找丢失的钥匙，汤姆则检查办公室。
导游请汤姆在大门附近系好安全绳。
经理说午餐后访客可以搜索旧车间。
安娜找到钥匙后，设备开始工作。
工厂参观开始前，汤姆系好了绳子。
漂亮的车间展示工人如何制作工具，尽管参观时间很短。
导游欢迎访客时，安娜阅读邀请函。
汤姆可以邀请经理参加下一次开放日。
设备关上大门后，他们离开了工厂。

title: 湖底的塑料箱
sentences: Near a hill, Tom and Anna join a lake clean-up.
A plastic box lies at the bottom of the lake.
The team wants to keep every fish alive.
The cleaning boat stops working because a rope blocks its propeller.
Anna reads the instruction while Tom checks the engine.
The guide says the boat can keep working after the rope moves.
Tom finds the plastic rope beside the bottom steps.
The fish swim away when the boat starts working.
Anna follows the instruction and lifts the box.
The box begins to disappear under the water, so Anna pulls the net.
The last plastic piece can disappear while the fish stay alive.
The boat is working again after the clean-up, and the bottom is safe.
translations: 在山附近，汤姆和安娜参加湖泊清理活动。
湖底有一个塑料箱。
团队想让每条鱼都活着。
一根绳子堵住了螺旋桨，所以清理船停止工作。
安娜阅读说明，汤姆则检查发动机。
导游说绳子移开后，船可以继续工作。
汤姆在底部台阶旁找到塑料绳。
船开始工作时，鱼游走了。
安娜遵循说明，抬起了箱子。
箱子开始在水下消失，所以安娜拉起了网。
最后一块塑料可以消失，同时鱼仍然活着。
清理后船又开始工作，湖底也安全了。

title: 运动员的天气预测
sentences: Before a school race, Tom and Anna meet an athlete.
The coach recommends a quiet place near the planet display.
The athlete must predict the temperature before training.
The outdoor thermometer breaks, so Anna can shout for help.
Tom checks the planet model while the athlete reads the chart.
The coach can recommend a second thermometer after the first fails.
The athlete can predict the temperature when the sky clears.
Anna does not shout after Tom fixes the device.
The planet display shows a cold place on the map.
Tom can recommend warm clothes before the race begins.
The athlete can predict the temperature correctly after lunch.
Anna can shout happily when the athlete wins, so the crowd smiles.
translations: 学校赛跑前，汤姆和安娜遇到一名运动员。
教练推荐行星展台附近一个安静的地方。
运动员必须在训练前预测温度。
室外温度计坏了，所以安娜可以大声求助。
运动员阅读图表时，汤姆检查行星模型。
第一个温度计坏掉后，教练可以推荐第二个。
天空放晴后，运动员可以预测温度。
汤姆修好设备后，安娜没有再大喊。
行星展台在地图上显示一个寒冷的地方。
比赛开始前，汤姆可以推荐穿暖和的衣服。
午餐后，运动员可以正确预测温度。
运动员获胜时，安娜可以开心地大喊，所以人群笑了。

title: 小说里的科学实验
sentences: At a book club, Tom and Anna organize a science experiment.
A new novel describes a device that can connect two rooms.
The empty laboratory has a double door beside the table.
Anna checks the experiment while Tom reads the novel.
The organizer asks everyone to connect the wires carefully.
Tom opens the double door because the room is empty.
The device connects two lights after the experiment begins.
Anna can organize the notes while the students watch.
The novel explains why the device needs a double signal, and Tom listens.
Tom checks the empty table before the experiment ends.
The organizer can connect the final wire when the lights shine.
Anna can organize a second test, so the experiment succeeds.
translations: 在读书会，汤姆和安娜组织科学实验。
一本新小说描述了一台能连接两个房间的设备。
空实验室里，桌子旁有一扇双开门。
汤姆阅读小说时，安娜检查实验。
组织者请大家小心地连接电线。
因为房间是空的，汤姆打开了双开门。
实验开始后，设备连接了两盏灯。
学生们观看时，安娜整理笔记。
小说解释设备为什么需要双重信号，汤姆认真听着。
实验结束前，汤姆检查了空桌子。
灯亮时，组织者可以连接最后一根电线。
安娜可以组织第二次测试，所以实验成功了。

title: 画廊里的暴风雨
sentences: Before a storm, Tom and Anna visit a comfortable gallery.
The guide shows a painting about careful thinking.
A storm begins while visitors look at the largest picture.
The gallery lights go out, so Anna feels stress.
Tom checks the comfortable chairs while the guide closes the doors.
The guide says neither the windows nor the roof is broken.
Anna practises thinking calmly after the first thunder.
The gallery becomes comfortable when the lights return.
Tom says neither the painting nor the frame is damaged.
The storm becomes quieter after the guide calls the manager.
Anna feels less stress, because the visitors remain safe.
The guide shows a second gallery room before the storm ends.
translations: 暴风雨前，汤姆和安娜参观舒适的画廊。
导游展示一幅关于细心思考的画。
访客观看最大画作时，暴风雨开始了。
画廊灯光熄灭，所以安娜感到压力。
导游关门时，汤姆检查舒适的椅子。
导游说窗户和屋顶都没有损坏。
第一声雷响后，安娜练习冷静思考。
灯光恢复时，画廊变得舒适。
汤姆说画和画框都没有损坏。
导游给经理打电话后，暴风雨变小了。
因为访客仍然安全，安娜感到压力小了。
暴风雨结束前，导游展示了画廊的第二个房间。

title: 战场遗址的安全调查
sentences: Tom and Anna investigate a historic battle site with a guide.
The guide asks them to spot practical signs near the path.
A hidden object may have a serious consequence for visitors.
Anna checks the map, while Tom studies the damaged fence.
The guide says the aim is to keep the site open safely, so visitors can return.
A warning is due to appear before the afternoon tour.
Tom can spot a metal box beside the old battle marker.
The team follows a practical plan because the object may be dangerous.
The guide explains the consequence of touching the box, although the warning is clear.
Anna checks whether the warning is due on the public map.
Tom says the aim of the survey is now clear.
The team can spot another sign after the guide calls security, so the search continues.
The practical report describes the battle site safely.
Tom and Anna leave after the warning is placed.
translations: 汤姆和安娜与向导调查一处历史战场遗址。
向导请他们在小路附近寻找实用标志。
一个隐藏物体可能给访客带来严重后果。
安娜检查地图，汤姆则研究受损围栏。
向导说目标是让遗址安全开放，这样游客就能回来。
下午参观前应该放置一个警告。
汤姆在旧战场标记旁发现一个金属箱。
因为物体可能危险，团队遵循实用计划。
尽管警告很清楚，向导仍解释了触碰箱子的后果。
安娜检查公共地图上是否应该有警告。
汤姆说调查目标现在很清楚。
向导呼叫保安后，团队发现了另一个标志。
实用报告安全地描述了战场遗址。
放置警告后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 博物馆的运送记录
sentences: Tom and Anna check the content of a museum delivery file.
The manager asks a guard to deliver a valuable painting.
A conclusion in the file says the painting needs new protection.
Anna reads the content, while Tom checks the loading area.
The guard must deliver the painting before the evening show.
Tom tells the team not to ignore the warning on the box, because the floor is wet.
The guard can sight a clear mark beside the delivery door.
Anna checks the conclusion because one page is missing.
The content shows where the painting should go.
Tom asks the guard to deliver the box carefully, while Anna watches the door.
The team does not ignore the sight of water near the door.
The manager changes the conclusion after checking the mark, so the guard waits.
The guard delivers the painting when the floor becomes dry.
Tom and Anna leave after the museum confirms the delivery.
translations: 汤姆和安娜检查博物馆运送文件的内容。
经理请警卫运送一幅珍贵的画。
文件中的结论说画需要新的保护。
安娜阅读内容，汤姆则检查装货区。
警卫必须在晚间展览前运送画。
汤姆告诉团队不要忽略箱子上的警告，因为地面是湿的。
警卫在运送门旁看见了清楚的标记。
因为缺少一页，安娜检查了结论。
内容显示画应该被放在哪里。
汤姆请警卫小心运送箱子，安娜则看着门。
团队没有忽略门边有水的景象。
经理检查标记后改变了结论。
地面变干后，警卫运送了画。
博物馆确认运送完成后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 小样本身份调查
sentences: Tom and Anna collect a sample from a tiny laboratory plant.
The scientist says the sample may reveal the plant's identity, if the label is correct.
A block of ice covers the laboratory entrance.
Anna checks a possibly useful tool, while Tom clears the block.
The tiny plant may survive if the room becomes warmer, so the heater matters.
The scientist asks Tom to collect a second sample.
Anna finds a label that confirms the plant's identity.
The block disappears after the heater starts working.
Tom compares the sample, because the first result is unclear.
The scientist says the plant can possibly survive outside.
Anna records the tiny plant's identity before moving it.
The second sample matches the first one.
The laboratory opens when the ice block is gone.
Tom and Anna leave after the plant survives the test.
translations: 汤姆和安娜从实验室小植物上采集样本。
科学家说样本可能揭示植物身份，如果标签是正确的。
一块冰堵住了实验室入口。
安娜检查一个可能有用的工具，汤姆则清理冰块。
如果房间变暖，小植物可能存活，所以加热器很重要。
科学家请汤姆采集第二个样本。
安娜找到一张确认植物身份的标签。
加热器开始工作后，障碍消失了。
因为第一个结果不清楚，汤姆比较样本。
科学家说植物可能在室外存活。
移动小植物前，安娜记录了它的身份。
第二个样本与第一个相符。
冰块消失后，实验室开放了。
植物通过测试后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 边境民俗展览
sentences: Tom and Anna promote a folk exhibition near the border.
The museum prepares a package of traditional music, and the manager labels it.
Anna must concentrate on the main display before the visitors arrive.
A small shop sells folk clothes beside the border gate.
