Tom checks the package while the manager can promote the exhibition, before the doors open.
The folk group mainly performs songs from nearby villages.
Anna can concentrate on a story about the old border road, while Tom checks the stage.
The manager opens the package after checking the music list.
The exhibition can promote local history, although the room is small.
Tom says the folk songs mainly describe family life.
The shop offers a second package when the first sells out.
Anna checks the border map before the final performance.
The group can promote the exhibition because visitors enjoy the songs.
Tom and Anna leave after the folk show ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在边境附近推广民俗展览。
博物馆准备了一包传统音乐，经理还给它贴上了标签。
访客到达前，安娜必须集中精力准备主展台。
边境大门旁的一家小店卖民俗服装。
开门前，汤姆检查音乐包，经理则可以推广展览。
民俗团队主要演奏附近村庄的歌曲。
安娜可以专心研究关于旧边境道路的故事，汤姆则检查舞台。
经理检查音乐清单后打开了包装。
尽管房间很小，展览仍可以推广当地历史。
汤姆说民歌主要描述家庭生活。
第一包卖完后，商店提供了第二包。
最后演出前，安娜检查边境地图。
因为访客喜欢歌曲，团队可以推广展览。
民俗演出结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 谋杀案的入口记录
sentences: Tom and Anna gather evidence about a murder at an old hotel.
The detective checks the entry list before the guests arrive.
A witness says the murder happened near the back stairs.
Anna can spread the papers while Tom examines the entrance camera.
The detective can gather a second statement from the guard.
The hotel currently has three empty rooms, plus a locked office.
Tom finds a mark near the entry after the rain stops.
Anna checks the murder timeline, because one hour is missing.
The guard says the entrance was closed during the storm, so no guest used it.
The detective can gather the current records in one file.
Tom can spread the map across the table while Anna reads the statement.
The entry record shows who left the hotel, although the time is missing.
The team currently has enough evidence to continue, plus a clear route, so the search can end.
Tom and Anna leave after the detective closes the case file.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一家老酒店收集谋杀案证据。
客人到达前，侦探检查入口名单。
一位证人说谋杀发生在后楼梯附近。
安娜摊开文件，汤姆则检查入口摄像机。
侦探从警卫那里收集了第二份陈述。
酒店目前有三个空房间，还有一间上锁的办公室。
雨停后，汤姆在入口附近发现一个标记。
因为少了一个小时，安娜检查谋杀时间线。
警卫说暴风雨期间入口关闭了，所以没有客人使用它。
侦探把当前记录收集到一个文件中。
安娜阅读陈述时，汤姆把地图摊在桌上。
入口记录显示谁离开了酒店。
团队目前有足够证据继续调查。
侦探关闭案件文件后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 实验室的长期研究
sentences: Tom and Anna join a medical laboratory studying bacteria, where the director reviews patient samples.
The director asks them to establish a logical safety criterion, so the next trial can begin safely.
A researcher examines bacteria from patients with damaged arms, while Anna labels the samples.
The long-term project needs a clear means of recording results, because several tests will be compared.
Anna checks the criterion, while Tom prepares the sample room.
The director says the logical method must protect every patient although the test is small.
Tom uses a safe means to move the bacteria samples.
A patient explains how the infection affected both arms.
The team establishes a long-term schedule after the first test when the lab opens.
Anna tests whether the criterion remains logical under pressure.
Tom records each means of treatment before the review, so the data remains clear.
The bacteria grow slowly, so the long-term study cannot finish today.
The director says the logical criterion will guide future work.
Anna checks the patient's arms while Tom seals the samples if the nurse approves.
The laboratory establishes a safer means of handling bacteria.
Tom and Anna leave after the long-term review begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入一个研究细菌的医学实验室。
主任请他们建立一项合乎逻辑的安全标准。
研究员检查来自手臂受损患者的细菌。
这个长期项目需要一种记录结果的清晰方法。
汤姆准备样品室时，安娜检查标准。
主任说合乎逻辑的方法必须保护每位患者。
汤姆用安全方法移动细菌样品。
一位患者解释感染如何影响两只手臂。
第一次测试后，团队建立了长期日程。
安娜测试压力下标准是否仍然合乎逻辑。
汤姆在审查前记录每种治疗方法。
细菌生长缓慢，所以长期研究今天无法结束。
主任说合乎逻辑的标准会指导未来工作。
汤姆封好样品时，安娜检查患者的手臂。
实验室建立了更安全的细菌处理方法。
长期审查开始后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 市政厅的防洪计划
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a council meeting about flood protection, while officials review the old barrier.
A former minister asks the council to establish a stronger policy, so residents can prepare.
The river may resist the proposed barrier during winter storms, although the worst weather is still months away.
Anna reads the former report, while Tom checks the council map.
The minister says officials must resist pressure from developers, because public safety comes first.
The council wants to establish a long-term agreement with residents.
Tom explains that the barrier will thus protect the lower streets although the cost is high.
A former engineer proposes a design that can resist strong water.
Anna asks the council to establish clear responsibilities when the river rises.
The minister says the policy must remain fair to every resident.
The river rises, so the council delays the final decision.
Tom checks whether the former design can resist another flood because the river is rising.
The council establishes a temporary warning system before sunset.
The minister accepts the plan, thus ending the disagreement.
Anna records the council decision while Tom updates the map.
Tom and Anna leave after the former minister thanks them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于防洪的市政会议。
一位前部长请委员会建立更强的政策。
冬季暴风雨期间，河水可能冲垮拟议的屏障。
汤姆检查市政地图时，安娜阅读以前的报告。
部长说官员必须抵制开发商的压力。
委员会想与居民建立长期协议。
汤姆解释因此屏障会保护较低的街道。
一位前工程师提出能抵抗强水流的设计。
安娜请委员会建立清楚的责任分工。
部长说政策必须对每位居民保持公平。
河水上涨了，所以委员会推迟了最终决定。
汤姆检查以前的设计能否抵抗下一次洪水。
日落前，委员会建立了临时警报系统。
部长接受计划，因此结束了分歧。
安娜记录委员会决定时，汤姆更新地图。
前部长感谢他们后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 庄园的合同谈判
sentences: Tom and Anna approach a firm that manages an old estate, while the grounds prepare for winter.
The lord asks the firm to seek a new conservation contract, so the walls can be repaired.
A repair scheme could protect the estate from further damage, and workers can begin before winter.
Anna studies the contract, while Tom walks around the grounds.
The firm wants to approach local workers before the winter, although the budget is still uncertain.
The lord says the scheme must seek public support.
Tom finds a practical approach to the broken garden wall.
Anna checks whether the contract covers the entire estate.
The firm seeks a second opinion because the scheme is expensive.
The lord signs the contract after the workers approve the approach.
Tom explains that the scheme can protect the historic garden, so the lord listens.
Anna approaches the firm with a revised cost estimate when the second opinion arrives.
The lord says the contract should seek a fair payment.
The firm accepts the scheme although the work will take months.
Tom and Anna inspect the garden before the repairs begin.
They leave after the lord thanks the firm.
translations: 汤姆和安娜走近一家管理老庄园的公司。
领主请公司寻找新的保护合同。
一项修缮方案可以保护庄园免受进一步损坏。
汤姆在庭院里走动时，安娜研究合同。
公司想在冬天前接触当地工人。
领主说方案必须寻求公众支持。
汤姆为损坏的花园墙找到一个实用方法。
安娜检查合同是否覆盖整个庄园。
因为方案很昂贵，公司寻求第二个意见。
工人批准方法后，领主签署了合同。
汤姆解释方案可以保护历史花园。
安娜带着修改后的费用估算接近公司。
领主说合同应该寻求公平的付款。
虽然工作需要几个月，公司仍接受了方案。
修理开始前，汤姆和安娜检查花园。
领主感谢公司后，他们离开了。

title: 机构的灾害响应
sentences: Tom and Anna join an agency that manages emergency supplies, while the storm approaches.
The administration wants to ensure a significant response to the storm, so clinics receive help quickly.
A concerned director reports a shortage of medical equipment, and the agency calls the counties.
Anna checks the agency records, while Tom visits the storage centre.
The administration must ensure that every county receives supplies, because several roads are closing.
Tom says the concern is significant because roads are blocked.
The agency contacts a private company after the first delivery fails.
A concerned nurse lists the equipment needed by each clinic.
Anna ensures that the administration receives the updated list.
The director explains how the agency will respond to new requests.
Tom finds a significant gap in the county delivery schedule.
The administration repairs the gap although the storm continues.
The agency ensures a second delivery before the roads reopen, so clinics receive help.
Anna records the concern while Tom checks the final boxes if the roads remain open.
The director says the response is significant for public trust.
Tom and Anna leave after the agency closes its emergency desk.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入一个管理应急物资的机构。
行政部门想确保对暴风雨做出重要响应。
一位担忧的主任报告医疗设备短缺。
汤姆访问储存中心时，安娜检查机构记录。
行政部门必须确保每个郡都收到物资。
汤姆说这个担忧很重要，因为道路被堵住了。
第一次配送失败后，机构联系了一家公司。
一位担忧的护士列出每个诊所需要的设备。
安娜确保行政部门收到更新后的清单。
主任解释机构将如何回应新的请求。
汤姆在郡配送日程中发现一个重要缺口。
虽然暴风雨仍在继续，行政部门还是修补了缺口。
道路重新开放前，机构确保第二次配送完成。
汤姆检查最后的箱子时，安娜记录了担忧。
主任说这个响应对公众信任很重要。
机构关闭应急服务台后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 工厂的收入谈判
sentences: Tom and Anna attend an association meeting about factory labour, because the workers fear a pay cut.
The chairman explains a principle for sharing company income, so everyone can compare it with costs.
Workers demand a fair share of the factory stock, while the chairman reviews the accounts.
Anna studies the association report, while Tom speaks with the workers.
The chairman says the principle must protect long-term income, but Tom asks for a clear figure.
The workers demand that management discuss the stock openly.
Tom explains how labour costs affect the association budget.
A new principle could increase income if production improves.
Anna checks whether the stock belongs to the association.
The chairman accepts the demand after reviewing the report, so the workers relax.
The association proposes a plan to protect labour rights.
Tom says the principle is fair although the income is limited.
The workers discuss how stock ownership may change when production improves.
Anna records the demand while the chairman revises the plan.
The association approves the principle before the factory meeting.
Tom and Anna leave after the labour discussion ends.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于工厂劳动的协会会议。
主席解释一项分享公司收入的原则。
工人要求公平分享工厂库存。
汤姆和工人交谈时，安娜研究协会报告。
主席说原则必须保护长期收入。
工人要求管理层公开讨论库存。
汤姆解释劳动力成本如何影响协会预算。
如果生产改善，新原则可以增加收入。
安娜检查库存是否属于协会。
主席审查报告后接受了要求。
协会提出保护劳动权利的计划。
虽然收入有限，汤姆说原则是公平的。
工人讨论库存所有权可能如何改变。
主席修改计划时，安娜记录了要求。
工厂会议前，协会批准了这项原则。
劳动讨论结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 郡级防御基金
sentences: Tom and Anna visit a county office beyond the old railway, while the council reviews old maps.
The council plans to fund a new flood defence system, so villages can prepare.
A damaged cell tower leaves several villages without communication, and the officer requests a temporary signal.
Anna checks the county map, while Tom interviews the defence officer.
The officer explains whom the fund should support first, because some villages are isolated.
The council must obtain equipment beyond the original budget.
Tom says the defence plan should protect every county road although the fund is small.
Anna finds a working cell near the emergency station.
The fund can support villages whom the flood isolated when the roads reopen.
The officer obtains a second estimate before the council votes.
The defence team works beyond the river after the water falls.
Tom records whom the fund will help during the first phase because the list is long.
Anna checks the cell signal because the county office is remote.
The council approves the fund, so the defence work begins.
Tom and Anna leave after the county signs the agreement.
The new system protects the villages beyond the river.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观旧铁路以外的郡办公室。
委员会计划资助一套新的防洪系统。
受损的手机信号塔让几个村庄失去通信。
汤姆采访防御官员时，安娜检查郡地图。
官员解释基金应该首先支持谁。
委员会必须获得超出原预算的设备。
汤姆说防御计划应该保护每条郡道路。
安娜在应急站附近找到一个能工作的手机信号。
基金可以支持被洪水隔离的村庄。
委员会投票前，官员获得了第二份估算。
水位下降后，防御团队在河流以外工作。
汤姆记录第一阶段基金将帮助谁。
因为郡办公室很偏远，安娜检查手机信号。
委员会批准基金，所以防御工作开始了。
郡签署协议后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
新系统保护河流以外的村庄。

title: 企业继任计划
sentences: Tom and Anna advise a company preparing for executive change, while the board reviews current accounts.
The board wants to obtain new investment for the prime project, so the project can continue.
The current executive must maintain trust during the transition, because employees fear losing jobs.
Anna reviews each aspect of the plan, while Tom meets the board.
The company hopes to obtain investment before the market changes, although the deadline is close.
The prime factory needs maintenance although production continues.
Tom explains which aspect of the plan carries the greatest risk.
The executive promises to maintain service for every customer.
Anna finds an investment proposal that supports the prime project.
The board obtains approval after reviewing the maintenance budget.
Tom checks the executive timetable when the transition begins.
The company maintains its standards despite the uncertain market if investors agree.
Anna records the aspect that investors consider most important.
The board accepts the investment, so the prime project continues.
Tom and Anna leave after the executive signs the plan.
The company maintains confidence during the long-term transition despite uncertainty.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为准备管理层变动的公司提供建议。
董事会想为核心项目获得新的投资。
现任高管必须在过渡期间保持信任。
汤姆会见董事会时，安娜审查计划的每个方面。
公司希望在市场变化前获得投资。
虽然生产仍在继续，核心工厂需要维护。
汤姆解释计划的哪个方面风险最大。
高管承诺为每位客户保持服务。
安娜找到一份支持核心项目的投资提案。
董事会审查维护预算后获得批准。
过渡开始时，汤姆检查高管时间表。
尽管市场不确定，公司仍保持标准。
安娜记录投资者认为最重要的方面。
董事会接受投资，所以核心项目继续。
高管签署计划后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
公司在长期过渡期间保持信心。

title: 工业研究院的重组
sentences: Tom and Anna visit an industrial institution facing a major change, while researchers wait for the decision.
The chairman presents a plan for the entire research campus, so every department can plan.
A former factory assumes the institution will close its oldest unit, although the factory has not closed yet.
Anna reviews the appropriate files, while Tom tours the workshops.
The chairman says the industrial programme needs new equipment, because the new unit must meet standards.
The institution must assume responsibility for the entire project.
Tom finds an appropriate use for an empty production hall when the factory closes.
The chairman asks workers to discuss the industrial plan openly, so they can respond.
Anna checks whether the institution can support the new unit.
The entire board visits the workshop after the first meeting.
Tom explains why the former factory cannot assume the full cost.
The chairman proposes appropriate training for the workers because the new unit needs skills.
The institution accepts the plan although the change is difficult.
Anna records the industrial timetable before the board votes.
The chairman approves the plan, so the new unit can open when training ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the institution announces the decision.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参观一个面临重大变化的工业机构。
主席提出整个研究园区的计划。
一家旧工厂认为该机构会关闭最老的部门。
汤姆参观车间时，安娜查看合适的文件。
主席说工业项目需要新设备。
该机构必须为整个项目承担责任。
汤姆为一个空生产大厅找到合适的用途。
主席请工人公开讨论工业计划。
安娜检查该机构是否能支持新部门。
第一次会议后，整个董事会参观了车间。
汤姆解释旧工厂为什么不能承担全部费用。
主席为工人提出合适的培训。
虽然变化很困难，机构仍接受了计划。
董事会投票前，安娜记录工业时间表。
主席批准计划，所以新部门可以开放。
机构宣布决定后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 委员会的审判提案
sentences: Tom and Anna review a commission proposal about a public trial, while the commission checks the schedule.
The procedure requires evidence from every affected sector, so witnesses can prepare.
A difficult circumstance delays the commission's first meeting, although the legal team has warned them.
Anna studies the proposal, while Tom interviews a legal adviser.
The adviser explains how the procedure should protect witnesses, because several need protection.
The commission wants to propose a fair trial before summer.
Tom checks which sector can provide the missing evidence.
The circumstance becomes serious because the records are incomplete.
Anna revises the procedure after the adviser finds a legal gap.
The commission accepts the proposal although the trial will be public.
Tom contacts the affected sector when the hearing date changes.
The adviser says the procedure must remain transparent.
Anna records each circumstance in the commission file.
The proposal gains support, so the trial can proceed.
Tom and Anna leave after the commission confirms the procedure.
The legal adviser prepares witnesses carefully for the public trial before the first hearing begins in early summer.
translations: 汤姆和安娜审查委员会关于公开审判的提案。
程序要求每个受影响部门提供证据。
一个困难情况推迟了委员会的第一次会议。
汤姆采访法律顾问时，安娜研究提案。
顾问解释程序应该如何保护证人。
委员会想在夏天前提出公平审判方案。
汤姆检查哪个部门能提供缺失证据。
因为记录不完整，情况变得严重。
顾问发现法律漏洞后，安娜修改了程序。
虽然审判将公开进行，委员会仍接受了提案。
听证日期改变时，汤姆联系了受影响部门。
顾问说程序必须保持透明。
安娜把每种情况记录在委员会档案中。
提案获得支持，所以审判可以进行。
委员会确认程序后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
法律顾问为公开审判准备证人。

title: 学校事务的公开听证
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a hearing about an affair at a private school, while parents wait outside.
The head teacher must reveal how the school funds operate, so the committee can answer questions.
A parent makes an appeal on behalf of a worried pupil, and the pupil asks for help.
Anna reads the financial file, while Tom speaks with the head teacher.
The affair concerns a contract that failed to operate properly, because the school must explain it.
The committee asks the school to reveal every relevant payment.
Tom explains that the appeal should regard the pupil's welfare although the hearing is difficult.
The head teacher says the funds operate under strict rules.
Anna checks whether the affair affected other pupils.
The parent repeats the appeal when new evidence appears.
The committee reveals a missing payment after reviewing the file because the record is incomplete.
Tom says the school must regard transparency as essential.
The head teacher repairs the system so the funds operate correctly when the review ends.
Anna records the pupil's statement before the hearing ends, so the file is complete.
The appeal succeeds, and the committee reveals its decision.
Tom and Anna leave after the school publishes the report.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于私立学校一桩事务的听证会。
校长必须公开学校资金如何运作。
一位家长代表一名担忧的学生提出申诉。
汤姆与校长交谈时，安娜阅读财务文件。
这桩事务涉及一份未能正常运作的合同。
委员会要求学校公开每笔相关款项。
汤姆解释申诉应该考虑学生的福祉。
校长说资金按照严格规则运作。
安娜检查这桩事务是否影响其他学生。
新证据出现时，家长重复了申诉。
委员会审查文件后，公开了一笔缺失款项。
汤姆说学校必须把透明度视为重要原则。
校长修复系统，所以资金可以正常运作。
听证结束前，安娜记录了学生的陈述。
申诉成功了，委员会公开了决定。
学校发布报告后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 议会设施的改造
sentences: Tom and Anna assess a parliament facility before a public vote, while the committee reviews access plans.
The majority wants to enable access for disabled citizens, so the public vote can address the problem.
A tough budget limits the extent of the proposed renovation, because the current design is expensive.
Anna studies the facility map, while Tom interviews the architect.
The architect says the parliament must enable safe movement, if the entrance changes.
A majority of residents supports a wider entrance.
Tom explains the extent of the work before the committee meets.
The facility needs a tough safety review after the inspection.
Anna checks whether the plan can enable access without closing the hall.
The parliament accepts the majority proposal although the budget is tight.
Tom finds a facility that can host temporary meetings.
The architect reduces the extent of the renovation when costs rise.
Anna records the majority decision before the public vote.
The parliament enables the new entrance, so residents can enter safely.
Tom and Anna leave after the committee approves the facility plan.
The tough review continues beyond the first renovation stage.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在公开投票前评估一座议会设施。
多数人希望让残障公民能够进入。
一项艰难的预算限制了改造范围。
汤姆采访建筑师时，安娜研究设施地图。
建筑师说议会必须让人安全通行。
大多数居民支持更宽的入口。
委员会开会前，汤姆解释工程范围。
检查后，设施需要严格的安全审查。
安娜检查计划能否在不关闭大厅的情况下开放入口。
虽然预算紧张，议会仍接受多数提案。
汤姆找到一个能举办临时会议的设施。
费用上涨时，建筑师缩小了改造范围。
公开投票前，安娜记录了多数决定。
议会启用新入口，所以居民可以安全进入。
委员会批准设施计划后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
严格审查会持续到第一阶段改造之后。

title: 医院的公共健康计划
sentences: Tom and Anna join a hospital team studying cancer prevention, while nurses prepare the new programme.
The programme aims to extend health support across the district, so residents can receive advice.
A shortage of staff allows violence to arise in the waiting area, and the director calls security.
Anna checks the civil health records, while Tom speaks with the nurse.
The doctor says the programme can extend screening to every species of patient, before the service expands.
The hospital must address violence before it can extend the service.
Tom identifies why the conflict arose during the night shift.
Anna explains that civil support can reduce pressure on nurses.
The programme extends its cancer education after the first meeting.
A new rule prevents violence when patients wait outside.
The team studies how illness can arise in different communities if the data is complete.
Tom records the civil response because public trust is weak.
The hospital extends the programme although the budget remains limited.
Anna checks whether the cancer materials suit every species of patient.
Tom and Anna leave after the hospital adopts the new plan.
The civil team continues its work beyond the first district.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入研究癌症预防的医院团队。
项目的目标是把健康支持扩展到整个地区。
人员短缺让候诊区出现暴力。
汤姆和护士交谈时，安娜检查民事健康记录。
医生说项目可以把筛查扩展到每种患者。
医院必须处理暴力，才能扩展服务。
汤姆找出夜班期间冲突产生的原因。
安娜解释民事支持可以减轻护士压力。
第一次会议后，项目扩大了癌症教育。
新规则防止患者在外面等待时发生暴力。
团队研究疾病如何在不同社区出现。
因为公众信任很弱，汤姆记录了民事回应。
虽然预算仍有限，医院还是扩展了项目。
安娜检查癌症材料是否适合每种患者。
医院采用新计划后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
民事团队继续在第一个地区以外工作。

title: 地区预算辩论
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a district debate about a public budget, while the council reviews the latest figures.
A recent shot damaged the library during a security exercise, so the library needs repairs.
The council faces a threat to its cultural programme, and residents request more protection.
Anna reviews the budget, while Tom inspects the damaged district office.
The mayor says the threat requires a stronger security plan, because the danger has not ended.
A new requirement limits how the council can spend its funds.
Tom asks whether the budget can cover repairs after the shot.
The debate becomes difficult because the district has fewer resources.
Anna proposes a requirement for safer public buildings.
The council discusses the threat before approving a proposal because the budget is limited.
Tom records the shot report while Anna checks the budget figures.
The mayor says the requirement will apply across the district when repairs finish.
The debate continues although the threat has not returned.
The council approves a budget for repairs, so the library can reopen.
Tom and Anna leave after the district debate ends.
The new security requirement becomes part of the public policy.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于公共预算的地区辩论。
一次最近的射击在安全演练中损坏了图书馆。
委员会的文化项目面临威胁。
汤姆检查受损的地区办公室时，安娜审查预算。
市长说这个威胁需要更强的安全计划。
一项新要求限制委员会使用资金的方式。
汤姆询问预算能否在射击后支付修理费用。
因为地区资源更少，辩论变得困难。
安娜提出一项让公共建筑更安全的要求。
委员会在批准提案前讨论威胁。
安娜检查预算数据时，汤姆记录射击报告。
市长说这项要求会在整个地区适用。
虽然威胁没有回来，辩论仍继续。
委员会批准修理预算，所以图书馆可以重新开放。
地区辩论结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
新的安全要求成为公共政策的一部分。

title: 国际援助代表团
sentences: Tom and Anna join a mission delivering aid to a remote city, while local volunteers prepare supplies.
A senior citizen explains the concept of local recovery, so the city can organize its response.
The opposition blocks the main road before the team arrives, although the mission has not arrived.
Anna checks the mission plan, while Tom contacts a senior officer.
The officer says the aid must reach every citizen, because every package must be tracked.
The mission adopts a concept based on local cooperation.
Tom asks the opposition to open a safe route for aid.
A senior volunteer describes the city's most urgent needs.
Anna distributes aid after the opposition agrees to a pause.
The concept gains support because citizens cooperate if the route remains open.
Tom records which citizen receives each package because the mission needs proof.
The mission provides aid although the road remains dangerous.
The senior officer confirms that the plan protects the team.
Anna explains the concept to the opposition before leaving.
The mission reaches its goal, so the city can recover.
Tom and Anna leave after the senior volunteers thank them.
translations: 汤姆和安娜加入向偏远城市运送援助的代表团。
一位年长公民解释当地恢复的概念。
代表团到达前，反对派堵住了主路。
汤姆联系高级官员时，安娜检查任务计划。
官员说援助必须到达每位公民。
代表团采用基于当地合作的概念。
汤姆请反对派为援助打开一条安全路线。
一位高级志愿者描述城市最紧急的需求。
反对派同意暂停后，安娜分发援助。
因为公民合作，这个概念获得支持。
汤姆记录每个公民收到的包裹。
虽然道路仍危险，代表团继续提供援助。
高级官员确认计划保护团队。
离开前，安娜向反对派解释这个概念。
代表团达到目标，所以城市可以恢复。
高级志愿者感谢他们后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 研究会议的关键发言
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a research conference for medical participants, while researchers discuss patient safety.
A critical speaker asks the audience to recall an earlier study, so the audience asks for evidence.
One participant presents evidence that could gain public trust, although the report is incomplete.
Anna checks the conference programme, while Tom watches the speaker.
The speaker says the critical question concerns patient safety, before the question is answered.
A participant must recall the exact date before answering.
Tom explains how the study can gain support from hospitals.
The critical audience begins to stare when the evidence changes.
Anna records each participant's response during the debate.
The speaker recalls a second study after checking the archive.
Tom says the evidence is critical although the sample is small.
The participant fully gains confidence when the hospitals respond.
Anna asks the speaker to fully recall the final conclusion if possible.
The audience stops to stare after the evidence is explained.
The conference gains attention, so more participants join.
Tom and Anna leave after the critical session ends after a successful discussion.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加医学研究会议。
一位批判性的演讲者请听众回忆早期研究。
一位参与者展示可能赢得公众信任的证据。
汤姆观看演讲者时，安娜检查会议日程。
演讲者说关键问题涉及患者安全。
参与者在回答前必须回忆确切日期。
汤姆解释研究如何赢得医院支持。
证据发生变化时，批判性的听众开始凝视。
安娜在辩论期间记录每位参与者的回答。
演讲者查看档案后回忆起第二项研究。
虽然样本很小，汤姆说证据很关键。
医院回应后，参与者获得了信心。
安娜请演讲者回忆最终结论。
证据解释清楚后，听众停止凝视。
会议获得关注，所以更多参与者加入。
关键环节结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 校园罢工与自由
sentences: Tom and Anna investigate a strike at a university campus, while organisers prepare a statement.
The student union wants to protect academic freedom, so students can discuss it.
A failure in the heating system changes the protest schedule, and the union delays the protest.
Anna checks the campus status, while Tom speaks with the organisers.
The organisers say students may strike if negotiations fail, before the strike begins.
The university must adopt a fair process before the strike begins.
Tom explains that freedom depends on responsible conduct.
Anna records the status of every lecture affected by the failure.
The union can adopt a revised schedule when the heating returns; otherwise, the strike continues.
The strike continues although the university offers a meeting.
Tom says the failure should not remove students' freedom.
The organisers conduct a vote before adopting the final plan.
Anna checks the campus status because the protest remains peaceful.
The university adopts the plan, so the strike ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the student union confirms the agreement.
The new process protects freedom during future disputes; otherwise, conflict may return.
translations: 汤姆和安娜调查大学校园的一次罢工。
学生会想保护学术自由。
供暖系统故障改变了抗议日程。
汤姆和组织者交谈时，安娜检查校园状态。
组织者说如果谈判失败，学生可能罢工。
罢工开始前，大学必须采用公平程序。
汤姆解释自由取决于负责任的行为。
安娜记录受故障影响的每堂课状态。
供暖恢复后，学生会采用了修改后的日程。
虽然大学提出会面，罢工仍在继续。
汤姆说故障不应该夺走学生的自由。
组织者在采用最终计划前进行投票。
因为抗议保持和平，安娜检查校园状态。
大学采用计划，所以罢工结束了。
学生会确认协议后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
新程序保护未来争议中的自由。

title: 联赛调查
sentences: Tom and Anna conduct an investigation for a regional sports league, while officials prepare interviews.
A dozen players report a conflict about team selection, so the league opens a review.
The league asks officials to trust the evidence rather than rumours, because the players are angry.
Anna reviews the conduct rules, while Tom interviews the players.
The investigation must protect every player from unfair treatment, before the final decision.
The officials conduct separate interviews before reaching a decision.
Tom says trust will return if the league publishes its findings.
A conflict appears when one coach changes the selection list.
Anna records a dozen statements in the investigation file.
The league reviews whether the conduct followed its rules.
Tom explains that the evidence can resolve the conflict.
The officials trust Anna's report because the interviews agree.
The league conducts a final meeting although the players remain angry.
The investigation confirms that the selection was fair.
The players trust the league again, so the season continues.
Tom and Anna leave after the league publishes the report before the next regional match begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为一个地区体育联赛进行调查。
十二名球员报告了关于球队选拔的冲突。
联赛请官员相信证据而不是谣言。
汤姆采访球员时，安娜审查行为规则。
调查必须保护每位球员免受不公平对待。
官员在做决定前分别进行采访。
汤姆说如果联赛公布结果，信任会回来。
一位教练改变选拔名单时，冲突出现了。
安娜在调查档案中记录了十二份陈述。

汤姆解释证据可以解决冲突。
因为采访结果一致，官员相信安娜的报告。
虽然球员仍然生气，联赛还是进行了最后会议。
调查确认选拔是公平的。
球员再次信任联赛，所以赛季继续。
联赛发布报告后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 危机时期的社区贡献
sentences: Tom and Anna organise an annual meeting during a local crisis, while volunteers sort supplies.
The mayor asks every association to make a contribution, so families can receive food.
A shortage of food creates a serious crisis in the region, and the mayor calls for help.
Anna checks the annual figures, while Tom visits the storage centre.
The association presents a vision for sharing supplies fairly, because every resident is affected.
A local associate offers a contribution after the crisis begins.
Tom explains how the annual plan can support every resident.
The mayor says the association's presence will reassure families.
Anna records each contribution before the meeting continues.
The vision gains support because several businesses cooperate.
Tom checks whether the crisis has affected the annual budget if costs rise.
The associate increases its presence in remote neighbourhoods.
Anna describes the contribution while the mayor updates the plan.
The crisis eases when the association distributes food.
The mayor accepts the vision, so the annual programme continues.
Tom and Anna leave after the association thanks the volunteers after the food distribution ends successfully.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在当地危机期间组织年度会议。
市长请每个协会作出贡献。
食物短缺在该地区造成严重危机。
汤姆参观储存中心时，安娜检查年度数据。
协会提出公平分享物资的愿景。
危机开始后，一家当地企业提供了贡献。
汤姆解释年度计划如何支持每位居民。
市长说协会的存在会让家庭安心。
会议继续时，安娜记录每项贡献。
因为几家企业合作，愿景获得了支持。
汤姆检查危机是否影响年度预算。
协会扩大了在偏远社区的存在。
市长更新计划时，安娜描述这项贡献。
协会分发食物后，危机缓和了。
市长接受愿景，所以年度项目继续。
协会感谢志愿者后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 大师的保护课程
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a master class on wildlife protection, while the centre prepares a rescue.
A master explains how to handle a rare animal safely, so the team follows each step.
The relevant equipment is apparently missing from the centre, and the rescue must continue.
Anna checks the protection plan, while Tom searches the storage room.
The master says the equipment can handle difficult conditions, although the road is rough.
The centre must protect the animal before nightfall.
Tom finds a relatively small container beside the old cages.
Anna explains why the missing equipment is relevant to the rescue.
The master handles the animal after the vet arrives, so the rescue begins.
The protection team works carefully although the animal is frightened.
Tom checks whether the container can handle the journey if the road is rough.
The relevant report is apparently hidden under the master schedule.
Anna records the protection steps before the animal is moved.
The centre protects the animal, so the rescue succeeds.
Tom and Anna leave after the master thanks the team.
The relatively simple plan becomes a model for future rescues when training begins.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加野生动物保护大师课。
一位大师解释如何安全处理稀有动物。
相关设备显然不在中心里。
汤姆搜索储藏室时，安娜检查保护计划。
大师说设备可以应对困难情况。
中心必须在夜幕降临前保护动物。
汤姆在旧笼子旁找到一个相对较小的容器。
安娜解释缺失设备为什么与救援有关。
兽医到达后，大师处理了动物。
虽然动物很害怕，保护团队仍然小心工作。
汤姆检查容器是否能承受旅程。
相关报告显然藏在大师日程下面。

中心保护了动物，所以救援成功。
大师感谢团队后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这个相对简单的计划成为未来救援的范例。

title: 地区评估会议
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a regional assessment of a housing project, while residents prepare questions.
The committee asks residents for serious consideration of the plan, so the hearing can begin.
A new building begins to emerge near the regional station, and local traffic increases.
Anna reviews the assessment, while Tom speaks with a local resident.
The resident can deny that the project will improve the neighbourhood, because the plan is unclear.
The committee considers whether the regional plan is affordable.
Tom explains which assessment measures the project's impact.
A second proposal can emerge after residents raise concerns.
Anna records each consideration before the public hearing.
The resident can deny the proposal can protect local housing.
The committee completes its assessment although several figures are missing.
Tom checks the regional figures when the developer responds, so the assessment improves.
Anna says careful consideration can improve the final plan.
The committee accepts a revised proposal, so construction can continue.
Tom and Anna leave after the resident receives a written response.
The regional assessment remains open for future consideration in the coming months.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加一项住房项目的地区评估。
委员会请居民认真考虑这项计划。
一栋新楼开始在地区车站附近出现。
汤姆和当地居民交谈时，安娜审查评估。
居民否认项目会改善社区。
委员会考虑地区计划是否负担得起。
汤姆解释哪项评估衡量项目影响。
居民提出担忧后，第二份提案出现了。
公开听证前，安娜记录每项考虑。
居民否认提案可以保护当地住房。
虽然缺少几项数据，委员会仍完成评估。
开发商回应时，汤姆检查地区数据。
安娜说仔细考虑可以改善最终计划。
委员会接受修改后的提案，所以建设可以继续。
居民收到书面答复后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
地区评估仍然开放，供未来考虑。

title: 庄园的司法听证
sentences: Tom and Anna observe a hearing about a disputed estate, while villagers wait outside.
The judge asks whether the potential owner is willing to settle, so the hearing can continue.
A claim about justice has divided the local community, and both families want answers.
Anna reviews the estate documents, while Tom watches the witnesses.
The judge says the evidence may observe a long-standing boundary, before the court decides.
The owner is willing to settle if the survey is accurate.
Tom explains the potential effect on neighbouring families.
Anna observes a second map after the first one is challenged.
The court considers whether justice requires a new boundary.
The owner offers to settle the dispute before the final hearing.
Tom checks the estate records although several pages are missing.
The judge observes that the potential loss would affect the village.
Anna records the evidence because the justice claim remains serious.
The parties settle after the court accepts the second map.
Tom and Anna leave when the estate hearing ends.
The settlement protects the village from a longer dispute in the village.
translations: 汤姆和安娜旁听一场关于有争议庄园的听证会。
法官询问潜在的所有者是否愿意和解。
一项关于正义的主张分裂了当地社区。
汤姆观看证人时，安娜审查庄园文件。
法官说证据可能显示一个长期存在的边界。
如果测量准确，所有者愿意和解。
汤姆解释对邻近家庭的潜在影响。
第一张地图受到质疑后，安娜观察第二张地图。
法院考虑正义是否要求新的边界。
最终听证前，所有者提出解决争议。
虽然几页缺失，汤姆仍检查庄园记录。
法官指出潜在损失会影响村庄。
因为正义主张仍然严重，安娜记录了证据。
法院接受第二张地图后，双方达成和解。
庄园听证结束时，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这项和解保护村庄免受更长期的争议。

title: 地区领导力计划
sentences: Tom and Anna assess a leadership programme for regional schools, while principals compare results.
The director proposes additional training for new principals, so each school can improve.
Each school must contribute staff time to the objective, because the programme needs support.
Anna reviews the leadership data, while Tom visits a rural school.
The director says the programme is largely funded by local grants, although costs are rising.
A principal can propose an additional session for parents.
Tom explains how leadership can contribute to student safety.
The objective becomes clearer when schools share their records.
Anna checks whether the additional training is largely practical.
The director contributes a second proposal after the teachers respond.
Tom says the leadership plan should support every school.
The rural principal can propose a timetable although resources are limited.
The programme contributes to the objective because teachers cooperate.
Anna records the additional costs before the board votes.
The board approves the plan, so leadership training begins across the region next term with strong local support teams.
Tom and Anna leave after the director thanks the schools.
translations: 汤姆和安娜评估一个面向地区学校的领导力项目。
主任提出为新校长增加培训。
每所学校必须为目标贡献员工时间。
汤姆参观乡村学校时，安娜审查领导力数据。
主任说项目主要由当地拨款资助。
一位校长提出为家长增加一次课程。
汤姆解释领导力如何促进学生安全。
学校分享记录后，目标变得更加清楚。
安娜检查额外培训是否主要是实践性的。
教师回应后，主任贡献了第二份提案。
汤姆说领导力计划应该支持每所学校。
虽然资源有限，乡村校长仍提出了时间表。
因为教师合作，项目促进了目标。
董事会投票前，安娜记录了额外费用。
董事会批准计划，所以领导力培训开始了。
主任感谢学校后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 研究者的信念
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a research lecture about public faith, while students prepare questions.
A critic questions the scientist's confidence in the new theory, so the room becomes tense.
The speaker presents a commitment to open scientific debate, although the evidence is limited.
Anna checks the lecture notes, while Tom records the volume level.
The scientist says faith in evidence should not replace testing, because results must be repeated.
The critic insists that confidence requires a larger sample.
Tom explains how the commitment supports honest research.
The speaker answers the critic nevertheless, although the room is tense.
Anna observes a rise in the volume of questions.
The scientist repeats the commitment after reviewing new data.
The critic gains confidence when the method is explained.
Tom says faith can guide a question but cannot prove it.
The audience nevertheless remains while the lecture continues although the volume becomes difficult.
Anna records the final confidence statement before the debate ends.
The audience accepts the commitment, so the discussion remains open.
Tom and Anna leave after the research lecture after the final question.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加关于公众信念的研究讲座。
一位批评家质疑科学家对新理论的信心。
演讲者展示了参与公开科学辩论的承诺。
汤姆记录音量时，安娜检查讲座笔记。
科学家说对证据的信念不能替代测试。
批评家坚持信心需要更大的样本。
汤姆解释承诺如何支持诚实研究。
虽然房间紧张，演讲者仍然回答批评家。
安娜观察到问题音量增加。
查看新数据后，科学家重复了这项承诺。
方法解释清楚后，批评家获得了信心。
汤姆说信念可以引导问题，却不能证明问题。
虽然音量变得难以承受，讲座仍继续。
辩论结束前，安娜记录最后的信心声明。
听众接受了这项承诺，所以讨论保持开放。
研究讲座结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。

title: 家庭安全调查
sentences: Tom and Anna conduct an investigation into domestic safety, while residents report problems.
A researcher can insist that the survey must engage every household, so the results are useful.
A faulty alarm can threaten residents during the night, and the agency receives complaints.
Anna checks the administration file, while Tom visits the agency.
The agency must demonstrate that its warning system works entirely, before repairs are approved.
The administration can insist on a complete inspection before repairs.
Tom explains how the faulty alarm can threaten domestic workers entirely.
Anna engages a senior engineer to test the alarm.
The engineer can demonstrate the fault after the alarm sounds.
The agency repairs the system although the procedure is expensive.
Tom checks whether the administration can engage local residents.
The threat decreases when every household receives a warning.
Anna records the demonstration before the final report.
The agency ensures protection, so the investigation can close if the report is accepted.
Tom and Anna leave after the administration publishes its findings.
The domestic safety programme engages residents in future reviews during the next review.
translations: 汤姆和安娜调查家庭安全问题。
研究员坚持调查必须让每个家庭参与。
夜间有故障的警报威胁居民。
汤姆访问机构时，安娜检查行政文件。
机构必须证明警报系统有效。
行政部门坚持在修理前进行完整检查。
汤姆解释威胁如何影响家庭工人。
安娜请一位高级工程师测试警报。
警报响起后，工程师演示了故障。
虽然程序很昂贵，机构还是修好了系统。
汤姆检查行政部门是否能让当地居民参与。
每个家庭收到警告后，威胁降低了。
最终报告前，安娜记录了演示。
机构确保了保护，所以调查可以结束。
行政部门发布调查结果后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
家庭安全项目让居民参与未来审查。

title: 工资规定的改革
sentences: Tom and Anna review a broad wage regulation for factory workers, while unions prepare comments.
The minister announces a grant for companies that improve conditions, so employers can respond.
Workers request relief because the actual wage is too low, and families face higher costs.
Anna reads the regulation, while Tom interviews the labour association.
The minister says the grant should support broad reform, although the budget is limited.
The association demands a higher wage before accepting the proposal.
Tom explains the actual cost of living in the region.
Anna checks whether the regulation covers temporary workers.
The minister grants relief after the association presents evidence.
The broad proposal includes training and safer equipment.
Tom says the wage must rise although the market is weak.
The association reviews the actual figures before the vote if the minister requests them.
Anna records the grant while the minister answers questions.
The regulation passes, so workers receive immediate relief.
Tom and Anna leave after the labour meeting ends.
The broad reform changes how companies report their wages after the next annual meeting in June.
translations: 汤姆和安娜审查一项面向工厂工人的广泛工资规定。
部长宣布向改善条件的公司提供拨款。
因为实际工资太低，工人请求缓解。
汤姆采访劳动协会时，安娜阅读规定。
部长说拨款应该支持广泛改革。
协会在接受提案前要求更高工资。
汤姆解释该地区的实际生活成本。
安娜检查规定是否涵盖临时工人。
协会提交证据后，部长批准了缓解措施。
广泛提案包括培训和更安全的设备。
虽然市场疲弱，汤姆说工资必须提高。
协会在投票前审查实际数据。
部长回答问题时，安娜记录拨款。
规定通过了，所以工人立即得到缓解。
劳动会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
广泛改革改变了公司报告工资的方式。

title: 工程项目的启动会议
sentences: When the town announced the launch of a bridge, the construction site was already disputed.
The council needed to acquire farmland for the approach road, but farmers feared losing river access.
The first planning session ended without an agreement.
Tom and Anna attended the next session after reading the first meeting's notes.
Instead, an internal report revealed that the engineers had measured traffic although they had not spoken to the residents.
From the engineers' perspective, the shortest route was the safest.
From the farmers' perspective, it would cut through the only path to their fields.
Anna studied the internal map and asked everyone to walk the route together.
The walk changed the conversation because the riverbank was also the villagers' only access to their crops.
The council could acquire an unused strip beside the old railway if its owner agreed, and the construction team could keep the farm road open.
It was a longer route, but it would serve the whole village.
At the final session, the manager presented the revised plan before the vote.
The launch would be delayed by several months, but the delay gave residents time to prepare.
When construction finally began, several farmers brought coffee to the workers.
Tom watched them from the riverbank and realized that a successful bridge was more than a structure across water.
It was also a promise that the people on both sides had been heard.
translations: 小镇宣布启动一座桥时，施工地点已经引发争议。
委员会需要征用农田修建引道，但农民担心会失去通往河边的路。
第一次规划会议没有达成协议。
汤姆和安娜参加第二次会议，本以为这会是一场技术讨论。
然而，一份内部报告显示，工程师测量了交通情况，却没有听取居民的意见。
从工程师的角度看，最短的路线最安全。
但从农民的角度看，这条路线会穿过他们通往农田的唯一道路。
安娜要求查看内部地图，然后提议大家一起走一遍计划中的路线。
这次实地查看改变了讨论，因为河岸也是村民前往庄稼地的唯一通道。
委员会可以征用旧铁路旁一条废弃的土地，同时让施工团队保留农路。
这条路线虽然更长，却能服务整个村庄。
在最后一次会议上，经理展示了修改后的计划。
项目启动会推迟几个月，但这段时间也让居民能够提前做好准备。
施工最终开始时，几位农民带着咖啡来慰问工人。
汤姆站在河岸边看着他们，意识到一座成功的桥不仅是横跨河流的建筑。
它也是一个承诺：桥两边的人都真正被听见了。

title: 住房纪律听证
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a hearing about housing discipline in the city, while tenants wait for answers.
The council wants to retain affordable homes for residents, so families can remain together.
An increasingly serious dispute threatens several families, because repairs have been delayed.
Anna studies the housing records, while Tom speaks with the tenants.
The landlord says the moral rules are difficult to enforce, although the council has offered help.
The council must retain discipline although the dispute is emotional.
Tom explains why the tenants call the building hell.
Anna checks an increasingly long list of complaints.
The council proposes discipline for landlords who ignore repairs.
The landlord agrees to retain the housing after mediation.
Tom records the moral concerns before the hearing resumes, while tenants call the building hell.
The dispute becomes calmer when the council offers support.
Anna says the increasingly strict plan protects families if repairs continue.
The landlord accepts the discipline, so the tenants can stay.
Tom and Anna leave after the housing hearing ends.
The council retains a moral commitment to safe homes for all residents.
translations: 汤姆和安娜参加城市住房纪律听证会。
委员会想为居民保留负担得起的住房。
一场日益严重的争议威胁几个家庭。
汤姆和租客交谈时，安娜研究住房记录。
房东说道德规则很难执行。
虽然争议很情绪化，委员会仍必须保持纪律。
汤姆解释租客为什么称这栋楼为地狱。
安娜检查越来越长的投诉清单。
委员会提议对忽略修理的房东实施纪律。
调解后，房东同意保留住房。
听证恢复前，汤姆记录道德方面的担忧。
委员会提供支持后，争议平静下来。
安娜说日益严格的计划保护家庭。
房东接受纪律，所以租客可以留下。
住房听证结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
委员会保留了对安全住房的道德承诺。

title: 比赛胜利的贷款审查
sentences: Tom and Anna assess a sports club after its unexpected victory, while supporters celebrate nearby.
The club requests a loan to improve the training ground, so younger players can practise.
A finding shows that the club has limited financial capacity, because recent costs were high.
Anna reviews the assessment, while Tom interviews the coach.
The coach says the victory could attract new supporters, although the budget remains tight.
The bank will assess the loan before making a decision.
Tom finds a limited budget in the club's financial report.
Anna checks whether the victory can improve the club's capacity.
The coach can grab a finding from the old training records.
The bank offers a smaller loan because the budget is limited.
Tom assesses the proposal after the club explains its plans although the budget is limited.
Anna records the finding while the coach gathers evidence.
The club can grab new opportunities if the loan is approved.
The bank approves the loan, so the training ground can improve.
Tom and Anna leave after the assessment meeting ends.
The victory gives the club a stronger financial perspective.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在体育俱乐部意外获胜后进行评估。
俱乐部申请贷款改善训练场。
一项发现显示俱乐部的财务能力有限。
汤姆采访教练时，安娜审查评估。
教练说胜利可能吸引新的支持者。
银行会在决定前评估贷款。
汤姆在俱乐部财务报告中找到有限预算。
安娜检查胜利能否提高俱乐部能力。
教练从旧训练记录中抓出一项发现。
因为预算有限，银行提供了较小的贷款。
俱乐部解释计划后，汤姆评估了提案。
教练收集证据时，安娜记录了发现。
如果贷款获批，俱乐部可以抓住新机会。
银行批准贷款，所以训练场可以改善。
评估会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这场胜利给俱乐部带来了更强的财务视角。

title: 养老金与公共财政
sentences: Tom and Anna review a pension proposal for a regional council, while residents prepare questions.
A conservative group questions the capacity of the public fund, so the council requests evidence.
The finance office says costs vary between rural and urban areas, because services differ.
Anna studies the pension figures, while Tom interviews residents.
The council may impose a new contribution on higher incomes, although the proposal is controversial.
A conservative adviser says the fund must retain public trust.
Tom explains why capacity differs across the region.
Anna checks how finance costs vary during an economic crisis.
The council proposes a pension review before it can impose new fees.
The adviser says the conservative plan protects current savings.
Tom records residents' concerns although the figures are complex.
The finance office varies its forecast when new data arrives.
Anna says the pension capacity can support the region if costs fall.
The council delays the fee, so residents can review the proposal.
Tom and Anna leave after the finance hearing ends.
The pension review remains open to different public views during the next session.
translations: 汤姆和安娜审查地区委员会的养老金提案。
一个保守派团体质疑公共基金的能力。
财政办公室说农村和城市的成本不同。
汤姆采访居民时，安娜研究养老金数据。
委员会可能对高收入征收新的贡献。
一位保守派顾问说基金必须保留公众信任。
汤姆解释该地区不同地方的能力为何不同。
安娜检查经济危机期间财政成本如何变化。
委员会计划在征收新费用前审查养老金。
顾问说保守方案保护当前储蓄。
虽然数据复杂，汤姆仍记录居民的担忧。
新数据到达后，财政办公室改变了预测。
安娜说如果成本下降，养老金能力可以支持该地区。
委员会推迟费用，所以居民可以审查提案。
财政听证结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
养老金审查仍然开放，接受不同的公众观点。

title: 乡村医疗检查
sentences: Tom and Anna conduct an initial examination at a rural clinic, while residents wait nearby.
A doctor explains how rural residents lean on the clinic, so transport is essential.
The clinic lacks staff, whereas the regional hospital is crowded, and patients face delays.
Anna reviews the examination records, while Tom interviews residents.
The doctor can declare that the initial plan needs more funding, because the clinic is understaffed.
A rural nurse says patients lean on regular transport.
Tom compares the rural clinic with the regional hospital.
The examination reveals a shortage of emergency beds although the clinic is prepared.
Anna can declare that the shortage affects the initial schedule.
The doctor proposes a mobile service whereas the hospital expands.
Tom records residents' needs before the examination ends.
The regional office reviews the plan when the data arrives.
Anna says the rural clinic can improve if transport is funded.
The office declares a new service, so patients receive support.
Tom and Anna leave after the initial examination.
The rural plan remains connected to the regional hospital for future services this year.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在乡村诊所进行初步检查。
医生解释乡村居民如何依靠诊所。
诊所缺少员工，而地区医院很拥挤。
汤姆采访居民时，安娜审查检查记录。
医生宣布初步计划需要更多资金。
乡村护士说患者依靠定期交通。
汤姆比较乡村诊所和地区医院。
检查揭示急救床位短缺。
安娜宣布短缺影响初步日程。
医院扩建时，医生提出流动服务。
检查结束前，汤姆记录居民需求。
数据到达后，地区办公室审查计划。
安娜说如果交通得到资助，乡村诊所可以改善。
办公室宣布新服务，所以患者得到支持。
初步检查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
乡村计划仍然与地区医院相连。

title: 机场安全审查
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect an aircraft after it lands at the regional airport, while staff prepare the gate.
The airport needs a reasonable plan for a busy holiday period, so managers review every shift.
A recent offence has raised concerns about security around the runway, and passengers want answers.
Anna reads a detailed report, while Tom checks the aircraft records.
The manager says a reduction in staff caused the weak concentration on safety, because workers were tired.
Tom explains that the offence could affect public confidence.
The team makes a reasonable reduction in flights because the runway is crowded.
Anna prepares a detailed schedule before the next aircraft arrives.
The manager asks for concentration when workers inspect every gate.
Tom finds that the aircraft followed a reasonable route although the weather changed.
Anna reports the offence to the airport board after checking the cameras.
The board approves a reduction in night flights if security remains weak.
Tom gives a detailed explanation so the team can improve concentration.
The aircraft leaves safely when the new checks are complete.
Tom and Anna leave after the airport confirms the reasonable plan.
The reduction gives the airport time to prevent another offence.
translations: 飞机降落在地区机场后，汤姆和安娜检查飞机。
机场需要为繁忙的假期制定合理计划。
最近的一起违法事件引发了人们对跑道周围安全的担忧。
汤姆检查飞机记录时，安娜阅读详细报告。
经理说员工减少导致对安全的注意力不足。
汤姆解释这起违法事件可能影响公众信心。
因为跑道拥挤，团队合理减少了航班数量。
下一架飞机到达前，安娜准备了详细日程。
经理要求工人检查每个登机口时保持专注。
尽管天气改变，汤姆发现飞机走了合理路线。
检查摄像头后，安娜向机场董事会报告了违法事件。
如果安全仍然薄弱，董事会就批准减少夜间航班。
汤姆给出详细解释，所以团队可以提高注意力。
新检查完成后，飞机安全离开了。
机场确认合理计划后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
减少航班给机场时间防止再次发生违法事件。

title: 城市公司的搬迁
sentences: Tom and Anna review an overall plan for a corporate move, while directors examine the schedule.
The company wants to transfer its office to an urban district, so workers can share facilities.
Public criticism surrounds the plan because traffic is already heavy, and residents fear more delays.
Anna studies the corporate budget, while Tom walks around the urban site.

The artist doubts whether the team is capable of moving the large painting, because it is fragile.
Anna studies the landscape, while Tom checks the gallery entrance.
The curator says the creation needs a calm tone for the main hall, although the opening is soon.
Tom explains that the elderly artist remains capable despite her age.
The team prepares a grand frame after measuring the gallery wall.
Anna adjusts the tone before the visitors arrive.
The artist says the landscape can show a capable city although it looks quiet.
Tom records the creation while the curator tests the lights.
The gallery will display the grand painting if the frame is secure.
Anna says the elderly artist's tone changes when she recalls the city.
The landscape gives the main hall a capable and welcoming character.
The curator displays the creation, so the gallery can open on time.
Tom and Anna leave after the grand opening ends.
The elderly artist sees her landscape become a lasting creation.
translations: 汤姆和安娜来到大画廊审查一幅城市景观画。
画廊想展出一位老年艺术家的新作品。
艺术家怀疑团队是否有能力搬动这幅大画。
汤姆检查画廊入口时，安娜研究景观画。
策展人说作品需要适合大厅的平静色调。
汤姆解释尽管年纪大，这位艺术家仍然有能力。
测量画廊墙壁后，团队准备了一个大画框。
参观者到来前，安娜调整了色调。
艺术家说尽管城市看起来安静，景观画仍能展现有能力的城市。
策展人测试灯光时，汤姆记录作品情况。
如果画框牢固，画廊就会展出这幅大画。
安娜说艺术家回忆城市时，色调会发生变化。
景观画让大厅拥有了能干而温暖的气质。
策展人展出作品，所以画廊可以按时开放。
盛大开幕结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这位老年艺术家看着自己的景观画成为持久作品。

title: 革命展览的历史推进
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare an exhibition about a revolution in a city museum, while staff check the cases.
The museum wants to advance a public discussion of the event, so schools can visit.
An external review finds a tear in the map near an old tank, and the curator requests repairs.
Anna reads a brief account, while Tom repairs the exhibition case.
The curator says the revolution changed the city's history, although some records are missing.
Tom explains how the external evidence can advance the discussion.
The team moves the tank after checking the floor strength.
Anna writes a brief label before the next school group arrives.
The curator says the tear could damage the map although the case is dry.
Tom compares the revolution records with external letters.
The museum will advance the opening if the repair is complete.
Anna records the tank's history while Tom checks the lighting.
The brief guide explains how the revolution affected ordinary families when visitors ask.
The museum opens the exhibition, so the public discussion can advance.
Tom and Anna leave after the opening session ends.
The repaired map makes the revolution easier to understand.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在城市博物馆准备关于一场革命的展览。
博物馆想推动公众讨论这场事件。
外部审查发现旧坦克旁的地图有一道裂口。
汤姆修复展柜时，安娜阅读一份简短记载。
策展人说这场革命改变了城市历史。
汤姆解释外部证据如何推动讨论。
检查地板承重后，团队移动了坦克。
下一批学校参观者到来前，安娜写了简短标签。
尽管展柜很干，策展人说裂口可能损坏地图。
汤姆把革命记录与外部信件进行比较。
如果修复完成，博物馆就会提前开放。
汤姆检查灯光时，安娜记录坦克的历史。
简短指南解释革命如何影响普通家庭。
博物馆开放了展览，所以公众讨论可以继续推进。
开幕活动结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
修复后的地图让革命更容易理解。

title: 汽车工厂的合作协议
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a motor factory after a dispute over its origin, while workers await a decision.
The workers want to build a bond with the new management, so talks can continue.
A union leader accuses the company of ignoring worker expectations, because shifts remain unsafe.
Anna studies the motor records, while Tom meets the union leader.
The manager says the disagreement is somewhat larger than expected, although both sides want peace.
Tom explains how the factory's origin affects its current identity.
The company offers a bond program after the workers present their concerns.
Anna asks the manager to respect the expectation of safe shifts.
The union can accuse the company again if the motor line remains unsafe.
Tom records the origin story although several details are uncertain.
The manager cannot accuse workers before the next meeting.
Anna compares the expectation list with the factory's somewhat strict safety rules.
The workers accept the bond proposal when the company repairs the motor line.
The union withdraws its accusation, so the factory can reopen.
Tom and Anna leave after the origin review ends.
The new bond gives workers a stronger expectation of respect.
translations: 一场关于起源的争议后，汤姆和安娜检查汽车工厂。
工人想与新管理层建立联系。
工会领袖指责公司忽视工人的期望。
汤姆会见工会领袖时，安娜研究汽车记录。
经理说分歧比预想的稍微大一些。
汤姆解释工厂起源如何影响当前身份。
工人提出担忧后，公司提供了合作计划。
安娜要求经理尊重安全轮班的期望。
如果汽车生产线仍不安全，工会会再次指责公司。
尽管几个细节不确定，汤姆仍记录了起源故事。
经理不能在下次会议前指责工人。
安娜把期望清单与工厂有些严格的安全规则进行比较。
公司修好汽车生产线后，工人接受了合作提案。
工会撤回指责，所以工厂可以重新开放。
起源审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
新的合作让工人对得到尊重有了更强期望。

title: 严重事故的法院陪审
sentences: Tom and Anna accompany a lawyer to court after a severe accident, while the witness waits nearby.
The lawyer needs to cite the main evidence before the hearing, so the case can proceed.
A minor witness has constant pain and cannot attend the first session, because travel is unsafe.
Anna reviews the expense records, while Tom speaks with the lawyer.
The judge says the severe injury requires careful support, although the hearing is soon.
Tom explains why the minor detail may affect the case.
The lawyer will accompany the witness after arranging medical transport.
Anna asks the court to limit the expense of repeated travel.
The witness can cite the constant noise that preceded the accident.
Tom records the severe damage although the report is incomplete.
The judge says the minor point is important before the verdict when the evidence is reviewed.
Anna checks whether the lawyer can cite the medical evidence.
The court reduces the expense if the witness gives a recorded statement.
The lawyer cites the evidence, so the hearing can continue fairly.
Tom and Anna leave after they accompany the witness outside.
The final record shows how constant care can reduce severe harm.
translations: 一次严重事故后，汤姆和安娜陪同律师去法院。
听证前，律师需要引用主要证据。
一名未成年证人持续疼痛，无法参加第一次庭审。
汤姆与律师交谈时，安娜审查费用记录。
法官说严重伤势需要谨慎支持。
汤姆解释这个小细节可能影响案件。
安排医疗交通后，律师会陪同证人。
安娜要求法院限制反复出行的费用。
证人可以引用事故前持续存在的噪声。
尽管报告不完整，汤姆仍记录了严重损害。
法官说判决前这个小问题很重要。
安娜检查律师是否可以引用医疗证据。
如果证人提供录音陈述，法院就减少费用。
律师引用了证据，所以听证可以公平继续。
陪同证人到外面后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
最终记录显示持续照护如何减少严重伤害。

title: 当代艺术核心展
sentences: Tom and Anna plan a vast contemporary art exhibition, while artists prepare their work.
The museum wants to protect the core of a new public program, so visitors can participate.
Several artists oppose the plan because the gallery has limited space, and tensions rise.
Anna studies the multiple proposals, while Tom measures the main hall.
The director says the core idea must remain open to visitors, although the schedule is tight.
Tom explains how contemporary work can reach a vast audience.
The artists oppose one display after the safety team raises concerns.
Anna selects multiple rooms before the museum closes for repairs.
The director says the program can continue although the schedule is tight.
Tom records the core concerns when the artists return.
The museum will present contemporary art afterwards if the rooms pass inspection.
Anna checks the vast entrance while Tom revises the visitor route.
The director resolves the multiple problems afterwards.
The museum opens the exhibition, so the core program can continue.
Tom and Anna leave after the contemporary opening ends.
The vast exhibition gives opposing artists a shared public space.
translations: 汤姆和安娜策划一场大型当代艺术展。
博物馆想保护新公共项目的核心。
几位艺术家反对这个计划，因为画廊空间有限。
汤姆测量主展厅时，安娜研究多份提案。
主任说核心理念必须继续向参观者开放。
汤姆解释当代作品如何触及广泛观众。
安全团队提出担忧后，艺术家反对其中一件展示。
博物馆关闭维修前，安娜选了多个房间。
尽管日程紧张，主任说项目仍能继续。
艺术家回来时，汤姆记录核心问题。
如果房间通过检查，博物馆就会展出当代艺术。
汤姆修改参观路线时，安娜检查宽阔入口。
之后，主任解决了多个问题。
博物馆开放了展览，所以核心项目可以继续。
当代艺术开幕结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
大型展览给反对的艺术家提供了共同的公共空间。

title: 快速审判的证人
sentences: Tom and Anna rush to court after a witness requests help, while security clears the entrance.
The lawyer wants to justify a permanent protection order, so the witness can remain safe.
The witness must leave rapidly because the threat is still serious, and the lawyer calls the judge.
Anna reads the case file, while Tom speaks with the witness.
The judge asks the lawyer to emphasize the immediate danger, although the room is crowded.
Tom explains why the witness cannot rush into another decision.
The lawyer prepares a permanent address after checking the records.
Anna asks the court to justify the cost before the hearing begins.
The witness moves rapidly when the security team opens the door.

The judge approves protection, so the witness can leave safely.
The lawyer justifies the order after presenting the final evidence.
Tom and Anna leave after the witness reaches the safe car.
The permanent order gives the witness time to recover from the rush.

汤姆与证人交谈时，安娜阅读案件文件。

汤姆解释证人不能仓促作出另一个决定。
检查记录后，律师准备了一个永久地址。
听证开始前，安娜要求法院说明费用理由。
安全团队打开门时，证人迅速移动。
尽管走廊很安静，汤姆仍记录了这次匆忙。
如果保护令受到挑战，律师会强调危险。
汤姆在外面等待时，安娜检查永久计划。
法官批准保护，所以证人可以安全离开。
提出最终证据后，律师为命令提供了理由。
证人到达安全汽车后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
永久命令给证人时间从这次匆忙中恢复。

title: 风暴后的通信恢复
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a massive storm's damage to the coastal network, while residents wait for news.
The emergency team needs a cable to connect the island via radio, so messages can continue.
A rapid decline in power exposes a crucial weakness in the system, and several villages go dark.
Anna checks the cable map, while Tom visits the damaged station.
The manager says the massive waves may delay the repair, although the team is ready.
Tom explains how the decline in power could expose more villages.
The crew carries a new cable after the storm begins to decline.
Anna asks the team to expose the broken line before nightfall.
The crucial station works via a temporary generator although fuel is limited.
Tom records the massive damage while Anna contacts the island.
The team will repair the cable if the water level continues to decline.
The manager says the crucial route can expose the weakest areas when the team maps them.
The island receives power, so the rapid decline finally stops.
The crew exposes the broken cable and completes the repair.
Tom and Anna leave after the coastal network returns.
The restored cable gives the island a crucial link to the mainland.
translations: 汤姆和安娜检查大风暴对沿海网络造成的损害。

电力迅速下降暴露出系统中的关键弱点。
汤姆参观受损站点时，安娜检查电缆地图。
经理说巨浪可能推迟维修。

风暴开始减弱后，团队带来了一条新电缆。
安娜要求团队在夜幕降临前找出断线。
尽管燃料有限，关键站点仍通过临时发电机工作。
安娜联系岛屿时，汤姆记录大面积损害。
如果水位继续下降，团队就会修理电缆。
经理说关键路线可以暴露最薄弱的地区。
岛屿恢复供电，所以快速下降终于停止。
团队找出断裂电缆并完成维修。
沿海网络恢复后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
修复后的电缆给岛屿提供了与大陆的关键连接。

title: 剧院内部改造
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect the inner hall of an old theater, while actors wait outside.
The director needs to permit a fundamental repair before opening night, so the cast can rehearse.
A lower balcony blocks the audience's view and can dominate the design, because it is too large.
Anna studies the inner structure, while Tom meets the theater engineer.
The engineer says the cast cannot rehearse until the lower level is safe, although time is short.
Tom explains how the balcony came to dominate the hall.
The director asks the council to permit a new entrance after the inspection.
Anna checks the fundamental support before workers remove the lower seats.
The cast rehearses an inner scene although the stage remains crowded.

The council will permit the repair if the theater protects the audience.
Anna says the lower wall can support the new plan.
The cast returns when the inner hall is clear.
The director approves the repair, so the lower balcony no longer dominates.
Tom and Anna leave after the theater review ends.
The fundamental change gives the cast a safer stage.
translations: 汤姆和安娜检查老剧院的内部大厅。

检查后，主任请求委员会允许设置新入口。
工人拆除较低座位前，安娜检查基础支撑。
尽管舞台仍然拥挤，演员排练了一个内部场景。
工程师测试阳台时，汤姆记录设计问题。
如果剧院保护观众，委员会就会允许维修。
安娜说较低的墙可以支撑新计划。
内部大厅清空后，演员回来了。
主任批准了维修，所以较低阳台不再主导大厅。
剧院审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这项根本改变给演员提供了更安全的舞台。

title: 旧厂房的施工许可
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect an old factory before applying for a licence, while workers wait outside.
The council wants to construct a public workshop on the site, so the town needs approval.
An unknown fault may force the owners to abandon the project, because the walls are weak.
Anna studies the licence rules, while Tom checks the factory walls.
The engineer says the fault could affect the construction plan, although repairs are possible.
Tom explains why the council cannot abandon the workshop yet.
The team finds an unknown pipe after opening the floor.
Anna prepares a licence request before the council meeting.
The builders construct a safe frame although the site remains difficult.
Tom can wrap the pipe while the engineer records the fault.
However, the council will abandon the old design if the pipe blocks the entrance.
Anna says the unknown risk can be managed with a new licence.
The team constructs a second entrance, so the workshop can continue.
The council approves the licence after the engineer signs the report.
Tom and Anna leave after the construction review ends.
The licence allows the town to wrap the old factory in a safer future.
translations: 申请许可证前，汤姆和安娜检查旧工厂。

汤姆检查工厂墙壁时，安娜研究许可证规定。

汤姆解释委员会还不能放弃工坊。
打开地面后，团队发现一根未知管道。
委员会会议前，安娜准备许可证申请。
尽管场地仍然困难，工人还是建造了安全框架。
工程师记录故障时，汤姆包住了管道。
如果管道挡住入口，委员会就会放弃旧设计。
安娜说有了新许可证就能管理未知风险。
团队建造了第二个入口，所以工坊可以继续。
工程师签署报告后，委员会批准了许可证。
施工审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
许可证让小镇可以把旧工厂包进更安全的未来。

title: 剧院排练的证词
sentences: Tom and Anna attend a preparation meeting before a theater performance, while actors rehearse nearby.
The director wants to interpret a spiritual tale for young visitors, so the story must be clear.
A loud scream makes the actors suspect that the old building is unsafe, and rehearsals stop.
Anna checks the preparation list, while Tom searches the backstage rooms.
The director says the performance should not dismiss the audience's fears, although the sound is unexplained.
Tom explains how the actors can interpret the spiritual scene carefully.
The engineer dismisses the first alarm after checking the pipes.
Anna asks the director to suspect no one before the inspection ends.
A second scream occurs when a heavy door moves in the wind.
Tom records the preparation steps although the actors are nervous.
The director will interpret the tale if the stage becomes secure.
Anna says the spiritual theme can dismiss the audience's fear when explained.
The engineer confirms that the building is safe, so the actors can rehearse.
The director completes preparation and opens the doors.
Tom and Anna leave after the performance ends.
The interpreted tale turns the unknown scream into a shared lesson.
translations: 剧院演出前，汤姆和安娜参加准备会议。

一声响亮尖叫让演员怀疑旧建筑不安全。
汤姆搜索后台房间时，安娜检查准备清单。

汤姆解释演员如何谨慎地诠释精神场景。
检查管道后，工程师排除了第一次警报。
安娜要求导演在检查结束前不要怀疑任何人。
一扇沉重的门被风吹动时，第二声尖叫出现了。
尽管演员紧张，汤姆仍记录了准备步骤。
如果舞台变得安全，导演就会诠释这个故事。
安娜说解释清楚后，精神主题可以消除观众的恐惧。
工程师确认建筑安全，所以演员可以排练。
导演完成准备并打开了大门。
演出结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
被诠释的故事把未知的尖叫变成了共同课程。

title: 宇宙实验的改变
sentences: Tom and Anna watch a dramatic launch at a university observatory, while researchers monitor the screens.
The team wants to study how the universe can alter its shape, so the launch must be measured.
A deep error may drag the mission away from its planned path, and the team pauses the test.
Anna checks the launch data, while Tom speaks with the scientist.
The scientist says the universe can possess forces that remain unknown, although the signal is useful.
Tom explains how a small change can alter the entire experiment.
The team finds a dramatic signal after the first test begins.
Anna adjusts the model before the signal can drag the mission off course.
The scientist says the error is deeply connected to the old data.
However, Tom records the forces that the universe appears to possess.
The team will alter the launch if the signal becomes dangerous.
Anna says the dramatic result can change how researchers view space.
The model corrects the path, so the mission can continue safely.
The scientist confirms that the universe has revealed a new pattern when the data is complete.
Tom and Anna leave after the observatory meeting ends.
The deeply changed model gives the team a more careful view of the universe.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在大学天文台观看戏剧性的发射。

汤姆与科学家交谈时，安娜检查发射数据。
科学家说宇宙拥有仍然未知的力量。
汤姆解释一个小改变如何改变整个实验。
第一次测试开始后，团队发现了一个戏剧性信号。
信号把任务拖离路线前，安娜调整了模型。
科学家说这个错误与旧数据有深层联系。
汤姆记录宇宙似乎拥有的力量。
如果信号变得危险，团队就会改变发射计划。
安娜说这个戏剧性结果可能改变研究人员看待太空的方式。

科学家确认宇宙揭示了一个新模式。
天文台会议结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
深度改变后的模型让团队更谨慎地观察宇宙。

title: 诊所资金会议
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare an agenda for a community clinic meeting, while staff arrange the room.
The clinic needs funding to purchase new therapy equipment, so patients can receive care.
A shortfall threatens the visual treatment room and its patients, because the old machine is failing.
Anna reviews the agenda, while Tom visits the therapy room.
The director says every inch of space must serve the patients, although the room is crowded.
Tom explains why funding is vital before the clinic expands.
The team prepares a visual plan after measuring each room.
Anna asks the council to purchase a smaller therapy machine.

安娜说反对的人值得一个清晰答案。
光线消失了，所以团队可以安全返回。
检查湖泊后，向导揭示了自然原因。
神秘调查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
这个解释让沮丧的小镇恢复了更热闹的气氛。

title: 电影类型的治疗故事
sentences: Tom and Anna review a shocked audience's response to a new film, while the director studies the notes.
The director wants to create an enthusiastic comedy about a cure, so the message stays hopeful.
A deliberate decoration makes the genre confusing for the viewers, because it changes the tone.
Anna studies the genre, while Tom interviews the shocked audience.
The director says the film should not offend people seeking help, although the joke is popular.
Tom explains how the cure story can remain humorous and respectful.
The team removes the decoration after collecting feedback.
Anna edits the trailer before the next screening.
The audience becomes enthusiastic although the genre remains unusual.
However, Tom records the deliberate choice while the director revises the scene.
The film can cure confusion if the introduction explains the genre.
Anna says the humorous scene should encourage, not offend, viewers.
The trailer improves, so the audience can understand the story.
The director praises the team after the final screening.
Tom and Anna leave after the film review ends.
The revised cure story gives the shocked audience a warmer ending.
translations: 汤姆和安娜审查观众对新电影感到震惊的反应。
导演想制作一部关于治疗的热情喜剧。
一项故意的装饰让观众困惑电影类型。
汤姆采访受惊观众时，安娜研究电影类型。
导演说电影不应该冒犯寻求帮助的人。
汤姆解释治疗故事如何保持幽默和尊重。
收集反馈后，团队移除了装饰。
下一次放映前，安娜编辑了预告片。
尽管类型仍然特别，观众变得很有热情。
导演修改场景时，汤姆记录了这个故意选择。
如果介绍解释电影类型，电影就能消除困惑。
安娜说幽默场景应该鼓励观众，而不是冒犯他们。
预告片有所改善，所以观众可以理解故事。
最后放映后，导演赞扬了团队。
电影审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
修改后的治疗故事给受惊观众带来了更温暖的结局。

title: 实验室安全训练
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a laboratory after a rubber seal breaks, while the supervisor clears the room.
The supervisor wants workers to obey every safety rule, so the training is repeated.
An unconscious worker has touched a harmful chemical, and the nurse calls for help.
Anna checks the rubber equipment, while Tom calls the nurse.
The supervisor says the chemical can offend the skin and lungs, although the worker is recovering.
Tom explains why workers must obey the emergency command.
The nurse treats the worker after removing the damaged seal.
Anna asks the supervisor to repeat the safety training.
The unconscious worker wakes although the team remains deeply worried.
However, Tom records the harmful substance while the nurse checks that it does not offend the skin again.
The lab can multiply its safety checks if the supervisor approves.
Anna says no worker should feel ashamed after an accident.
The supervisor obeys the safety report and can multiply the checks, so the lab can reopen.
The nurse confirms that the worker is safe and not ashamed when the examination ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the laboratory review ends.
The new training reduces the chance of another harmful mistake.
translations: 橡胶密封圈破裂后，汤姆和安娜检查实验室。
主管想让工人遵守每条安全规定。
一名失去意识的工人接触了有害化学品。
汤姆呼叫护士时，安娜检查橡胶设备。
主管说化学品可能伤害皮肤和肺部。
汤姆解释工人为什么必须遵守紧急指令。
移除损坏密封圈后，护士救治了工人。
安娜要求主管重复安全培训。
工人醒来了，尽管团队仍然非常担忧。
护士检查房间时，汤姆记录有害物质。
如果主管批准，实验室就能增加安全检查次数。
安娜说事故后工人不应该感到羞愧。
主管遵守了安全报告，所以实验室可以重新开放。
检查后，护士确认工人已经安全。
实验室审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
新的培训降低了再次发生有害错误的可能性。

title: 弯曲道路的交通计划
sentences: Tom and Anna inspect a curved road after a harmful traffic accident, while drivers wait nearby.
The council wants a matching plan for signs and speed limits, so the road can reopen.
A confusing warning has left drivers depressed and created a depressing mood, because the curve is dangerous.
Anna checks the road map, while Tom measures the outer curve.
The engineer says the accident was caused by a downwards slope, although the sign was unclear.
Tom explains how a matching sign can prevent further harm.
The team installs a clear warning after closing the road.
Anna asks the council to modify the confusing message.
The traffic becomes calmer although the curve remains steep.
However, Tom records the harmful conditions while workers paint the curved line.
The council can match the signs if drivers provide feedback.
Anna says the downward slope points downwards wherever the road bends.
The new signs work, so the road can reopen.
The engineer confirms the matching plan when the final test ends.
Tom and Anna leave after the traffic review ends.
The modified signs give drivers a less depressing journey.
translations: 一次有害交通事故后，汤姆和安娜检查弯曲道路。
委员会想为标志和限速制定匹配计划。
一个令人困惑的警告让司机沮丧又不确定。
汤姆测量外侧弯道时，安娜检查道路地图。
工程师说事故是由向下的坡度造成的。
汤姆解释匹配的标志如何防止进一步伤害。
关闭道路后，团队安装了清晰警告。
安娜要求委员会修改令人困惑的信息。
尽管弯道仍然陡峭，交通变得更平静。
工人粉刷线路时，汤姆记录有害状况。
如果司机提供反馈，委员会就能匹配标志。
安娜说道路无论在哪里弯曲，都应该标出向下坡度。
新标志起效了，所以道路可以重新开放。
最后一次测试后，工程师确认了匹配计划。
交通审查结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
修改后的标志给司机带来了不那么令人沮丧的旅程。

title: 记者的诚实采访
sentences: Tom and Anna prepare a sincere interview with a local writer, while the editor reviews the schedule.
The editor wants to publish an article about the writer's intended project, so every fact matters.
An impatient reporter makes a dishonest claim about the interview, because one source is unclear.
Anna checks the pointed questions, while Tom speaks with the writer.
The editor says the humorous story must remain respectful, although the subject is sensitive.
Tom explains why sincere questions can reveal the writer's intention.
The writer edits a pointed answer after reviewing the article draft.
Anna asks the reporter to correct the dishonest claim.
The interview becomes humorous although the opening is tense.
However, Tom records the intended message while the editor checks each fact.
The article can remain sincere if every source is clear.
Anna says the impatient reporter should wait before responding.
The editor approves the article, so the interview can be published.
The writer confirms the intended meaning after reading the final text.
Tom and Anna leave after the interview ends.
The sincere article turns a dishonest claim into a useful correction.
translations: 汤姆和安娜准备采访一位当地作家的真诚访谈。
编辑想发表一篇关于作家预定项目的文章。
一名不耐烦的记者对采访提出了不诚实的说法。
汤姆与作家交谈时，安娜检查尖锐问题。
编辑说幽默故事必须保持尊重。
汤姆解释真诚问题如何揭示作家的意图。
审查文章草稿后，作家修改了一个尖锐回答。
安娜要求记者纠正不诚实说法。
尽管开场紧张，采访仍变得幽默。
编辑检查每项事实时，汤姆记录预定信息。
如果每个来源都清楚，文章就能保持真诚。
安娜说不耐烦的记者应该在回应前等待。
编辑批准了文章，所以采访可以发表。
读完最终文本后，作家确认了预定含义。
采访结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
真诚文章把不诚实说法变成了有用的更正。

title: 折叠展台的改造
sentences: Tom and Anna design a folding display for a small community fair, while workers clear the room.
The organizer wants to make the stand significantly easier to move, so volunteers can help.
A narrow doorway makes the first display difficult to carry, because the frame is too wide.
Anna measures the doorway, while Tom studies the folding frame.
The organizer says the new design must welcome every visitor, although the budget is limited.
Tom explains why folding panels can save space during transport.
The team builds a folding frame after testing the hinges.
Anna checks the measurements before the fair opens.
The display becomes significantly lighter although the frame is strong.
However, Tom records the folding steps while workers paint the panels.
The organizer can move the stand if the panels fold smoothly.
Anna says the significantly smaller package will fit the doorway.
The stand opens, so visitors can enter the fair.
The organizer approves the folding design after the final test.
Tom and Anna leave after the community fair ends.
The significantly improved display gives the small fair a welcoming center.
translations: 汤姆和安娜为小型社区集市设计折叠展示台。
组织者想让展台明显更容易移动。
狭窄门口让第一种展示很难搬运。
汤姆研究折叠框架时，安娜测量门口。
组织者说新设计必须欢迎每位访客。
汤姆解释折叠面板如何在运输时节省空间。
测试铰链后，团队制作了折叠框架。
集市开放前，安娜检查测量结果。
尽管框架很坚固，展示台仍明显变轻。
工人给面板上漆时，汤姆记录折叠步骤。
如果面板顺利折叠，组织者就能移动展台。
安娜说明显更小的包装可以放进门口。
展台打开了，所以访客可以进入集市。
最后测试后，组织者批准了折叠设计。
社区集市结束后，汤姆和安娜离开了。
明显改进的展示给小集市带来了温暖中心。
